<h3>Data flow</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>steps</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Receive terminal input</td>
<td><code>EventBroker</code> in <code>tui.rs</code> normalizes crossterm events to <code>TuiEvent</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Update app status</td>
<td><code>app.rs</code> centralizes keystrokes and session events on the <code>AppEvent</code> bus</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>transcript calculation</td>
<td><code>ChatWidget</code> maintains committed cell and in-flight active cell</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Cell Rendering</td>
<td><code>history_cell.rs</code> creates a <code>HistoryCell</code> trait implementation for each item type</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Bottom input processing</td>
<td><code>BottomPane</code> manages popups, mentions, and approvals with the <code>BottomPaneView</code> stack</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>streaming commit</td>
<td><code>streaming/*</code> achieves readable output speed with adaptive chunking policy</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>Overlay·Popup component details</h2>
<h3>Pager Overlay (<code>pager_overlay.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>There are two types of <code>Overlay</code> enums.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/pager_overlay.rs
pub(crate) enum Overlay {
    Transcript(TranscriptOverlay),
    Static(StaticOverlay),
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>TranscriptOverlay</code> is a full transcript viewer opened with <code>Ctrl+T</code>. In addition to the committed cell list, the live tail of the currently streaming active cell is updated based on the cache key. The cache key is a combination of terminal width, active cell revision, stream-continuation flag, and animation tick.</p>
<p><code>StaticOverlay</code> displays a list of arbitrary <code>Line</code> or <code>Renderable</code> as a static page. It is used in auxiliary screens such as model information screen and debug view.</p>
<h3>Approval Overlay (<code>bottom_pane/approval_overlay.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>This is a modal that receives user approval when the agent attempts to run a tool, request permission, apply a patch, or elicit MCP.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/bottom_pane/approval_overlay.rs
pub(crate) enum ApprovalRequest {
    Exec { thread_id, id, command, reason, available_decisions, .. },
    Permissions { thread_id, call_id, reason, permissions, .. },
    ApplyPatch { thread_id, id, reason, cwd, changes, .. },
    McpElicitation { thread_id, server_name, request_id, message, .. },
}
</code></pre>
<p>Each variant tracks which agent thread the request is from through <code>thread_id</code>. The UI includes Bash command highlighting, diff summary, and permission profile display.</p>
<h3>Command Popup (<code>bottom_pane/command_popup.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>This is an autocomplete pop-up that opens when you type <code>/</code> slash. Shows a combined list of built-in <code>SlashCommand</code> and user-defined <code>CustomPrompt</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/bottom_pane/command_popup.rs
pub(crate) enum CommandItem {
    Builtin(SlashCommand),
    UserPrompt(usize),  // prompts 벡터 인덱스
}
</code></pre>
<p>Among built-ins, alias commands (<code>quit</code> → <code>exit</code>, <code>approvals</code> → <code>permissions</code>) are hidden from the default list. With <code>CommandPopupFlags</code>, displayed items vary depending on feature flags such as collaboration modes, connectors, plugins, and realtime.</p>
<h3>Skill Popup (<code>bottom_pane/skill_popup.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>This is a skill mention pop-up that opens when you type <code>@</code>. Filter the <code>MentionItem</code> list by fuzzy match.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/bottom_pane/skill_popup.rs
pub(crate) struct MentionItem {
    pub display_name: String,
    pub description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub insert_text: String,
    pub search_terms: Vec&#x3C;String>,
    pub path: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub category_tag: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub sort_rank: u8,
}
</code></pre>
<p>Sort in the following order: <code>sort_rank</code> → fuzzy score → display_name, and cut and display with <code>MAX_POPUP_ROWS</code>. Render the <code>Enter to insert / Esc to close</code> hint at the bottom.</p>
<h3>File Search Popup (<code>bottom_pane/file_search_popup.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>This is a file search pop-up that opens when a file is mentioned in the form <code>@filename</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/bottom_pane/file_search_popup.rs
pub(crate) struct FileSearchPopup {
    display_query: String,
    pending_query: String,
    waiting: bool,
    matches: Vec&#x3C;FileMatch>,
    state: ScrollState,
}
</code></pre>
<p>By separating <code>pending_query</code> and <code>display_query</code>, existing results are reliably displayed even while the search is in-flight. Stale results are discarded by query comparison in <code>set_matches</code>.</p>
<h3>Request User Input Overlay (<code>bottom_pane/request_user_input/</code>)</h3>
<p>This is a form overlay that appears when the MCP server or agent requests structured input from the user. It consists of three files.</p>
<pre><code>bottom_pane/request_user_input/
├── mod.rs     — 상태 머신 (Focus::Options / Focus::Notes, 질문별 답안)
├── layout.rs  — 적응형 레이아웃 계산 (LayoutSections, LayoutPlan)
└── render.rs  — Renderable 구현, 커서 위치, unanswered 확인 다이얼로그
</code></pre>
<p>Core operations:</p>
<ul>
<li>Combine option selection + free text (notes) input for each question</li>
<li>When you type while in option focus, it automatically switches to notes focus.</li>
<li>Press Enter to proceed to next question, submit in full on last question</li>
<li>If there are unanswered questions, a confirmation dialog will appear: <code>"Submit with unanswered questions?"</code></li>
</ul>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/bottom_pane/request_user_input/mod.rs
enum Focus { Options, Notes }
</code></pre>
<p>The layout adaptively distributes the progress → question → options → notes → footer area according to the available height. Divide the cases into <code>layout_with_options</code> and <code>layout_without_options</code>.</p>
<h3>Model Catalog / Selection</h3>
<p><code>tui/src/model_catalog.rs</code> (or the same file in <code>tui_app_server</code>) manages the model list and collaboration mode presets.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/model_catalog.rs (tui_app_server 내)
pub(crate) struct ModelCatalog {
    models: Vec&#x3C;ModelPreset>,
    collaboration_modes_config: CollaborationModesConfig,
}
</code></pre>
<p>When executing the <code>/model</code> slash command, it is converted to a <code>SelectionItem</code> list and displayed in <code>ListSelectionView</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Streaming pipeline details</h2>
<h3>Architecture Overview</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    D["LLM delta"] --> SC["MarkdownStreamCollector"]
    SC -->|"newline-gated&#x3C;br/>commit"| Q["StreamState.queued_lines&#x3C;br/>(VecDeque&#x26;lt;QueuedLine&#x26;gt;)"]
    Q --> P["AdaptiveChunkingPolicy&#x3C;br/>Smooth / CatchUp"]
    P -->|DrainPlan| CT["commit_tick&#x3C;br/>run_commit_tick()"]
    CT --> HC["HistoryCell emission&#x3C;br/>AgentMessageCell"]

    style P fill:#ffd,stroke:#333
</code></pre>
<h3>StreamState (<code>streaming/mod.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>This is the basic structure of all streaming states. Owns a newline-gated markdown collection and a FIFO queue.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/streaming/mod.rs
struct QueuedLine {
    line: Line&#x3C;'static>,
    enqueued_at: Instant,
}

pub(crate) struct StreamState {
    pub collector: MarkdownStreamCollector,
    queued_lines: VecDeque&#x3C;QueuedLine>,
    pub has_seen_delta: bool,
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>enqueued_at</code> timestamp tracks the "age" of queue pressure. <code>step()</code> takes one line, <code>drain_n(max)</code> takes up to max lines, and <code>drain_all()</code> takes the entire line from the front of the queue.</p>
<h3>StreamController / PlanStreamController (<code>streaming/controller.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>Two controllers wrap <code>StreamState</code> and set <code>HistoryCell</code> emission rules.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/streaming/controller.rs
pub(crate) struct StreamController {
    state: StreamState,
    finishing_after_drain: bool,
    header_emitted: bool,
}

pub(crate) struct PlanStreamController {
    state: StreamState,
    header_emitted: bool,
    top_padding_emitted: bool,
}
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>push(delta)</code>: Add delta to the collector. When a newline is included, the completed line is queued.</li>
<li><code>on_commit_tick()</code>: Drain one line and emit it as <code>AgentMessageCell</code></li>
<li><code>on_commit_tick_batch(max)</code>: Multi-line drain for adaptive catch-up.</li>
<li><code>finalize()</code>: Flush all remaining data and release it to the final cell.</li>
</ul>
<p><code>PlanStreamController</code> adds the <code>"• Proposed Plan"</code> header, <code>proposed_plan_style()</code> application, and padding management.</p>
<h3>Adaptive Chunking Policy (<code>streaming/chunking.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>A two-speed gear system controls the streaming display speed.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/streaming/chunking.rs
pub(crate) enum ChunkingMode {
    Smooth,   // 기본: tick당 1줄 드레인
    CatchUp,  // 큐 압력 높을 때: 전체 backlog 드레인
}

pub(crate) enum DrainPlan {
    Single,         // 1줄 방출
    Batch(usize),   // 최대 N줄 방출
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>constant</th>
<th>value</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>ENTER_QUEUE_DEPTH_LINES</code></td>
<td>8</td>
<td>Smooth→CatchUp transition cue depth</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>ENTER_OLDEST_AGE</code></td>
<td>120ms</td>
<td>Smooth→CatchUp transition cue age</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>EXIT_QUEUE_DEPTH_LINES</code></td>
<td>2</td>
<td>CatchUp→Smooth Start Queue Depth</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>EXIT_OLDEST_AGE</code></td>
<td>40ms</td>
<td>CatchUp→Smooth Start Q Age</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>EXIT_HOLD</code></td>
<td>250ms</td>
<td>Time required to maintain exit condition (hysteresis)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>REENTER_CATCH_UP_HOLD</code></td>
<td>250ms</td>
<td>Re-entry cooldown after CatchUp ends</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SEVERE_QUEUE_DEPTH_LINES</code></td>
<td>64</td>
<td>Severe backlog (ignore cooldown)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SEVERE_OLDEST_AGE</code></td>
<td>300ms</td>
<td>Severe backlog (ignore cooldown)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Hysteresis prevents frequent switching (gear-flapping) between Smooth↔CatchUp. Severe backlogs will ignore the cooldown and immediately re-enter CatchUp.</p>
<h3>Commit Tick Orchestration (<code>streaming/commit_tick.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>This is an adhesive module that connects the chunking policy to a specific controller drain.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/streaming/commit_tick.rs
pub(crate) fn run_commit_tick(
    policy: &#x26;mut AdaptiveChunkingPolicy,
    stream_controller: Option&#x3C;&#x26;mut StreamController>,
    plan_stream_controller: Option&#x3C;&#x26;mut PlanStreamController>,
    scope: CommitTickScope,
    now: Instant,
) -> CommitTickOutput { ... }
</code></pre>
<p>Flow: <code>stream_queue_snapshot()</code> → <code>resolve_chunking_plan()</code> → <code>apply_commit_tick_plan()</code></p>
<p>If you use <code>CommitTickScope::CatchUpOnly</code>, actual drain occurs only in CatchUp mode, and the rest returns as noop. In this way, we can separate the baseline tick and catch-up tick.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Terminal runtime details (<code>tui.rs</code>, <code>tui/event_stream.rs</code>)</h2>
<h3>EventBroker structure</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/tui/event_stream.rs
pub struct EventBroker&#x3C;S: EventSource = CrosstermEventSource> {
    state: Mutex&#x3C;EventBrokerState&#x3C;S>>,
    resume_events_tx: watch::Sender&#x3C;()>,
}

enum EventBrokerState&#x3C;S: EventSource> {
    Paused,     // crossterm EventStream dropped
    Start,      // 다음 poll 시 새 소스 생성
    Running(S), // 이벤트 소스 가동 중
}
</code></pre>
<p>When <code>EventBroker</code> shares a crossterm stream and passes stdin by calling an external editor, etc., drop→recreate is possible. When testing, replace it with <code>FakeEventSource</code>.</p>
<h3>Frame Scheduling</h3>
<p>Control the frame interval with the <code>TARGET_FRAME_INTERVAL</code> constant. If you issue a redraw request with <code>FrameRequester</code>, the TUI runtime will reflect it in the next frame.</p>
<hr>
<h2><code>tui_app_server</code> parallel implementation details</h2>
<p><code>codex-rs/tui_app_server/</code> is a parallel implementation that maintains almost the same UI code as <code>codex-rs/tui/</code> and replaces the session management layer with <code>AppServerClient</code> based.</p>
<h3>Structural differences</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>side</th>
<th><code>tui</code> (local)</th>
<th><code>tui_app_server</code></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Session Connection</td>
<td><code>InProcessAppServerClient</code></td>
<td><code>AppServerClient</code> (both remote/local available)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Certification</td>
<td><code>AuthManager</code>, directly owned by <code>CodexAuth</code></td>
<td>Delegation to server side</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Model list</td>
<td><code>ModelCatalog</code> in <code>model_catalog.rs</code></td>
<td><code>ModelListParams</code> RPC with <code>AppServerSession</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Config Management</td>
<td><code>ConfigBuilder</code> + <code>ConfigOverrides</code> directly</td>
<td>Query the server with the <code>ConfigLayerSource</code> protocol</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Thread Management</td>
<td><code>ThreadManager</code>, <code>ForkSnapshot</code> directly</td>
<td><code>ThreadStartParams/ThreadForkParams</code> RPC</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3><code>AppServerSession</code> (<code>tui_app_server/src/app_server_session.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>Wraps a JSON-RPC session with the server. Provides typed request methods for thread CRUD (start, fork, resume, rollback, interrupt), model list, account information, skill list, realtime audio, etc.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui_app_server/src/app_server_session.rs — 주요 import
use codex_app_server_client::AppServerClient;
use codex_app_server_protocol::{
    ThreadStartParams, ThreadForkParams, ThreadResumeParams,
    ThreadRollbackParams, TurnStartParams, TurnInterruptParams,
    ModelListParams, SkillsListParams, ...
};
</code></pre>
<h3>Shared code and branching points</h3>
<p>Both crates have most of the rendering code the same, including <code>bottom_pane/</code>, <code>chatwidget/</code>, <code>streaming/</code>, <code>pager_overlay.rs</code>, and <code>history_cell.rs</code> (copy source). The differences are mainly in the initialization/session connection part of <code>app.rs</code> and authentication/config loading. This structural redundancy becomes the main motivation for later common crate extraction.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Anatomy of ChatWidget — 9,707 lines of state machine</h2>
<p><code>chatwidget.rs</code> is the largest single file in Codex TUI. It consumes protocol events, configures history cells, and drives the transcript viewport and overlay UI.</p>
<h3>Core status fields</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chatwidget.rs — ChatWidget 구조체 (678–800행, 발췌)
pub(crate) struct ChatWidget {
    active_cell: Option&#x3C;Box&#x3C;dyn HistoryCell>>,  // 현재 스트리밍 중인 셀
    active_cell_revision: u64,                   // 캐시 무효화 카운터
    adaptive_chunking: AdaptiveChunkingPolicy,   // Smooth/CatchUp 정책
    stream_controller: Option&#x3C;StreamController>, // 스트림 라이프사이클
    agent_turn_running: bool,                    // 에이전트 턴 진행 중
    mcp_startup_status: Option&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;String, McpStartupStatus>>,
    running_commands: HashMap&#x3C;String, RunningCommand>,
    queued_user_messages: VecDeque&#x3C;UserMessage>,  // 턴 중 대기 메시지
    pending_steers: VecDeque&#x3C;PendingSteer>,       // 제출된 미확인 steer
    interrupts: InterruptManager,                 // 인터럽트 큐
    current_status: StatusIndicatorState,         // 현재 푸터 상태
    // ... 총 60+ 필드
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Event Mapping — 120+ EventMsg types</h3>
<p>ChatWidget directly matches 120+ types of <code>codex_protocol::protocol::EventMsg</code>. Main Categories:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Category</th>
<th>Representative event</th>
<th>processing</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>agent message</td>
<td><code>AgentMessageDelta</code>, <code>AgentMessage</code></td>
<td>active_cell update/commit</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Run</td>
<td><code>ExecCommandBegin/End/OutputDelta</code></td>
<td>RunningCommand tracking</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Approved</td>
<td><code>ApplyPatchApprovalRequest</code>, <code>ExecApprovalRequest</code></td>
<td>Create BottomPane Overlay</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>MCP</td>
<td><code>McpToolCallBegin/End</code>, <code>McpStartupUpdate/Complete</code></td>
<td>state machine transition</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Guardian</td>
<td><code>GuardianAssessment</code></td>
<td>Track pending review status</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Tokens/Limits</td>
<td><code>TokenUsage</code>, <code>RateLimitSnapshot</code></td>
<td>Warning threshold check</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>web search</td>
<td><code>WebSearchBegin/End</code></td>
<td>Create WebSearchCell</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>create image</td>
<td><code>ImageGenerationBegin/End</code></td>
<td>Separate cell tracking</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Keybinding adaptation based on terminal detection</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chatwidget.rs — queued_message_edit_binding_for_terminal (211–235행)
fn queued_message_edit_binding_for_terminal(terminal_info: TerminalInfo) -> KeyBinding {
    if matches!(terminal_info.multiplexer, Some(Multiplexer::Tmux { .. })) {
        return key_hint::shift(KeyCode::Left);  // tmux는 Alt+Up을 삼킨다
    }
    match terminal_info.name {
        AppleTerminal | WarpTerminal | VsCode => key_hint::shift(KeyCode::Left),
        Ghostty | Iterm2 | WezTerm | Kitty | Alacritty | Konsole
        | GnomeTerminal | Vte | WindowsTerminal | Dumb | Unknown
            => key_hint::alt(KeyCode::Up),
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Since <code>match</code> is <strong>exhaustive</strong>, adding a new <code>TerminalName</code> variant will cause a <strong>compilation error</strong>, forcing a binding decision.</p>
<h3>Rate Limit Alert State Machine</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chatwidget.rs — RateLimitWarningState (414–477행)
const RATE_LIMIT_WARNING_THRESHOLDS: [f64; 3] = [75.0, 90.0, 95.0];

struct RateLimitWarningState {
    secondary_index: usize,  // 주간 제한 임계값 인덱스
    primary_index: usize,    // 5시간 제한 임계값 인덱스
}

impl RateLimitWarningState {
    fn take_warnings(&#x26;mut self, secondary_pct: Option&#x3C;f64>, primary_pct: Option&#x3C;f64>) -> Vec&#x3C;String> {
        // 100%에 도달하면 경고 없음 (별도 UI로 전환)
        // 각 레벨(75/90/95)은 한 번만 경고, index 전진으로 재발 방지
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>It advances monotonically in the order 75% → 90% → 95%, and the same threshold warning is not repeated. When 100% is reached, a separate UI dedicated to the rate limit is activated instead of a warning.</p>
<h3>Guardian Review Status Tracking</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chatwidget.rs — PendingGuardianReviewStatus (598–664행)
struct PendingGuardianReviewStatus {
    entries: Vec&#x3C;PendingGuardianReviewStatusEntry>,
}

impl PendingGuardianReviewStatus {
    fn start_or_update(&#x26;mut self, id: String, detail: String);
    fn finish(&#x26;mut self, id: &#x26;str) -> bool;
    fn status_indicator_state(&#x26;self) -> Option&#x3C;StatusIndicatorState> {
        // 1개 리뷰: "Reviewing approval request" + 단일 상세
        // N개 리뷰: "Reviewing N approval requests" + 글머리 목록 (최대 3개 + "+N more")
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Guardian review status has its own tracking system, separate from the ChatWidget's <code>current_status</code>. When multiple reviews are running simultaneously, a summary UI is displayed in the footer.</p>
<hr>
<h2>ChatComposer input pipeline — 9,874 lines of state machine</h2>
<h3>Architecture Overview</h3>
<p>ChatComposer is a <strong>reusable input component</strong> whose behavior scope is controlled by <code>ChatComposerConfig</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chat_composer.rs — ChatComposerConfig (291–307행)
struct ChatComposerConfig {
    popups_enabled: bool,         // 슬래시/파일/스킬 팝업 허용
    slash_commands_enabled: bool, // /명령 파싱 활성화
    image_paste_enabled: bool,    // 이미지 경로 첨부 활성화
}

// 최소 프리셋: request_user_input 같은 단순 텍스트 입력에 사용
const fn plain_text() -> Self { /* 모두 false */ }
</code></pre>
<h3>Popup status — limit 1 at a time</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chat_composer.rs (431–436행)
enum ActivePopup {
    None,
    Command(CommandPopup),    // /슬래시 명령 자동완성
    File(FileSearchPopup),    // 파일 검색
    Skill(SkillPopup),        // @멘션 (스킬/플러그인/커넥터)
}
</code></pre>
<p>All key events go through <code>handle_key_event()</code>, and if there is an active popup, they are consumed first by the popup handler. After key processing, <code>sync_popups()</code> is called to automatically open or close the popup depending on the buffer/cursor state.</p>
<h3>Non-Bracketed Paste Burst Detection</h3>
<p>Some terminals, such as Windows, do not send the paste as bracketed paste, but as a quick <code>KeyCode::Char</code> sequence. The <code>PasteBurst</code> state machine detects this:</p>
<pre><code>ASCII 입력:
  첫 빠른 문자 → 홀드 (깜빡임 억제)
  → 후속 빠른 입력 확인 → paste-like로 판정 → handle_paste()로 라우팅

Non-ASCII (IME):
  첫 문자 → 즉시 삽입 (IME 입력 누락 방지)
  → 후속 감지는 여전히 동작 → retro-capture 경로
</code></pre>
<p>When <code>LARGE_PASTE_CHAR_THRESHOLD = 1000</code> characters are exceeded, the text is not inserted directly but replaced with a <code>[Pasted N chars]</code> placeholder and expanded upon submission.</p>
<h3>Voice Hold-to-Talk</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chat_composer.rs — VoiceState (324–341행)
struct VoiceState {
    transcription_enabled: bool,
    space_hold_started_at: Option&#x3C;Instant>,    // 스페이스 누른 시점
    space_hold_trigger: Option&#x3C;Arc&#x3C;AtomicBool>>,
    key_release_supported: bool,               // 터미널이 Release 이벤트 지원?
    space_hold_repeat_seen: bool,              // 반복 키 이벤트 감지됨?
}
</code></pre>
<p>In terminals that support KeyRelease, you can record while pressing the space button, and transcribe when you release it. On terminals that do not support KeyRelease, use repeated space key events as "still held" evidence, and end recording when the events are disconnected.</p>
<h3>InputResult — Submission path branch</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chat_composer.rs (250–262행)
enum InputResult {
    Submitted { text, text_elements },           // Enter → 즉시 전송
    Queued { text, text_elements },              // Tab → 대기열 추가
    Command(SlashCommand),                        // /명령 디스패치
    CommandWithArgs(SlashCommand, String, Vec&#x3C;TextElement>), // /명령 + 인자
    None,                                         // 키 소비 없음
}
</code></pre>
<p>Enter = Submit immediately, Tab = Queue if task is running (Submit immediately if not running). In the submission path, pending paste placeholder expansion, space trim, text element rebase, and custom prompt expansion are executed sequentially.</p>
<hr>
<h2>active_cell_revision invalidate cache</h2>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chatwidget.rs — active_cell_revision (684–692행)
/// 모노토닉 카운터. active cell의 transcript 출력이 변할 수 있을 때 bump.
/// 의도적으로 wrapping을 허용. 극히 드문 1회 캐시 충돌 가능 (무해).
active_cell_revision: u64,
</code></pre>
<p>Transcript overlay caches live tail with <code>active_cell_transcript_key()</code> and <code>active_cell_transcript_lines()</code>. If <code>active_cell_revision</code> does not change, it will not be reorganized for every draw. Without this optimization, the 9,700-line transcript would be re-rendered every frame, drastically reducing performance.</p>
<hr>
<h3>Reuse seam</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>tui.rs</code> + <code>tui/event_stream.rs</code> is the easiest terminal runtime layer to remove.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>history_cell.rs</code> is a protocol-aware adapter layer, so it has high reuse value.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>render/*</code>, <code>markdown_render.rs</code> are good for porting to other UI surfaces.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>streaming/*</code> is a generalizable streaming marking policy — chunking policy is source agnostic</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>selection_popup_common.rs</code> + <code>scroll_state.rs</code> is a general-purpose popup framework.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>chat_composer.rs</code> is valuable, but Codex-specific slash and mention rules need to be stripped out.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>app.rs</code> is too big, so we need to break the seam into smaller pieces first.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>request_user_input/</code> can be extracted with a structured form engine, but is directly connected to the current Codex protocol.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Tightly coupled risk</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>risk</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>app.rs</code> non-dialog</td>
<td>State and orchestration are concentrated in one file (tui/tui_app_server) (thousands of lines each)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Direct dependence on protocol type</td>
<td>UI knows <code>codex_protocol::*</code> events deeply</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Copy parallel implementation source</td>
<td><code>tui</code> and <code>tui_app_server</code> have overlapping rendering code</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Input Model Complexity</td>
<td>slash, skill mention, app mention, approval, attachment, request_user_input are intertwined</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>increase overlay type</td>
<td><code>ApprovalOverlay</code>, <code>RequestUserInputOverlay</code>, <code>McpServerElicitationOverlay</code>, etc. are each independent state machines</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>List of core files</h3>
<p><strong><code>tui</code> crate:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><code>tui/src/tui.rs</code> — Terminal runtime</li>
<li><code>tui/src/tui/event_stream.rs</code> — EventBroker, TuiEventStream</li>
<li><code>tui/src/app.rs</code> — App state machine</li>
<li><code>tui/src/app_event.rs</code> — AppEvent message bus</li>
<li><code>tui/src/chatwidget.rs</code> — transcript surface</li>
<li><code>tui/src/chatwidget/agent.rs</code>, <code>interrupts.rs</code>, <code>plugins.rs</code>, <code>realtime.rs</code>, <code>skills.rs</code></li>
<li><code>tui/src/history_cell.rs</code> — HistoryCell trait + implementations</li>
<li><code>tui/src/pager_overlay.rs</code> — Overlay enum (Transcript, Static)</li>
<li><code>tui/src/bottom_pane/chat_composer.rs</code> — Prompt editor</li>
<li><code>tui/src/bottom_pane/approval_overlay.rs</code> — Approval modal</li>
<li><code>tui/src/bottom_pane/command_popup.rs</code> — slash autocompletion</li>
<li><code>tui/src/bottom_pane/skill_popup.rs</code> — Skill mention popup</li>
<li><code>tui/src/bottom_pane/file_search_popup.rs</code> — File search popup</li>
<li><code>tui/src/bottom_pane/request_user_input/</code> — structured input form</li>
<li><code>tui/src/streaming/mod.rs</code> — StreamState</li>
<li><code>tui/src/streaming/controller.rs</code> — StreamController, PlanStreamController</li>
<li><code>tui/src/streaming/chunking.rs</code> — AdaptiveChunkingPolicy</li>
<li><code>tui/src/streaming/commit_tick.rs</code> — run_commit_tick orchestration</li>
<li><code>tui/src/markdown_render.rs</code> — Markdown render</li>
<li><code>tui/src/render/*</code> — highlight, renderable, line_utils</li>
</ul>
<p><strong><code>tui_app_server</code> crate:</strong></p>
<ul>
<li><code>tui_app_server/src/app.rs</code> — App state machine for remote sessions.</li>
<li><code>tui_app_server/src/app_server_session.rs</code> — AppServerClient wrapper</li>
<li><code>tui_app_server/src/model_catalog.rs</code> — ModelCatalog</li>
</ul>

<h1>Codex TUI 설계 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> (Rust source, workspace). Primary crates: <code>tui/</code>, <code>tui_app_server/</code>, <code>app-server-*</code>. Host-delegated harnesses (<code>lc</code>, <code>sp</code>) render via this surface.</p>
</blockquote>
<p><code>openai/codex</code> 안의 TUI 계층은 단순한 CLI 화면이 아니라 거의 하나의 로컬 프런트엔드 런타임이다. <code>codex-rs/tui</code>는 Ratatui 기반 풀스크린 인터페이스이고, <code>codex-rs/tui_app_server</code>는 거의 같은 UI를 유지하면서 app-server 세션을 1급 데이터 소스로 삼는 평행 구현이다.</p>
<p>핵심 구조는 세 덩어리다. 메인 transcript viewport는 <code>ChatWidget</code>이 담당하고, 입력과 상태와 승인 UI는 <code>bottom_pane</code>이 맡으며, overlay 계층은 transcript pager, 승인 모달, 모델 선택, 플러그인 팝업, 파일 검색, <code>request_user_input</code> 폼 같은 보조 화면을 얹는다. <code>tui.rs</code>는 raw mode, alt screen, 이벤트 스트림, frame scheduling을 담당하는 터미널 런타임이고, <code>app.rs</code>는 사실상 전체 UI 상태 머신이다.</p>
<p>중요한 관찰은 <code>codex-rs/tui</code>조차도 순수 core 직결 UI가 아니라는 점이다. Cargo 의존성을 보면 <code>codex-app-server-client</code>, <code>codex-app-server-protocol</code>, <code>codex-tui-app-server</code>를 직접 물고 있고, <code>app.rs</code>에서도 <code>InProcessAppServerClient</code>를 사용한다. 즉 “로컬 TUI”도 app-server 프로토콜적 사고 위에 올라가 있다. 이건 추후 추출 시 큰 힌트다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["tui.rs — terminal runtime&#x3C;br/>raw mode · alt screen · EventBroker"] --> B["app.rs — App state machine&#x3C;br/>AppEvent dispatch · overlay 관리"]
    B --> C["ChatWidget&#x3C;br/>transcript cells · active cell · viewport"]
    B --> D["BottomPane&#x3C;br/>ChatComposer · BottomPaneView stack"]
    B --> E["Overlay layer&#x3C;br/>TranscriptOverlay · StaticOverlay"]
    C --> F["history_cell.rs&#x3C;br/>protocol → render cell 변환"]
    C --> G["streaming pipeline&#x3C;br/>StreamController · AdaptiveChunkingPolicy"]
    D --> H["popup / overlay 위젯들"]
    H --> H1["ApprovalOverlay"]
    H --> H2["CommandPopup · SkillPopup"]
    H --> H3["FileSearchPopup"]
    H --> H4["RequestUserInputOverlay"]
    G --> G1["chunking.rs — Smooth/CatchUp 정책"]
    G --> G2["commit_tick.rs — 드레인 오케스트레이션"]
    G --> G3["controller.rs — Stream/PlanStream 컨트롤러"]
</code></pre>
<hr>

<hr>
<h2>Overlay·Popup 컴포넌트 상세</h2>
<h3>Pager Overlay (<code>pager_overlay.rs</code>)</h3>
<p><code>Overlay</code> enum은 두 종류다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/pager_overlay.rs
pub(crate) enum Overlay {
    Transcript(TranscriptOverlay),
    Static(StaticOverlay),
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>TranscriptOverlay</code>는 <code>Ctrl+T</code>로 여는 전체 transcript 뷰어다. committed cell 목록에 더해 현재 streaming 중인 active cell의 live tail을 cache key 기반으로 갱신한다. cache key는 터미널 폭, active cell revision, stream-continuation 플래그, animation tick을 조합한다.</p>
<p><code>StaticOverlay</code>는 임의의 <code>Line</code> 또는 <code>Renderable</code> 목록을 정적 페이지로 보여준다. 모델 정보 화면, 디버그 뷰 같은 보조 화면에 쓰인다.</p>
<h3>Approval Overlay (<code>bottom_pane/approval_overlay.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>에이전트가 tool 실행, 퍼미션 요청, 패치 적용, MCP elicitation을 시도할 때 사용자 승인을 받는 모달이다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/bottom_pane/approval_overlay.rs
pub(crate) enum ApprovalRequest {
    Exec { thread_id, id, command, reason, available_decisions, .. },
    Permissions { thread_id, call_id, reason, permissions, .. },
    ApplyPatch { thread_id, id, reason, cwd, changes, .. },
    McpElicitation { thread_id, server_name, request_id, message, .. },
}
</code></pre>
<p>각 variant는 <code>thread_id</code>로 어떤 에이전트 스레드의 요청인지 추적한다. UI는 Bash 명령 하이라이트, diff 요약, 퍼미션 프로필 표시를 포함한다.</p>
<h3>Command Popup (<code>bottom_pane/command_popup.rs</code>)</h3>
<p><code>/</code> slash 입력 시 열리는 자동완성 팝업이다. 빌트인 <code>SlashCommand</code>와 사용자 정의 <code>CustomPrompt</code> 목록을 합쳐서 보여준다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/bottom_pane/command_popup.rs
pub(crate) enum CommandItem {
    Builtin(SlashCommand),
    UserPrompt(usize),  // prompts 벡터 인덱스
}
</code></pre>
<p>빌트인 중 alias 명령(<code>quit</code>→<code>exit</code>, <code>approvals</code>→<code>permissions</code>)은 기본 목록에서 숨긴다. <code>CommandPopupFlags</code>로 collaboration modes, connectors, plugins, realtime 등 피처 플래그에 따라 표시 항목이 달라진다.</p>
<h3>Skill Popup (<code>bottom_pane/skill_popup.rs</code>)</h3>
<p><code>@</code> 입력 시 열리는 스킬 멘션 팝업이다. <code>MentionItem</code> 목록을 fuzzy match로 필터링한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/bottom_pane/skill_popup.rs
pub(crate) struct MentionItem {
    pub display_name: String,
    pub description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub insert_text: String,
    pub search_terms: Vec&#x3C;String>,
    pub path: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub category_tag: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub sort_rank: u8,
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>sort_rank</code> → fuzzy score → display_name 순으로 정렬하고, <code>MAX_POPUP_ROWS</code>로 잘라서 보여준다. 하단에 <code>Enter to insert / Esc to close</code> 힌트를 렌더한다.</p>
<h3>File Search Popup (<code>bottom_pane/file_search_popup.rs</code>)</h3>
<p><code>@filename</code> 형태로 파일을 멘션할 때 열리는 파일 검색 팝업이다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/bottom_pane/file_search_popup.rs
pub(crate) struct FileSearchPopup {
    display_query: String,
    pending_query: String,
    waiting: bool,
    matches: Vec&#x3C;FileMatch>,
    state: ScrollState,
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>pending_query</code>와 <code>display_query</code>를 분리해서, 검색이 in-flight인 동안에도 기존 결과를 안정적으로 보여준다. stale 결과는 <code>set_matches</code>에서 query 비교로 버린다.</p>
<h3>Request User Input Overlay (<code>bottom_pane/request_user_input/</code>)</h3>
<p>MCP 서버나 에이전트가 사용자에게 structured input을 요청할 때 나타나는 폼 오버레이다. 세 파일로 구성된다.</p>
<pre><code>bottom_pane/request_user_input/
├── mod.rs     — 상태 머신 (Focus::Options / Focus::Notes, 질문별 답안)
├── layout.rs  — 적응형 레이아웃 계산 (LayoutSections, LayoutPlan)
└── render.rs  — Renderable 구현, 커서 위치, unanswered 확인 다이얼로그
</code></pre>
<p>핵심 동작:</p>
<ul>
<li>질문마다 옵션 선택 + 자유 텍스트(notes) 입력을 조합한다</li>
<li>옵션 포커스 중 타이핑하면 자동으로 notes 포커스로 전환된다</li>
<li>Enter로 다음 질문 진행, 마지막 질문에서 전체 제출</li>
<li>미응답 질문이 있으면 <code>"Submit with unanswered questions?"</code> 확인 다이얼로그를 띄운다</li>
</ul>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/bottom_pane/request_user_input/mod.rs
enum Focus { Options, Notes }
</code></pre>
<p>레이아웃은 available height에 따라 progress → question → options → notes → footer 영역을 적응적으로 분배한다. <code>layout_with_options</code>와 <code>layout_without_options</code>로 케이스를 나눈다.</p>
<h3>Model Catalog / Selection</h3>
<p><code>tui/src/model_catalog.rs</code> (또는 <code>tui_app_server</code> 내 동일 파일)는 모델 목록과 collaboration mode preset을 관리한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/model_catalog.rs (tui_app_server 내)
pub(crate) struct ModelCatalog {
    models: Vec&#x3C;ModelPreset>,
    collaboration_modes_config: CollaborationModesConfig,
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>/model</code> 슬래시 커맨드 실행 시 <code>SelectionItem</code> 목록으로 변환되어 <code>ListSelectionView</code>에 표시된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>스트리밍 파이프라인 상세</h2>
<h3>아키텍처 개요</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    D["LLM delta"] --> SC["MarkdownStreamCollector"]
    SC -->|"newline-gated&#x3C;br/>commit"| Q["StreamState.queued_lines&#x3C;br/>(VecDeque&#x26;lt;QueuedLine&#x26;gt;)"]
    Q --> P["AdaptiveChunkingPolicy&#x3C;br/>Smooth / CatchUp"]
    P -->|DrainPlan| CT["commit_tick&#x3C;br/>run_commit_tick()"]
    CT --> HC["HistoryCell emission&#x3C;br/>AgentMessageCell"]

    style P fill:#ffd,stroke:#333
</code></pre>
<h3>StreamState (<code>streaming/mod.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>모든 스트리밍 상태의 기초 구조체다. newline-gated markdown collection과 FIFO 큐를 소유한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/streaming/mod.rs
struct QueuedLine {
    line: Line&#x3C;'static>,
    enqueued_at: Instant,
}

pub(crate) struct StreamState {
    pub collector: MarkdownStreamCollector,
    queued_lines: VecDeque&#x3C;QueuedLine>,
    pub has_seen_delta: bool,
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>enqueued_at</code> 타임스탬프로 큐 압력의 "나이"를 추적한다. <code>step()</code>은 한 줄, <code>drain_n(max)</code>은 최대 max 줄, <code>drain_all()</code>은 전체를 큐 앞에서 꺼낸다.</p>
<h3>StreamController / PlanStreamController (<code>streaming/controller.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>두 컨트롤러가 <code>StreamState</code>를 감싸고 <code>HistoryCell</code> 방출 규칙을 정한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/streaming/controller.rs
pub(crate) struct StreamController {
    state: StreamState,
    finishing_after_drain: bool,
    header_emitted: bool,
}

pub(crate) struct PlanStreamController {
    state: StreamState,
    header_emitted: bool,
    top_padding_emitted: bool,
}
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><code>push(delta)</code>: 델타를 collector에 추가. 개행 포함 시 완성된 줄을 큐에 넣는다</li>
<li><code>on_commit_tick()</code>: 한 줄 드레인 후 <code>AgentMessageCell</code>로 방출</li>
<li><code>on_commit_tick_batch(max)</code>: adaptive catch-up용 다중 줄 드레인</li>
<li><code>finalize()</code>: 잔여 데이터를 전부 플러시해서 최종 셀로 방출</li>
</ul>
<p><code>PlanStreamController</code>는 <code>"• Proposed Plan"</code> 헤더와 <code>proposed_plan_style()</code> 적용, 패딩 관리를 추가한다.</p>
<h3>Adaptive Chunking Policy (<code>streaming/chunking.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>2단 기어 시스템으로 스트리밍 표시 속도를 제어한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/streaming/chunking.rs
pub(crate) enum ChunkingMode {
    Smooth,   // 기본: tick당 1줄 드레인
    CatchUp,  // 큐 압력 높을 때: 전체 backlog 드레인
}

pub(crate) enum DrainPlan {
    Single,         // 1줄 방출
    Batch(usize),   // 최대 N줄 방출
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>상수</th>
<th>값</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>ENTER_QUEUE_DEPTH_LINES</code></td>
<td>8</td>
<td>Smooth→CatchUp 전환 큐 깊이</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>ENTER_OLDEST_AGE</code></td>
<td>120ms</td>
<td>Smooth→CatchUp 전환 큐 나이</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>EXIT_QUEUE_DEPTH_LINES</code></td>
<td>2</td>
<td>CatchUp→Smooth 시작 큐 깊이</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>EXIT_OLDEST_AGE</code></td>
<td>40ms</td>
<td>CatchUp→Smooth 시작 큐 나이</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>EXIT_HOLD</code></td>
<td>250ms</td>
<td>exit 조건 유지 필요 시간 (히스테리시스)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>REENTER_CATCH_UP_HOLD</code></td>
<td>250ms</td>
<td>CatchUp 종료 후 재진입 쿨다운</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SEVERE_QUEUE_DEPTH_LINES</code></td>
<td>64</td>
<td>심각한 backlog (쿨다운 무시)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SEVERE_OLDEST_AGE</code></td>
<td>300ms</td>
<td>심각한 backlog (쿨다운 무시)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>히스테리시스로 Smooth↔CatchUp 간 빈번한 전환(gear-flapping)을 방지한다. 심각한 backlog는 쿨다운을 무시하고 즉시 CatchUp에 재진입한다.</p>
<h3>Commit Tick 오케스트레이션 (<code>streaming/commit_tick.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>chunking 정책과 구체적 컨트롤러 드레인을 연결하는 접착 모듈이다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/streaming/commit_tick.rs
pub(crate) fn run_commit_tick(
    policy: &#x26;mut AdaptiveChunkingPolicy,
    stream_controller: Option&#x3C;&#x26;mut StreamController>,
    plan_stream_controller: Option&#x3C;&#x26;mut PlanStreamController>,
    scope: CommitTickScope,
    now: Instant,
) -> CommitTickOutput { ... }
</code></pre>
<p>흐름: <code>stream_queue_snapshot()</code> → <code>resolve_chunking_plan()</code> → <code>apply_commit_tick_plan()</code></p>
<p><code>CommitTickScope::CatchUpOnly</code>를 쓰면 CatchUp 모드일 때만 실제 드레인이 일어나고, 나머지는 noop으로 반환한다. 이렇게 baseline tick과 catch-up tick을 분리할 수 있다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>터미널 런타임 상세 (<code>tui.rs</code>, <code>tui/event_stream.rs</code>)</h2>
<h3>EventBroker 구조</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui/src/tui/event_stream.rs
pub struct EventBroker&#x3C;S: EventSource = CrosstermEventSource> {
    state: Mutex&#x3C;EventBrokerState&#x3C;S>>,
    resume_events_tx: watch::Sender&#x3C;()>,
}

enum EventBrokerState&#x3C;S: EventSource> {
    Paused,     // crossterm EventStream dropped
    Start,      // 다음 poll 시 새 소스 생성
    Running(S), // 이벤트 소스 가동 중
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>EventBroker</code>가 crossterm 스트림을 공유해서 external editor 호출 등으로 stdin을 넘겨줄 때 drop→recreate가 가능하다. 테스트 시에는 <code>FakeEventSource</code>로 교체한다.</p>
<h3>Frame Scheduling</h3>
<p><code>TARGET_FRAME_INTERVAL</code> 상수로 프레임 간격을 제어한다. <code>FrameRequester</code>로 redraw 요청을 발행하면, TUI 런타임이 다음 frame에서 반영한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2><code>tui_app_server</code> 평행 구현 상세</h2>
<p><code>codex-rs/tui_app_server/</code>는 <code>codex-rs/tui/</code>와 거의 동일한 UI 코드를 유지하면서, 세션 관리 계층을 <code>AppServerClient</code> 기반으로 교체한 평행 구현이다.</p>
<h3>구조 차이</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>측면</th>
<th><code>tui</code> (로컬)</th>
<th><code>tui_app_server</code></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>세션 연결</td>
<td><code>InProcessAppServerClient</code></td>
<td><code>AppServerClient</code> (원격/로컬 모두 가능)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>인증</td>
<td><code>AuthManager</code>, <code>CodexAuth</code> 직접 소유</td>
<td>서버 측에 위임</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>모델 목록</td>
<td><code>model_catalog.rs</code> 내 <code>ModelCatalog</code></td>
<td><code>AppServerSession</code>으로 <code>ModelListParams</code> RPC</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Config 관리</td>
<td><code>ConfigBuilder</code> + <code>ConfigOverrides</code> 직접</td>
<td><code>ConfigLayerSource</code> 프로토콜로 서버에 질의</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>스레드 관리</td>
<td><code>ThreadManager</code>, <code>ForkSnapshot</code> 직접</td>
<td><code>ThreadStartParams/ThreadForkParams</code> RPC</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3><code>AppServerSession</code> (<code>tui_app_server/src/app_server_session.rs</code>)</h3>
<p>서버와의 JSON-RPC 세션을 래핑한다. 스레드 CRUD(start, fork, resume, rollback, interrupt), 모델 목록, 계정 정보, skill 목록, realtime 오디오 등을 위한 typed request 메서드를 제공한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// tui_app_server/src/app_server_session.rs — 주요 import
use codex_app_server_client::AppServerClient;
use codex_app_server_protocol::{
    ThreadStartParams, ThreadForkParams, ThreadResumeParams,
    ThreadRollbackParams, TurnStartParams, TurnInterruptParams,
    ModelListParams, SkillsListParams, ...
};
</code></pre>
<h3>공유 코드와 분기점</h3>
<p>두 크레이트는 <code>bottom_pane/</code>, <code>chatwidget/</code>, <code>streaming/</code>, <code>pager_overlay.rs</code>, <code>history_cell.rs</code> 등 대부분의 렌더링 코드를 동일하게 가진다 (소스 복사). 차이점은 주로 <code>app.rs</code>의 초기화·세션 연결 부분과 인증·config 로딩이다. 이 구조적 중복은 추후 공통 크레이트 추출의 주요 동기가 된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>ChatWidget 해부 — 9,707줄의 상태 머신</h2>
<p><code>chatwidget.rs</code>는 Codex TUI에서 가장 큰 단일 파일이다. 프로토콜 이벤트를 소비하고 히스토리 셀을 구성하며 transcript viewport와 overlay UI를 구동한다.</p>
<h3>핵심 상태 필드</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chatwidget.rs — ChatWidget 구조체 (678–800행, 발췌)
pub(crate) struct ChatWidget {
    active_cell: Option&#x3C;Box&#x3C;dyn HistoryCell>>,  // 현재 스트리밍 중인 셀
    active_cell_revision: u64,                   // 캐시 무효화 카운터
    adaptive_chunking: AdaptiveChunkingPolicy,   // Smooth/CatchUp 정책
    stream_controller: Option&#x3C;StreamController>, // 스트림 라이프사이클
    agent_turn_running: bool,                    // 에이전트 턴 진행 중
    mcp_startup_status: Option&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;String, McpStartupStatus>>,
    running_commands: HashMap&#x3C;String, RunningCommand>,
    queued_user_messages: VecDeque&#x3C;UserMessage>,  // 턴 중 대기 메시지
    pending_steers: VecDeque&#x3C;PendingSteer>,       // 제출된 미확인 steer
    interrupts: InterruptManager,                 // 인터럽트 큐
    current_status: StatusIndicatorState,         // 현재 푸터 상태
    // ... 총 60+ 필드
}
</code></pre>
<h3>이벤트 매핑 — 120+ EventMsg 유형</h3>
<p>ChatWidget은 <code>codex_protocol::protocol::EventMsg</code>의 120+ 유형을 직접 매칭한다. 주요 카테고리:</p>

<h3>터미널 감지 기반 키바인딩 적응</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chatwidget.rs — queued_message_edit_binding_for_terminal (211–235행)
fn queued_message_edit_binding_for_terminal(terminal_info: TerminalInfo) -> KeyBinding {
    if matches!(terminal_info.multiplexer, Some(Multiplexer::Tmux { .. })) {
        return key_hint::shift(KeyCode::Left);  // tmux는 Alt+Up을 삼킨다
    }
    match terminal_info.name {
        AppleTerminal | WarpTerminal | VsCode => key_hint::shift(KeyCode::Left),
        Ghostty | Iterm2 | WezTerm | Kitty | Alacritty | Konsole
        | GnomeTerminal | Vte | WindowsTerminal | Dumb | Unknown
            => key_hint::alt(KeyCode::Up),
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>match</code>가 <strong>exhaustive</strong>이므로 새로운 <code>TerminalName</code> 변형을 추가하면 <strong>컴파일 에러</strong>가 발생해 바인딩 결정을 강제한다.</p>
<h3>Rate Limit 경고 상태 머신</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chatwidget.rs — RateLimitWarningState (414–477행)
const RATE_LIMIT_WARNING_THRESHOLDS: [f64; 3] = [75.0, 90.0, 95.0];

struct RateLimitWarningState {
    secondary_index: usize,  // 주간 제한 임계값 인덱스
    primary_index: usize,    // 5시간 제한 임계값 인덱스
}

impl RateLimitWarningState {
    fn take_warnings(&#x26;mut self, secondary_pct: Option&#x3C;f64>, primary_pct: Option&#x3C;f64>) -> Vec&#x3C;String> {
        // 100%에 도달하면 경고 없음 (별도 UI로 전환)
        // 각 레벨(75/90/95)은 한 번만 경고, index 전진으로 재발 방지
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>75% → 90% → 95% 순으로 단조 전진하며 같은 임계값 경고가 반복되지 않는다. 100% 도달 시 경고 대신 별도 rate limit 전용 UI가 활성화된다.</p>
<h3>Guardian Review 상태 추적</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chatwidget.rs — PendingGuardianReviewStatus (598–664행)
struct PendingGuardianReviewStatus {
    entries: Vec&#x3C;PendingGuardianReviewStatusEntry>,
}

impl PendingGuardianReviewStatus {
    fn start_or_update(&#x26;mut self, id: String, detail: String);
    fn finish(&#x26;mut self, id: &#x26;str) -> bool;
    fn status_indicator_state(&#x26;self) -> Option&#x3C;StatusIndicatorState> {
        // 1개 리뷰: "Reviewing approval request" + 단일 상세
        // N개 리뷰: "Reviewing N approval requests" + 글머리 목록 (최대 3개 + "+N more")
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Guardian 리뷰 상태는 ChatWidget의 <code>current_status</code>와 분리된 자체 추적 시스템을 가진다. 여러 리뷰가 동시 진행될 때 푸터에 요약 UI를 표시한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>ChatComposer 입력 파이프라인 — 9,874줄의 상태 머신</h2>
<h3>아키텍처 개요</h3>
<p>ChatComposer는 <code>ChatComposerConfig</code>로 동작 범위를 제어하는 <strong>재사용 가능한 입력 컴포넌트</strong>다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chat_composer.rs — ChatComposerConfig (291–307행)
struct ChatComposerConfig {
    popups_enabled: bool,         // 슬래시/파일/스킬 팝업 허용
    slash_commands_enabled: bool, // /명령 파싱 활성화
    image_paste_enabled: bool,    // 이미지 경로 첨부 활성화
}

// 최소 프리셋: request_user_input 같은 단순 텍스트 입력에 사용
const fn plain_text() -> Self { /* 모두 false */ }
</code></pre>
<h3>팝업 상태 — 동시 1개 제한</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chat_composer.rs (431–436행)
enum ActivePopup {
    None,
    Command(CommandPopup),    // /슬래시 명령 자동완성
    File(FileSearchPopup),    // 파일 검색
    Skill(SkillPopup),        // @멘션 (스킬/플러그인/커넥터)
}
</code></pre>
<p>모든 키 이벤트는 <code>handle_key_event()</code>를 거치며, 활성 팝업이 있으면 팝업 핸들러가 먼저 소비한다. 키 처리 후 <code>sync_popups()</code>가 호출되어 버퍼/커서 상태에 맞게 팝업을 자동 열거나 닫는다.</p>
<h3>Non-Bracketed Paste Burst 감지</h3>
<p>Windows 등 일부 터미널은 붙여넣기를 bracketed paste로 보내지 않고 빠른 <code>KeyCode::Char</code> 시퀀스로 보낸다. <code>PasteBurst</code> 상태 머신이 이를 감지한다:</p>
<pre><code>ASCII 입력:
  첫 빠른 문자 → 홀드 (깜빡임 억제)
  → 후속 빠른 입력 확인 → paste-like로 판정 → handle_paste()로 라우팅

Non-ASCII (IME):
  첫 문자 → 즉시 삽입 (IME 입력 누락 방지)
  → 후속 감지는 여전히 동작 → retro-capture 경로
</code></pre>
<p><code>LARGE_PASTE_CHAR_THRESHOLD = 1000</code>자 초과 시 텍스트를 직접 삽입하지 않고 <code>[Pasted N chars]</code> 플레이스홀더로 대체하고, 제출 시 확장한다.</p>
<h3>Voice Hold-to-Talk</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chat_composer.rs — VoiceState (324–341행)
struct VoiceState {
    transcription_enabled: bool,
    space_hold_started_at: Option&#x3C;Instant>,    // 스페이스 누른 시점
    space_hold_trigger: Option&#x3C;Arc&#x3C;AtomicBool>>,
    key_release_supported: bool,               // 터미널이 Release 이벤트 지원?
    space_hold_repeat_seen: bool,              // 반복 키 이벤트 감지됨?
}
</code></pre>
<p>KeyRelease를 지원하는 터미널에서는 스페이스 누르고 있는 동안 녹음, 떼면 전사. KeyRelease 미지원 터미널에서는 반복 스페이스 키 이벤트를 "still held" 증거로 사용하고, 이벤트가 끊기면 녹음 종료.</p>
<h3>InputResult — 제출 경로 분기</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chat_composer.rs (250–262행)
enum InputResult {
    Submitted { text, text_elements },           // Enter → 즉시 전송
    Queued { text, text_elements },              // Tab → 대기열 추가
    Command(SlashCommand),                        // /명령 디스패치
    CommandWithArgs(SlashCommand, String, Vec&#x3C;TextElement>), // /명령 + 인자
    None,                                         // 키 소비 없음
}
</code></pre>
<p>Enter = 즉시 제출, Tab = 태스크 실행 중이면 큐잉 (실행 중이 아니면 즉시 제출). 제출 경로에서 pending paste 플레이스홀더 확장, 공백 trim, text element rebase, 커스텀 프롬프트 확장이 순차 실행된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>active_cell_revision 캐시 무효화</h2>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// chatwidget.rs — active_cell_revision (684–692행)
/// 모노토닉 카운터. active cell의 transcript 출력이 변할 수 있을 때 bump.
/// 의도적으로 wrapping을 허용. 극히 드문 1회 캐시 충돌 가능 (무해).
active_cell_revision: u64,
</code></pre>
<p>Transcript overlay는 <code>active_cell_transcript_key()</code>와 <code>active_cell_transcript_lines()</code>로 live tail을 캐시한다. <code>active_cell_revision</code>이 변하지 않으면 매 draw마다 재구성하지 않는다. 이 최적화가 없으면 9,700줄 transcript가 매 프레임마다 재렌더링되어 성능이 급격히 저하된다.</p>
<hr>
<h3>재사용 seam</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>tui.rs</code> + <code>tui/event_stream.rs</code>는 가장 쉽게 떼어낼 수 있는 터미널 런타임 계층이다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>history_cell.rs</code>는 protocol-aware adapter 계층이라 재사용 가치가 높다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>render/*</code>, <code>markdown_render.rs</code>는 다른 UI 표면에도 이식하기 좋다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>streaming/*</code>는 일반화 가능한 스트리밍 표시 정책이다 — chunking policy는 소스 무관</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>selection_popup_common.rs</code> + <code>scroll_state.rs</code>는 범용 팝업 프레임워크다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>chat_composer.rs</code>는 가치가 높지만 Codex 고유 slash와 mention 규칙을 걷어내야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>app.rs</code>는 너무 커서 먼저 seam을 더 잘게 쪼개야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>request_user_input/</code>는 structured form 엔진으로 추출 가능하지만 현재 Codex 프로토콜에 직결</li>
</ul>
<h3>강결합 리스크</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>리스크</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>app.rs</code> 비대화</td>
<td>상태와 오케스트레이션이 한 파일에 몰려 있다 (tui/tui_app_server 각각 수천 줄)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>protocol 타입 직접 의존</td>
<td>UI가 <code>codex_protocol::*</code> 이벤트를 깊게 안다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>평행 구현 소스 복사</td>
<td><code>tui</code>와 <code>tui_app_server</code>가 렌더링 코드를 중복 소유한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>입력 모델 복잡도</td>
<td>slash, skill mention, app mention, approval, attachment, request_user_input이 얽혀 있다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>overlay 유형 증가</td>
<td><code>ApprovalOverlay</code>, <code>RequestUserInputOverlay</code>, <code>McpServerElicitationOverlay</code> 등이 각각 독립 상태 머신이다</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: ChatWidget 해부(9,707줄 상태 머신/60+ 필드/120+ 이벤트/터미널 감지 키바인딩/rate limit 경고 상태/Guardian 리뷰 추적), ChatComposer 입력 파이프라인(9,874줄/Config 프리셋/팝업 상태/paste burst/voice state/InputResult), active_cell_revision 캐시 무효화 5개 역공학 섹션 추가.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: TUI를 protocol-aware local client runtime으로 분석해 정리했다.</li>
<li>2025-07-19: overlay/popup 컴포넌트 6종 상세 추가, 스트리밍 파이프라인(StreamState → AdaptiveChunkingPolicy → commit_tick) 코드 스니펫 포함 분석, tui_app_server 평행 구현 비교, EventBroker 구조 추가, mermaid 다이어그램 확장.</li>
</ul>
16:["$","$L28","20-axis-01-tui",{"id":"20-axis-01-tui","order":18,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 01: TUI design","description":"001_tui-design/01_co_tui.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$3b"}}]}]
3c:T15ce7,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 02: Prompt &#x26; context</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — <code>core/src/instructions/</code>, <code>core/src/context_manager/</code>, <code>AGENTS.md</code> injection paths cited in-body.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>Codex의 프롬프트 시스템을 보면서 가장 먼저 버려야 할 오해는 모든 지시문이 한 군데에서 한 번에 붙는다는 생각이다. 실제 코드는 적어도 네 개의 별도 채널을 쓴다. 기본 base instructions, 동적으로 조립되는 developer instructions, <code>AGENTS.md</code>와 스킬 같은 contextual user fragment, 그리고 plugin이나 collaboration mode가 추가하는 부가 힌트가</li>
<li>실제 조립 순서를 보면 <code>codex.rs</code>는 먼저 sandbox와 approval policy를 developer instructions로 바꾸고, 그 위에 현재 turn의 <code>developer_instructions</code>, memory tool 지시문, collaboration mode 지시문, realtime 관련 메시지, personality 메시지를 얹는다. 반면 <code>AGENTS.md</code>와 <code>SKILL.md</code>는 이 develop</li>
<li>또 하나의 중요한 차이는 plugin mention이다. skill과 다르게 plugin mention은 <code>build_plugin_injections()</code>를 통해 developer instructions 쪽으로 들어간다. 즉 Codex는 "파일형 지시문"과 "기능형 힌트"를 의도적으로 다른 채널로 보내고 있다. 이 분리는 우리 쪽에서 포크할 때 그대로 가져갈 가치가 크다.</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A["base instructions(protocol/prompts/default.md)"] --> E["model input context"]</li>
<li>B["developer instructions bundle(codex.rs → build_initial_context)"] --> E</li>
<li>C["contextual user items(AGENTS.md, skills, env context)"] --> E</li>
<li>D["plugin/app/skill hints(developer channel)"] --> E</li>
<li>F["guardian policy prompt(별도 developer message)"] --> E</li>
<li>style A fill:#2d5016,color:#fff</li>
<li>style B fill:#1a3a5c,color:#fff</li>
</ul>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/context_manager/updates.rs:161
pub(crate) fn build_developer_update_item(text_sections: Vec&#x3C;String>) -> Option&#x3C;ResponseItem> {
    build_text_message("developer", text_sections)
}

fn build_text_message(role: &#x26;str, text_sections: Vec&#x3C;String>) -> Option&#x3C;ResponseItem> {
    let content = text_sections
        .into_iter()
        .map(|text| ContentItem::InputText { text })
        .collect();
    Some(ResponseItem::Message {
        id: None,
        role: role.to_string(),
        content,
        end_turn: None,
        phase: None,
    })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/contextual_user_message.rs:113
pub(crate) fn is_memory_excluded_contextual_user_fragment(content_item: &#x26;ContentItem) -> bool {
    let ContentItem::InputText { text } = content_item else {
        return false;
    };
    AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.matches_text(text) || SKILL_FRAGMENT.matches_text(text)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-text">프로젝트 루트 탐색:
  cwd에서 위로 올라가며 project_root_markers (.git 등) 탐색
  → 프로젝트 루트 결정

파일 우선순위 (디렉토리별):
  1. AGENTS.override.md   ← 로컬 오버라이드 우선
  2. AGENTS.md            ← 기본
  3. project_doc_fallback_filenames 설정값

수집 순서: project_root → ... → cwd (상위에서 하위로)
결합: 모든 파일 내용을 "\n\n"으로 연결
바이트 제한: project_doc_max_bytes 초과 시 truncation
</code></pre>

pub(crate) async fn get_user_instructions(config: &#x26;Config) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let project_docs = read_project_docs(config).await;
    let mut output = String::new();
    if let Some(instructions) = config.user_instructions.clone() {
        output.push_str(&#x26;instructions);
    }
    match project_docs {
        Ok(Some(docs)) => {
            if !output.is_empty() {
                output.push_str("\n\n--- project-doc ---\n\n");
            }
            output.push_str(&#x26;docs);
        }
        // ...
    };
    // JS REPL instructions 추가 (피처 플래그)
    // Hierarchical agents message 추가 (ChildAgentsMd 피처)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/instructions/user_instructions.rs:19-27
impl UserInstructions {
    pub(crate) fn serialize_to_text(&#x26;self) -> String {
        format!(
            "{prefix}{directory}\n\n&#x3C;INSTRUCTIONS>\n{contents}\n{suffix}",
            prefix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.start_marker(),  // "# AGENTS.md instructions for "
            directory = self.directory,
            contents = self.text,
            suffix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.end_marker(),    // "&#x3C;/INSTRUCTIONS>"
        )
    }
}
</code></pre>

(프로젝트 루트 AGENTS.md 내용)

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/skills/render.rs:5-48
pub fn render_skills_section(skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata]) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let mut lines: Vec&#x3C;String> = Vec::new();
    lines.push("## Skills".to_string());
    // ...
    for skill in skills {
        let path_str = skill.path_to_skills_md.to_string_lossy();
        lines.push(format!("- {name}: {description} (file: {path_str})"));
    }
    lines.push("### How to use skills".to_string());
    // 트리거 규칙, progressive disclosure 등
    Some(format!("{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_OPEN_TAG}\n{body}\n{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_CLOSE_TAG}"))
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/instructions/user_instructions.rs:46-53
impl From&#x3C;SkillInstructions> for ResponseItem {
    fn from(si: SkillInstructions) -> Self {
        SKILL_FRAGMENT.into_message(SKILL_FRAGMENT.wrap(format!(
            "&#x3C;name>{}&#x3C;/name>\n&#x3C;path>{}&#x3C;/path>\n{}",
            si.name, si.path, si.contents
        )))
    }
}

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/environment_context.rs:163-198
pub fn serialize_to_xml(self) -> String {
    let mut lines = Vec::new();
    if let Some(cwd) = self.cwd {
        lines.push(format!("  &#x3C;cwd>{}&#x3C;/cwd>", cwd.to_string_lossy()));
    }
    lines.push(format!("  &#x3C;shell>{}&#x3C;/shell>", self.shell.name()));
    if let Some(current_date) = self.current_date { /* ... */ }
    if let Some(timezone) = self.timezone { /* ... */ }
    match self.network { /* allowed/denied domains */ }
    if let Some(subagents) = self.subagents { /* ... */ }
    ENVIRONMENT_CONTEXT_FRAGMENT.wrap(lines.join("\n"))
}
</code></pre>

  &#x3C;timezone>Asia/Seoul&#x3C;/timezone>
  &#x3C;network enabled="true">
    &#x3C;allowed>api.github.com&#x3C;/allowed>

<pre><code class="language-markdown">&#x3C;!-- core/templates/compact/prompt.md -->
You are performing a CONTEXT CHECKPOINT COMPACTION.
Create a handoff summary for another LLM that will resume the task.
Include:
- Current progress and key decisions made
- Important context, constraints, or user preferences
- What remains to be done (clear next steps)
- Any critical data, examples, or references needed to continue
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/codex.rs:871-876
pub(crate) fn model_context_window(&#x26;self) -> Option&#x3C;i64> {
    let effective_context_window_percent = self.model_info.effective_context_window_percent;
    self.model_info.context_window.map(|context_window| {
        context_window.saturating_mul(effective_context_window_percent) / 100
    })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart LR
    A["turn 완료"] --> B{"토큰 사용량 체크"}
    B -->|"한도 내"| C["다음 턴 진행"]
    B -->|"한도 초과"| D{"remote compact 가능?"}
    D -->|"OpenAI provider"| E["remote compact&#x3C;br/>(trim_function_call_history)"]
    D -->|"기타"| F["inline compact&#x3C;br/>(SUMMARIZATION_PROMPT)"]
    E --> C
    F --> C
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart TB
    subgraph INIT["세션 초기화"]
        A1["Config 로드"] --> A2["AGENTS.md 계층적 수집&#x3C;br/>(project_doc.rs)"]

    C3 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> INJECT
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Prompt and context injection pipeline</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — <code>core/src/instructions/</code>, <code>core/src/context_manager/</code>, <code>AGENTS.md</code> injection paths cited in-body.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>The first misconception to dispel when looking at Codex's prompt system is the idea that all instructions are attached in one place at once. The actual code uses at least four separate channels. Basic base instructions, dynamically assembled developer instructions, contextual user fragments such as <code>AGENTS.md</code> and skills, and additional hints added by plugins or collaboration modes are entered in different formats.</p>
<p>This distinction is very important in our fork. We need to duplicate which directives go into which role messages, not just "copy one prompt file." Even if the same text is inserted as a developer message or a user context fragment, the subsequent memory exclusion rules, history reconstruction, and visible item processing methods vary.</p>
<p>Looking at the actual assembly sequence, <code>codex.rs</code> first changes the sandbox and approval policy to developer instructions, and then places the current turn's <code>developer_instructions</code>, memory tool directive, collaboration mode directive, realtime-related message, and personality message on top of it. On the other hand, <code>AGENTS.md</code> and <code>SKILL.md</code> are not included in this developer bundle, but are separately wrapped in the user role text of <code>ResponseItem::Message</code> and recorded as conversation items.</p>
<p>Another important difference is the plugin mention. Unlike skill, plugin mentions go into developer instructions through <code>build_plugin_injections()</code>. In other words, Codex is intentionally sending “file-type directives” and “function-type hints” to different channels. This separation is very worth taking with us when we fork from our side.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["base instructions&#x3C;br/>(protocol/prompts/default.md)"] --> E["model input context"]
    B["developer instructions bundle&#x3C;br/>(codex.rs → build_initial_context)"] --> E
    C["contextual user items&#x3C;br/>(AGENTS.md, skills, env context)"] --> E
    D["plugin/app/skill hints&#x3C;br/>(developer channel)"] --> E
    F["guardian policy prompt&#x3C;br/>(별도 developer message)"] --> E

    style A fill:#2d5016,color:#fff
    style B fill:#1a3a5c,color:#fff
    style C fill:#5c3a1a,color:#fff
    style D fill:#3a1a5c,color:#fff
    style F fill:#5c1a2d,color:#fff
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant TC as TurnContext
    participant BIC as build_initial_context()
    participant DS as developer_sections Vec
    participant CUS as contextual_user_sections Vec
    participant UPD as context_manager::updates
    participant OUT as ResponseItem 출력

    TC->>BIC: sandbox/approval/model 상태
    BIC->>DS: ① model_switch_message (조건부)
    BIC->>DS: ② DeveloperInstructions::from_policy()
    BIC->>DS: ③ turn_context.developer_instructions
    BIC->>DS: ④ build_memory_tool_developer_instructions()
    BIC->>DS: ⑤ from_collaboration_mode()
    BIC->>DS: ⑥ build_initial_realtime_item()
    BIC->>DS: ⑦ personality_spec_message()
    BIC->>DS: ⑧ render_apps_section()
    BIC->>DS: ⑨ render_skills_section()
    BIC->>DS: ⑩ render_plugins_section()
    BIC->>DS: ⑪ commit_message_trailer_instruction()
    BIC->>CUS: UserInstructions (AGENTS.md)
    BIC->>CUS: EnvironmentContext (XML)
    DS->>UPD: build_developer_update_item()
    CUS->>UPD: build_contextual_user_message()
    UPD->>OUT: developer role message
    UPD->>OUT: user role message
    BIC->>OUT: guardian policy (별도 developer message, 조건부)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Technical Reference</h2>
<h3>Prompt input channel</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Channel</th>
<th>source file</th>
<th>Entry format</th>
<th>Meaning</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>base instructions</td>
<td><code>codex-rs/protocol/src/prompts/base_instructions/default.md</code></td>

<td>Common working rules of the very bottom</td>
</tr>
<tr>

</tr>

</tr>
