</table>
<h3>developer bundle assembly sequence (build_initial_context)</h3>
<p>This is the actual order in which the <code>build_initial_context()</code> function in <code>codex.rs</code> assembles <code>developer_sections: Vec&#x3C;String></code>. See code lines 3434–3606.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>order</th>
<th>Assembly elements</th>
<th>Code location</th>
<th>Conditions</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>①</td>
<td>model switch message</td>
<td><code>build_model_instructions_update_item()</code></td>
<td>When the model is different from the previous turn</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>②</td>
<td>sandbox/approval policy</td>
<td><code>DeveloperInstructions::from_policy()</code></td>
<td>Always</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>③</td>
<td>developer_instructions in current turn</td>
<td><code>turn_context.developer_instructions</code></td>
<td>When not a guardian</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>④</td>
<td>memory tool guide</td>
<td><code>build_memory_tool_developer_instructions()</code></td>
<td>MemoryTool feature + use_memories</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑤</td>
<td>collaboration mode</td>
<td><code>DeveloperInstructions::from_collaboration_mode()</code></td>
<td>When a mode has a directive</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑥</td>
<td>realtime initial message</td>
<td><code>build_initial_realtime_item()</code></td>
<td>When realtime status changes</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑦</td>
<td>personality message</td>
<td><code>personality_spec_message()</code></td>
<td>Personality feature + when not baked</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑧</td>
<td>apps section</td>
<td><code>render_apps_section()</code></td>
<td>When apps_enabled</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑨</td>
<td>skills section</td>
<td><code>render_skills_section()</code></td>
<td>When implicit skills exist</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑩</td>
<td>plugins section</td>
<td><code>render_plugins_section()</code></td>
<td>When loaded plugins exist</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑪</td>
<td>commit attribution</td>
<td><code>commit_message_trailer_instruction()</code></td>
<td>CodexGitCommit feature</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Once assembled, it is synthesized into a single developer role <code>ResponseItem::Message</code>** by calling <code>build_developer_update_item(developer_sections)</code>. Each section is entered separately as <code>ContentItem::InputText</code>, so it can be distinguished from the model's perspective.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/context_manager/updates.rs:161
pub(crate) fn build_developer_update_item(text_sections: Vec&#x3C;String>) -> Option&#x3C;ResponseItem> {
    build_text_message("developer", text_sections)
}

fn build_text_message(role: &#x26;str, text_sections: Vec&#x3C;String>) -> Option&#x3C;ResponseItem> {
    let content = text_sections
        .into_iter()
        .map(|text| ContentItem::InputText { text })
        .collect();
    Some(ResponseItem::Message {
        id: None,
        role: role.to_string(),
        content,
        end_turn: None,
        phase: None,
    })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Separation of developer instructions vs system instructions</h3>
<p>Codex does not use the "system" role. Instead, separate the directive into two roles.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Category</th>
<th>role</th>
<th>Characteristics</th>
<th>Example</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>developer instructions</strong></td>
<td><code>"developer"</code></td>
<td>Policy/functional directive. Define the model's behavioral constraints</td>
<td>sandbox policy, approval rules, personality, collaboration mode</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>contextual user fragment</strong></td>
<td><code>"user"</code></td>
<td>Project-contextual directives. It is recorded in conversation history, but can be selectively excluded from memory</td>
<td>AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, environment context</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>The key reason for this separation is the <strong>memory exclusion rule</strong>. In <code>contextual_user_message.rs</code>, AGENTS.md and skills are classified as prompt scaffolding and are excluded from the memory stage-1 input, but environment context and subagent notification are maintained:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/contextual_user_message.rs:113
pub(crate) fn is_memory_excluded_contextual_user_fragment(content_item: &#x26;ContentItem) -> bool {
    let ContentItem::InputText { text } = content_item else {
        return false;
    };
    AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.matches_text(text) || SKILL_FRAGMENT.matches_text(text)
}
</code></pre>
<h3><code>AGENTS.md</code> discovery and injection mechanism</h3>
<h4>Hierarchical navigation (<code>project_doc.rs</code>)</h4>
<p><code>AGENTS.md</code> is not simply a file in the current directory. It is collected <strong>hierarchically</strong> from the project root to cwd.</p>
<pre><code>프로젝트 루트 탐색:
  cwd에서 위로 올라가며 project_root_markers (.git 등) 탐색
  → 프로젝트 루트 결정

파일 우선순위 (디렉토리별):
  1. AGENTS.override.md   ← 로컬 오버라이드 우선
  2. AGENTS.md            ← 기본
  3. project_doc_fallback_filenames 설정값

수집 순서: project_root → ... → cwd (상위에서 하위로)
결합: 모든 파일 내용을 "\n\n"으로 연결
바이트 제한: project_doc_max_bytes 초과 시 truncation
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/project_doc.rs:35-37
pub const DEFAULT_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "AGENTS.md";
pub const LOCAL_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "AGENTS.override.md";
</code></pre>
<p>The collected project doc is combined with <code>Config::instructions</code> to create <code>user_instructions</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/project_doc.rs:77-120
pub(crate) async fn get_user_instructions(config: &#x26;Config) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let project_docs = read_project_docs(config).await;
    let mut output = String::new();
    if let Some(instructions) = config.user_instructions.clone() {
        output.push_str(&#x26;instructions);
    }
    match project_docs {
        Ok(Some(docs)) => {
            if !output.is_empty() {
                output.push_str("\n\n--- project-doc ---\n\n");
            }
            output.push_str(&#x26;docs);
        }
        // ...
    };
    // JS REPL instructions 추가 (피처 플래그)
    // Hierarchical agents message 추가 (ChildAgentsMd 피처)
}
</code></pre>
<h4>Wrapping Format (<code>UserInstructions</code>)</h4>
<p>Once user_instructions are ready, they are wrapped in <code>contextual_user_sections</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/instructions/user_instructions.rs:19-27
impl UserInstructions {
    pub(crate) fn serialize_to_text(&#x26;self) -> String {
        format!(
            "{prefix}{directory}\n\n&#x3C;INSTRUCTIONS>\n{contents}\n{suffix}",
            prefix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.start_marker(),  // "# AGENTS.md instructions for "
            directory = self.directory,
            contents = self.text,
            suffix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.end_marker(),    // "&#x3C;/INSTRUCTIONS>"
        )
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Final output form:</p>
<pre><code># AGENTS.md instructions for /path/to/project

&#x3C;INSTRUCTIONS>
(Config::instructions 내용)

--- project-doc ---

(프로젝트 루트 AGENTS.md 내용)

(하위 디렉토리 AGENTS.md 내용)
&#x3C;/INSTRUCTIONS>
</code></pre>
<h3><code>SKILL.md</code> injection pipeline</h3>
<p>Skill injection is divided into two stages: <code>render_skills_section()</code> in the developer bundle and <code>build_skill_injections()</code> separately.</p>
<h4>Step 1: Skill list guide (developer channel)</h4>
<p><code>render_skills_section()</code> puts a <strong>list</strong> of available skills into developer instructions:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/skills/render.rs:5-48
pub fn render_skills_section(skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata]) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let mut lines: Vec&#x3C;String> = Vec::new();
    lines.push("## Skills".to_string());
    // ...
    for skill in skills {
        let path_str = skill.path_to_skills_md.to_string_lossy();
        lines.push(format!("- {name}: {description} (file: {path_str})"));
    }
    lines.push("### How to use skills".to_string());
    // 트리거 규칙, progressive disclosure 등
    Some(format!("{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_OPEN_TAG}\n{body}\n{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_CLOSE_TAG}"))
}
</code></pre>
<h4>Step 2: Inject skill body (user channel)</h4>
<p>When the user explicitly mentions <code>$skill-name</code>, <code>build_skill_injections()</code> reads the SKILL.md file and wraps it in <code>SkillInstructions</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/instructions/user_instructions.rs:46-53
impl From&#x3C;SkillInstructions> for ResponseItem {
    fn from(si: SkillInstructions) -> Self {
        SKILL_FRAGMENT.into_message(SKILL_FRAGMENT.wrap(format!(
            "&#x3C;name>{}&#x3C;/name>\n&#x3C;path>{}&#x3C;/path>\n{}",
            si.name, si.path, si.contents
        )))
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Final output form:</p>
<pre><code class="language-xml">&#x3C;skill>
&#x3C;name>dev-frontend&#x3C;/name>
&#x3C;path>/project/.codex/skills/dev-frontend/SKILL.md&#x3C;/path>
(SKILL.md 본문)
&#x3C;/skill>
</code></pre>
<h3>Contextual User Fragment System</h3>
<p><code>contextual_user_message.rs</code> defines 6 types of fragments. Each is identified by a start/end marker.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Fragment</th>
<th>start marker</th>
<th>end marker</th>
<th>excluding memory</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code># AGENTS.md instructions for </code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/INSTRUCTIONS></code></td>
<td>✅ Excluded</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SKILL_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;skill></code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/skill></code></td>
<td>✅ Excluded</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>ENVIRONMENT_CONTEXT_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;environment_context></code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/environment_context></code></td>
<td>❌ Maintain</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>USER_SHELL_COMMAND_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;user_shell_command></code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/user_shell_command></code></td>
<td>❌ Maintain</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>TURN_ABORTED_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;turn_aborted></code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/turn_aborted></code></td>
<td>❌ Maintain</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SUBAGENT_NOTIFICATION_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;subagent_notification></code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/subagent_notification></code></td>
<td>❌ Maintain</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Even in the guardian transcript, these fragments are filtered out with <code>is_contextual_user_message_content()</code> and excluded. In other words, the guardian only sees the actual conversation content, not the prompt scaffolding.</p>
<h3>Environment Context Structure</h3>
<p><code>EnvironmentContext</code> is serialized to XML and put into the contextual user fragment:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/environment_context.rs:163-198
pub fn serialize_to_xml(self) -> String {
    let mut lines = Vec::new();
    if let Some(cwd) = self.cwd {
        lines.push(format!("  &#x3C;cwd>{}&#x3C;/cwd>", cwd.to_string_lossy()));
    }
    lines.push(format!("  &#x3C;shell>{}&#x3C;/shell>", self.shell.name()));
    if let Some(current_date) = self.current_date { /* ... */ }
    if let Some(timezone) = self.timezone { /* ... */ }
    match self.network { /* allowed/denied domains */ }
    if let Some(subagents) = self.subagents { /* ... */ }
    ENVIRONMENT_CONTEXT_FRAGMENT.wrap(lines.join("\n"))
}
</code></pre>
<p>Example output:</p>
<pre><code class="language-xml">&#x3C;environment_context>
  &#x3C;cwd>/Users/dev/project&#x3C;/cwd>
  &#x3C;shell>zsh&#x3C;/shell>
  &#x3C;current_date>2026-03-26&#x3C;/current_date>
  &#x3C;timezone>Asia/Seoul&#x3C;/timezone>
  &#x3C;network enabled="true">
    &#x3C;allowed>api.github.com&#x3C;/allowed>
    &#x3C;denied>evil.example.com&#x3C;/denied>
  &#x3C;/network>
&#x3C;/environment_context>
</code></pre>
<h3>Custom Prompts (slash commands)</h3>
<p><code>.md</code> files in the <code>$CODEX_HOME/prompts/</code> directory are loaded with a custom prompt:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/custom_prompts.rs:83-145
fn parse_frontmatter(content: &#x26;str) -> (Option&#x3C;String>, Option&#x3C;String>, String) {
    // YAML-like frontmatter 파싱:
    // ---
    // description: "짧은 설명"
    // argument-hint: "힌트 텍스트"
    // ---
    // (본문)
}
</code></pre>
<p>Extracts <code>description</code> and <code>argument-hint</code> from frontmatter and uses the rest as the prompt body. The file name (excluding extension) becomes the slash command name.</p>
<h3>Review Prompts</h3>
<p>Use a fixed prompt template for each code review mode:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/review_prompts.rs:13-16
const UNCOMMITTED_PROMPT: &#x26;str = "Review the current code changes (staged, unstaged, and \
    untracked files) and provide prioritized findings.";

const BASE_BRANCH_PROMPT: &#x26;str = "Review the code changes against the base branch \
    '{baseBranch}'. The merge base commit for this comparison is {mergeBaseSha}. \
    Run `git diff {mergeBaseSha}` to inspect the changes relative to {baseBranch}. \
    Provide prioritized, actionable findings.";

const COMMIT_PROMPT_WITH_TITLE: &#x26;str = "Review the code changes introduced by commit \
    {sha} (\"{title}\"). Provide prioritized, actionable findings.";
</code></pre>
<h3>Guardian Prompt Assembly</h3>
<p>The guardian subagent has a separate prompt pipeline.</p>
<h4>Policy prompt (<code>guardian/prompt.rs</code>)</h4>
<p>Include <code>policy.md</code> at compile time with <code>include_str!</code> and append the JSON output schema to your code:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/guardian/prompt.rs:437-439
pub(crate) fn guardian_policy_prompt() -> String {
    let prompt = include_str!("policy.md").trim_end();
    format!("{prompt}\n\n{}\n", guardian_output_contract_prompt())
}
</code></pre>
<p>output contract:</p>
<pre><code class="language-json">{
  "risk_level": "low" | "medium" | "high",
  "risk_score": 0-100,
  "rationale": "string",
  "evidence": [{"message": "string", "why": "string"}]
}
</code></pre>
<h4>Request Prompt (<code>build_guardian_prompt_items</code>)</h4>
<p>Extract the transcript from the conversation history, but filter out the contextual user messages, truncate them within the token budget, and composite them with the planned action JSON:</p>
<pre><code>>>> TRANSCRIPT START
[1] user: 사용자 요청 내용
[2] tool shell call: {"command": "..."}
[3] assistant: 응답 내용
>>> TRANSCRIPT END

>>> APPROVAL REQUEST START
Planned action JSON:
{"type": "shell", "command": ["rm", "-rf", "..."]}
>>> APPROVAL REQUEST END
</code></pre>
<p>The token budget manages user messages and tool evidence separately:</p>
<pre><code>GUARDIAN_MAX_MESSAGE_TRANSCRIPT_TOKENS — user/assistant 메시지 예산
GUARDIAN_MAX_TOOL_TRANSCRIPT_TOKENS    — tool call/result 예산
GUARDIAN_MAX_MESSAGE_ENTRY_TOKENS      — 개별 메시지 토큰 상한
GUARDIAN_MAX_TOOL_ENTRY_TOKENS         — 개별 tool 항목 토큰 상한
GUARDIAN_RECENT_ENTRY_LIMIT            — 최근 non-user 항목 개수 제한
</code></pre>
<p>The guardian subagent's developer_instructions are emitted as a separate developer message in <code>build_initial_context()</code> (<code>separate_guardian_developer_message</code> flag):</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex.rs:3597-3604
if separate_guardian_developer_message
    &#x26;&#x26; let Some(developer_instructions) = turn_context.developer_instructions.as_deref()
{
    items.push(
        build_developer_update_item(vec![developer_instructions.to_string()])
    );
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Memory Prompt Template</h3>
<p>The memory system renders prompts with the Askama template engine.</p>
<h4>read_path.md — Memory reading guide (developer channel)</h4>
<p>Read <code>memory_summary.md</code> from <code>build_memory_tool_developer_instructions()</code> and insert it into developer instructions:</p>
<pre><code class="language-markdown">&#x3C;!-- core/templates/memories/read_path.md (요약) -->
## Memory
You have access to a memory folder with guidance from prior runs.
Memory layout:
- {{ base_path }}/memory_summary.md
- {{ base_path }}/MEMORY.md (searchable registry)
- {{ base_path }}/skills/&#x3C;skill-name>/
- {{ base_path }}/rollout_summaries/

========= MEMORY_SUMMARY BEGINS =========
{{ memory_summary }}
========= MEMORY_SUMMARY ENDS =========
</code></pre>
<p>Token limit: truncate memory_summary with <code>MEMORY_TOOL_DEVELOPER_INSTRUCTIONS_SUMMARY_TOKEN_LIMIT</code>.</p>
<h4>stage_one_input.md — Rollout summary input</h4>
<pre><code class="language-markdown">&#x3C;!-- core/templates/memories/stage_one_input.md -->
rollout_context:
- rollout_path: {{ rollout_path }}
- rollout_cwd: {{ rollout_cwd }}

rendered conversation:
{{ rollout_contents }}
</code></pre>
<p>The rollout content is truncated only up to the number of tokens to which the <code>CONTEXT_WINDOW_PERCENT</code> ratio is applied in addition to the <code>effective_context_window_percent</code> of the model's context_window.</p>
<h3>Context Compaction</h3>
<p>Automatic compaction occurs when the context window runs out:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/compact.rs:31-33
pub const SUMMARIZATION_PROMPT: &#x26;str = include_str!("../templates/compact/prompt.md");
pub const SUMMARY_PREFIX: &#x26;str = include_str!("../templates/compact/summary_prefix.md");
const COMPACT_USER_MESSAGE_MAX_TOKENS: usize = 20_000;
</code></pre>
<p>compaction prompt:</p>
<pre><code class="language-markdown">&#x3C;!-- core/templates/compact/prompt.md -->
You are performing a CONTEXT CHECKPOINT COMPACTION.
Create a handoff summary for another LLM that will resume the task.
Include:
- Current progress and key decisions made
- Important context, constraints, or user preferences
- What remains to be done (clear next steps)
- Any critical data, examples, or references needed to continue
</code></pre>
<p>Compaction has two modes:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Pre-turn/Manual</strong>: <code>InitialContextInjection::DoNotInject</code> — After summarizing, replace the history and re-inject the initial context in the next turn.</li>
<li><strong>Mid-turn</strong>: <code>InitialContextInjection::BeforeLastUserMessage</code> — Insert initial context before the last user message, even after the summary.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Context Window Management</h3>
<h4>Calculate effective context window</h4>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/codex.rs:871-876
pub(crate) fn model_context_window(&#x26;self) -> Option&#x3C;i64> {
    let effective_context_window_percent = self.model_info.effective_context_window_percent;
    self.model_info.context_window.map(|context_window| {
        context_window.saturating_mul(effective_context_window_percent) / 100
    })
}
</code></pre>
<p>The actual usable token is calculated as <code>context_window * effective_context_window_percent / 100</code>. The default values ​​are <code>context_window=272_000</code>, <code>effective_context_window_percent=95</code>, so about 258,400 tokens.</p>
<h4>Token usage tracking</h4>
<p>At the end of each turn, update the current token usage with <code>update_token_info_from_usage()</code>. When the context window is exceeded, compaction is triggered with <code>set_token_usage_full()</code>. In remote compact(<code>compact_remote.rs</code>), the function call history is trimmed with <code>trim_function_call_history_to_fit_context_window()</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart LR
    A["turn 완료"] --> B{"토큰 사용량 체크"}
    B -->|"한도 내"| C["다음 턴 진행"]
    B -->|"한도 초과"| D{"remote compact 가능?"}
    D -->|"OpenAI provider"| E["remote compact&#x3C;br/>(trim_function_call_history)"]
    D -->|"기타"| F["inline compact&#x3C;br/>(SUMMARIZATION_PROMPT)"]
    E --> C
    F --> C
</code></pre>
<h3>Full prompt assembly pipeline diagram</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart TB
    subgraph INIT["세션 초기화"]
        A1["Config 로드"] --> A2["AGENTS.md 계층적 수집&#x3C;br/>(project_doc.rs)"]
        A2 --> A3["user_instructions 합성&#x3C;br/>(Config::instructions + project docs)"]
        A3 --> A4["TurnContext 구성"]
    end

    subgraph BUILD["build_initial_context()"]
        B1["developer_sections = Vec::new()"]
        B1 --> B2["① model switch"]
        B2 --> B3["② from_policy(sandbox, approval)"]
        B3 --> B4["③ developer_instructions"]
        B4 --> B5["④ memory tool prompt"]
        B5 --> B6["⑤ collaboration mode"]
        B6 --> B7["⑥ realtime item"]
        B7 --> B8["⑦ personality"]
        B8 --> B9["⑧ apps section"]
        B9 --> B10["⑨ skills section"]
        B10 --> B11["⑩ plugins section"]
        B11 --> B12["⑪ commit attribution"]

        B12 --> C1["contextual_user_sections = Vec::new()"]
        C1 --> C2["UserInstructions (AGENTS.md 래핑)"]
        C2 --> C3["EnvironmentContext (XML)"]
    end

    subgraph MERGE["최종 합성"]
        D1["build_developer_update_item(developer_sections)&#x3C;br/>→ developer role ResponseItem"]
        D2["build_contextual_user_message(contextual_user_sections)&#x3C;br/>→ user role ResponseItem"]
        D3["guardian policy (조건부)&#x3C;br/>→ 별도 developer role ResponseItem"]
    end

    subgraph INJECT["턴 실행 시 추가 주입"]
        E1["skill mentions → build_skill_injections()&#x3C;br/>→ user role items"]
        E2["설정 변경 → build_settings_update_items()&#x3C;br/>→ developer/user update items"]
    end

    A4 --> BUILD
    B12 --> D1
    C3 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> INJECT
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h3>Interpretation from fork perspective</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Do not copy only <code>default.md</code></li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> developer bundle assembly function is the key</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>AGENTS.md</code> and skill are user fragment contextual, not developer channel</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> plugin hint is a developer channel, unlike skill</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> guardian separates policy prompts into separate developer messages</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> AGENTS.md is collected hierarchically and AGENTS.override.md takes precedence.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> You also need to decide whether to fork the history reconstruction and memory exclusion rules together.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> You need to decide how to use the context compaction strategy (remote vs inline)</li>
</ul>
<h3>Rules that we can keep as is</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Rules</th>
<th>Reason</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Policy directives are placed in the developer channel</td>
<td>Sandbox and approval policies become clear</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Place the repo local directive as a contextual user fragment</td>
<td>Easy to manage separately from history and memory</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>The skill text is wrapped in a separate wrapper</td>
<td>You can track what skills were used</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Plugin hint is set to developer channel</td>
<td>Function hints and file directives can be separated</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>AGENTS.md Hierarchical Collections</td>
<td>It is possible to separate directives by directory in a monorepo</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Manage memory exclusion rules on a fragment basis</td>
<td>Scaffolding and automatic separation of conversation content are key</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Place the context compaction prompt as an external template</td>
<td>Prompt modification is possible without changing code</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Boundary between core and optional</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> core: <code>BaseInstructions</code>, permissions-based developer prompt, <code>AGENTS.md</code> wrapper (including hierarchical collection), explicit skill injection, environment context, contextual fragment marker system</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> optional: memory prompt, personality prompt, plugin hint injection, skill dependency installation, collaboration mode preset, guardian subagent, realtime conversation, JS REPL instructions, custom prompts</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> When forking, you must decide whether to take all optional layers from the beginning.</li>
</ul>

<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: The input channels of base instructions, developer instructions, <code>AGENTS.md</code>, skill, and plugin hint were separated and organized.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: Summary and detailed version were combined.</li>
<li>2026-03-27: Significant reinforcement — <code>build_initial_context()</code> 11-step assembly order reorganized to code-based, AGENTS.md hierarchical navigation/wrapping mechanism detailed, SKILL.md 2-step injection (list → body) analysis added, contextual user fragment 6 types of marker table and memory exclusion rule code attached, EnvironmentContext XML serialization structure added, guardian prompt pipeline (policy.md + transcript) Detailed documentation (budget + separation developer message), added memory template (read_path/stage_one_input) analysis, added context compaction (inline/remote) prompt and token management, added context window valid calculation expression and automatic compaction trigger flow, added custom prompts frontmatter parsing and review prompts template, added full pipeline mermaid flowchart, added developer vs system instructions separation description, expanded core file list to table.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>002_prompt-context/02_co_prompt.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>프롬프트와 컨텍스트 주입 파이프라인</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — <code>core/src/instructions/</code>, <code>core/src/context_manager/</code>, <code>AGENTS.md</code> injection paths cited in-body.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex의 프롬프트 시스템을 보면서 가장 먼저 버려야 할 오해는 모든 지시문이 한 군데에서 한 번에 붙는다는 생각이다. 실제 코드는 적어도 네 개의 별도 채널을 쓴다. 기본 base instructions, 동적으로 조립되는 developer instructions, <code>AGENTS.md</code>와 스킬 같은 contextual user fragment, 그리고 plugin이나 collaboration mode가 추가하는 부가 힌트가 서로 다른 형식으로 들어간다.</p>
<p>이 구분은 우리 포크에서 매우 중요하다. 우리는 "프롬프트 파일 하나만 복사하면 된다"가 아니라, <strong>어떤 지시문이 어떤 역할 메시지로 들어가는지</strong>를 복제해야 한다. 같은 텍스트라도 developer message로 넣느냐, user context fragment로 넣느냐에 따라 이후 메모리 제외 규칙, history reconstruction, visible item 처리 방식이 달라진다.</p>
<p>실제 조립 순서를 보면 <code>codex.rs</code>는 먼저 sandbox와 approval policy를 developer instructions로 바꾸고, 그 위에 현재 turn의 <code>developer_instructions</code>, memory tool 지시문, collaboration mode 지시문, realtime 관련 메시지, personality 메시지를 얹는다. 반면 <code>AGENTS.md</code>와 <code>SKILL.md</code>는 이 developer bundle 안으로 들어가지 않고, 별도 <code>ResponseItem::Message</code>의 user role 텍스트로 감싸져 conversation item으로 기록된다.</p>
<p>또 하나의 중요한 차이는 plugin mention이다. skill과 다르게 plugin mention은 <code>build_plugin_injections()</code>를 통해 developer instructions 쪽으로 들어간다. 즉 Codex는 "파일형 지시문"과 "기능형 힌트"를 의도적으로 다른 채널로 보내고 있다. 이 분리는 우리 쪽에서 포크할 때 그대로 가져갈 가치가 크다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["base instructions&#x3C;br/>(protocol/prompts/default.md)"] --> E["model input context"]
    B["developer instructions bundle&#x3C;br/>(codex.rs → build_initial_context)"] --> E
    C["contextual user items&#x3C;br/>(AGENTS.md, skills, env context)"] --> E
    D["plugin/app/skill hints&#x3C;br/>(developer channel)"] --> E
    F["guardian policy prompt&#x3C;br/>(별도 developer message)"] --> E

    style A fill:#2d5016,color:#fff
    style B fill:#1a3a5c,color:#fff
    style C fill:#5c3a1a,color:#fff
    style D fill:#3a1a5c,color:#fff
    style F fill:#5c1a2d,color:#fff
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant TC as TurnContext
    participant BIC as build_initial_context()
    participant DS as developer_sections Vec
    participant CUS as contextual_user_sections Vec
    participant UPD as context_manager::updates
    participant OUT as ResponseItem 출력

    TC->>BIC: sandbox/approval/model 상태
    BIC->>DS: ① model_switch_message (조건부)
    BIC->>DS: ② DeveloperInstructions::from_policy()
    BIC->>DS: ③ turn_context.developer_instructions
    BIC->>DS: ④ build_memory_tool_developer_instructions()
    BIC->>DS: ⑤ from_collaboration_mode()
    BIC->>DS: ⑥ build_initial_realtime_item()
    BIC->>DS: ⑦ personality_spec_message()
    BIC->>DS: ⑧ render_apps_section()
    BIC->>DS: ⑨ render_skills_section()
    BIC->>DS: ⑩ render_plugins_section()
    BIC->>DS: ⑪ commit_message_trailer_instruction()
    BIC->>CUS: UserInstructions (AGENTS.md)
    BIC->>CUS: EnvironmentContext (XML)
    DS->>UPD: build_developer_update_item()
    CUS->>UPD: build_contextual_user_message()
    UPD->>OUT: developer role message
    UPD->>OUT: user role message
    BIC->>OUT: guardian policy (별도 developer message, 조건부)
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>기술 참조</h2>
<h3>프롬프트 입력 채널</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>채널</th>
<th>소스 파일</th>
<th>들어가는 형식</th>
<th>의미</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>base instructions</td>
<td><code>codex-rs/protocol/src/prompts/base_instructions/default.md</code></td>
<td><code>BaseInstructions</code></td>
<td>가장 바닥의 공통 작업 규칙</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>developer bundle</td>
<td><code>DeveloperInstructions::from_*</code>와 <code>codex.rs</code> 조립부</td>
<td>developer role text</td>
<td>런타임 정책과 mode별 지시</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>AGENTS fragment</td>
<td><code>core/src/instructions/user_instructions.rs</code></td>
<td>user role contextual fragment</td>
<td>repo 또는 dir별 작업 규칙</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>skill fragment</td>
<td><code>core/src/instructions/user_instructions.rs</code></td>
<td>user role contextual fragment</td>
<td>선택된 <code>SKILL.md</code> 본문</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>environment context</td>
<td><code>core/src/environment_context.rs</code></td>
<td>user role XML fragment</td>
<td>cwd, shell, date, network, subagents</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>plugin hint</td>
<td><code>core/src/plugins/injection.rs</code></td>
<td>developer role text</td>
<td>plugin이 노출하는 MCP, app, prefix 힌트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>guardian policy</td>
<td><code>core/src/guardian/prompt.rs</code> + <code>policy.md</code></td>
<td>별도 developer message</td>
<td>guardian subagent 전용 정책</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>review prompt</td>
<td><code>core/src/review_prompts.rs</code></td>
<td>user message</td>
<td>코드 리뷰 요청 프롬프트</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>custom prompt</td>
<td><code>core/src/custom_prompts.rs</code></td>
<td>slash command 입력</td>
<td><code>$CODEX_HOME/prompts/*.md</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>compact prompt</td>
<td><code>core/templates/compact/prompt.md</code></td>
<td>user message</td>
<td>context compaction 요약 지시</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>memory prompt</td>
<td><code>core/templates/memories/read_path.md</code></td>
<td>developer text 섹션</td>
<td>메모리 읽기 경로 안내</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>developer bundle 조립 순서 (build_initial_context)</h3>
<p><code>codex.rs</code>의 <code>build_initial_context()</code> 함수가 <code>developer_sections: Vec&#x3C;String></code>을 조립하는 실제 순서다. 코드 라인 3434–3606 참조.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>순서</th>
<th>조립 요소</th>
<th>코드 위치</th>
<th>조건</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>①</td>
<td>model switch 메시지</td>
<td><code>build_model_instructions_update_item()</code></td>
<td>이전 턴과 모델이 다를 때</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>②</td>
<td>sandbox/approval policy</td>
<td><code>DeveloperInstructions::from_policy()</code></td>
<td>항상</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>③</td>
<td>현재 turn의 developer_instructions</td>
<td><code>turn_context.developer_instructions</code></td>
<td>guardian이 아닐 때</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>④</td>
<td>memory tool 안내</td>
<td><code>build_memory_tool_developer_instructions()</code></td>
<td>MemoryTool 피처 + use_memories</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑤</td>
<td>collaboration mode</td>
<td><code>DeveloperInstructions::from_collaboration_mode()</code></td>
<td>모드에 지시문이 있을 때</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑥</td>
<td>realtime 초기 메시지</td>
<td><code>build_initial_realtime_item()</code></td>
<td>realtime 상태 변경 시</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑦</td>
<td>personality message</td>
<td><code>personality_spec_message()</code></td>
<td>Personality 피처 + baked 아닐 때</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑧</td>
<td>apps section</td>
<td><code>render_apps_section()</code></td>
<td>apps_enabled 일 때</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑨</td>
<td>skills section</td>
<td><code>render_skills_section()</code></td>
<td>implicit skills 존재 시</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑩</td>
<td>plugins section</td>
<td><code>render_plugins_section()</code></td>
<td>loaded plugins 존재 시</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>⑪</td>
<td>commit attribution</td>
<td><code>commit_message_trailer_instruction()</code></td>
<td>CodexGitCommit 피처</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>조립이 끝나면 <code>build_developer_update_item(developer_sections)</code> 호출로 **단일 developer role <code>ResponseItem::Message</code>**로 합성된다. 각 section은 별도 <code>ContentItem::InputText</code>로 들어가므로 모델 입장에서 구분 가능하다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/context_manager/updates.rs:161
pub(crate) fn build_developer_update_item(text_sections: Vec&#x3C;String>) -> Option&#x3C;ResponseItem> {
    build_text_message("developer", text_sections)
}

fn build_text_message(role: &#x26;str, text_sections: Vec&#x3C;String>) -> Option&#x3C;ResponseItem> {
    let content = text_sections
        .into_iter()
        .map(|text| ContentItem::InputText { text })
        .collect();
    Some(ResponseItem::Message {
        id: None,
        role: role.to_string(),
        content,
        end_turn: None,
        phase: None,
    })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>developer instructions vs system instructions 분리</h3>
<p>Codex는 "system" role을 쓰지 않는다. 대신 두 가지 role로 지시문을 분리한다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>구분</th>
<th>role</th>
<th>특성</th>
<th>예시</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>developer instructions</strong></td>
<td><code>"developer"</code></td>
<td>정책성·기능성 지시문. 모델의 행동 제약을 정의</td>
<td>sandbox policy, approval rules, personality, collaboration mode</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>contextual user fragment</strong></td>
<td><code>"user"</code></td>
<td>프로젝트 맥락형 지시문. 대화 히스토리에 기록되지만 메모리에서 선별 제외 가능</td>
<td>AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, environment context</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>이 분리의 핵심 이유는 <strong>메모리 제외 규칙</strong>이다. <code>contextual_user_message.rs</code>에서 AGENTS.md와 skill은 prompt scaffolding으로 분류되어 memory stage-1 입력에서 빠지지만, environment context와 subagent notification은 유지된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/contextual_user_message.rs:113
pub(crate) fn is_memory_excluded_contextual_user_fragment(content_item: &#x26;ContentItem) -> bool {
    let ContentItem::InputText { text } = content_item else {
        return false;
    };
    AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.matches_text(text) || SKILL_FRAGMENT.matches_text(text)
}
</code></pre>
<h3><code>AGENTS.md</code> 발견 및 주입 메커니즘</h3>
<h4>계층적 탐색 (<code>project_doc.rs</code>)</h4>
<p><code>AGENTS.md</code>는 단순히 현재 디렉토리 파일 하나가 아니다. 프로젝트 루트부터 cwd까지 <strong>계층적으로</strong> 수집된다.</p>
<pre><code>프로젝트 루트 탐색:
  cwd에서 위로 올라가며 project_root_markers (.git 등) 탐색
  → 프로젝트 루트 결정

파일 우선순위 (디렉토리별):
  1. AGENTS.override.md   ← 로컬 오버라이드 우선
  2. AGENTS.md            ← 기본
  3. project_doc_fallback_filenames 설정값

수집 순서: project_root → ... → cwd (상위에서 하위로)
결합: 모든 파일 내용을 "\n\n"으로 연결
바이트 제한: project_doc_max_bytes 초과 시 truncation
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/project_doc.rs:35-37
pub const DEFAULT_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "AGENTS.md";
pub const LOCAL_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "AGENTS.override.md";
</code></pre>
<p>수집된 project doc은 <code>Config::instructions</code>와 합쳐져 <code>user_instructions</code>가 된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/project_doc.rs:77-120
pub(crate) async fn get_user_instructions(config: &#x26;Config) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let project_docs = read_project_docs(config).await;
    let mut output = String::new();
    if let Some(instructions) = config.user_instructions.clone() {
        output.push_str(&#x26;instructions);
    }
    match project_docs {
        Ok(Some(docs)) => {
            if !output.is_empty() {
                output.push_str("\n\n--- project-doc ---\n\n");
            }
            output.push_str(&#x26;docs);
        }
        // ...
    };
    // JS REPL instructions 추가 (피처 플래그)
    // Hierarchical agents message 추가 (ChildAgentsMd 피처)
}
</code></pre>
<h4>래핑 형식 (<code>UserInstructions</code>)</h4>
<p>user_instructions가 준비되면 <code>contextual_user_sections</code>에 래핑되어 들어간다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/instructions/user_instructions.rs:19-27
impl UserInstructions {
    pub(crate) fn serialize_to_text(&#x26;self) -> String {
        format!(
            "{prefix}{directory}\n\n&#x3C;INSTRUCTIONS>\n{contents}\n{suffix}",
            prefix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.start_marker(),  // "# AGENTS.md instructions for "
            directory = self.directory,
            contents = self.text,
            suffix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.end_marker(),    // "&#x3C;/INSTRUCTIONS>"
        )
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>최종 출력 형태:</p>
<pre><code># AGENTS.md instructions for /path/to/project

&#x3C;INSTRUCTIONS>
(Config::instructions 내용)

--- project-doc ---

(프로젝트 루트 AGENTS.md 내용)

(하위 디렉토리 AGENTS.md 내용)
&#x3C;/INSTRUCTIONS>
</code></pre>
<h3><code>SKILL.md</code> 주입 파이프라인</h3>
<p>스킬 주입은 developer bundle 안의 <code>render_skills_section()</code>과 별도의 <code>build_skill_injections()</code> 두 단계로 나뉜다.</p>
<h4>1단계: 스킬 목록 안내 (developer channel)</h4>
<p><code>render_skills_section()</code>은 사용 가능한 스킬 <strong>목록</strong>을 developer instructions에 넣는다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/skills/render.rs:5-48
pub fn render_skills_section(skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata]) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let mut lines: Vec&#x3C;String> = Vec::new();
    lines.push("## Skills".to_string());
    // ...
    for skill in skills {
        let path_str = skill.path_to_skills_md.to_string_lossy();
        lines.push(format!("- {name}: {description} (file: {path_str})"));
    }
    lines.push("### How to use skills".to_string());
    // 트리거 규칙, progressive disclosure 등
    Some(format!("{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_OPEN_TAG}\n{body}\n{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_CLOSE_TAG}"))
}
</code></pre>
<h4>2단계: 스킬 본문 주입 (user channel)</h4>
<p>사용자가 <code>$skill-name</code>으로 명시적 멘션하면 <code>build_skill_injections()</code>가 SKILL.md 파일을 읽어 <code>SkillInstructions</code>로 래핑한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/instructions/user_instructions.rs:46-53
impl From&#x3C;SkillInstructions> for ResponseItem {
    fn from(si: SkillInstructions) -> Self {
        SKILL_FRAGMENT.into_message(SKILL_FRAGMENT.wrap(format!(
            "&#x3C;name>{}&#x3C;/name>\n&#x3C;path>{}&#x3C;/path>\n{}",
            si.name, si.path, si.contents
        )))
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>최종 출력 형태:</p>
<pre><code class="language-xml">&#x3C;skill>
&#x3C;name>dev-frontend&#x3C;/name>
&#x3C;path>/project/.codex/skills/dev-frontend/SKILL.md&#x3C;/path>
(SKILL.md 본문)
&#x3C;/skill>
</code></pre>
<h3>Contextual User Fragment 체계</h3>
<p><code>contextual_user_message.rs</code>는 6종의 fragment를 정의한다. 각각은 시작/종료 마커로 식별된다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Fragment</th>
<th>시작 마커</th>
<th>종료 마커</th>
<th>메모리 제외</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code># AGENTS.md instructions for </code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/INSTRUCTIONS></code></td>
<td>✅ 제외</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SKILL_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;skill></code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/skill></code></td>
<td>✅ 제외</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>ENVIRONMENT_CONTEXT_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;environment_context></code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/environment_context></code></td>
<td>❌ 유지</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>USER_SHELL_COMMAND_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;user_shell_command></code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/user_shell_command></code></td>
<td>❌ 유지</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>TURN_ABORTED_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;turn_aborted></code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/turn_aborted></code></td>
<td>❌ 유지</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SUBAGENT_NOTIFICATION_FRAGMENT</code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;subagent_notification></code></td>
<td><code>&#x3C;/subagent_notification></code></td>
<td>❌ 유지</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>guardian transcript에서도 이 fragment들은 <code>is_contextual_user_message_content()</code>로 필터링되어 제외된다. 즉 guardian은 프롬프트 scaffolding이 아닌 실제 대화 내용만 본다.</p>
<h3>Environment Context 구조</h3>
<p><code>EnvironmentContext</code>는 XML로 직렬화되어 contextual user fragment로 들어간다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/environment_context.rs:163-198
pub fn serialize_to_xml(self) -> String {
    let mut lines = Vec::new();
    if let Some(cwd) = self.cwd {
        lines.push(format!("  &#x3C;cwd>{}&#x3C;/cwd>", cwd.to_string_lossy()));
    }
    lines.push(format!("  &#x3C;shell>{}&#x3C;/shell>", self.shell.name()));
    if let Some(current_date) = self.current_date { /* ... */ }
    if let Some(timezone) = self.timezone { /* ... */ }
    match self.network { /* allowed/denied domains */ }
    if let Some(subagents) = self.subagents { /* ... */ }
    ENVIRONMENT_CONTEXT_FRAGMENT.wrap(lines.join("\n"))
}
</code></pre>
<p>출력 예시:</p>
<pre><code class="language-xml">&#x3C;environment_context>
  &#x3C;cwd>/Users/dev/project&#x3C;/cwd>
  &#x3C;shell>zsh&#x3C;/shell>
  &#x3C;current_date>2026-03-26&#x3C;/current_date>
  &#x3C;timezone>Asia/Seoul&#x3C;/timezone>
  &#x3C;network enabled="true">
    &#x3C;allowed>api.github.com&#x3C;/allowed>
    &#x3C;denied>evil.example.com&#x3C;/denied>
  &#x3C;/network>
&#x3C;/environment_context>
</code></pre>
<h3>Custom Prompts (slash commands)</h3>
<p><code>$CODEX_HOME/prompts/</code> 디렉토리의 <code>.md</code> 파일들이 커스텀 프롬프트로 로드된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/custom_prompts.rs:83-145
fn parse_frontmatter(content: &#x26;str) -> (Option&#x3C;String>, Option&#x3C;String>, String) {
    // YAML-like frontmatter 파싱:
    // ---
    // description: "짧은 설명"
    // argument-hint: "힌트 텍스트"
    // ---
    // (본문)
}
</code></pre>
<p>frontmatter에서 <code>description</code>과 <code>argument-hint</code>를 추출하고 나머지는 프롬프트 본문으로 사용. 파일 이름(확장자 제외)이 slash command 이름이 된다.</p>
<h3>Review Prompts</h3>
<p>코드 리뷰 모드별로 고정된 프롬프트 템플릿을 사용한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/review_prompts.rs:13-16
const UNCOMMITTED_PROMPT: &#x26;str = "Review the current code changes (staged, unstaged, and \
    untracked files) and provide prioritized findings.";

const BASE_BRANCH_PROMPT: &#x26;str = "Review the code changes against the base branch \
    '{baseBranch}'. The merge base commit for this comparison is {mergeBaseSha}. \
    Run `git diff {mergeBaseSha}` to inspect the changes relative to {baseBranch}. \
    Provide prioritized, actionable findings.";

const COMMIT_PROMPT_WITH_TITLE: &#x26;str = "Review the code changes introduced by commit \
    {sha} (\"{title}\"). Provide prioritized, actionable findings.";
</code></pre>
<h3>Guardian Prompt 조립</h3>
<p>guardian subagent는 별도 분리된 프롬프트 파이프라인을 가진다.</p>
<h4>정책 프롬프트 (<code>guardian/prompt.rs</code>)</h4>
<p><code>policy.md</code>를 <code>include_str!</code>로 컴파일 시점에 포함하고 JSON output schema를 코드에서 덧붙인다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/guardian/prompt.rs:437-439
pub(crate) fn guardian_policy_prompt() -> String {
    let prompt = include_str!("policy.md").trim_end();
    format!("{prompt}\n\n{}\n", guardian_output_contract_prompt())
}
</code></pre>
<p>output contract:</p>
<pre><code class="language-json">{
  "risk_level": "low" | "medium" | "high",
  "risk_score": 0-100,
  "rationale": "string",
  "evidence": [{"message": "string", "why": "string"}]
}
</code></pre>
<h4>요청 프롬프트 (<code>build_guardian_prompt_items</code>)</h4>
<p>대화 히스토리에서 transcript를 추출하되 <strong>contextual user message는 필터링</strong>하고, 토큰 예산 내에서 잘라낸 뒤 planned action JSON과 합성한다:</p>
<pre><code>>>> TRANSCRIPT START
[1] user: 사용자 요청 내용
[2] tool shell call: {"command": "..."}
[3] assistant: 응답 내용
>>> TRANSCRIPT END

>>> APPROVAL REQUEST START
Planned action JSON:
{"type": "shell", "command": ["rm", "-rf", "..."]}
>>> APPROVAL REQUEST END
</code></pre>
<p>토큰 예산은 user message와 tool evidence를 분리 관리한다:</p>
<pre><code>GUARDIAN_MAX_MESSAGE_TRANSCRIPT_TOKENS — user/assistant 메시지 예산
GUARDIAN_MAX_TOOL_TRANSCRIPT_TOKENS    — tool call/result 예산
GUARDIAN_MAX_MESSAGE_ENTRY_TOKENS      — 개별 메시지 토큰 상한
GUARDIAN_MAX_TOOL_ENTRY_TOKENS         — 개별 tool 항목 토큰 상한
GUARDIAN_RECENT_ENTRY_LIMIT            — 최근 non-user 항목 개수 제한
</code></pre>
<p>guardian subagent의 developer_instructions는 <code>build_initial_context()</code>에서 별도 developer message로 방출된다 (<code>separate_guardian_developer_message</code> 플래그):</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex.rs:3597-3604
if separate_guardian_developer_message
    &#x26;&#x26; let Some(developer_instructions) = turn_context.developer_instructions.as_deref()
{
    items.push(
        build_developer_update_item(vec![developer_instructions.to_string()])
    );
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Memory Prompt 템플릿</h3>
<p>메모리 시스템은 Askama 템플릿 엔진으로 프롬프트를 렌더링한다.</p>
<h4>read_path.md — 메모리 읽기 안내 (developer channel)</h4>
<p><code>build_memory_tool_developer_instructions()</code>에서 <code>memory_summary.md</code>를 읽어 developer instructions에 삽입:</p>
<pre><code class="language-markdown">&#x3C;!-- core/templates/memories/read_path.md (요약) -->
## Memory
You have access to a memory folder with guidance from prior runs.
Memory layout:
- {{ base_path }}/memory_summary.md
- {{ base_path }}/MEMORY.md (searchable registry)
- {{ base_path }}/skills/&#x3C;skill-name>/
- {{ base_path }}/rollout_summaries/

========= MEMORY_SUMMARY BEGINS =========
{{ memory_summary }}
========= MEMORY_SUMMARY ENDS =========
</code></pre>
<p>토큰 제한: <code>MEMORY_TOOL_DEVELOPER_INSTRUCTIONS_SUMMARY_TOKEN_LIMIT</code>으로 memory_summary를 truncation.</p>
<h4>stage_one_input.md — 롤아웃 요약 입력</h4>
<pre><code class="language-markdown">&#x3C;!-- core/templates/memories/stage_one_input.md -->
rollout_context:
- rollout_path: {{ rollout_path }}
- rollout_cwd: {{ rollout_cwd }}

rendered conversation:
{{ rollout_contents }}
</code></pre>
<p>롤아웃 내용은 모델의 context_window의 <code>effective_context_window_percent</code>에서 추가로 <code>CONTEXT_WINDOW_PERCENT</code> 비율을 적용한 토큰 수까지만 truncation된다.</p>
<h3>Context Compaction (대화 압축)</h3>
<p>context window가 부족해지면 자동 compaction이 실행된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/compact.rs:31-33
pub const SUMMARIZATION_PROMPT: &#x26;str = include_str!("../templates/compact/prompt.md");
pub const SUMMARY_PREFIX: &#x26;str = include_str!("../templates/compact/summary_prefix.md");
const COMPACT_USER_MESSAGE_MAX_TOKENS: usize = 20_000;
</code></pre>
<p>compaction 프롬프트:</p>
<pre><code class="language-markdown">&#x3C;!-- core/templates/compact/prompt.md -->
You are performing a CONTEXT CHECKPOINT COMPACTION.
Create a handoff summary for another LLM that will resume the task.
Include:
- Current progress and key decisions made
- Important context, constraints, or user preferences
- What remains to be done (clear next steps)
- Any critical data, examples, or references needed to continue
</code></pre>
<p>compaction은 두 가지 모드가 있다:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Pre-turn/Manual</strong>: <code>InitialContextInjection::DoNotInject</code> — 요약 후 히스토리를 교체하고, 다음 턴에서 initial context를 재주입</li>
<li><strong>Mid-turn</strong>: <code>InitialContextInjection::BeforeLastUserMessage</code> — 요약 뒤에도 마지막 user message 앞에 initial context를 삽입</li>
</ul>
<h3>Context Window 관리</h3>
<h4>유효 context window 계산</h4>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/codex.rs:871-876
pub(crate) fn model_context_window(&#x26;self) -> Option&#x3C;i64> {
    let effective_context_window_percent = self.model_info.effective_context_window_percent;
    self.model_info.context_window.map(|context_window| {
        context_window.saturating_mul(effective_context_window_percent) / 100
    })
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>context_window * effective_context_window_percent / 100</code>으로 실제 사용 가능 토큰을 산출한다. 기본값은 <code>context_window=272_000</code>, <code>effective_context_window_percent=95</code>이므로 약 258,400 토큰.</p>
<h4>토큰 사용량 추적</h4>
<p>매 턴 종료 시 <code>update_token_info_from_usage()</code>로 현재 토큰 사용량을 갱신. context window 초과 시 <code>set_token_usage_full()</code>로 compaction을 트리거한다. 원격 compact(<code>compact_remote.rs</code>)에서는 <code>trim_function_call_history_to_fit_context_window()</code>로 function call 히스토리를 잘라낸다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart LR
    A["turn 완료"] --> B{"토큰 사용량 체크"}
    B -->|"한도 내"| C["다음 턴 진행"]
    B -->|"한도 초과"| D{"remote compact 가능?"}
    D -->|"OpenAI provider"| E["remote compact&#x3C;br/>(trim_function_call_history)"]
    D -->|"기타"| F["inline compact&#x3C;br/>(SUMMARIZATION_PROMPT)"]
    E --> C
    F --> C
</code></pre>
<h3>전체 프롬프트 조립 파이프라인 다이어그램</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart TB
    subgraph INIT["세션 초기화"]
        A1["Config 로드"] --> A2["AGENTS.md 계층적 수집&#x3C;br/>(project_doc.rs)"]
        A2 --> A3["user_instructions 합성&#x3C;br/>(Config::instructions + project docs)"]
        A3 --> A4["TurnContext 구성"]
    end

    subgraph BUILD["build_initial_context()"]
        B1["developer_sections = Vec::new()"]
        B1 --> B2["① model switch"]
        B2 --> B3["② from_policy(sandbox, approval)"]
        B3 --> B4["③ developer_instructions"]
        B4 --> B5["④ memory tool prompt"]
        B5 --> B6["⑤ collaboration mode"]
        B6 --> B7["⑥ realtime item"]
        B7 --> B8["⑦ personality"]
        B8 --> B9["⑧ apps section"]
        B9 --> B10["⑨ skills section"]
        B10 --> B11["⑩ plugins section"]
        B11 --> B12["⑪ commit attribution"]

        B12 --> C1["contextual_user_sections = Vec::new()"]
        C1 --> C2["UserInstructions (AGENTS.md 래핑)"]
        C2 --> C3["EnvironmentContext (XML)"]
    end

    subgraph MERGE["최종 합성"]
        D1["build_developer_update_item(developer_sections)&#x3C;br/>→ developer role ResponseItem"]
        D2["build_contextual_user_message(contextual_user_sections)&#x3C;br/>→ user role ResponseItem"]
        D3["guardian policy (조건부)&#x3C;br/>→ 별도 developer role ResponseItem"]
    end

    subgraph INJECT["턴 실행 시 추가 주입"]
        E1["skill mentions → build_skill_injections()&#x3C;br/>→ user role items"]
        E2["설정 변경 → build_settings_update_items()&#x3C;br/>→ developer/user update items"]
    end

    A4 --> BUILD
    B12 --> D1
    C3 --> D2
    D2 --> D3
    D3 --> INJECT
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h3>포크 관점의 해석</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>default.md</code>만 복사해서는 안 된다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> developer bundle 조립 함수가 핵심이다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>AGENTS.md</code>와 skill은 developer channel이 아니라 user contextual fragment다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> plugin hint는 skill과 달리 developer channel이다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> guardian은 별도 developer message로 정책 프롬프트를 분리한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> AGENTS.md는 계층적으로 수집되며 AGENTS.override.md가 우선한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> history reconstruction과 memory exclusion 규칙도 함께 포크할지 결정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> context compaction 전략(remote vs inline)을 어떻게 가져갈지 결정해야 한다</li>
</ul>
<h3>우리 쪽에서 그대로 가져갈 만한 규칙</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>규칙</th>
<th>이유</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>정책성 지시문은 developer channel에 둔다</td>
<td>sandbox와 approval 정책이 명확해진다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>repo 로컬 지시문은 contextual user fragment로 둔다</td>
<td>history와 memory에서 분리 관리가 쉽다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>skill 본문은 별도 wrapper로 감싼다</td>
<td>어떤 스킬이 들어갔는지 추적 가능하다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>plugin hint는 developer channel로 둔다</td>
<td>기능 힌트와 파일 지시문을 분리할 수 있다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>AGENTS.md는 계층적 수집한다</td>
<td>모노레포에서 디렉토리별 지시문 분리가 가능하다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>메모리 제외 규칙을 fragment 단위로 관리한다</td>
<td>scaffolding과 대화 내용의 자동 분리가 핵심이다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>context compaction 프롬프트를 외부 템플릿으로 둔다</td>
<td>프롬프트 수정이 코드 변경 없이 가능하다</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>core와 optional의 경계</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> core: <code>BaseInstructions</code>, permissions 기반 developer prompt, <code>AGENTS.md</code> wrapper (계층적 수집 포함), explicit skill injection, environment context, contextual fragment 마커 체계</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> optional: memory prompt, personality prompt, plugin hint injection, skill dependency 설치, collaboration mode preset, guardian subagent, realtime conversation, JS REPL instructions, custom prompts</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 포크 시 optional 계층을 처음부터 다 가져갈지 결정해야 한다</li>
</ul>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: base instructions, developer instructions, <code>AGENTS.md</code>, skill, plugin hint의 입력 채널을 분리해서 정리했다.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: 요약본과 상세본을 통합했다.</li>
<li>2026-03-27: 대폭 보강 — <code>build_initial_context()</code> 11단계 조립 순서를 코드 기반으로 재정리, AGENTS.md 계층적 탐색·래핑 메커니즘 상세화, SKILL.md 2단계 주입(목록→본문) 분석 추가, contextual user fragment 6종 마커 테이블과 메모리 제외 규칙 코드 첨부, EnvironmentContext XML 직렬화 구조 추가, guardian prompt 파이프라인(policy.md + transcript 예산 + 분리 developer message) 상세 문서화, memory 템플릿(read_path/stage_one_input) 분석 추가, context compaction(inline/remote) 프롬프트와 토큰 관리 추가, context window 유효 계산식과 자동 compaction 트리거 플로우 추가, custom prompts frontmatter 파싱과 review prompts 템플릿 추가, 전체 파이프라인 mermaid flowchart 추가, developer vs system instructions 분리 설명 추가, 핵심 파일 목록을 테이블로 확장.</li>
</ul>
17:["$","$L28","20-axis-02-prompt",{"id":"20-axis-02-prompt","order":19,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 02: Prompt & context","description":"002_prompt-context/02_co_prompt.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$3c"}}]}]
3d:T1e5a8,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 03: Tool runtime</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — <code>core/src/tools/router.rs</code>, <code>tools/</code>, <code>apply-patch</code>, parallel dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>Codex의 툴 시스템은 "모델이 함수 이름을 말하면 handler 하나가 바로 실행된다" 같은 단순 구조가 아니다. 실제로는 <code>ResponseItem</code>을 <code>ToolCall</code>로 바꾸는 라우터가 있고, 그 라우터가 registry를 통해 적절한 handler를 찾고, 실행 중에는 pre-tool hook, mutating 판정, metrics, cancellation, parallel gating까지 함께 처리한다.</li>
<li>이 구조가 중요한 이유는 우리가 CLI를 버리더라도 툴 런타임은 거의 그대로 재사용할 수 있기 때문이다. Codex에서 툴은 UI 기능이 아니라 core 엔진 기능이다. <code>shell</code>, <code>apply_patch</code>, <code>request_user_input</code>, <code>mcp</code>, <code>view_image</code>, <code>dynamic</code>, <code>multi_agents</code>, <code>plan</code>이 같은 registry 계층 아래에 놓여 있다는 점이 특히 중요하다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li>모델이 tool call을 내보내면, Codex core는 다음 순서로 처리한다:</li>
<li>
<ol>
<li><strong><code>ToolRouter::build_tool_call()</code></strong> — <code>ResponseItem</code> 변형(FunctionCall / ToolSearchCall / CustomToolCall / LocalShellCall)을 해석해 <code>ToolCall { tool_name, tool_namespace, call_id, payload }</code> 구조체로 변환한다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="2">
<li><strong><code>ToolCallRuntime::handle_tool_call()</code></strong> — 병렬/직렬 게이팅과 cancellation을 관리하면서 dispatch를 스케줄링한다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="3">
<li><strong><code>ToolRouter::dispatch_tool_call_with_code_mode_result()</code></strong> → <strong><code>ToolRegistry::dispatch_any()</code></strong> — handler lookup, payload kind 검증, pre-tool-use hook 실행, mutating 판정, telemetry, after-tool-use hook까지 실행하는 "정책 포함 실행 파이프라인"이다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="4">
<li><strong><code>ToolHandler::handle()</code></strong> — 개별 handler가 실제 로직을 수행한다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A["model ResponseItem"] --> B["ToolRouter::build_tool_call()"]</li>
<li>B --> C["ToolCall"]</li>
</ul>

</ul>
<h2>Source code snippets</h2>

    D --> E{"parallel?"}
    E -- "read lock" --> F["ToolRouter::dispatch_tool_call_with_code_mode_result()"]

match item {
    ResponseItem::FunctionCall { name, namespace, arguments, call_id, .. } => {
        // MCP 도구인지 먼저 검사
        if let Some((server, tool)) = session.parse_mcp_tool_name(&#x26;name, &#x26;namespace).await {
            // → ToolPayload::Mcp { server, tool, raw_arguments }
        } else {
            // → ToolPayload::Function { arguments }
        }
    }
    ResponseItem::ToolSearchCall { call_id, execution: "client", arguments, .. } => {
        // → ToolPayload::ToolSearch { arguments }
    }
    ResponseItem::CustomToolCall { name, input, call_id, .. } => {
        // → ToolPayload::Custom { input }
    }
    ResponseItem::LocalShellCall { call_id, action: LocalShellAction::Exec(exec), .. } => {
        // → ToolPayload::LocalShell { params }
    }
    _ => Ok(None),  // 처리 불가 item은 무시
}
</code></pre>

2. handler lookup — tool_handler_key(name, namespace)로 HashMap 조회
3. payload kind 검증 — handler.matches_kind(payload)
4. pre-tool-use hook — shell/exec/local_shell 계열이면 명령 문자열 추출 후 hook 실행
5. is_mutating 판정 — mutating이면 tool_call_gate.wait_ready() 대기
6. handler.handle_any(invocation) — 실제 실행, telemetry 자동 계측
7. after-tool-use hook — 성공/실패/duration/mutating 정보를 hook에 전달
</code></pre>

pub(crate) fn tool_handler_key(tool_name: &#x26;str, namespace: Option&#x3C;&#x26;str>) -> String {
    if let Some(namespace) = namespace {
        format!("{namespace}:{tool_name}")
    } else {
        tool_name.to_string()
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// parallel.rs — 핵심 병렬 제어 로직
tokio::select! {
    _ = cancellation_token.cancelled() => {
        Ok(Self::aborted_response(&#x26;call, secs))
    },
    res = async {
        let _guard = if supports_parallel {
            Either::Left(lock.read().await)      // RwLock read
        } else {
            Either::Right(lock.write().await)     // RwLock write
        };
        router.dispatch_tool_call_with_code_mode_result(
            session, turn, tracker, call.clone(), source,
        ).await
    } => res,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Model as 모델
    participant Router as ToolRouter
    participant Runtime as ToolCallRuntime
    participant Registry as ToolRegistry
    participant Hook as Hook System
    participant Handler as handler

    Model->>Router: ResponseItem (FunctionCall 등)
    Router->>Router: build_tool_call() → ToolCall
    Router->>Runtime: handle_tool_call(call, cancellation_token)
    Runtime->>Runtime: RwLock read/write 게이팅
    Runtime->>Registry: dispatch_any(invocation)
    Registry->>Registry: handler lookup + kind 검증
    Registry->>Hook: pre_tool_use hook (shell만)
    Hook-->>Registry: allow / block
    Registry->>Handler: handle(invocation)
    Handler-->>Registry: ToolOutput
    Registry->>Hook: after_tool_use hook
    Hook-->>Registry: continue / abort
    Registry-->>Runtime: AnyToolResult
    Runtime-->>Model: ResponseInputItem
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// registry.rs — ToolRegistryBuilder
pub struct ToolRegistryBuilder {
    handlers: HashMap&#x3C;String, Arc&#x3C;dyn AnyToolHandler>>,
    specs: Vec&#x3C;ConfiguredToolSpec>,
}

impl ToolRegistryBuilder {
    pub fn register_handler&#x3C;H>(&#x26;mut self, name: impl Into&#x3C;String>, handler: Arc&#x3C;H>)
    where H: ToolHandler + 'static {
        let name = name.into();
        let handler: Arc&#x3C;dyn AnyToolHandler> = handler;
        if self.handlers.insert(name.clone(), handler.clone()).is_some() {
            warn!("overwriting handler for tool {name}");
        }
    }

    pub fn build(self) -> (Vec&#x3C;ConfiguredToolSpec>, ToolRegistry) {
        let registry = ToolRegistry::new(self.handlers);
        (self.specs, registry)
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// spec.rs — MCP 도구 등록
if let Some(mcp_tools) = mcp_tools {
    let mut entries: Vec&#x3C;(String, Tool)> = mcp_tools.into_iter().collect();
    entries.sort_by(|a, b| a.0.cmp(&#x26;b.0));
    for (name, tool) in entries {
        match mcp_tool_to_openai_tool(name.clone(), tool) {
            Ok(converted_tool) => {
                builder.push_spec(ToolSpec::Function(converted_tool));
                builder.register_handler(name, mcp_handler.clone());
            }
            Err(e) => { tracing::error!("Failed to convert MCP tool: {e:?}"); }
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>

for tool in dynamic_tools {

        Ok(converted_tool) => {
            builder.push_spec(ToolSpec::Function(converted_tool));
            builder.register_handler(tool.name.clone(), dynamic_tool_handler.clone());

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// registry.rs
#[async_trait]
pub trait ToolHandler: Send + Sync {
    type Output: ToolOutput + 'static;

    fn kind(&#x26;self) -> ToolKind;                      // Function | Mcp

    fn matches_kind(&#x26;self, payload: &#x26;ToolPayload) -> bool { /* 기본 구현 */ }

    async fn is_mutating(&#x26;self, _invocation: &#x26;ToolInvocation) -> bool {
        false  // 기본값: 비파괴적
    }

    async fn handle(&#x26;self, invocation: ToolInvocation) -> Result&#x3C;Self::Output, FunctionCallError>;
}
</code></pre>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Tool registry and execution loop</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — <code>core/src/tools/router.rs</code>, <code>tools/</code>, <code>apply-patch</code>, parallel dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex's tool system is not a simple structure like "when the model says a function name, a handler is immediately executed." In reality, there is a router that changes <code>ResponseItem</code> to <code>ToolCall</code>, and the router finds an appropriate handler through the registry and processes pre-tool hooks, mutating decisions, metrics, cancellation, and parallel gating during execution.</p>
<p>The reason this structure is important is because even if we discard the CLI, the tool runtime can be reused almost as is. In Codex, tools are core engine functions, not UI functions. It is particularly important that <code>shell</code>, <code>apply_patch</code>, <code>request_user_input</code>, <code>mcp</code>, <code>view_image</code>, <code>dynamic</code>, <code>multi_agents</code>, and <code>plan</code> lie under the same registry layer.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. Full dispatch flow</h2>
<h3>1.1 Overview</h3>
<p>When a model issues a tool call, Codex core processes it in the following order:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong><code>ToolRouter::build_tool_call()</code></strong> — Interprets the <code>ResponseItem</code> variant (FunctionCall / ToolSearchCall / CustomToolCall / LocalShellCall) and converts it to the <code>ToolCall { tool_name, tool_namespace, call_id, payload }</code> structure.</li>
<li><strong><code>ToolCallRuntime::handle_tool_call()</code></strong> — Schedules dispatch while managing parallel/serial gating and cancellation.</li>
<li><strong><code>ToolRouter::dispatch_tool_call_with_code_mode_result()</code></strong> → <strong><code>ToolRegistry::dispatch_any()</code></strong> — This is a “policy-inclusive execution pipeline” that executes handler lookup, payload kind verification, pre-tool-use hook execution, mutating decision, telemetry, and after-tool-use hook.</li>
<li><strong><code>ToolHandler::handle()</code></strong> — Individual handlers perform the actual logic.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["model ResponseItem"] --> B["ToolRouter::build_tool_call()"]
    B --> C["ToolCall"]
    C --> D["ToolCallRuntime::handle_tool_call()"]
    D --> E{"parallel?"}
    E -- "read lock" --> F["ToolRouter::dispatch_tool_call_with_code_mode_result()"]
    E -- "write lock" --> F
    F --> G["ToolRegistry::dispatch_any()"]
    G --> H["pre-tool-use hook"]
    H --> I["ToolHandler::handle()"]
    I --> J["after-tool-use hook"]
    J --> K["AnyToolResult → ResponseInputItem"]
</code></pre>
<h3>1.2 <code>ToolRouter::build_tool_call()</code> — item interpretation details</h3>
<p><code>build_tool_call()</code> is a static method and determines the <code>payload</code> of <code>ToolCall</code> according to the <code>ResponseItem</code> enum transformation of the model response.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// router.rs — build_tool_call 핵심 분기
match item {
    ResponseItem::FunctionCall { name, namespace, arguments, call_id, .. } => {
        // MCP 도구인지 먼저 검사
        if let Some((server, tool)) = session.parse_mcp_tool_name(&#x26;name, &#x26;namespace).await {
            // → ToolPayload::Mcp { server, tool, raw_arguments }
        } else {
            // → ToolPayload::Function { arguments }
        }
    }
    ResponseItem::ToolSearchCall { call_id, execution: "client", arguments, .. } => {
        // → ToolPayload::ToolSearch { arguments }
    }
    ResponseItem::CustomToolCall { name, input, call_id, .. } => {
        // → ToolPayload::Custom { input }
    }
    ResponseItem::LocalShellCall { call_id, action: LocalShellAction::Exec(exec), .. } => {
        // → ToolPayload::LocalShell { params }
    }
    _ => Ok(None),  // 처리 불가 item은 무시
}
</code></pre>
<p>Note: Even if <code>FunctionCall</code> comes in, <code>session.parse_mcp_tool_name()</code> first checks the MCP namespace and switches to <code>ToolPayload::Mcp</code>. In other words, <strong>MCP tools come in FunctionCall form, but are separated at the payload stage</strong>.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/router.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<h3>1.3 <code>ToolRegistry::dispatch_any()</code> — Policy execution pipeline</h3>
<p>The reason <code>dispatch_any()</code> is not a simple dispatch is that it goes through all 7 steps:</p>
<pre><code>1. tool_calls 카운터 증가 (active_turn.turn_state)
2. handler lookup — tool_handler_key(name, namespace)로 HashMap 조회
3. payload kind 검증 — handler.matches_kind(payload)
4. pre-tool-use hook — shell/exec/local_shell 계열이면 명령 문자열 추출 후 hook 실행
5. is_mutating 판정 — mutating이면 tool_call_gate.wait_ready() 대기
6. handler.handle_any(invocation) — 실제 실행, telemetry 자동 계측
7. after-tool-use hook — 성공/실패/duration/mutating 정보를 hook에 전달
</code></pre>
<p>If there is no handler, <code>unsupported_tool_call_message</code> is returned to the model. If the payload kind does not match, the entire turn is stopped with a <code>Fatal</code> error.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// registry.rs — handler lookup과 namespace 키 생성
pub(crate) fn tool_handler_key(tool_name: &#x26;str, namespace: Option&#x3C;&#x26;str>) -> String {
    if let Some(namespace) = namespace {
        format!("{namespace}:{tool_name}")
    } else {
        tool_name.to_string()
    }
}
</code></pre>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/registry.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<h3>1.4 <code>ToolCallRuntime</code> — Parallel control and cancellation</h3>
<p><code>ToolCallRuntime</code> uses <code>Arc&#x3C;RwLock&#x3C;()>></code> to control parallel execution:</p>
<ul>
<li>**Handler with <code>supports_parallel_tool_calls = true</code> → <code>lock.read()</code> (multiple handlers can run simultaneously)</li>
<li><strong>handler</strong> with <code>supports_parallel_tool_calls = false</code> → <code>lock.write()</code> (exclusive execution)</li>
</ul>
<p>Cancellation is handled with <code>tokio::select!</code>. When <code>CancellationToken</code> is cancelled, it returns <code>AbortedToolOutput</code> immediately without waiting for the handler.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// parallel.rs — 핵심 병렬 제어 로직
tokio::select! {
    _ = cancellation_token.cancelled() => {
        Ok(Self::aborted_response(&#x26;call, secs))
    },
    res = async {
        let _guard = if supports_parallel {
            Either::Left(lock.read().await)      // RwLock read
        } else {
            Either::Right(lock.write().await)     // RwLock write
        };
        router.dispatch_tool_call_with_code_mode_result(
            session, turn, tracker, call.clone(), source,
        ).await
    } => res,
}
</code></pre>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/parallel.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Model as 모델
    participant Router as ToolRouter
    participant Runtime as ToolCallRuntime
    participant Registry as ToolRegistry
    participant Hook as Hook System
    participant Handler as handler

    Model->>Router: ResponseItem (FunctionCall 등)
    Router->>Router: build_tool_call() → ToolCall
    Router->>Runtime: handle_tool_call(call, cancellation_token)
    Runtime->>Runtime: RwLock read/write 게이팅
    Runtime->>Registry: dispatch_any(invocation)
    Registry->>Registry: handler lookup + kind 검증
    Registry->>Hook: pre_tool_use hook (shell만)
    Hook-->>Registry: allow / block
    Registry->>Handler: handle(invocation)
    Handler-->>Registry: ToolOutput
    Registry->>Hook: after_tool_use hook
    Hook-->>Registry: continue / abort
    Registry-->>Runtime: AnyToolResult
    Runtime-->>Model: ResponseInputItem
</code></pre>
<hr>
