<hr>
<h2>3. Dynamic tool registration mechanism</h2>
<h3>3.1 <code>ToolRegistryBuilder</code> pattern</h3>
<p>Codex requires that the tool configuration can be changed at runtime, so it uses the <code>ToolRegistryBuilder</code> → <code>ToolRegistry</code> builder pattern. The key is that <code>register_handler()</code> puts the name-handler mapping into <code>HashMap&#x3C;String, Arc&#x3C;dyn AnyToolHandler>></code>, and <code>build()</code> converts it into an immutable <code>ToolRegistry</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// registry.rs — ToolRegistryBuilder
pub struct ToolRegistryBuilder {
    handlers: HashMap&#x3C;String, Arc&#x3C;dyn AnyToolHandler>>,
    specs: Vec&#x3C;ConfiguredToolSpec>,
}

impl ToolRegistryBuilder {
    pub fn register_handler&#x3C;H>(&#x26;mut self, name: impl Into&#x3C;String>, handler: Arc&#x3C;H>)
    where H: ToolHandler + 'static {
        let name = name.into();
        let handler: Arc&#x3C;dyn AnyToolHandler> = handler;
        if self.handlers.insert(name.clone(), handler.clone()).is_some() {
            warn!("overwriting handler for tool {name}");
        }
    }

    pub fn build(self) -> (Vec&#x3C;ConfiguredToolSpec>, ToolRegistry) {
        let registry = ToolRegistry::new(self.handlers);
        (self.specs, registry)
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>There is a <code>register_many()</code> method left as a comment, which can be used for batch registration of dynamic tools in the future.</p>
<h3>3.2 MCP tool dynamic registration</h3>
<p>The MCP tool iterates through the entire <code>mcp_tools: HashMap&#x3C;String, Tool></code> in <code>build_specs_with_discoverable_tools()</code> and registers each as <code>mcp_tool_to_openai_tool()</code> → <code>register_handler(name, mcp_handler.clone())</code>. <strong>The same <code>McpHandler</code> instance</strong> is shared by all MCP tools.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// spec.rs — MCP 도구 등록
if let Some(mcp_tools) = mcp_tools {
    let mut entries: Vec&#x3C;(String, Tool)> = mcp_tools.into_iter().collect();
    entries.sort_by(|a, b| a.0.cmp(&#x26;b.0));
    for (name, tool) in entries {
        match mcp_tool_to_openai_tool(name.clone(), tool) {
            Ok(converted_tool) => {
                builder.push_spec(ToolSpec::Function(converted_tool));
                builder.register_handler(name, mcp_handler.clone());
            }
            Err(e) => { tracing::error!("Failed to convert MCP tool: {e:?}"); }
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.3 Dynamic Tool Registration</h3>
<p>Dynamic tools follow a similar pattern. Iterate over the <code>DynamicToolSpec</code> array and register each with <code>dynamic_tool_to_openai_tool()</code> → <code>register_handler(tool.name, dynamic_tool_handler.clone())</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// spec.rs — Dynamic tool 등록
for tool in dynamic_tools {
    match dynamic_tool_to_openai_tool(tool) {
        Ok(converted_tool) => {
            builder.push_spec(ToolSpec::Function(converted_tool));
            builder.register_handler(tool.name.clone(), dynamic_tool_handler.clone());
        }
        Err(e) => { tracing::error!("Failed to convert dynamic tool: {e:?}"); }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.4 Differences between dynamic tools and MCP tools</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Item</th>
<th>dynamic tool</th>
<th>MCP tool</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>definition location</td>
<td>Client registers as app-server</td>
<td>Provided by MCP Server</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>core payload</td>
<td><code>ToolPayload::Function</code> → <code>DynamicToolHandler</code></td>
<td><code>ToolPayload::Mcp</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>inside handler</td>
<td>Send <code>DynamicToolCallRequest</code> event to app-server through <code>oneshot</code> channel, wait for response</td>
<td>RPC to MCP server with <code>handle_mcp_tool_call()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Event</td>
<td><code>DynamicToolCallRequest/Response</code></td>
<td><code>McpToolCallBegin/End</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Execution entity</td>
<td>app-server → client</td>
<td>MCP Server Process</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>History item</td>
<td><code>ThreadItem::DynamicToolCall</code></td>
<td><code>ThreadItem::McpToolCall</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>is_mutating</td>
<td>always <code>true</code></td>
<td>default <code>false</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/dynamic.rs</code>, <code>mcp.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<hr>
<h2>4. <code>ToolHandler</code> trait and <code>ToolPayload</code> type</h2>
<h3>4.1 ToolHandler trait</h3>
<p>Core traits that every handler must implement:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// registry.rs
#[async_trait]
pub trait ToolHandler: Send + Sync {
    type Output: ToolOutput + 'static;

    fn kind(&#x26;self) -> ToolKind;                      // Function | Mcp

    fn matches_kind(&#x26;self, payload: &#x26;ToolPayload) -> bool { /* 기본 구현 */ }

    async fn is_mutating(&#x26;self, _invocation: &#x26;ToolInvocation) -> bool {
        false  // 기본값: 비파괴적
    }

    async fn handle(&#x26;self, invocation: ToolInvocation) -> Result&#x3C;Self::Output, FunctionCallError>;
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>ToolKind</code> is <code>Function</code> | There are only two values: <code>Mcp</code>. The default implementation of <code>matches_kind()</code> allows only the combinations <code>(Function, ToolPayload::Function)</code>, <code>(Function, ToolPayload::ToolSearch)</code>, and <code>(Mcp, ToolPayload::Mcp)</code>.</p>
<h3>4.2 ToolPayload enum</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// context.rs
pub enum ToolPayload {
    Function { arguments: String },           // JSON 문자열
    ToolSearch { arguments: SearchToolCallParams },
    Custom { input: String },
    LocalShell { params: ShellToolCallParams },
    Mcp { server: String, tool: String, raw_arguments: String },
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 ToolInvocation structure</h3>
<p>All context bundles passed to the handler:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// context.rs
pub struct ToolInvocation {
    pub session: Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    pub turn: Arc&#x3C;TurnContext>,
    pub tracker: SharedTurnDiffTracker,
    pub call_id: String,
    pub tool_name: String,
    pub tool_namespace: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub payload: ToolPayload,
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. Orchestrator — Authorize/Sandbox/Retry</h2>
<p><code>ToolOrchestrator</code> is a separate approval-sandbox-execution pipeline used inside <strong>shell and unified_exec family handler</strong>. It is a separate layer from the <code>dispatch_any()</code> policy pipeline of <code>ToolRegistry</code>.</p>
<pre><code>Orchestrator 실행 시퀀스:
1. Approval — ExecApprovalRequirement::NeedsApproval → 사용자/Guardian 승인
2. Sandbox 선택 — SandboxManager::select_initial()
3. 1차 시도 — ToolRuntime::run() + network approval
4. 재시도 — sandbox 에스컬레이션 후 재실행 (approve 캐시 재사용)
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// orchestrator.rs — 핵심 구조
pub(crate) struct ToolOrchestrator {
    sandbox: SandboxManager,
}

impl ToolOrchestrator {
    pub async fn run&#x3C;Rq, Out, T>(
        &#x26;mut self, tool: &#x26;mut T, req: &#x26;Rq,
        tool_ctx: &#x26;ToolCtx, turn_ctx: &#x26;TurnContext,
        approval_policy: AskForApproval,
    ) -> Result&#x3C;OrchestratorRunResult&#x3C;Out>, ToolError> {
        // 1) Approval 단계
        // 2) SandboxAttempt 선택
        // 3) run_attempt() — 실행 + network approval
        // 4) sandbox 실패 시 에스컬레이션 재시도
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>The concrete runtime implementing the <code>ToolRuntime</code> trait is located in the <code>runtimes/</code> directory:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>runtime</th>
<th>file</th>
<th>Use</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Shell runtime</td>
<td><code>runtimes/shell.rs</code> + <code>runtimes/shell/</code></td>
<td>Used by <code>ShellHandler</code>, <code>ShellCommandHandler</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Unified exec runtime</td>
<td><code>runtimes/unified_exec.rs</code></td>
<td><code>UnifiedExecHandler</code> uses</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Apply patch runtime</td>
<td><code>runtimes/apply_patch.rs</code></td>
<td><code>ApplyPatchHandler</code> uses</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/orchestrator.rs</code>, <code>runtimes/mod.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<hr>
<h2>6. Network Approval Mechanism</h2>
<h3>6.1 Structure</h3>
<p><code>NetworkApprovalService</code> manages approval/rejection of network requests that occur during tool execution. Within the sandbox, implement an inline approval flow that asks the user for requests blocked by a network proxy.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// network_approval.rs
pub(crate) struct NetworkApprovalService {
    active_calls: Mutex&#x3C;IndexMap&#x3C;String, Arc&#x3C;ActiveNetworkApprovalCall>>>,
    call_outcomes: Mutex&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;String, NetworkApprovalOutcome>>,
    pending_host_approvals: Mutex&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;HostApprovalKey, Arc&#x3C;PendingHostApproval>>>,
    session_approved_hosts: Mutex&#x3C;HashSet&#x3C;HostApprovalKey>>,
    session_denied_hosts: Mutex&#x3C;HashSet&#x3C;HostApprovalKey>>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.2 Approval Mode</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub(crate) enum NetworkApprovalMode {
    Immediate,  // 실행 직후 즉시 승인 결과 확인
    Deferred,   // 실행 완료 후 나중에 확인 (exit code 기반 판단)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.3 Inline policy decision flow</h3>
<p>When <code>handle_inline_policy_request()</code> is called:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Check session_denied_hosts</strong> → If the host has already been denied, immediately call <code>NetworkDecision::deny</code></li>
<li><strong>Check session_approved_hosts</strong> → If the host has already been approved, immediately <code>NetworkDecision::Allow</code></li>
<li><strong>Create pending approval</strong> → Duplicate requests for the same host are joined to a single approval</li>
<li><strong>Guardian or user approval</strong> → Immediate rejection if <code>AskForApproval::Never</code></li>
<li><strong>Result Caching</strong> → If <code>AllowForSession</code>, applies to the entire session.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// HostApprovalKey — 승인 캐시 키
struct HostApprovalKey {
    host: String,           // 소문자 정규화
    protocol: &#x26;'static str, // "http" | "https" | "socks5-tcp" | "socks5-udp"
    port: u16,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.4 Integration with Orchestrator</h3>
<p><code>ToolOrchestrator::run_attempt()</code> calls <code>begin_network_approval()</code> before execution, and after execution it calls <code>finish_immediate_network_approval()</code> or <code>finish_deferred_network_approval()</code> depending on the mode.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/network_approval.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<hr>
<h2>7. Unified Exec Framework</h2>
<h3>7.1 Overview</h3>
<p><code>UnifiedExecHandler</code> is a PTY-based long-running process management tool. Two subfunctions are processed in one handler:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>exec_command</code></strong> — Creates a new process, allocates a PTY, returns intermediate output after <code>yield_time_ms</code></li>
<li><strong><code>write_stdin</code></strong> — Send stdin input to existing session, collect output</li>
</ul>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// handlers/unified_exec.rs — 핵심 파라미터
struct ExecCommandArgs {
    cmd: String,
    workdir: Option&#x3C;String>,
    shell: Option&#x3C;String>,        // 모델이 셸 경로 지정 가능
    login: Option&#x3C;bool>,          // -lc 모드
    tty: bool,                    // default false → PTY 할당 여부
    yield_time_ms: u64,           // default 10_000ms
    max_output_tokens: Option&#x3C;usize>,
    sandbox_permissions: SandboxPermissions,
    additional_permissions: Option&#x3C;PermissionProfile>,
    justification: Option&#x3C;String>,
    prefix_rule: Option&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;String>>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>7.2 Execution flow</h3>
<pre><code>1. resolve_workdir_base_path() — 작업 디렉터리 결정
2. parse_arguments_with_base_path() — 인자 파싱 (경로 정규화 포함)
3. maybe_emit_implicit_skill_invocation() — 스킬 telemetry
4. manager.allocate_process_id() — 프로세스 ID 할당
5. get_command() — ShellMode에 따라 command 벡터 생성
6. intercept_apply_patch() — apply_patch 명령 가로채기
7. apply_granted_turn_permissions() — 턴 레벨 권한 적용
8. normalize_and_validate_additional_permissions() — 추가 권한 검증
9. manager.exec_command() — UnifiedExecProcessManager에 위임
</code></pre>
<h3>7.3 Shell mode</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum UnifiedExecShellMode {
    Direct,             // 사용자 기본 셸 사용
    ZshFork(ZshForkConfig),  // codex 전용 zsh fork 사용
}
</code></pre>
<p>In <code>Direct</code> mode, the model can specify a different shell with the <code>shell</code> parameter. In <code>ZshFork</code> mode, a separate zsh binary and execve wrapper are used.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/unified_exec.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<hr>

<table>

</tr>

<pre><code>ShellZshFork 활성 → ShellCommand (ZshFork 백엔드)
UnifiedExec 활성 + ConPTY 지원 → UnifiedExec
그 외 → 모델 기본값 또는 ShellCommand fallback
</code></pre>

<hr>
<h2>10. Relationship between <code>apply_patch</code> and shell</h2>
<p>Although <code>apply_patch</code> seems like a completely separate tool, actual shell family handlers (<code>ShellHandler</code>, <code>ShellCommandHandler</code>, <code>UnifiedExecHandler</code>) also intercept <code>apply_patch</code> in the command string through <code>intercept_apply_patch()</code>. That is, Codex attempts to handle patches on both the surfaces of "normal shell calls" and "dedicated patch tools." When forking, you must first decide whether you need a dual surface.</p>
<hr>
<h2>11. Connection between implicit skill invocation and tool execution</h2>
<p>The <code>shell</code> and <code>unified_exec</code> handlers call <code>maybe_emit_implicit_skill_invocation()</code> immediately before execution. However, this function currently does not inject the skill body back into the prompt, but only leaves telemetry that the skill was implicitly used by looking at the command path. Just looking at the name, it looks like automatic skill activation, but the actual implementation is closer to usage tracking.</p>
<hr>
<h2>12. Fork seam / checklist</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> View <code>ToolRouter</code> and <code>ToolRegistry</code> as separate core layers</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> handler is viewed as an engine function, not a product UI</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Distinguish between surface differences between dynamic tools and MCP tools.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Must determine whether <code>apply_patch</code> is a double entry point.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>spec + router + registry + parallel runtime</code> should be viewed as a set</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>shell + unified_exec + apply_patch</code> is a bundle of local execution cores</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>mcp + mcp_tool_call + protocol events</code> must be taken together</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>dynamic handler + app-server bridge</code> is required for client-driven tool surface</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Since <code>ToolOrchestrator</code> bundles approval-sandbox-retry, it is taken separately from the handler.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The core of <code>NetworkApprovalService</code> is the per-session host cache.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> You need to decide whether to keep the pre-tool-use hook or simplify it.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> You must decide whether to use the parallel execution lock policy as is or redesign it.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>tool_suggest</code>, legacy approval API, and <code>multi_agents_v2</code> can be postponed to 2nd priority.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>UnifiedExecShellMode::ZshFork</code> is only for macOS/Zsh, so a fallback to <code>Direct</code> is required in Linux environments.</li>
</ul>

<hr>
<h2>Latest update (2026-05-30)</h2>
<p>This section summarizes the four major changes affecting the tool runtime in the most recent 412 commits (since 2025-07) in the Codex CLI repository.</p>
<h3>A. <code>ToolExposure::Deferred</code> and <code>deferred_mcp_tools</code></h3>
<p>The tool exposure policy has been expanded from the existing Direct/Hidden dichotomy to <strong>4-level enum</strong>.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>value</th>
<th>Meaning</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>Direct</code></td>
<td>Included in the initial model-visible list, also used as a code mode nested tool</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Deferred</code></td>
<td>Excluded from the initial list, only exposed when searching with <code>tool_search</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>DirectModelOnly</code></td>
<td>Expose directly to the model, but not on code-mode nested surfaces</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Hidden</code></td>
<td>dispatch only — spec not exposed in model</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>The core motivation for introducing <code>Deferred</code> is to exclude all MCP tools from the initial prompt and only discover them via <code>tool_search</code> if the number of MCP tools exceeds <code>DIRECT_MCP_TOOL_EXPOSURE_THRESHOLD</code> (currently 100) or the <code>ToolSearchAlwaysDeferMcpTools</code> feature flag is active. <code>build_mcp_tool_exposure()</code> returns a <code>McpToolExposure { direct_tools, deferred_tools }</code> structure, which is delivered to the router through <code>ToolRouterParams::deferred_mcp_tools</code>.</p>
<p>In <code>spec_plan.rs</code>, the deferred MCP tool is created with <code>McpHandler::new()</code> and registered with <code>planned_tools.add_with_exposure(handler, ToolExposure::Deferred)</code>. Afterwards, <code>search_info()</code> of all runtimes where <code>append_tool_search_executor()</code> is <code>ToolExposure::Deferred</code> is collected and injected into <code>ToolSearchHandler</code>.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>codex-rs/tools/src/tool_executor.rs</code> (enum definition)
📁 <code>codex-rs/core/src/mcp_tool_exposure.rs</code> (<code>build_mcp_tool_exposure()</code>)
📁 <code>codex-rs/core/src/tools/spec_plan.rs</code> (deferred registration + tool_search integration)</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>B. Extension API — <code>ToolContributor</code> and <code>TurnItemEmitter</code></h3>
<p>The new Extension API (<code>codex-rs/ext/extension-api/</code>) provides a <code>ToolContributor</code> trait that allows extensions to <strong>dynamically register native tools</strong>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// contributors.rs
pub trait ToolContributor: Send + Sync {
    fn tools(
        &#x26;self,
        session_store: &#x26;ExtensionData,
        thread_store: &#x26;ExtensionData,
    ) -> Vec&#x3C;Arc&#x3C;dyn ToolExecutor&#x3C;ToolCall>>>;
}
</code></pre>
<p>If you register <code>tool_contributor()</code> in <code>ExtensionRegistryBuilder</code>, <code>tool_contributors()</code> will be called every turn to recalculate the list of active tools. On the core side, <code>ExtensionToolAdapter</code> wraps <code>ToolExecutor&#x3C;ExtensionToolCall></code> with <code>CoreToolRuntime</code> and joins the existing <code>ToolRegistry</code> pipeline (pre/post hook, telemetry, parallel gating).</p>
<p><code>TurnItemEmitter</code> is a channel that can push <code>TurnItem</code> (e.g. <code>WebSearchItem</code>) to the session while the extension tool is running. <code>CoreTurnItemEmitter</code> calls <code>Session::emit_turn_item_started/completed()</code> to deliver the event to the client. The extension does not extend session lifetime because the extension tool only has <code>Weak&#x3C;Session></code> and <code>Weak&#x3C;TurnContext></code>.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/extension-api/src/contributors.rs</code> (<code>ToolContributor</code>, <code>ToolLifecycleContributor</code>)
📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/extension-api/src/registry.rs</code> (<code>ExtensionRegistryBuilder</code>)
📁 <code>codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/extension_tools.rs</code> (<code>ExtensionToolAdapter</code>, <code>CoreTurnItemEmitter</code>)</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>C. Image Generation Extension — First ToolContributor Implementation Example</h3>
<p><code>codex-rs/ext/image-generation/</code> is the first practical application of the Extension API. <code>ImageGenerationExtension</code> implements three contributors simultaneously:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>ThreadLifecycleContributor</code></strong> — Inserts <code>ImageGenerationExtensionConfig</code>(enabled + provider) into the thread store when thread starts.</li>
<li><strong><code>ConfigContributor</code></strong> — Enabled status updated when config changes</li>
<li><strong><code>ToolContributor</code></strong> — <code>Feature::ImageGenExt</code> + OpenAI backend + Returns <code>ImageGenerationTool</code> when Codex authentication conditions are met</li>
</ul>
<p><code>ImageGenerationTool</code> returns <code>ToolExposure::DirectModelOnly</code>, which excludes it from code-mode nested surfaces. It is registered as the <code>imagegen</code> tool in the namespace <code>image_gen</code> and uses <code>ToolSpec::Namespace(ResponsesApiNamespace { ... })</code>. When executed, a generate/edit request is sent to the <code>gpt-image-2</code> model through <code>CodexImagesBackend</code>, and the generated image is returned as base64 and persisted on the local disk (<code>generated_images/</code>).</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/image-generation/src/extension.rs</code> (contributor registration)
📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/image-generation/src/tool.rs</code> (<code>ImageGenerationTool</code>, <code>ToolExposure::DirectModelOnly</code>)</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>D. Tool-level integration of Goal Steering</h3>
<p>As Goal Steering was refactored into an Extension API (<code>codex-rs/ext/goal/</code>), the interface with the tool runtime was redefined into two layers: <code>ToolLifecycleContributor</code> and <code>ToolContributor</code>.</p>
<p><strong><code>ToolLifecycleContributor::on_tool_finish()</code></strong> — When tool execution is complete, <code>account_active_goal_progress()</code> is called to reflect the token usage in the goal. Completion of the <code>update_goal</code> tool itself is excluded to avoid double counting. When budget exceedance is detected, <code>InternalModelContextFragment</code> is created with <code>budget_limit_steering_item()</code> and injected into the ongoing turn through <code>GoalRuntimeHandle::inject_active_turn_steering()</code>. This path goes through <code>ThreadManager::get_thread() → inject_if_running()</code>, and is quietly skipped if there are no active turns.</p>
<p><strong><code>ToolContributor::tools()</code></strong> — <code>GoalToolExecutor</code> returns three tools: <code>get_goal</code>, <code>create_goal</code>, and <code>update_goal</code>. These tools directly access the persisted goal DB through <code>codex_state::StateRuntime</code>.</p>
<p><strong><code>TurnLifecycleContributor</code></strong> — If there is an active goal at the start of the turn, the goal_id is marked in the accounting snapshot of the turn, and the accumulated token is flushed to the DB when the turn ends/aborts. If <code>UsageLimitExceeded</code> occurs in <code>on_turn_error()</code>, the active goal switches to the <code>UsageLimited</code> state.</p>
<p>Goal Steering's key impact on tool runtime: Every tool call completion event triggers goal accounting, and when the budget is exceeded, a steering context is inserted between tool responses, causing the model to start wrapping up. This mechanism operates independently of the existing <code>dispatch_any()</code> pipeline and is connected only through the Extension API's lifecycle hook.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/goal/src/extension.rs</code> (implementation of <code>ToolLifecycleContributor</code>, <code>ToolContributor</code>)
📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/goal/src/runtime.rs</code> (<code>inject_active_turn_steering()</code>, <code>account_active_goal_progress()</code>)
📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/goal/src/steering.rs</code> (<code>budget_limit_steering_item()</code>)</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>003_tool-runtime/03_co_tool.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>툴 레지스트리와 실행 루프</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — <code>core/src/tools/router.rs</code>, <code>tools/</code>, <code>apply-patch</code>, parallel dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex의 툴 시스템은 "모델이 함수 이름을 말하면 handler 하나가 바로 실행된다" 같은 단순 구조가 아니다. 실제로는 <code>ResponseItem</code>을 <code>ToolCall</code>로 바꾸는 라우터가 있고, 그 라우터가 registry를 통해 적절한 handler를 찾고, 실행 중에는 pre-tool hook, mutating 판정, metrics, cancellation, parallel gating까지 함께 처리한다.</p>
<p>이 구조가 중요한 이유는 우리가 CLI를 버리더라도 툴 런타임은 거의 그대로 재사용할 수 있기 때문이다. Codex에서 툴은 UI 기능이 아니라 core 엔진 기능이다. <code>shell</code>, <code>apply_patch</code>, <code>request_user_input</code>, <code>mcp</code>, <code>view_image</code>, <code>dynamic</code>, <code>multi_agents</code>, <code>plan</code>이 같은 registry 계층 아래에 놓여 있다는 점이 특히 중요하다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. 전체 디스패치 흐름</h2>
<h3>1.1 개요</h3>
<p>모델이 tool call을 내보내면, Codex core는 다음 순서로 처리한다:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong><code>ToolRouter::build_tool_call()</code></strong> — <code>ResponseItem</code> 변형(FunctionCall / ToolSearchCall / CustomToolCall / LocalShellCall)을 해석해 <code>ToolCall { tool_name, tool_namespace, call_id, payload }</code> 구조체로 변환한다.</li>
<li><strong><code>ToolCallRuntime::handle_tool_call()</code></strong> — 병렬/직렬 게이팅과 cancellation을 관리하면서 dispatch를 스케줄링한다.</li>
<li><strong><code>ToolRouter::dispatch_tool_call_with_code_mode_result()</code></strong> → <strong><code>ToolRegistry::dispatch_any()</code></strong> — handler lookup, payload kind 검증, pre-tool-use hook 실행, mutating 판정, telemetry, after-tool-use hook까지 실행하는 "정책 포함 실행 파이프라인"이다.</li>
<li><strong><code>ToolHandler::handle()</code></strong> — 개별 handler가 실제 로직을 수행한다.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["model ResponseItem"] --> B["ToolRouter::build_tool_call()"]
    B --> C["ToolCall"]
    C --> D["ToolCallRuntime::handle_tool_call()"]
    D --> E{"parallel?"}
    E -- "read lock" --> F["ToolRouter::dispatch_tool_call_with_code_mode_result()"]
    E -- "write lock" --> F
    F --> G["ToolRegistry::dispatch_any()"]
    G --> H["pre-tool-use hook"]
    H --> I["ToolHandler::handle()"]
    I --> J["after-tool-use hook"]
    J --> K["AnyToolResult → ResponseInputItem"]
</code></pre>
<h3>1.2 <code>ToolRouter::build_tool_call()</code> — item 해석 상세</h3>
<p><code>build_tool_call()</code>은 static method로서, 모델 응답의 <code>ResponseItem</code> enum 변형에 따라 <code>ToolCall</code>의 <code>payload</code>를 결정한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// router.rs — build_tool_call 핵심 분기
match item {
    ResponseItem::FunctionCall { name, namespace, arguments, call_id, .. } => {
        // MCP 도구인지 먼저 검사
        if let Some((server, tool)) = session.parse_mcp_tool_name(&#x26;name, &#x26;namespace).await {
            // → ToolPayload::Mcp { server, tool, raw_arguments }
        } else {
            // → ToolPayload::Function { arguments }
        }
    }
    ResponseItem::ToolSearchCall { call_id, execution: "client", arguments, .. } => {
        // → ToolPayload::ToolSearch { arguments }
    }
    ResponseItem::CustomToolCall { name, input, call_id, .. } => {
        // → ToolPayload::Custom { input }
    }
    ResponseItem::LocalShellCall { call_id, action: LocalShellAction::Exec(exec), .. } => {
        // → ToolPayload::LocalShell { params }
    }
    _ => Ok(None),  // 처리 불가 item은 무시
}
</code></pre>
<p>주의할 점: <code>FunctionCall</code>이 들어와도 <code>session.parse_mcp_tool_name()</code>이 먼저 MCP 네임스페이스를 확인해 <code>ToolPayload::Mcp</code>로 전환한다. 즉 <strong>MCP 도구는 FunctionCall 형태로 들어오지만 payload 단계에서 분리된다</strong>.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/router.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<h3>1.3 <code>ToolRegistry::dispatch_any()</code> — 정책 실행 파이프라인</h3>
<p><code>dispatch_any()</code>가 단순 dispatch가 아닌 이유는 다음 7단계를 모두 거치기 때문이다:</p>
<pre><code>1. tool_calls 카운터 증가 (active_turn.turn_state)
2. handler lookup — tool_handler_key(name, namespace)로 HashMap 조회
3. payload kind 검증 — handler.matches_kind(payload)
4. pre-tool-use hook — shell/exec/local_shell 계열이면 명령 문자열 추출 후 hook 실행
5. is_mutating 판정 — mutating이면 tool_call_gate.wait_ready() 대기
6. handler.handle_any(invocation) — 실제 실행, telemetry 자동 계측
7. after-tool-use hook — 성공/실패/duration/mutating 정보를 hook에 전달
</code></pre>
<p>handler가 없으면 <code>unsupported_tool_call_message</code>를 모델에 되돌린다. payload kind가 불일치하면 <code>Fatal</code> 에러로 전체 turn을 중단한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// registry.rs — handler lookup과 namespace 키 생성
pub(crate) fn tool_handler_key(tool_name: &#x26;str, namespace: Option&#x3C;&#x26;str>) -> String {
    if let Some(namespace) = namespace {
        format!("{namespace}:{tool_name}")
    } else {
        tool_name.to_string()
    }
}
</code></pre>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/registry.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<h3>1.4 <code>ToolCallRuntime</code> — 병렬 제어와 cancellation</h3>
<p><code>ToolCallRuntime</code>은 <code>Arc&#x3C;RwLock&#x3C;()>></code>를 사용해 병렬 실행을 제어한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>supports_parallel_tool_calls = true</code>인 handler</strong> → <code>lock.read()</code> (여러 handler 동시 실행 가능)</li>
<li><strong><code>supports_parallel_tool_calls = false</code>인 handler</strong> → <code>lock.write()</code> (독점 실행)</li>
</ul>
<p>cancellation은 <code>tokio::select!</code>로 처리한다. <code>CancellationToken</code>이 취소되면 handler를 기다리지 않고 즉시 <code>AbortedToolOutput</code>을 반환한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// parallel.rs — 핵심 병렬 제어 로직
tokio::select! {
    _ = cancellation_token.cancelled() => {
        Ok(Self::aborted_response(&#x26;call, secs))
    },
    res = async {
        let _guard = if supports_parallel {
            Either::Left(lock.read().await)      // RwLock read
        } else {
            Either::Right(lock.write().await)     // RwLock write
        };
        router.dispatch_tool_call_with_code_mode_result(
            session, turn, tracker, call.clone(), source,
        ).await
    } => res,
}
</code></pre>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/parallel.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Model as 모델
    participant Router as ToolRouter
    participant Runtime as ToolCallRuntime
    participant Registry as ToolRegistry
    participant Hook as Hook System
    participant Handler as handler

    Model->>Router: ResponseItem (FunctionCall 등)
    Router->>Router: build_tool_call() → ToolCall
    Router->>Runtime: handle_tool_call(call, cancellation_token)
    Runtime->>Runtime: RwLock read/write 게이팅
    Runtime->>Registry: dispatch_any(invocation)
    Registry->>Registry: handler lookup + kind 검증
    Registry->>Hook: pre_tool_use hook (shell만)
    Hook-->>Registry: allow / block
    Registry->>Handler: handle(invocation)
    Handler-->>Registry: ToolOutput
    Registry->>Hook: after_tool_use hook
    Hook-->>Registry: continue / abort
    Registry-->>Runtime: AnyToolResult
    Runtime-->>Model: ResponseInputItem
</code></pre>
<hr>

<hr>
<h2>3. 동적 도구 등록 메커니즘</h2>
<h3>3.1 <code>ToolRegistryBuilder</code> 패턴</h3>
<p>Codex는 런타임에 tool 구성이 바뀔 수 있어야 하므로 <code>ToolRegistryBuilder</code> → <code>ToolRegistry</code> 빌더 패턴을 사용한다. 핵심은 <code>register_handler()</code>가 이름-handler 매핑을 <code>HashMap&#x3C;String, Arc&#x3C;dyn AnyToolHandler>></code>에 넣고, <code>build()</code>가 이를 immutable <code>ToolRegistry</code>로 변환하는 구조다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// registry.rs — ToolRegistryBuilder
pub struct ToolRegistryBuilder {
    handlers: HashMap&#x3C;String, Arc&#x3C;dyn AnyToolHandler>>,
    specs: Vec&#x3C;ConfiguredToolSpec>,
}

impl ToolRegistryBuilder {
    pub fn register_handler&#x3C;H>(&#x26;mut self, name: impl Into&#x3C;String>, handler: Arc&#x3C;H>)
    where H: ToolHandler + 'static {
        let name = name.into();
        let handler: Arc&#x3C;dyn AnyToolHandler> = handler;
        if self.handlers.insert(name.clone(), handler.clone()).is_some() {
            warn!("overwriting handler for tool {name}");
        }
    }

    pub fn build(self) -> (Vec&#x3C;ConfiguredToolSpec>, ToolRegistry) {
        let registry = ToolRegistry::new(self.handlers);
        (self.specs, registry)
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>주석으로 남겨진 <code>register_many()</code> 메서드가 있으며, 향후 dynamic tool의 일괄 등록에 사용될 수 있다.</p>
<h3>3.2 MCP 도구 동적 등록</h3>
<p>MCP 도구는 <code>build_specs_with_discoverable_tools()</code> 안에서 <code>mcp_tools: HashMap&#x3C;String, Tool></code> 전체를 순회하며 각각 <code>mcp_tool_to_openai_tool()</code> → <code>register_handler(name, mcp_handler.clone())</code>으로 등록한다. <strong>동일한 <code>McpHandler</code> 인스턴스</strong>가 모든 MCP 도구에 공유된다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// spec.rs — MCP 도구 등록
if let Some(mcp_tools) = mcp_tools {
    let mut entries: Vec&#x3C;(String, Tool)> = mcp_tools.into_iter().collect();
    entries.sort_by(|a, b| a.0.cmp(&#x26;b.0));
    for (name, tool) in entries {
        match mcp_tool_to_openai_tool(name.clone(), tool) {
            Ok(converted_tool) => {
                builder.push_spec(ToolSpec::Function(converted_tool));
                builder.register_handler(name, mcp_handler.clone());
            }
            Err(e) => { tracing::error!("Failed to convert MCP tool: {e:?}"); }
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.3 Dynamic Tool 등록</h3>
<p>Dynamic tool도 유사한 패턴이다. <code>DynamicToolSpec</code> 배열을 순회하며 각각 <code>dynamic_tool_to_openai_tool()</code> → <code>register_handler(tool.name, dynamic_tool_handler.clone())</code>로 등록한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// spec.rs — Dynamic tool 등록
for tool in dynamic_tools {
    match dynamic_tool_to_openai_tool(tool) {
        Ok(converted_tool) => {
            builder.push_spec(ToolSpec::Function(converted_tool));
            builder.register_handler(tool.name.clone(), dynamic_tool_handler.clone());
        }
        Err(e) => { tracing::error!("Failed to convert dynamic tool: {e:?}"); }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.4 동적 도구와 MCP 도구의 차이</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>항목</th>
<th>dynamic tool</th>
<th>MCP tool</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>정의 위치</td>
<td>클라이언트가 app-server로 등록</td>
<td>MCP 서버가 제공</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>core payload</td>
<td><code>ToolPayload::Function</code> → <code>DynamicToolHandler</code></td>
<td><code>ToolPayload::Mcp</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>handler 내부</td>
<td><code>oneshot</code> 채널로 app-server에 <code>DynamicToolCallRequest</code> 이벤트 발송, 응답 대기</td>
<td><code>handle_mcp_tool_call()</code>로 MCP 서버에 RPC</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>이벤트</td>
<td><code>DynamicToolCallRequest/Response</code></td>
<td><code>McpToolCallBegin/End</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>실행 주체</td>
<td>app-server → 클라이언트</td>
<td>MCP 서버 프로세스</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>히스토리 item</td>
<td><code>ThreadItem::DynamicToolCall</code></td>
<td><code>ThreadItem::McpToolCall</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>is_mutating</td>
<td>항상 <code>true</code></td>
<td>기본 <code>false</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/dynamic.rs</code>, <code>mcp.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<hr>
<h2>4. <code>ToolHandler</code> trait과 <code>ToolPayload</code> 타입</h2>
<h3>4.1 ToolHandler trait</h3>
<p>모든 handler가 구현해야 하는 핵심 trait:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// registry.rs
#[async_trait]
pub trait ToolHandler: Send + Sync {
    type Output: ToolOutput + 'static;

    fn kind(&#x26;self) -> ToolKind;                      // Function | Mcp

    fn matches_kind(&#x26;self, payload: &#x26;ToolPayload) -> bool { /* 기본 구현 */ }

    async fn is_mutating(&#x26;self, _invocation: &#x26;ToolInvocation) -> bool {
        false  // 기본값: 비파괴적
    }

    async fn handle(&#x26;self, invocation: ToolInvocation) -> Result&#x3C;Self::Output, FunctionCallError>;
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>ToolKind</code>는 <code>Function</code> | <code>Mcp</code> 두 값만 있다. <code>matches_kind()</code>의 기본 구현은 <code>(Function, ToolPayload::Function)</code>, <code>(Function, ToolPayload::ToolSearch)</code>, <code>(Mcp, ToolPayload::Mcp)</code> 조합만 허용한다.</p>
<h3>4.2 ToolPayload enum</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// context.rs
pub enum ToolPayload {
    Function { arguments: String },           // JSON 문자열
    ToolSearch { arguments: SearchToolCallParams },
    Custom { input: String },
    LocalShell { params: ShellToolCallParams },
    Mcp { server: String, tool: String, raw_arguments: String },
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 ToolInvocation 구조체</h3>
<p>handler에게 전달되는 모든 컨텍스트 번들:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// context.rs
pub struct ToolInvocation {
    pub session: Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    pub turn: Arc&#x3C;TurnContext>,
    pub tracker: SharedTurnDiffTracker,
    pub call_id: String,
    pub tool_name: String,
    pub tool_namespace: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub payload: ToolPayload,
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. Orchestrator — 승인/샌드박스/재시도</h2>
<p><code>ToolOrchestrator</code>는 <strong>shell과 unified_exec 계열 handler 내부</strong>에서 사용하는 별도 승인-샌드박스-실행 파이프라인이다. <code>ToolRegistry</code>의 <code>dispatch_any()</code> 정책 파이프라인과는 별개 계층이다.</p>
<pre><code>Orchestrator 실행 시퀀스:
1. Approval — ExecApprovalRequirement::NeedsApproval → 사용자/Guardian 승인
2. Sandbox 선택 — SandboxManager::select_initial()
3. 1차 시도 — ToolRuntime::run() + network approval
4. 재시도 — sandbox 에스컬레이션 후 재실행 (approve 캐시 재사용)
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// orchestrator.rs — 핵심 구조
pub(crate) struct ToolOrchestrator {
    sandbox: SandboxManager,
}

impl ToolOrchestrator {
    pub async fn run&#x3C;Rq, Out, T>(
        &#x26;mut self, tool: &#x26;mut T, req: &#x26;Rq,
        tool_ctx: &#x26;ToolCtx, turn_ctx: &#x26;TurnContext,
        approval_policy: AskForApproval,
    ) -> Result&#x3C;OrchestratorRunResult&#x3C;Out>, ToolError> {
        // 1) Approval 단계
        // 2) SandboxAttempt 선택
        // 3) run_attempt() — 실행 + network approval
        // 4) sandbox 실패 시 에스컬레이션 재시도
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>ToolRuntime</code> trait를 구현하는 concrete 런타임은 <code>runtimes/</code> 디렉터리에 있다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>런타임</th>
<th>파일</th>
<th>용도</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Shell runtime</td>
<td><code>runtimes/shell.rs</code> + <code>runtimes/shell/</code></td>
<td><code>ShellHandler</code>, <code>ShellCommandHandler</code>가 사용</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Unified exec runtime</td>
<td><code>runtimes/unified_exec.rs</code></td>
<td><code>UnifiedExecHandler</code>가 사용</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Apply patch runtime</td>
<td><code>runtimes/apply_patch.rs</code></td>
<td><code>ApplyPatchHandler</code>가 사용</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/orchestrator.rs</code>, <code>runtimes/mod.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<hr>
<h2>6. Network Approval 메커니즘</h2>
<h3>6.1 구조</h3>
<p><code>NetworkApprovalService</code>는 tool 실행 중 발생하는 네트워크 요청의 승인/거부를 관리한다. sandbox 내에서 네트워크 프록시가 차단한 요청을 사용자에게 물어보는 인라인 승인 플로우를 구현한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// network_approval.rs
pub(crate) struct NetworkApprovalService {
    active_calls: Mutex&#x3C;IndexMap&#x3C;String, Arc&#x3C;ActiveNetworkApprovalCall>>>,
    call_outcomes: Mutex&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;String, NetworkApprovalOutcome>>,
    pending_host_approvals: Mutex&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;HostApprovalKey, Arc&#x3C;PendingHostApproval>>>,
    session_approved_hosts: Mutex&#x3C;HashSet&#x3C;HostApprovalKey>>,
    session_denied_hosts: Mutex&#x3C;HashSet&#x3C;HostApprovalKey>>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.2 승인 모드</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub(crate) enum NetworkApprovalMode {
    Immediate,  // 실행 직후 즉시 승인 결과 확인
    Deferred,   // 실행 완료 후 나중에 확인 (exit code 기반 판단)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.3 인라인 정책 결정 흐름</h3>
<p><code>handle_inline_policy_request()</code>가 호출되면:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>session_denied_hosts 확인</strong> → 이미 거부한 호스트면 즉시 <code>NetworkDecision::deny</code></li>
<li><strong>session_approved_hosts 확인</strong> → 이미 승인한 호스트면 즉시 <code>NetworkDecision::Allow</code></li>
<li><strong>pending approval 생성</strong> → 같은 호스트에 대한 중복 요청은 단일 approval에 합류</li>
<li><strong>Guardian 또는 사용자 승인</strong> → <code>AskForApproval::Never</code>이면 즉시 거부</li>
<li><strong>결과 캐싱</strong> → <code>AllowForSession</code>이면 세션 전체에 적용</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// HostApprovalKey — 승인 캐시 키
struct HostApprovalKey {
    host: String,           // 소문자 정규화
    protocol: &#x26;'static str, // "http" | "https" | "socks5-tcp" | "socks5-udp"
    port: u16,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.4 Orchestrator와의 통합</h3>
<p><code>ToolOrchestrator::run_attempt()</code>는 실행 전에 <code>begin_network_approval()</code>을 호출하고, 실행 후 모드에 따라 <code>finish_immediate_network_approval()</code> 또는 <code>finish_deferred_network_approval()</code>을 호출한다.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/network_approval.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<hr>
<h2>7. Unified Exec 프레임워크</h2>
<h3>7.1 개요</h3>
<p><code>UnifiedExecHandler</code>는 PTY 기반 장기 실행 프로세스 관리 도구다. 두 가지 하위 함수를 하나의 handler에서 처리한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>exec_command</code></strong> — 새 프로세스 생성, PTY 할당, <code>yield_time_ms</code> 후 중간 출력 반환</li>
<li><strong><code>write_stdin</code></strong> — 기존 세션에 stdin 입력 전송, 출력 수집</li>
</ul>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// handlers/unified_exec.rs — 핵심 파라미터
struct ExecCommandArgs {
    cmd: String,
    workdir: Option&#x3C;String>,
    shell: Option&#x3C;String>,        // 모델이 셸 경로 지정 가능
    login: Option&#x3C;bool>,          // -lc 모드
    tty: bool,                    // default false → PTY 할당 여부
    yield_time_ms: u64,           // default 10_000ms
    max_output_tokens: Option&#x3C;usize>,
    sandbox_permissions: SandboxPermissions,
    additional_permissions: Option&#x3C;PermissionProfile>,
    justification: Option&#x3C;String>,
    prefix_rule: Option&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;String>>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>7.2 실행 흐름</h3>
<pre><code>1. resolve_workdir_base_path() — 작업 디렉터리 결정
2. parse_arguments_with_base_path() — 인자 파싱 (경로 정규화 포함)
3. maybe_emit_implicit_skill_invocation() — 스킬 telemetry
4. manager.allocate_process_id() — 프로세스 ID 할당
5. get_command() — ShellMode에 따라 command 벡터 생성
6. intercept_apply_patch() — apply_patch 명령 가로채기
7. apply_granted_turn_permissions() — 턴 레벨 권한 적용
8. normalize_and_validate_additional_permissions() — 추가 권한 검증
9. manager.exec_command() — UnifiedExecProcessManager에 위임
</code></pre>
<h3>7.3 셸 모드</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum UnifiedExecShellMode {
    Direct,             // 사용자 기본 셸 사용
    ZshFork(ZshForkConfig),  // codex 전용 zsh fork 사용
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>Direct</code> 모드에서는 모델이 <code>shell</code> 파라미터로 다른 셸을 지정할 수 있다. <code>ZshFork</code> 모드에서는 별도 zsh 바이너리와 execve wrapper를 사용한다.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/unified_exec.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<hr>
<h2>8. <code>ToolsConfig</code>와 Feature Flag 기반 도구 선택</h2>
<p><code>ToolsConfig</code>는 <code>ToolsConfigParams</code>(모델 정보 + feature flags + sandbox 정책)를 받아 어떤 도구를 활성화할지 결정한다. 주요 feature flag:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Feature Flag</th>
<th>제어하는 도구</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>Feature::ShellTool</code></td>
<td>shell 계열 전체</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Feature::UnifiedExec</code></td>
<td>exec_command / write_stdin</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Feature::ShellZshFork</code></td>
<td>ShellCommand 백엔드 (ZshFork)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Feature::ApplyPatchFreeform</code></td>
<td>apply_patch freeform 형식</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Feature::CodeMode</code></td>
<td>codex / codex_wait</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Feature::CodeModeOnly</code></td>
<td>code_mode_only 모드</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Feature::JsRepl</code></td>
<td>js_repl / js_repl_reset</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Feature::Collab</code></td>
<td>spawn_agent, wait_agent 등</td>
</tr>
<tr>

</tr>

<td>spawn_agents_on_csv</td>
</tr>

<td>tool_search</td>
</tr>

<td>tool_suggest</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>sandbox_permissions 확장</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Feature::RequestPermissionsTool</code></td>
<td>request_permissions</td>

<td>image_generation</td>

</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>셸 도구 타입 결정 로직 (<code>ConfigShellToolType</code>):</p>
<pre><code>ShellZshFork 활성 → ShellCommand (ZshFork 백엔드)
UnifiedExec 활성 + ConPTY 지원 → UnifiedExec
그 외 → 모델 기본값 또는 ShellCommand fallback
</code></pre>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/spec.rs</code></p>
</blockquote>
<hr>

<hr>
<h2>10. <code>apply_patch</code>와 shell의 관계</h2>
<p><code>apply_patch</code>는 완전히 분리된 도구처럼 보이지만, 실제 shell 계열 handler(<code>ShellHandler</code>, <code>ShellCommandHandler</code>, <code>UnifiedExecHandler</code>)는 <code>intercept_apply_patch()</code>를 통해 명령 문자열 안의 <code>apply_patch</code>를 가로채기도 한다. 즉 Codex는 패치를 "일반 쉘 호출"과 "전용 패치 도구" 두 표면에서 모두 처리하려고 한다. 포크할 때는 이중 표면이 필요한지 먼저 결정해야 한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>11. implicit skill invocation과 tool 실행의 연결</h2>
<p><code>shell</code>과 <code>unified_exec</code> handler는 실행 직전에 <code>maybe_emit_implicit_skill_invocation()</code>을 호출한다. 하지만 이 함수는 현재 보니 스킬 본문을 다시 prompt에 주입하지 않고, command 경로를 보고 해당 skill이 암시적으로 사용되었다는 telemetry만 남긴다. 이름만 보면 자동 skill activation처럼 보이지만, 실제 구현은 usage tracking에 더 가깝다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>12. 포크 seam / 체크리스트</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>ToolRouter</code>와 <code>ToolRegistry</code>를 분리된 코어 층으로 본다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> handler는 제품 UI가 아니라 엔진 기능으로 본다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> dynamic tool과 MCP tool의 표면 차이를 구분한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>apply_patch</code>의 이중 진입점 여부를 결정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>spec + router + registry + parallel runtime</code>는 세트로 봐야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>shell + unified_exec + apply_patch</code>는 로컬 실행 코어 묶음이다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>mcp + mcp_tool_call + protocol events</code>는 같이 가져가야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>dynamic handler + app-server bridge</code>는 client-driven tool surface에 필요하다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>ToolOrchestrator</code>가 승인-샌드박스-재시도를 묶으므로 handler와 분리해서 가져간다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>NetworkApprovalService</code>는 session 단위 host 캐시가 핵심이다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> pre-tool-use hook을 유지할지 간소화할지 정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 병렬 실행 락 정책을 그대로 쓸지 재설계할지 정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>tool_suggest</code>, legacy approval API, <code>multi_agents_v2</code>는 2순위로 미룰 수 있다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>UnifiedExecShellMode::ZshFork</code>은 macOS/Zsh 전용이므로 Linux 환경에서는 <code>Direct</code>로 fallback 필요</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: tool router, registry, runtime, dynamic tool, MCP tool의 실제 실행 경로를 정리했다.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: 요약본과 상세본을 통합했다.</li>
<li>2025-07-17: 전체 handler 카탈로그(22+ 모듈, 등록 이름 대응표) 추가. ToolRouter → ToolRegistry → handler dispatch 흐름을 코드 스니펫과 함께 상세 문서화. 동적 도구 등록 메커니즘(ToolRegistryBuilder 패턴, MCP/Dynamic 등록 방식) 상세화. NetworkApprovalService(인라인 정책 결정, 호스트별 캐싱, Orchestrator 통합) 신규 섹션 추가. Unified Exec 프레임워크(exec_command/write_stdin, ShellMode, 실행 흐름) 상세 분석 추가. ToolOrchestrator(승인-샌드박스-재시도) 섹션 추가. ToolsConfig와 Feature Flag 기반 도구 선택 로직 정리. tools/ 모듈 전체 구조도 추가. 포크 seam 체크리스트 업데이트.</li>
<li>2026-05-30: ToolExposure::Deferred, Extension API ToolContributor, Image Generation 확장, Goal Steering 도구-레벨 통합 반영.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>최신 갱신 (2026-05-30)</h2>
<p>이 섹션은 Codex CLI 리포지토리의 최근 412개 커밋(2025-07 이후)에서 도구 런타임에 영향을 미치는 네 가지 주요 변경을 정리한다.</p>
<h3>A. <code>ToolExposure::Deferred</code>와 <code>deferred_mcp_tools</code></h3>
<p>도구 노출 정책이 기존 Direct/Hidden 이분법에서 <strong>4단계 enum</strong>으로 확장되었다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>값</th>
<th>의미</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>Direct</code></td>
<td>초기 model-visible 목록에 포함, code mode nested 도구로도 사용</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Deferred</code></td>
<td>초기 목록에서 제외, <code>tool_search</code>로 검색 시에만 노출</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>DirectModelOnly</code></td>
<td>모델에게 직접 노출하되 code-mode nested 표면에서는 제외</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Hidden</code></td>
<td>dispatch 전용 — 모델에 스펙 미노출</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><code>Deferred</code> 도입의 핵심 동기는 MCP 도구 수가 <code>DIRECT_MCP_TOOL_EXPOSURE_THRESHOLD</code>(현재 100)을 초과하거나 <code>ToolSearchAlwaysDeferMcpTools</code> feature flag가 활성이면, 모든 MCP 도구를 초기 프롬프트에서 제외하고 <code>tool_search</code>를 통해서만 발견하도록 하는 것이다. <code>build_mcp_tool_exposure()</code>가 <code>McpToolExposure { direct_tools, deferred_tools }</code> 구조체를 반환하며, <code>ToolRouterParams::deferred_mcp_tools</code>를 통해 라우터에 전달된다.</p>
<p><code>spec_plan.rs</code>에서 deferred MCP 도구는 <code>McpHandler::new()</code>로 생성 후 <code>planned_tools.add_with_exposure(handler, ToolExposure::Deferred)</code>로 등록된다. 이후 <code>append_tool_search_executor()</code>가 <code>ToolExposure::Deferred</code>인 모든 런타임의 <code>search_info()</code>를 수집해 <code>ToolSearchHandler</code>에 주입한다.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>codex-rs/tools/src/tool_executor.rs</code> (enum 정의)
📁 <code>codex-rs/core/src/mcp_tool_exposure.rs</code> (<code>build_mcp_tool_exposure()</code>)
📁 <code>codex-rs/core/src/tools/spec_plan.rs</code> (deferred 등록 + tool_search 연동)</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>B. Extension API — <code>ToolContributor</code>와 <code>TurnItemEmitter</code></h3>
<p>새 Extension API(<code>codex-rs/ext/extension-api/</code>)는 확장이 <strong>네이티브 도구를 동적으로 등록</strong>할 수 있는 <code>ToolContributor</code> trait을 제공한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// contributors.rs
pub trait ToolContributor: Send + Sync {
    fn tools(
        &#x26;self,
        session_store: &#x26;ExtensionData,
        thread_store: &#x26;ExtensionData,
    ) -> Vec&#x3C;Arc&#x3C;dyn ToolExecutor&#x3C;ToolCall>>>;
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>ExtensionRegistryBuilder</code>에 <code>tool_contributor()</code>로 등록하면, 매 턴마다 <code>tool_contributors()</code>가 호출되어 활성 도구 목록이 재계산된다. core 측에서는 <code>ExtensionToolAdapter</code>가 <code>ToolExecutor&#x3C;ExtensionToolCall></code>을 <code>CoreToolRuntime</code>으로 래핑하여 기존 <code>ToolRegistry</code> 파이프라인(pre/post hook, telemetry, parallel gating)에 합류시킨다.</p>
<p><code>TurnItemEmitter</code>는 확장 도구가 실행 중 <code>TurnItem</code>(예: <code>WebSearchItem</code>)을 세션에 push할 수 있는 채널이다. <code>CoreTurnItemEmitter</code>가 <code>Session::emit_turn_item_started/completed()</code>를 호출해 클라이언트에 이벤트를 전달한다. 확장 도구가 <code>Weak&#x3C;Session></code>과 <code>Weak&#x3C;TurnContext></code>만 갖기 때문에 확장이 세션 수명을 연장하지 않는다.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/extension-api/src/contributors.rs</code> (<code>ToolContributor</code>, <code>ToolLifecycleContributor</code>)
📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/extension-api/src/registry.rs</code> (<code>ExtensionRegistryBuilder</code>)
📁 <code>codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/extension_tools.rs</code> (<code>ExtensionToolAdapter</code>, <code>CoreTurnItemEmitter</code>)</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>C. Image Generation 확장 — 첫 번째 ToolContributor 구현 사례</h3>
<p><code>codex-rs/ext/image-generation/</code>은 Extension API의 첫 번째 실전 적용이다. <code>ImageGenerationExtension</code>이 세 가지 contributor를 동시 구현한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>ThreadLifecycleContributor</code></strong> — thread 시작 시 <code>ImageGenerationExtensionConfig</code>(enabled + provider)를 thread store에 삽입</li>
<li><strong><code>ConfigContributor</code></strong> — config 변경 시 enabled 상태 갱신</li>
<li><strong><code>ToolContributor</code></strong> — <code>Feature::ImageGenExt</code> + OpenAI 백엔드 + Codex 인증 조건 충족 시 <code>ImageGenerationTool</code>을 반환</li>
</ul>
<p><code>ImageGenerationTool</code>은 <code>ToolExposure::DirectModelOnly</code>을 반환하여 code-mode nested 표면에서 제외된다. 네임스페이스 <code>image_gen</code>에 <code>imagegen</code> 도구로 등록되며, <code>ToolSpec::Namespace(ResponsesApiNamespace { ... })</code>를 사용한다. 실행 시 <code>CodexImagesBackend</code>를 통해 <code>gpt-image-2</code> 모델에 generate/edit 요청을 보내고, 생성 이미지를 base64로 반환하면서 로컬 디스크(<code>generated_images/</code>)에도 persist한다.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/image-generation/src/extension.rs</code> (contributor 등록)
📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/image-generation/src/tool.rs</code> (<code>ImageGenerationTool</code>, <code>ToolExposure::DirectModelOnly</code>)</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>D. Goal Steering의 도구-레벨 통합</h3>
<p>Goal Steering이 Extension API로 리팩터링되면서(<code>codex-rs/ext/goal/</code>), 도구 런타임과의 접점이 <code>ToolLifecycleContributor</code>와 <code>ToolContributor</code> 두 계층으로 재정립되었다.</p>
<p><strong><code>ToolLifecycleContributor::on_tool_finish()</code></strong> — 도구 실행 완료 시 <code>account_active_goal_progress()</code>를 호출해 토큰 사용량을 goal에 반영한다. <code>update_goal</code> 도구 자체의 완료는 이중 계산을 피하기 위해 제외한다. budget 초과가 감지되면 <code>budget_limit_steering_item()</code>으로 <code>InternalModelContextFragment</code>를 생성하고 <code>GoalRuntimeHandle::inject_active_turn_steering()</code>을 통해 진행 중인 턴에 주입한다. 이 경로는 <code>ThreadManager::get_thread() → inject_if_running()</code>을 거치며, 활성 턴이 없으면 조용히 건너뛴다.</p>
<p><strong><code>ToolContributor::tools()</code></strong> — <code>GoalToolExecutor</code>가 <code>get_goal</code>, <code>create_goal</code>, <code>update_goal</code> 세 도구를 반환한다. 이 도구들은 <code>codex_state::StateRuntime</code>을 통해 persist된 goal DB에 직접 접근한다.</p>
<p><strong><code>TurnLifecycleContributor</code></strong> — turn 시작 시 활성 goal이 있으면 해당 턴의 accounting snapshot에 goal_id를 마킹하고, turn 종료/abort 시 누적 토큰을 DB에 flush한다. <code>on_turn_error()</code>에서 <code>UsageLimitExceeded</code>가 발생하면 활성 goal을 <code>UsageLimited</code> 상태로 전환한다.</p>
<p>Goal Steering이 도구 런타임에 미치는 핵심 영향: 모든 도구 호출 완료 이벤트가 goal accounting을 트리거하고, budget 초과 시 <strong>도구 응답 사이에 steering context가 삽입</strong>되어 모델이 wrap-up을 시작하도록 유도한다. 이 메커니즘은 기존 <code>dispatch_any()</code> 파이프라인과 독립적으로 작동하며, Extension API의 lifecycle hook을 통해서만 연결된다.</p>
<blockquote>
<p>📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/goal/src/extension.rs</code> (<code>ToolLifecycleContributor</code>, <code>ToolContributor</code> 구현)
📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/goal/src/runtime.rs</code> (<code>inject_active_turn_steering()</code>, <code>account_active_goal_progress()</code>)
📁 <code>codex-rs/ext/goal/src/steering.rs</code> (<code>budget_limit_steering_item()</code>)</p>
</blockquote>
18:["$","$L28","20-axis-03-tool",{"id":"20-axis-03-tool","order":20,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 03: Tool runtime","description":"003_tool-runtime/03_co_tool.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$3d"}}]}]
3e:T19d4d,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 04: Skill system</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — <code>core-skills/</code>, <code>skills/</code>, SkillTool integration.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>Codex의 skill 시스템은 겉보기보다 층이 많다. 보통은 "<code>SKILL.md</code>를 읽어서 프롬프트에 넣는다" 정도로 이해하기 쉬운데, 실제 구현은 <code>root 선택</code>, <code>metadata 로드</code>, <code>enabled or disabled 판정</code>, <code>explicit mention 선택</code>, <code>dependency 설치</code>, <code>본문 주입</code>, <code>implicit invocation telemetry</code>까지 따로 분리되어 있다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li><code>SkillsManager</code>는 cwd와 config stack을 바탕으로 skill root를 계산하고, 로딩 결과를 <strong>이중 캐시</strong>로 보관한다.</li>

<li>cache_by_config: RwLock&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;ConfigSkillsCacheKey, SkillLoadOutcome>>,  // config 기반</li>
<li>}</li>
</ul>

fn build_skill_outcome(&#x26;self, roots: Vec&#x3C;SkillRoot>, skill_config_rules: &#x26;SkillConfigRules) -> SkillLoadOutcome {
    let outcome = filter_skill_load_outcome_for_product(
        load_skills_from_roots(roots),
        self.restriction_product,
    );

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs — root 해석 핵심 로직 (축약)
match &#x26;layer.name {
    ConfigLayerSource::Project { .. } => {
        roots.push(SkillRoot {
            path: config_folder.as_path().join("skills"),
            scope: SkillScope::Repo,
        });
    }
    ConfigLayerSource::User { .. } => {
        // 1) $CODEX_HOME/skills (deprecated, backward compat)
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: config_folder.join("skills"), scope: SkillScope::User });
        // 2) $HOME/.agents/skills (user-installed)
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: home_dir.join(".agents/skills"), scope: SkillScope::User });
        // 3) $CODEX_HOME/skills/.system (embedded system skills cache)
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: system_cache_root_dir(config_folder), scope: SkillScope::System });
    }
    ConfigLayerSource::System { .. } => {
        // /etc/codex/skills → Admin scope
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: config_folder.join("skills"), scope: SkillScope::Admin });
    }
    _ => {}
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs
fn repo_agents_skill_roots(config_layer_stack: &#x26;ConfigLayerStack, cwd: &#x26;Path) -> Vec&#x3C;SkillRoot> {
    let project_root = find_project_root(cwd, &#x26;project_root_markers);
    let dirs = dirs_between_project_root_and_cwd(cwd, &#x26;project_root);
    for dir in dirs {
        let agents_skills = dir.join(".agents").join("skills");
        if agents_skills.is_dir() {
            roots.push(SkillRoot { path: agents_skills, scope: SkillScope::Repo });
        }
    }
    roots
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs
#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct SkillFrontmatter {
    name: Option&#x3C;String>,
    description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    metadata: SkillFrontmatterMetadata,  // short-description 등
}

fn parse_skill_file(path: &#x26;Path, scope: SkillScope) -> Result&#x3C;SkillMetadata, SkillParseError> {
    let contents = fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let frontmatter = extract_frontmatter(&#x26;contents)?;      // --- ... --- 구간 추출
    let parsed: SkillFrontmatter = serde_yaml::from_str(&#x26;frontmatter)?;

    // name이 없으면 부모 디렉터리 이름을 기본값으로 사용
    let base_name = parsed.name
        .map(sanitize_single_line)
        .unwrap_or_else(|| default_skill_name(path));
    let name = namespaced_skill_name(path, &#x26;base_name);     // plugin namespace 접두사

    let LoadedSkillMetadata { interface, dependencies, policy, permission_profile, managed_network_override }
        = load_skill_metadata(path);  // agents/openai.yaml 로드

    Ok(SkillMetadata { name, description, interface, dependencies, policy, ... })
}
</code></pre>

fn resolve_asset_path(skill_dir: &#x26;Path, field: &#x26;str, path: Option&#x3C;PathBuf>) -> Option&#x3C;PathBuf> {
    // 절대 경로 거부, ".." 컴포넌트 거부, "assets/" 접두사 필수
    let mut components = normalized.components();
    match components.next() {
        Some(Component::Normal(c)) if c == "assets" => {} // OK
        _ => { warn!("icon path must be under assets/"); return None; }
    }
    Some(skill_dir.join(normalized))
}

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// skills/src/lib.rs
pub fn install_system_skills(codex_home: &#x26;Path) -> Result&#x3C;(), SystemSkillsError> {
    let expected_fingerprint = embedded_system_skills_fingerprint(); // salt + 전체 파일 hash
    if dest.is_dir() &#x26;&#x26; read_marker(&#x26;marker_path) == expected_fingerprint {
        return Ok(());  // 이미 최신
    }
    // 기존 삭제 후 재설치
    fs::remove_dir_all(&#x26;dest)?;
    write_embedded_dir(&#x26;SYSTEM_SKILLS_DIR, &#x26;dest)?;
    fs::write(marker_path, format!("{expected_fingerprint}\n"))?;
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>

#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
pub(crate) struct SkillConfigRule {
    pub selector: SkillConfigRuleSelector,  // Name("pdf") 또는 Path("/path/to/SKILL.md")
    pub enabled: bool,
}

// 실제 적용
pub(crate) fn resolve_disabled_skill_paths(
    skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata],
    rules: &#x26;SkillConfigRules,
) -> HashSet&#x3C;PathBuf> {
    // Path 셀렉터 → 해당 경로 직접 추가/제거
    // Name 셀렉터 → 같은 이름의 모든 skill 경로에 적용
    // layer 순서 보존: 나중 셀렉터가 앞의 셀렉터를 override
}

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// injection.rs — 두 단계 선택
pub(crate) fn collect_explicit_skill_mentions(
    inputs: &#x26;[UserInput],
    skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata],
    disabled_paths: &#x26;HashSet&#x3C;PathBuf>,
    connector_slug_counts: &#x26;HashMap&#x3C;String, usize>,
) -> Vec&#x3C;SkillMetadata> {
    // 1단계: structured UserInput::Skill → path 기반 정확 매칭 (가장 강한 selection)
    for input in inputs {
        if let UserInput::Skill { name, path } = input {
            blocked_plain_names.insert(name.clone());  // 2단계에서 중복 방지
            if let Some(skill) = skills.iter().find(|s| s.path_to_skills_md == *path) {
                selected.push(skill.clone());
            }
        }
    }

    // 2단계: 텍스트 $skill-name 또는 [$skill-name](resource-path) → 이름/경로 매칭
    for input in inputs {
        if let UserInput::Text { text, .. } = input {
            let mentions = extract_tool_mentions(text);
            select_skills_from_mentions(&#x26;context, &#x26;mentions, &#x26;mut selected);
        }
    }
    selected
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// injection.rs — mention 형태
const SKILL_PATH_PREFIX: &#x26;str = "skill://";

// 1) 링크형: [$pdf](skill://path/to/SKILL.md) → path로 정확 매칭
// 2) 단순형: $pdf → name으로 매칭 (단, 이름이 unique한 경우만)
//    ambiguous name(같은 이름 skill이 2개+)이면 스킵
//    connector slug와 충돌해도 스킵

// 환경변수 오탐 방지
fn is_common_env_var(name: &#x26;str) -> bool {
    matches!(name.to_uppercase().as_str(), "PATH" | "HOME" | "USER" | "SHELL" | ...)
}

// mention 이름에 허용되는 문자
fn is_mention_name_char(byte: u8) -> bool {
    matches!(byte, b'a'..=b'z' | b'A'..=b'Z' | b'0'..=b'9' | b'_' | b'-' | b':')
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// injection.rs
pub(crate) async fn build_skill_injections(
    mentioned_skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata],
    otel: Option&#x3C;&#x26;SessionTelemetry>,
    analytics_client: &#x26;AnalyticsEventsClient,
    tracking: TrackEventsContext,
) -> SkillInjections {
    for skill in mentioned_skills {
        match fs::read_to_string(&#x26;skill.path_to_skills_md).await {
            Ok(contents) => {
                // otel counter: codex.skill.injected (status=ok)
                // analytics: SkillInvocation { invocation_type: Explicit }
                result.items.push(ResponseItem::from(SkillInstructions {
                    name: skill.name.clone(),
                    path: skill.path_to_skills_md.to_string_lossy().into_owned(),
                    contents,       // SKILL.md 전체 본문
                }));
            }
            Err(err) => {
                // otel counter: codex.skill.injected (status=error)
                result.warnings.push(format!("Failed to load skill {}: {err:#}", skill.name));
            }
        }
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// invocation_utils.rs — 두 가지 인덱스
pub(crate) fn build_implicit_skill_path_indexes(skills: Vec&#x3C;SkillMetadata>) -> (
    HashMap&#x3C;PathBuf, SkillMetadata>,  // scripts_dir → skill (예: .../pdf/scripts/ → pdf)
    HashMap&#x3C;PathBuf, SkillMetadata>,  // doc_path → skill   (예: .../pdf/SKILL.md → pdf)
) {
    for skill in skills {
        // 1) SKILL.md 경로 자체
        by_skill_doc_path.insert(normalize_path(&#x26;skill.path_to_skills_md), skill.clone());
        // 2) SKILL.md 부모의 scripts/ 디렉터리
        if let Some(skill_dir) = skill.path_to_skills_md.parent() {
            by_scripts_dir.insert(normalize_path(&#x26;skill_dir.join("scripts")), skill);
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// invocation_utils.rs

// 1) 스크립트 실행 감지: python scripts/rotate.py → scripts/ 경로로 skill 연결
fn detect_skill_script_run(outcome: &#x26;SkillLoadOutcome, tokens: &#x26;[String], workdir: &#x26;Path) -> Option&#x3C;SkillMetadata> {
    let script_token = script_run_token(tokens)?;  // python/bash/node 등의 runner + .py/.sh/.js 등의 확장자
    let script_path = workdir.join(script_token);
    for ancestor in script_path.ancestors() {
        if let Some(candidate) = outcome.implicit_skills_by_scripts_dir.get(ancestor) {
            return Some(candidate.clone());
        }
    }
    None
}

// 2) 문서 읽기 감지: cat SKILL.md → doc_path로 skill 연결
fn detect_skill_doc_read(outcome: &#x26;SkillLoadOutcome, tokens: &#x26;[String], workdir: &#x26;Path) -> Option&#x3C;SkillMetadata> {
    // cat/sed/head/tail/less/more/bat/awk 중 하나일 때만 진입
    if !command_reads_file(tokens) { return None; }
    for token in tokens.iter().skip(1) {
        if let Some(candidate) = outcome.implicit_skills_by_doc_path.get(&#x26;normalize_path(token)) {
            return Some(candidate.clone());
        }
    }
    None
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// invocation_utils.rs
pub(crate) async fn maybe_emit_implicit_skill_invocation(sess: &#x26;Session, ...) {
    let candidate = detect_implicit_skill_invocation_for_command(...)?;
    // 중복 방지: seen_key = "scope:path:name"
    if !turn_context.turn_skills.implicit_invocation_seen_skills.insert(seen_key) { return; }
    // otel counter: codex.skill.injected (invoke_type=implicit)
    // analytics: SkillInvocation { invocation_type: Implicit }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// render.rs
pub fn render_skills_section(skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata]) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let mut lines = Vec::new();
    lines.push("## Skills");
    lines.push("A skill is a set of local instructions...");
    lines.push("### Available skills");
    for skill in skills {
        lines.push(format!("- {name}: {description} (file: {path})"));
    }
    lines.push("### How to use skills");
    // trigger rules, progressive disclosure, coordination, safety 등 상세 가이드
    Some(format!("{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_OPEN_TAG}\n{body}\n{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_CLOSE_TAG}"))
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// env_var_dependencies.rs
pub(crate) fn collect_env_var_dependencies(mentioned_skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata]) -> Vec&#x3C;SkillDependencyInfo> {
    for skill in mentioned_skills {
        for tool in &#x26;skill.dependencies?.tools {
            if tool.r#type == "env_var" &#x26;&#x26; !tool.value.is_empty() {
                dependencies.push(SkillDependencyInfo {
                    skill_name: skill.name.clone(),
                    name: tool.value.clone(),       // 환경변수 이름
                    description: tool.description.clone(),
                });
            }
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>

    Inj-->>Core: mentioned_skills: [pdf]

    Inj->>FS: fs::read_to_string(SKILL.md)
    FS-->>Inj: SKILL.md 본문
    Inj->>OTel: codex.skill.injected (status=ok, invoke_type=explicit)
