<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<p>#Skill loading·trigger·injection analysis</p>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — <code>core-skills/</code>, <code>skills/</code>, SkillTool integration.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex's skill system has more layers than meets the eye. Usually, it is easy to understand as "read <code>SKILL.md</code> and put it in the prompt," but the actual implementation is separated into <code>root selection</code>, <code>metadata load</code>, <code>enabled or disabled judgment</code>, <code>explicit mention selection</code>, <code>dependency installation</code>, <code>body injection</code>, and <code>implicit invocation telemetry</code>.</p>
<p>The reason we need to look at this structure properly is because we need to decide how to fork the skill system. Now, Codex skills are simple text directives, but at the same time have interface metadata and tool dependencies that can be exposed to the UI. In other words, it's less of a "documentation piece" and more of a "small plugin documentation".</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. SkillsManager — Cache and entry point</h2>
<p><code>SkillsManager</code> calculates the skill root based on cwd and config stack, and stores the loading results as <strong>double cache</strong>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// manager.rs
pub struct SkillsManager {
    codex_home: PathBuf,
    plugins_manager: Arc&#x3C;PluginsManager>,
    restriction_product: Option&#x3C;Product>,
    cache_by_cwd: RwLock&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;PathBuf, SkillLoadOutcome>>,       // cwd 기반
    cache_by_config: RwLock&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;ConfigSkillsCacheKey, SkillLoadOutcome>>,  // config 기반
}
</code></pre>
<p>The reason there are two caches: <code>cache_by_cwd</code> is for the app-server's <code>skills_for_cwd()</code> path, and <code>cache_by_config</code> prevents role-local/session-local overrides from leaking between different sessions when querying with an already configured <code>Config</code>.</p>
<p>Immediately install or remove system skills depending on the <code>bundled_skills_enabled</code> flag in the constructor:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// manager.rs — 생성자 핵심부
if !bundled_skills_enabled {
    uninstall_system_skills(&#x26;manager.codex_home);
} else if let Err(err) = install_system_skills(&#x26;manager.codex_home) {
    tracing::error!("failed to install system skills: {err}");
}
</code></pre>
<p>The actual skill build pipeline is concentrated in <code>build_skill_outcome()</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// manager.rs
fn build_skill_outcome(&#x26;self, roots: Vec&#x3C;SkillRoot>, skill_config_rules: &#x26;SkillConfigRules) -> SkillLoadOutcome {
    let outcome = filter_skill_load_outcome_for_product(
        load_skills_from_roots(roots),
        self.restriction_product,
    );
    let disabled_paths = resolve_disabled_skill_paths(&#x26;outcome.skills, skill_config_rules);
    finalize_skill_outcome(outcome, disabled_paths)
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>finalize_skill_outcome()</code> applies the disabled path and then builds two indexes (<code>implicit_skills_by_scripts_dir</code>, <code>implicit_skills_by_doc_path</code>) for implicit invocation.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. Skill Root Analysis — Where to find skills</h2>
<p>root has user, repo, system, and admin scopes, and system skills are installed separately from the <code>codex_skills</code> package. Therefore, if we maintain system skills in our fork, we should also bring the concept of "installation and cache directories" rather than simple file bundles.</p>
<p><code>skill_roots_from_layer_stack_inner()</code> iterates through the config layer and determines the root by scope:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs — root 해석 핵심 로직 (축약)
match &#x26;layer.name {
    ConfigLayerSource::Project { .. } => {
        roots.push(SkillRoot {
            path: config_folder.as_path().join("skills"),
            scope: SkillScope::Repo,
        });
    }
    ConfigLayerSource::User { .. } => {
        // 1) $CODEX_HOME/skills (deprecated, backward compat)
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: config_folder.join("skills"), scope: SkillScope::User });
        // 2) $HOME/.agents/skills (user-installed)
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: home_dir.join(".agents/skills"), scope: SkillScope::User });
        // 3) $CODEX_HOME/skills/.system (embedded system skills cache)
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: system_cache_root_dir(config_folder), scope: SkillScope::System });
    }
    ConfigLayerSource::System { .. } => {
        // /etc/codex/skills → Admin scope
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: config_folder.join("skills"), scope: SkillScope::Admin });
    }
    _ => {}
}
</code></pre>
<p>Additionally, <code>repo_agents_skill_roots()</code> adds <code>.agents/skills/</code> in each directory to the repo scope, going up from cwd to the project root:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs
fn repo_agents_skill_roots(config_layer_stack: &#x26;ConfigLayerStack, cwd: &#x26;Path) -> Vec&#x3C;SkillRoot> {
    let project_root = find_project_root(cwd, &#x26;project_root_markers);
    let dirs = dirs_between_project_root_and_cwd(cwd, &#x26;project_root);
    for dir in dirs {
        let agents_skills = dir.join(".agents").join("skills");
        if agents_skills.is_dir() {
            roots.push(SkillRoot { path: agents_skills, scope: SkillScope::Repo });
        }
    }
    roots
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph "Skill Root 탐색 순서"
        P["Project config&#x3C;br/>.codex/skills/"] -->|Repo| R["roots"]
        A1[".agents/skills/&#x3C;br/>(cwd → project root)"] -->|Repo| R
        U1["$CODEX_HOME/skills/"] -->|User| R
        U2["$HOME/.agents/skills/"] -->|User| R
        PL["plugin skill roots"] -->|User| R
        S["$CODEX_HOME/skills/.system/"] -->|System| R
        AD["/etc/codex/skills/"] -->|Admin| R
    end
    R --> DEDUP["dedupe_skill_roots_by_path()"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. SKILL.md format and parsing</h2>
<h3>3.1 Directory structure</h3>
<pre><code>skill-name/
├── SKILL.md                 ← 필수 (frontmatter + 본문)
├── agents/
│   └── openai.yaml          ← UI 메타데이터 (interface, dependencies, policy, permissions)
├── scripts/                 ← 실행 가능한 코드
├── references/              ← 컨텍스트에 로드할 참조 문서
└── assets/                  ← 출력에 사용할 파일 (icon, template 등)
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 SKILL.md frontmatter parsing</h3>
<p><code>parse_skill_file()</code> parses the YAML frontmatter and generates <code>SkillMetadata</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs
#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct SkillFrontmatter {
    name: Option&#x3C;String>,
    description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    metadata: SkillFrontmatterMetadata,  // short-description 등
}

fn parse_skill_file(path: &#x26;Path, scope: SkillScope) -> Result&#x3C;SkillMetadata, SkillParseError> {
    let contents = fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let frontmatter = extract_frontmatter(&#x26;contents)?;      // --- ... --- 구간 추출
    let parsed: SkillFrontmatter = serde_yaml::from_str(&#x26;frontmatter)?;

    // name이 없으면 부모 디렉터리 이름을 기본값으로 사용
    let base_name = parsed.name
        .map(sanitize_single_line)
        .unwrap_or_else(|| default_skill_name(path));
    let name = namespaced_skill_name(path, &#x26;base_name);     // plugin namespace 접두사

    let LoadedSkillMetadata { interface, dependencies, policy, permission_profile, managed_network_override }
        = load_skill_metadata(path);  // agents/openai.yaml 로드

    Ok(SkillMetadata { name, description, interface, dependencies, policy, ... })
}
</code></pre>
<p>Validation: <code>name</code> up to 64 characters, <code>description</code> up to 1024 characters. If the value is empty, an error is returned.</p>
<h3>3.3 agents/openai.yaml structure</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs — 메타데이터 파일 구조
#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct SkillMetadataFile {
    interface: Option&#x3C;Interface>,       // display_name, icon, brand_color, default_prompt
    dependencies: Option&#x3C;Dependencies>, // MCP 서버, env_var 등
    policy: Option&#x3C;Policy>,             // allow_implicit_invocation, products
    permissions: Option&#x3C;SkillPermissionProfile>,  // network, file_system, macos seatbelt
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Interface {
    display_name: Option&#x3C;String>,
    short_description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    icon_small: Option&#x3C;PathBuf>,    // assets/ 하위 상대 경로만 허용
    icon_large: Option&#x3C;PathBuf>,
    brand_color: Option&#x3C;String>,
    default_prompt: Option&#x3C;String>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Policy {
    allow_implicit_invocation: Option&#x3C;bool>,  // 기본값 true
    products: Vec&#x3C;Product>,                   // 빈 배열이면 모든 product에서 사용 가능
}
</code></pre>
<p>The icon path must be a relative path under <code>assets/</code>. Rejected when using <code>..</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs
fn resolve_asset_path(skill_dir: &#x26;Path, field: &#x26;str, path: Option&#x3C;PathBuf>) -> Option&#x3C;PathBuf> {
    // 절대 경로 거부, ".." 컴포넌트 거부, "assets/" 접두사 필수
    let mut components = normalized.components();
    match components.next() {
        Some(Component::Normal(c)) if c == "assets" => {} // OK
        _ => { warn!("icon path must be under assets/"); return None; }
    }
    Some(skill_dir.join(normalized))
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.4 Progressive Disclosure Design</h3>
<p>Skills are loaded progressively in three stages:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>steps</th>
<th>Content</th>
<th>size</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Level 1 — Metadata</strong></td>
<td>name + description (always present in context)</td>
<td>~100 words</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Level 2 — SKILL.md body</strong></td>
<td>Load only when skill is triggered</td>
<td>&#x3C;5k words recommended</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Level 3 — Bundled resources</strong></td>
<td>Codex loads individual files only when needed</td>
<td>Unlimited (scripts can only be executed)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>4. Skill navigation and loading</h2>
<p><code>discover_skills_under_root()</code> searches under root with BFS:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs — 탐색 제한 상수
const SKILLS_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "SKILL.md";
const MAX_SCAN_DEPTH: usize = 6;           // root로부터 최대 6단계
const MAX_SKILLS_DIRS_PER_ROOT: usize = 2000;  // root당 최대 2000 디렉터리

// symlink 따라가기: Repo/User/Admin에서만, System에서는 하지 않음
let follow_symlinks = matches!(scope, SkillScope::Repo | SkillScope::User | SkillScope::Admin);
</code></pre>
<p>Loading results are sorted by scope priority (Repo=0 &#x3C; User=1 &#x3C; System=2 &#x3C; Admin=3) and name, and duplicates of the same path are removed:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs
outcome.skills.sort_by(|a, b| {
    scope_rank(a.scope).cmp(&#x26;scope_rank(b.scope))
        .then_with(|| a.name.cmp(&#x26;b.name))
        .then_with(|| a.path_to_skills_md.cmp(&#x26;b.path_to_skills_md))
});
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. System Skill Installation — Bundle Embedding</h2>
<p>The system skill is embedded at compile time as <code>include_dir!</code> in the <code>codex_skills</code> crate:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/skills/src/lib.rs
const SYSTEM_SKILLS_DIR: Dir = include_dir::include_dir!("$CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR/src/assets/samples");
</code></pre>
<p><code>install_system_skills()</code> unpacks files embedded in <code>$CODEX_HOME/skills/.system/</code>, but skips them if there are no changes to the fingerprint marker:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// skills/src/lib.rs
pub fn install_system_skills(codex_home: &#x26;Path) -> Result&#x3C;(), SystemSkillsError> {
    let expected_fingerprint = embedded_system_skills_fingerprint(); // salt + 전체 파일 hash
    if dest.is_dir() &#x26;&#x26; read_marker(&#x26;marker_path) == expected_fingerprint {
        return Ok(());  // 이미 최신
    }
    // 기존 삭제 후 재설치
    fs::remove_dir_all(&#x26;dest)?;
    write_embedded_dir(&#x26;SYSTEM_SKILLS_DIR, &#x26;dest)?;
    fs::write(marker_path, format!("{expected_fingerprint}\n"))?;
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>
<p>List of currently bundled system skills: <code>imagegen</code>, <code>openai-docs</code>, <code>plugin-creator</code>, <code>skill-creator</code>, <code>skill-installer</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. Config Rules — Enable/Disable Skills</h2>
<p><code>SkillConfigRules</code> controls enabled/disabled for each skill in the User/SessionFlags config layer:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// config_rules.rs
#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
pub(crate) struct SkillConfigRule {
    pub selector: SkillConfigRuleSelector,  // Name("pdf") 또는 Path("/path/to/SKILL.md")
    pub enabled: bool,
}

// 실제 적용
pub(crate) fn resolve_disabled_skill_paths(
    skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata],
    rules: &#x26;SkillConfigRules,
) -> HashSet&#x3C;PathBuf> {
    // Path 셀렉터 → 해당 경로 직접 추가/제거
    // Name 셀렉터 → 같은 이름의 모든 skill 경로에 적용
    // layer 순서 보존: 나중 셀렉터가 앞의 셀렉터를 override
}
</code></pre>
<p>This system allows users to turn off specific skills with <code>[[skills.config]]</code> entries in <code>codex.toml</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. Explicit Trigger — Explicit skill selection</h2>
<p>Skill triggers are divided into <strong>explicit trigger</strong> and <strong>implicit trigger</strong>. Only explicit triggers actually lead to <code>build_skill_injections()</code>, which reads the <code>SKILL.md</code> body and injects it into a contextual user fragment.</p>
<h3>7.1 <code>collect_explicit_skill_mentions()</code> — Selection algorithm</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// injection.rs — 두 단계 선택
pub(crate) fn collect_explicit_skill_mentions(
    inputs: &#x26;[UserInput],
    skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata],
    disabled_paths: &#x26;HashSet&#x3C;PathBuf>,
    connector_slug_counts: &#x26;HashMap&#x3C;String, usize>,
) -> Vec&#x3C;SkillMetadata> {
    // 1단계: structured UserInput::Skill → path 기반 정확 매칭 (가장 강한 selection)
    for input in inputs {
        if let UserInput::Skill { name, path } = input {
            blocked_plain_names.insert(name.clone());  // 2단계에서 중복 방지
            if let Some(skill) = skills.iter().find(|s| s.path_to_skills_md == *path) {
                selected.push(skill.clone());
            }
        }
    }

    // 2단계: 텍스트 $skill-name 또는 [$skill-name](resource-path) → 이름/경로 매칭
    for input in inputs {
        if let UserInput::Text { text, .. } = input {
            let mentions = extract_tool_mentions(text);
            select_skills_from_mentions(&#x26;context, &#x26;mentions, &#x26;mut selected);
        }
    }
    selected
}
</code></pre>
<h3>7.2 Parsing text mentions</h3>
<p><code>extract_tool_mentions()</code> parses both <code>$skill-name</code> and <code>[$skill-name](resource-path)</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// injection.rs — mention 형태
const SKILL_PATH_PREFIX: &#x26;str = "skill://";

// 1) 링크형: [$pdf](skill://path/to/SKILL.md) → path로 정확 매칭
// 2) 단순형: $pdf → name으로 매칭 (단, 이름이 unique한 경우만)
//    ambiguous name(같은 이름 skill이 2개+)이면 스킵
//    connector slug와 충돌해도 스킵

// 환경변수 오탐 방지
fn is_common_env_var(name: &#x26;str) -> bool {
    matches!(name.to_uppercase().as_str(), "PATH" | "HOME" | "USER" | "SHELL" | ...)
}

// mention 이름에 허용되는 문자
fn is_mention_name_char(byte: u8) -> bool {
    matches!(byte, b'a'..=b'z' | b'A'..=b'Z' | b'0'..=b'9' | b'_' | b'-' | b':')
}
</code></pre>
<h3>7.3 <code>build_skill_injections()</code> — Actual body injections</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// injection.rs
pub(crate) async fn build_skill_injections(
    mentioned_skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata],
    otel: Option&#x3C;&#x26;SessionTelemetry>,
    analytics_client: &#x26;AnalyticsEventsClient,
    tracking: TrackEventsContext,
) -> SkillInjections {
    for skill in mentioned_skills {
        match fs::read_to_string(&#x26;skill.path_to_skills_md).await {
            Ok(contents) => {
                // otel counter: codex.skill.injected (status=ok)
                // analytics: SkillInvocation { invocation_type: Explicit }
                result.items.push(ResponseItem::from(SkillInstructions {
                    name: skill.name.clone(),
                    path: skill.path_to_skills_md.to_string_lossy().into_owned(),
                    contents,       // SKILL.md 전체 본문
                }));
            }
            Err(err) => {
                // otel counter: codex.skill.injected (status=error)
                result.warnings.push(format!("Failed to load skill {}: {err:#}", skill.name));
            }
        }
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<p>The injected skill is wrapped in a <code>&#x3C;skill></code> tag and entered into the user message fragment.</p>
<hr>
<h2>8. Implicit Trigger — Implicit detection and telemetry</h2>
<p>Even if there is a policy field like <code>allow_implicit_invocation</code>, looking at the code now, the implicit path is closer to "detection and recording" and not "automatically inserting actual directives"**. Just by looking at the name, you should not misunderstand it as an automatic skill auto-run.</p>
<h3>8.1 Implicit detection index</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// invocation_utils.rs — 두 가지 인덱스
pub(crate) fn build_implicit_skill_path_indexes(skills: Vec&#x3C;SkillMetadata>) -> (
    HashMap&#x3C;PathBuf, SkillMetadata>,  // scripts_dir → skill (예: .../pdf/scripts/ → pdf)
    HashMap&#x3C;PathBuf, SkillMetadata>,  // doc_path → skill   (예: .../pdf/SKILL.md → pdf)
) {
    for skill in skills {
        // 1) SKILL.md 경로 자체
        by_skill_doc_path.insert(normalize_path(&#x26;skill.path_to_skills_md), skill.clone());
        // 2) SKILL.md 부모의 scripts/ 디렉터리
        if let Some(skill_dir) = skill.path_to_skills_md.parent() {
            by_scripts_dir.insert(normalize_path(&#x26;skill_dir.join("scripts")), skill);
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>8.2 Command-based detection</h3>
<p>We tokenize the commands the agent executes and check two things:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// invocation_utils.rs

// 1) 스크립트 실행 감지: python scripts/rotate.py → scripts/ 경로로 skill 연결
fn detect_skill_script_run(outcome: &#x26;SkillLoadOutcome, tokens: &#x26;[String], workdir: &#x26;Path) -> Option&#x3C;SkillMetadata> {
    let script_token = script_run_token(tokens)?;  // python/bash/node 등의 runner + .py/.sh/.js 등의 확장자
    let script_path = workdir.join(script_token);
    for ancestor in script_path.ancestors() {
        if let Some(candidate) = outcome.implicit_skills_by_scripts_dir.get(ancestor) {
            return Some(candidate.clone());
        }
    }
    None
}

// 2) 문서 읽기 감지: cat SKILL.md → doc_path로 skill 연결
fn detect_skill_doc_read(outcome: &#x26;SkillLoadOutcome, tokens: &#x26;[String], workdir: &#x26;Path) -> Option&#x3C;SkillMetadata> {
    // cat/sed/head/tail/less/more/bat/awk 중 하나일 때만 진입
    if !command_reads_file(tokens) { return None; }
    for token in tokens.iter().skip(1) {
        if let Some(candidate) = outcome.implicit_skills_by_doc_path.get(&#x26;normalize_path(token)) {
            return Some(candidate.clone());
        }
    }
    None
}
</code></pre>
<p>Detected results only publish <strong>telemetry</strong> (no body injection):</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// invocation_utils.rs
pub(crate) async fn maybe_emit_implicit_skill_invocation(sess: &#x26;Session, ...) {
    let candidate = detect_implicit_skill_invocation_for_command(...)?;
    // 중복 방지: seen_key = "scope:path:name"
    if !turn_context.turn_skills.implicit_invocation_seen_skills.insert(seen_key) { return; }
    // otel counter: codex.skill.injected (invoke_type=implicit)
    // analytics: SkillInvocation { invocation_type: Implicit }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>9. Skill list rendering</h2>
<p><code>render_skills_section()</code> wraps the available skills in a <code>&#x3C;skills_instructions></code> tag and puts them into the system prompt:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// render.rs
pub fn render_skills_section(skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata]) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let mut lines = Vec::new();
    lines.push("## Skills");
    lines.push("A skill is a set of local instructions...");
    lines.push("### Available skills");
    for skill in skills {
        lines.push(format!("- {name}: {description} (file: {path})"));
    }
    lines.push("### How to use skills");
    // trigger rules, progressive disclosure, coordination, safety 등 상세 가이드
    Some(format!("{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_OPEN_TAG}\n{body}\n{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_CLOSE_TAG}"))
}
</code></pre>
<p>Key usage instructions included in this render:</p>
<ul>
<li>Must be used when the user mentions a skill using <code>$SkillName</code> or plain text</li>
<li>Open SKILL.md, but read only as much as necessary with progressive disclosure.</li>
<li>If <code>scripts/</code> is present, execution/patch takes precedence over code rewriting.</li>
<li>If multiple skills are applied, select the minimum set and specify the order</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>10. Env Var Dependencies — Environment variable dependencies</h2>
<p>Independent of the MCP server installation, skills can have dependencies of type <code>env_var</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// env_var_dependencies.rs
pub(crate) fn collect_env_var_dependencies(mentioned_skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata]) -> Vec&#x3C;SkillDependencyInfo> {
    for skill in mentioned_skills {
        for tool in &#x26;skill.dependencies?.tools {
            if tool.r#type == "env_var" &#x26;&#x26; !tool.value.is_empty() {
                dependencies.push(SkillDependencyInfo {
                    skill_name: skill.name.clone(),
                    name: tool.value.clone(),       // 환경변수 이름
                    description: tool.description.clone(),
                });
            }
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Solution order: ① session cache → ② <code>env::var()</code> → ③ Ask the user through UI (<code>request_user_input</code>). Values ​​are stored only in session memory and are not written to disk.</p>
<hr>
<h2>11. Remote Skills — Server-based skills</h2>
<p><code>remote.rs</code> implements a client that queries and downloads remote skills through the ChatGPT API. Currently <strong>not yet connected to an active product surface</strong> (note: "intentionally kept around for future wiring").</p>
<h3>11.1 Remote skill scope</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// remote.rs
pub enum RemoteSkillScope {
    WorkspaceShared,   // workspace 공유 스킬
    AllShared,         // 전체 공유 스킬
    Personal,          // 개인 스킬
    Example,           // 예시 스킬
}

pub enum RemoteSkillProductSurface {
    Chatgpt, Codex, Api, Atlas,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>11.2 Views and Downloads</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// remote.rs — 조회
pub async fn list_remote_skills(config, auth, scope, product_surface, enabled)
    -> Result&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;RemoteSkillSummary>>
{
    // GET {chatgpt_base_url}/hazelnuts?product_surface=codex&#x26;scope=workspace-shared
    // ChatGPT auth 필수 (API key 불가)
}

// remote.rs — 다운로드 (zip 형태로 내려받아 $CODEX_HOME/skills/{id}/ 에 풀기)
pub async fn export_remote_skill(config, auth, skill_id) -> Result&#x3C;RemoteSkillDownloadResult> {
    // GET {chatgpt_base_url}/hazelnuts/{skill_id}/export
    // zip magic bytes 검증 → safe_join으로 path traversal 방지 → 압축 해제
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>safe_join()</code> prevents path traversal attacks by verifying that all path components of a zip entry are <code>Normal</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>12. MCP Dependency installation path</h2>
<p>Skills also have tool dependencies. You can define the MCP server, transport, command, url, etc. with <code>SkillToolDependency</code>, and if the feature flag is turned on, there is even a path to modify the global config after asking with <code>request_user_input</code> whether to install the MCP server required for the selected skill.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// model.rs
pub struct SkillToolDependency {
    pub r#type: String,          // "mcp_server", "env_var" 등
    pub value: String,           // 서버 이름이나 변수 이름
    pub description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub transport: Option&#x3C;String>, // "stdio", "sse" 등
    pub command: Option&#x3C;String>,   // 실행 명령어
    pub url: Option&#x3C;String>,       // 서버 URL
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>steps</th>
<th>Description</th>
<th>file</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>Collect tool dependency required for selected skill</td>
<td><code>skills/model.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>Comparison with currently installed MCP server</td>
<td><code>mcp/skill_dependencies.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>If necessary, ask whether to install with <code>request_user_input</code></td>
<td><code>mcp/skill_dependencies.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>Modify global config to register MCP server</td>
<td><code>mcp/skill_dependencies.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>If OAuth is required, try logging in</td>
<td><code>mcp/skill_dependencies.rs</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>This route is quite aggressive. Therefore, even if we maintain the skill in our fork, a separate policy decision must be made as to whether the skill can even modify the global config.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Comprehensive architecture diagram</h2>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph "Root 해석"
        CLS["ConfigLayerStack"] --> SR["skill_roots()"]
        PM["PluginsManager"] --> SR
        CWD["cwd"] --> RAR["repo_agents_skill_roots()"]
        RAR --> SR
    end

    subgraph "로딩"
        SR --> LR["load_skills_from_roots()"]
        LR -->|BFS 탐색| DSR["discover_skills_under_root()"]
        DSR -->|SKILL.md 파싱| PSF["parse_skill_file()"]
        PSF -->|agents/openai.yaml| LSM["load_skill_metadata()"]
        DSR --> SLO["SkillLoadOutcome"]
    end

    subgraph "필터링"
        SLO --> FP["filter_for_product()"]
        FP --> RDP["resolve_disabled_paths()"]
        RDP --> FIN["finalize_skill_outcome()"]
        FIN -->|implicit index 구축| IDX["by_scripts_dir / by_doc_path"]
    end

    subgraph "Trigger &#x26; 주입"
        UI["UserInput"] --> CEM["collect_explicit_mentions()"]
        FIN --> CEM
        CEM --> BSI["build_skill_injections()"]
        BSI -->|fs::read SKILL.md| INJ["SkillInjections"]
        INJ --> CTX["contextual user fragment&#x3C;br/>《skill》 wrapper"]
    end

    subgraph "Implicit (telemetry only)"
        CMD["shell command"] --> DET["detect_implicit_invocation()"]
        IDX --> DET
        DET --> TEL["otel counter + analytics"]
    end

    subgraph "Dependencies"
        CEM --> DEP_E["collect_env_var_deps()"]
        DEP_E --> RSD["resolve_skill_deps_for_turn()"]
        CEM --> DEP_M["MCP dep installer"]
        DEP_M --> GC["global config 수정"]
    end

    subgraph "UI 표면"
        FIN --> REN["render_skills_section()"]
        REN --> SYS["system prompt&#x3C;br/>《skills_instructions》"]
    end
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자
    participant Core as Codex Core
    participant SM as SkillsManager
    participant Loader as loader.rs
    participant FS as 파일 시스템
    participant Inj as injection.rs
    participant OTel as Telemetry

    User->>Core: "$pdf로 변환해줘" (UserInput::Text)
    Core->>SM: skills_for_config(config)
    SM->>SM: cache hit 확인
    alt cache miss
        SM->>Loader: skill_roots() → root 목록
        SM->>Loader: load_skills_from_roots(roots)
        Loader->>FS: BFS 탐색 (SKILL.md 검색)
        FS-->>Loader: SKILL.md + agents/openai.yaml
        Loader-->>SM: SkillLoadOutcome
        SM->>SM: filter_for_product + disabled_paths
        SM->>SM: build_implicit_indexes
        SM->>SM: cache에 저장
    end
    SM-->>Core: SkillLoadOutcome

    Core->>Inj: collect_explicit_skill_mentions(inputs, skills)
    Note over Inj: "$pdf" 파싱 → name 매칭&#x3C;br/>unique name이면 선택
    Inj-->>Core: mentioned_skills: [pdf]

    Core->>Inj: build_skill_injections(mentioned_skills)
    Inj->>FS: fs::read_to_string(SKILL.md)
    FS-->>Inj: SKILL.md 본문
    Inj->>OTel: codex.skill.injected (status=ok, invoke_type=explicit)
    Inj-->>Core: SkillInjections { items: [SkillInstructions] }

    Core->>Core: 〈skill〉 wrapper로 user message에 주입
</code></pre>

<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Repo</td>
<td><code>.codex/skills/</code>, <code>.agents/skills/</code> (cwd→project root each step)</td>
<td>Local skill created by user</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>User</td>
<td><code>$CODEX_HOME/skills/</code>, <code>$HOME/.agents/skills/</code>, plugin roots</td>

<h3>lifecycle</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>steps</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>root calculation</td>
<td><code>skill_roots()</code> combines config layer + plugin + .agents paths</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Navigation</td>
<td><code>discover_skills_under_root()</code> finds <code>SKILL.md</code> file with BFS (depth≤6, dirs≤2000)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>parsing</td>
<td><code>parse_skill_file()</code> reads frontmatter + <code>agents/openai.yaml</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>product filter</td>
<td><code>filter_skill_load_outcome_for_product()</code> applies product restrictions</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>config rules</td>
<td><code>resolve_disabled_skill_paths()</code> applies disabling based on user settings</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>implicit index</td>
<td><code>build_implicit_skill_path_indexes()</code> builds scripts_dir/doc_path index</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>explicit selection</td>
<td><code>collect_explicit_skill_mentions()</code> selects the skill for the current turn using structured input and <code>$skill-name</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>body injection</td>
<td><code>build_skill_injections()</code> wraps the actual <code>SKILL.md</code> body in <code>&#x3C;skill></code> tags</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Show list</td>
<td><code>render_skills_section()</code> creates available skills catalog as <code>&#x3C;skills_instructions></code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Resolve dependency</td>
<td>env_var → session cache/env/UI question, MCP → global config modification</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>trigger type</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>trigger</th>
<th>Actual Action</th>
<th>code path</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>structured <code>UserInput::Skill</code></td>
<td>Explicit selection based on path, strongest explicit selection</td>
<td><code>skills/injection.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>text <code>$skill-name</code></td>
<td>Plain name → Select only when unique match</td>
<td><code>skills/injection.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Link type <code>[$name](skill://path)</code></td>
<td>Accurate matching based on path</td>
<td><code>skills/injection.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>plugin mention</td>
<td>skill Generate developer hint rather than body</td>
<td><code>plugins/injection.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>shell script execution detection</td>
<td>Issue telemetry when running a <code>scripts/</code> sub (not inject body)</td>
<td><code>skills/invocation_utils.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>file read detection</td>
<td>When reading SKILL.md with <code>cat</code>/<code>head</code>, etc., telemetry is issued (not body injection)</td>
<td><code>skills/invocation_utils.rs</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Actual injection format</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Item</th>
<th>Format</th>
<th>implementation</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>skill text</td>
<td>user message fragment with <code>&#x3C;skill></code> wrapper</td>
<td><code>instructions/user_instructions.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Introduction to skill list</td>
<td><code>&#x3C;skills_instructions></code> wrapper, inserted into system prompt</td>
<td><code>skills/render.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>app-server skill query</td>
<td><code>skills/list</code> RPC</td>
<td><code>app-server/src/codex_message_processor.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>skill enable/disable</td>
<td><code>skills/config/write</code> RPC</td>
<td><code>app-server/src/codex_message_processor.rs</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Differences we especially need to remember</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>name</th>
<th>Real Meaning</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>explicit skill mention</td>
<td>Leads to actual body injection</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>implicit skill invocation</td>
<td>Command-related telemetry, not automatic body injection, is the key</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>bundled system skills</td>
<td>Embed in binary as <code>include_dir!</code> → cache in <code>$CODEX_HOME/skills/.system/</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>plugin skills</td>
<td>It is handled together with the plugin capability hint rather than the skill itself</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remote skills</td>
<td>ChatGPT API-based remote skill (not yet connected, future wiring)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>env_var dependency</td>
<td>Stored only in session-local memory, not written to disk</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>MCP dependency</td>
<td>Global config modification is possible, security policy review required</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>Fork Checklist</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> skill loader and injector are different</li>
<li>Only [x] explicit trigger leads to actual body injection</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> implicit invocation is currently closer to the telemetry hook</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> skill is closer to a package with UI metadata and dependencies</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Remember that there is a system skill installation path (<code>include_dir!</code> + fingerprint marker)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> MCP dependency installation function is powerful, but requires separate policy review</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> config rules allow skill enable/disable to be controlled on a per user/session basis</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> remote skills API exists, but is not yet connected</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> env_var dependency is session-only, and MCP dependency modifies global config.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> A separate decision must be made whether to maintain the global MCP config modification function.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> We need to decide whether to use <code>default_prompt</code> and icon metadata as is in our product UI.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> It must be decided whether to maintain product restriction and disabled path policies.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> We need to decide whether to fork the remote skills client to fit our infrastructure or remove it altogether.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> We need to decide whether to integrate skill permission profile (network domain override, file_system, macos seatbelt) into our sandbox.</li>
</ul>

<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>004_skill-system/04_co_skill.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>스킬 로딩 · 트리거 · 주입 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — <code>core-skills/</code>, <code>skills/</code>, SkillTool integration.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex의 skill 시스템은 겉보기보다 층이 많다. 보통은 "<code>SKILL.md</code>를 읽어서 프롬프트에 넣는다" 정도로 이해하기 쉬운데, 실제 구현은 <code>root 선택</code>, <code>metadata 로드</code>, <code>enabled or disabled 판정</code>, <code>explicit mention 선택</code>, <code>dependency 설치</code>, <code>본문 주입</code>, <code>implicit invocation telemetry</code>까지 따로 분리되어 있다.</p>
<p>이 구조를 제대로 봐야 하는 이유는 우리가 스킬 시스템을 어떻게 포크할지 결정해야 하기 때문이다. 지금 Codex skill은 단순 텍스트 지시문이면서도, 동시에 UI 노출 가능한 인터페이스 메타데이터와 도구 의존성을 가진다. 즉 "문서 조각"이 아니라 "작은 플러그인 설명서"에 더 가깝다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. SkillsManager — 캐시와 진입점</h2>
<p><code>SkillsManager</code>는 cwd와 config stack을 바탕으로 skill root를 계산하고, 로딩 결과를 <strong>이중 캐시</strong>로 보관한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// manager.rs
pub struct SkillsManager {
    codex_home: PathBuf,
    plugins_manager: Arc&#x3C;PluginsManager>,
    restriction_product: Option&#x3C;Product>,
    cache_by_cwd: RwLock&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;PathBuf, SkillLoadOutcome>>,       // cwd 기반
    cache_by_config: RwLock&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;ConfigSkillsCacheKey, SkillLoadOutcome>>,  // config 기반
}
</code></pre>
<p>캐시가 두 개인 이유: <code>cache_by_cwd</code>는 app-server의 <code>skills_for_cwd()</code> 경로용이고, <code>cache_by_config</code>는 이미 구성된 <code>Config</code>로 조회할 때 role-local/session-local 오버라이드가 다른 세션 사이에서 누출되지 않도록 한다.</p>
<p>생성자에서 <code>bundled_skills_enabled</code> 플래그에 따라 system skill을 즉시 설치하거나 제거한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// manager.rs — 생성자 핵심부
if !bundled_skills_enabled {
    uninstall_system_skills(&#x26;manager.codex_home);
} else if let Err(err) = install_system_skills(&#x26;manager.codex_home) {
    tracing::error!("failed to install system skills: {err}");
}
</code></pre>
<p>실제 skill 빌드 파이프라인은 <code>build_skill_outcome()</code>에 집약된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// manager.rs
fn build_skill_outcome(&#x26;self, roots: Vec&#x3C;SkillRoot>, skill_config_rules: &#x26;SkillConfigRules) -> SkillLoadOutcome {
    let outcome = filter_skill_load_outcome_for_product(
        load_skills_from_roots(roots),
        self.restriction_product,
    );
    let disabled_paths = resolve_disabled_skill_paths(&#x26;outcome.skills, skill_config_rules);
    finalize_skill_outcome(outcome, disabled_paths)
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>finalize_skill_outcome()</code>은 disabled path를 적용한 뒤, implicit invocation용 인덱스 두 개(<code>implicit_skills_by_scripts_dir</code>, <code>implicit_skills_by_doc_path</code>)를 구축한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. Skill Root 해석 — 어디서 스킬을 찾는가</h2>
<p>root는 user, repo, system, admin scope를 나눠 갖고, system skill은 <code>codex_skills</code> 패키지에서 별도 설치된다. 따라서 우리 포크에서 system skill을 유지한다면, 단순 파일 번들보다 "설치와 캐시 디렉터리" 개념까지 같이 가져와야 한다.</p>
<p><code>skill_roots_from_layer_stack_inner()</code>가 config layer를 순회하며 scope별 root를 결정한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs — root 해석 핵심 로직 (축약)
match &#x26;layer.name {
    ConfigLayerSource::Project { .. } => {
        roots.push(SkillRoot {
            path: config_folder.as_path().join("skills"),
            scope: SkillScope::Repo,
        });
    }
    ConfigLayerSource::User { .. } => {
        // 1) $CODEX_HOME/skills (deprecated, backward compat)
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: config_folder.join("skills"), scope: SkillScope::User });
        // 2) $HOME/.agents/skills (user-installed)
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: home_dir.join(".agents/skills"), scope: SkillScope::User });
        // 3) $CODEX_HOME/skills/.system (embedded system skills cache)
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: system_cache_root_dir(config_folder), scope: SkillScope::System });
    }
    ConfigLayerSource::System { .. } => {
        // /etc/codex/skills → Admin scope
        roots.push(SkillRoot { path: config_folder.join("skills"), scope: SkillScope::Admin });
    }
    _ => {}
}
</code></pre>
<p>추가로 <code>repo_agents_skill_roots()</code>는 cwd에서 project root까지 올라가면서 각 디렉터리의 <code>.agents/skills/</code> 를 repo scope로 추가한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs
fn repo_agents_skill_roots(config_layer_stack: &#x26;ConfigLayerStack, cwd: &#x26;Path) -> Vec&#x3C;SkillRoot> {
    let project_root = find_project_root(cwd, &#x26;project_root_markers);
    let dirs = dirs_between_project_root_and_cwd(cwd, &#x26;project_root);
    for dir in dirs {
        let agents_skills = dir.join(".agents").join("skills");
        if agents_skills.is_dir() {
            roots.push(SkillRoot { path: agents_skills, scope: SkillScope::Repo });
        }
    }
    roots
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph "Skill Root 탐색 순서"
        P["Project config&#x3C;br/>.codex/skills/"] -->|Repo| R["roots"]
        A1[".agents/skills/&#x3C;br/>(cwd → project root)"] -->|Repo| R
        U1["$CODEX_HOME/skills/"] -->|User| R
        U2["$HOME/.agents/skills/"] -->|User| R
        PL["plugin skill roots"] -->|User| R
        S["$CODEX_HOME/skills/.system/"] -->|System| R
        AD["/etc/codex/skills/"] -->|Admin| R
    end
    R --> DEDUP["dedupe_skill_roots_by_path()"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. SKILL.md 포맷과 파싱</h2>
<h3>3.1 디렉터리 구조</h3>
<pre><code>skill-name/
├── SKILL.md                 ← 필수 (frontmatter + 본문)
├── agents/
│   └── openai.yaml          ← UI 메타데이터 (interface, dependencies, policy, permissions)
├── scripts/                 ← 실행 가능한 코드
├── references/              ← 컨텍스트에 로드할 참조 문서
└── assets/                  ← 출력에 사용할 파일 (icon, template 등)
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 SKILL.md frontmatter 파싱</h3>
<p><code>parse_skill_file()</code>이 YAML frontmatter를 파싱해 <code>SkillMetadata</code>를 생성한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs
#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct SkillFrontmatter {
    name: Option&#x3C;String>,
    description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    metadata: SkillFrontmatterMetadata,  // short-description 등
}

fn parse_skill_file(path: &#x26;Path, scope: SkillScope) -> Result&#x3C;SkillMetadata, SkillParseError> {
    let contents = fs::read_to_string(path)?;
    let frontmatter = extract_frontmatter(&#x26;contents)?;      // --- ... --- 구간 추출
    let parsed: SkillFrontmatter = serde_yaml::from_str(&#x26;frontmatter)?;

    // name이 없으면 부모 디렉터리 이름을 기본값으로 사용
    let base_name = parsed.name
        .map(sanitize_single_line)
        .unwrap_or_else(|| default_skill_name(path));
    let name = namespaced_skill_name(path, &#x26;base_name);     // plugin namespace 접두사

    let LoadedSkillMetadata { interface, dependencies, policy, permission_profile, managed_network_override }
        = load_skill_metadata(path);  // agents/openai.yaml 로드

    Ok(SkillMetadata { name, description, interface, dependencies, policy, ... })
}
</code></pre>
<p>유효성 검증: <code>name</code> 최대 64자, <code>description</code> 최대 1024자. 빈 값이면 에러를 반환한다.</p>
<h3>3.3 agents/openai.yaml 구조</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs — 메타데이터 파일 구조
#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct SkillMetadataFile {
    interface: Option&#x3C;Interface>,       // display_name, icon, brand_color, default_prompt
    dependencies: Option&#x3C;Dependencies>, // MCP 서버, env_var 등
    policy: Option&#x3C;Policy>,             // allow_implicit_invocation, products
    permissions: Option&#x3C;SkillPermissionProfile>,  // network, file_system, macos seatbelt
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Interface {
    display_name: Option&#x3C;String>,
    short_description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    icon_small: Option&#x3C;PathBuf>,    // assets/ 하위 상대 경로만 허용
    icon_large: Option&#x3C;PathBuf>,
    brand_color: Option&#x3C;String>,
    default_prompt: Option&#x3C;String>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Deserialize)]
struct Policy {
    allow_implicit_invocation: Option&#x3C;bool>,  // 기본값 true
    products: Vec&#x3C;Product>,                   // 빈 배열이면 모든 product에서 사용 가능
}
</code></pre>
<p>icon 경로는 반드시 <code>assets/</code> 하위 상대 경로여야 한다. <code>..</code> 사용시 거부된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs
fn resolve_asset_path(skill_dir: &#x26;Path, field: &#x26;str, path: Option&#x3C;PathBuf>) -> Option&#x3C;PathBuf> {
    // 절대 경로 거부, ".." 컴포넌트 거부, "assets/" 접두사 필수
    let mut components = normalized.components();
    match components.next() {
        Some(Component::Normal(c)) if c == "assets" => {} // OK
        _ => { warn!("icon path must be under assets/"); return None; }
    }
    Some(skill_dir.join(normalized))
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.4 Progressive Disclosure 설계</h3>
<p>스킬은 세 단계로 점진적 로딩된다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>단계</th>
<th>내용</th>
<th>크기</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Level 1 — Metadata</strong></td>
<td>name + description (항상 컨텍스트에 존재)</td>
<td>~100 words</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Level 2 — SKILL.md body</strong></td>
<td>skill이 trigger될 때만 로드</td>
<td>&#x3C;5k words 권장</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Level 3 — Bundled resources</strong></td>
<td>Codex가 필요할 때만 개별 파일 로드</td>
<td>무제한 (scripts는 실행만으로 가능)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>4. Skill 탐색과 로딩</h2>
<p><code>discover_skills_under_root()</code>은 BFS로 root 아래를 탐색한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs — 탐색 제한 상수
const SKILLS_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "SKILL.md";
const MAX_SCAN_DEPTH: usize = 6;           // root로부터 최대 6단계
const MAX_SKILLS_DIRS_PER_ROOT: usize = 2000;  // root당 최대 2000 디렉터리

// symlink 따라가기: Repo/User/Admin에서만, System에서는 하지 않음
let follow_symlinks = matches!(scope, SkillScope::Repo | SkillScope::User | SkillScope::Admin);
</code></pre>
<p>로딩 결과는 scope 우선순위(Repo=0 &#x3C; User=1 &#x3C; System=2 &#x3C; Admin=3)와 이름 순으로 정렬되고, 같은 경로의 중복은 제거된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// loader.rs
outcome.skills.sort_by(|a, b| {
    scope_rank(a.scope).cmp(&#x26;scope_rank(b.scope))
        .then_with(|| a.name.cmp(&#x26;b.name))
        .then_with(|| a.path_to_skills_md.cmp(&#x26;b.path_to_skills_md))
});
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. System Skill 설치 — 번들 임베딩</h2>
<p>system skill은 <code>codex_skills</code> 크레이트에 <code>include_dir!</code>로 컴파일타임 임베딩된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/skills/src/lib.rs
const SYSTEM_SKILLS_DIR: Dir = include_dir::include_dir!("$CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR/src/assets/samples");
</code></pre>
<p><code>install_system_skills()</code>는 <code>$CODEX_HOME/skills/.system/</code>에 임베딩된 파일들을 풀어놓되, fingerprint marker로 변경이 없으면 스킵한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// skills/src/lib.rs
pub fn install_system_skills(codex_home: &#x26;Path) -> Result&#x3C;(), SystemSkillsError> {
    let expected_fingerprint = embedded_system_skills_fingerprint(); // salt + 전체 파일 hash
    if dest.is_dir() &#x26;&#x26; read_marker(&#x26;marker_path) == expected_fingerprint {
        return Ok(());  // 이미 최신
    }
    // 기존 삭제 후 재설치
    fs::remove_dir_all(&#x26;dest)?;
    write_embedded_dir(&#x26;SYSTEM_SKILLS_DIR, &#x26;dest)?;
    fs::write(marker_path, format!("{expected_fingerprint}\n"))?;
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>
<p>현재 번들된 system skill 목록: <code>imagegen</code>, <code>openai-docs</code>, <code>plugin-creator</code>, <code>skill-creator</code>, <code>skill-installer</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. Config Rules — 스킬 활성화/비활성화</h2>
<p><code>SkillConfigRules</code>는 User/SessionFlags config layer에서 스킬별 enabled/disabled를 제어한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// config_rules.rs
#[derive(Debug, Clone)]
pub(crate) struct SkillConfigRule {
    pub selector: SkillConfigRuleSelector,  // Name("pdf") 또는 Path("/path/to/SKILL.md")
    pub enabled: bool,
}

// 실제 적용
pub(crate) fn resolve_disabled_skill_paths(
    skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata],
    rules: &#x26;SkillConfigRules,
) -> HashSet&#x3C;PathBuf> {
    // Path 셀렉터 → 해당 경로 직접 추가/제거
    // Name 셀렉터 → 같은 이름의 모든 skill 경로에 적용
    // layer 순서 보존: 나중 셀렉터가 앞의 셀렉터를 override
}
</code></pre>
<p>이 시스템 덕분에 사용자가 <code>codex.toml</code>에서 <code>[[skills.config]]</code> 항목으로 특정 스킬을 끌 수 있다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. Explicit Trigger — 명시적 스킬 선택</h2>
<p>스킬 trigger는 <strong>명시적 trigger</strong>와 <strong>암시적 trigger</strong>로 나뉜다. 명시적 trigger만이 실제 <code>build_skill_injections()</code>로 이어져 <code>SKILL.md</code> 본문을 읽고 contextual user fragment로 주입한다.</p>
<h3>7.1 <code>collect_explicit_skill_mentions()</code> — 선택 알고리즘</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// injection.rs — 두 단계 선택
pub(crate) fn collect_explicit_skill_mentions(
    inputs: &#x26;[UserInput],
    skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata],
    disabled_paths: &#x26;HashSet&#x3C;PathBuf>,
    connector_slug_counts: &#x26;HashMap&#x3C;String, usize>,
) -> Vec&#x3C;SkillMetadata> {
    // 1단계: structured UserInput::Skill → path 기반 정확 매칭 (가장 강한 selection)
    for input in inputs {
        if let UserInput::Skill { name, path } = input {
            blocked_plain_names.insert(name.clone());  // 2단계에서 중복 방지
            if let Some(skill) = skills.iter().find(|s| s.path_to_skills_md == *path) {
                selected.push(skill.clone());
            }
        }
    }

    // 2단계: 텍스트 $skill-name 또는 [$skill-name](resource-path) → 이름/경로 매칭
    for input in inputs {
        if let UserInput::Text { text, .. } = input {
            let mentions = extract_tool_mentions(text);
            select_skills_from_mentions(&#x26;context, &#x26;mentions, &#x26;mut selected);
        }
    }
    selected
}
</code></pre>
<h3>7.2 텍스트 mention 파싱</h3>
<p><code>extract_tool_mentions()</code>가 <code>$skill-name</code>과 <code>[$skill-name](resource-path)</code> 두 형태를 파싱한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// injection.rs — mention 형태
const SKILL_PATH_PREFIX: &#x26;str = "skill://";

// 1) 링크형: [$pdf](skill://path/to/SKILL.md) → path로 정확 매칭
// 2) 단순형: $pdf → name으로 매칭 (단, 이름이 unique한 경우만)
//    ambiguous name(같은 이름 skill이 2개+)이면 스킵
//    connector slug와 충돌해도 스킵

// 환경변수 오탐 방지
fn is_common_env_var(name: &#x26;str) -> bool {
    matches!(name.to_uppercase().as_str(), "PATH" | "HOME" | "USER" | "SHELL" | ...)
}

// mention 이름에 허용되는 문자
fn is_mention_name_char(byte: u8) -> bool {
    matches!(byte, b'a'..=b'z' | b'A'..=b'Z' | b'0'..=b'9' | b'_' | b'-' | b':')
}
</code></pre>
<h3>7.3 <code>build_skill_injections()</code> — 실제 본문 주입</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// injection.rs
pub(crate) async fn build_skill_injections(
    mentioned_skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata],
    otel: Option&#x3C;&#x26;SessionTelemetry>,
    analytics_client: &#x26;AnalyticsEventsClient,
    tracking: TrackEventsContext,
) -> SkillInjections {
    for skill in mentioned_skills {
        match fs::read_to_string(&#x26;skill.path_to_skills_md).await {
            Ok(contents) => {
                // otel counter: codex.skill.injected (status=ok)
                // analytics: SkillInvocation { invocation_type: Explicit }
                result.items.push(ResponseItem::from(SkillInstructions {
                    name: skill.name.clone(),
                    path: skill.path_to_skills_md.to_string_lossy().into_owned(),
                    contents,       // SKILL.md 전체 본문
                }));
            }
            Err(err) => {
                // otel counter: codex.skill.injected (status=error)
                result.warnings.push(format!("Failed to load skill {}: {err:#}", skill.name));
            }
        }
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<p>주입된 skill은 <code>&#x3C;skill></code> 태그로 감싸져 user message fragment로 들어간다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>8. Implicit Trigger — 암시적 감지와 telemetry</h2>
<p><code>allow_implicit_invocation</code> 같은 정책 필드가 있어도, 지금 코드만 놓고 보면 implicit path는 <strong>"탐지와 기록"에 더 가깝고 "실제 지시문 자동 투입"은 아니다</strong>. 이름만 보고 자동 skill auto-run처럼 오해하면 안 된다.</p>
<h3>8.1 암시적 감지 인덱스</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// invocation_utils.rs — 두 가지 인덱스
pub(crate) fn build_implicit_skill_path_indexes(skills: Vec&#x3C;SkillMetadata>) -> (
    HashMap&#x3C;PathBuf, SkillMetadata>,  // scripts_dir → skill (예: .../pdf/scripts/ → pdf)
    HashMap&#x3C;PathBuf, SkillMetadata>,  // doc_path → skill   (예: .../pdf/SKILL.md → pdf)
) {
    for skill in skills {
        // 1) SKILL.md 경로 자체
        by_skill_doc_path.insert(normalize_path(&#x26;skill.path_to_skills_md), skill.clone());
        // 2) SKILL.md 부모의 scripts/ 디렉터리
        if let Some(skill_dir) = skill.path_to_skills_md.parent() {
            by_scripts_dir.insert(normalize_path(&#x26;skill_dir.join("scripts")), skill);
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>8.2 command 기반 감지</h3>
<p>에이전트가 실행하는 명령어를 토큰화해서 두 가지를 체크한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// invocation_utils.rs

// 1) 스크립트 실행 감지: python scripts/rotate.py → scripts/ 경로로 skill 연결
fn detect_skill_script_run(outcome: &#x26;SkillLoadOutcome, tokens: &#x26;[String], workdir: &#x26;Path) -> Option&#x3C;SkillMetadata> {
    let script_token = script_run_token(tokens)?;  // python/bash/node 등의 runner + .py/.sh/.js 등의 확장자
    let script_path = workdir.join(script_token);
    for ancestor in script_path.ancestors() {
        if let Some(candidate) = outcome.implicit_skills_by_scripts_dir.get(ancestor) {
            return Some(candidate.clone());
        }
    }
    None
}

// 2) 문서 읽기 감지: cat SKILL.md → doc_path로 skill 연결
fn detect_skill_doc_read(outcome: &#x26;SkillLoadOutcome, tokens: &#x26;[String], workdir: &#x26;Path) -> Option&#x3C;SkillMetadata> {
    // cat/sed/head/tail/less/more/bat/awk 중 하나일 때만 진입
    if !command_reads_file(tokens) { return None; }
    for token in tokens.iter().skip(1) {
        if let Some(candidate) = outcome.implicit_skills_by_doc_path.get(&#x26;normalize_path(token)) {
            return Some(candidate.clone());
        }
    }
    None
}
</code></pre>
<p>감지된 결과는 <strong>telemetry 발행</strong>만 한다 (본문 주입 아님):</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// invocation_utils.rs
pub(crate) async fn maybe_emit_implicit_skill_invocation(sess: &#x26;Session, ...) {
    let candidate = detect_implicit_skill_invocation_for_command(...)?;
    // 중복 방지: seen_key = "scope:path:name"
    if !turn_context.turn_skills.implicit_invocation_seen_skills.insert(seen_key) { return; }
    // otel counter: codex.skill.injected (invoke_type=implicit)
    // analytics: SkillInvocation { invocation_type: Implicit }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>9. Skill 목록 렌더링</h2>
<p><code>render_skills_section()</code>은 available skills를 <code>&#x3C;skills_instructions></code> 태그로 감싸 system prompt에 넣는다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// render.rs
pub fn render_skills_section(skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata]) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let mut lines = Vec::new();
    lines.push("## Skills");
    lines.push("A skill is a set of local instructions...");
    lines.push("### Available skills");
    for skill in skills {
        lines.push(format!("- {name}: {description} (file: {path})"));
    }
    lines.push("### How to use skills");
    // trigger rules, progressive disclosure, coordination, safety 등 상세 가이드
    Some(format!("{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_OPEN_TAG}\n{body}\n{SKILLS_INSTRUCTIONS_CLOSE_TAG}"))
}
</code></pre>
<p>이 렌더링 결과에 포함되는 사용 지침 핵심:</p>
<ul>
<li>사용자가 <code>$SkillName</code>이나 평문으로 스킬을 언급하면 반드시 사용</li>
<li>SKILL.md를 열되, progressive disclosure로 필요한 만큼만 읽기</li>
<li><code>scripts/</code>가 있으면 코드 재작성보다 실행/패치 우선</li>
<li>여러 스킬이 적용되면 최소 집합을 고르고 순서를 명시</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>10. Env Var Dependencies — 환경변수 의존성</h2>
<p>MCP 서버 설치와 별개로, skill은 <code>env_var</code> 타입 dependency를 가질 수 있다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// env_var_dependencies.rs
pub(crate) fn collect_env_var_dependencies(mentioned_skills: &#x26;[SkillMetadata]) -> Vec&#x3C;SkillDependencyInfo> {
    for skill in mentioned_skills {
        for tool in &#x26;skill.dependencies?.tools {
            if tool.r#type == "env_var" &#x26;&#x26; !tool.value.is_empty() {
                dependencies.push(SkillDependencyInfo {
                    skill_name: skill.name.clone(),
                    name: tool.value.clone(),       // 환경변수 이름
                    description: tool.description.clone(),
                });
            }
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>해결 순서: ① session cache → ② <code>env::var()</code> → ③ UI로 사용자에게 질문 (<code>request_user_input</code>). 값은 세션 메모리에만 저장되고 디스크에는 쓰이지 않는다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>11. Remote Skills — 서버 기반 스킬</h2>
<p><code>remote.rs</code>는 ChatGPT API를 통해 원격 스킬을 조회하고 다운로드하는 클라이언트를 구현한다. 현재는 <strong>아직 active product surface에 연결되지 않았다</strong> (주석: "intentionally kept around for future wiring").</p>
<h3>11.1 원격 스킬 scope</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// remote.rs
pub enum RemoteSkillScope {
    WorkspaceShared,   // workspace 공유 스킬
    AllShared,         // 전체 공유 스킬
    Personal,          // 개인 스킬
    Example,           // 예시 스킬
}

pub enum RemoteSkillProductSurface {
    Chatgpt, Codex, Api, Atlas,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>11.2 조회와 다운로드</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// remote.rs — 조회
pub async fn list_remote_skills(config, auth, scope, product_surface, enabled)
    -> Result&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;RemoteSkillSummary>>
{
    // GET {chatgpt_base_url}/hazelnuts?product_surface=codex&#x26;scope=workspace-shared
    // ChatGPT auth 필수 (API key 불가)
}

// remote.rs — 다운로드 (zip 형태로 내려받아 $CODEX_HOME/skills/{id}/ 에 풀기)
pub async fn export_remote_skill(config, auth, skill_id) -> Result&#x3C;RemoteSkillDownloadResult> {
    // GET {chatgpt_base_url}/hazelnuts/{skill_id}/export
    // zip magic bytes 검증 → safe_join으로 path traversal 방지 → 압축 해제
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>safe_join()</code>은 zip 엔트리의 path component가 모두 <code>Normal</code>인지 검증해 path traversal 공격을 방어한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>12. MCP Dependency 설치 경로</h2>
<p>스킬은 도구 의존성도 갖는다. <code>SkillToolDependency</code>로 MCP 서버, transport, command, url 등을 정의할 수 있고, feature flag가 켜져 있으면 선택된 skill 때문에 필요한 MCP 서버를 설치할지 <code>request_user_input</code>으로 물어본 뒤 전역 config를 수정하는 경로까지 있다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// model.rs
pub struct SkillToolDependency {
    pub r#type: String,          // "mcp_server", "env_var" 등
    pub value: String,           // 서버 이름이나 변수 이름
    pub description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub transport: Option&#x3C;String>, // "stdio", "sse" 등
    pub command: Option&#x3C;String>,   // 실행 명령어
    pub url: Option&#x3C;String>,       // 서버 URL
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>단계</th>
<th>설명</th>
<th>파일</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td>선택된 skill에서 필요한 tool dependency 수집</td>
<td><code>skills/model.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td>현재 설치된 MCP 서버와 비교</td>
<td><code>mcp/skill_dependencies.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td>필요하면 <code>request_user_input</code>으로 설치 여부 질문</td>
<td><code>mcp/skill_dependencies.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td>global config를 수정해 MCP 서버 등록</td>
<td><code>mcp/skill_dependencies.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td>OAuth가 필요하면 로그인 시도</td>
<td><code>mcp/skill_dependencies.rs</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>이 경로는 꽤 공격적이다. 따라서 우리 포크에서 skill을 유지하더라도 "skill이 곧 global config 수정까지 할 수 있는가"는 별도 정책 결정을 해야 한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>종합 아키텍처 다이어그램</h2>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    subgraph "Root 해석"
        CLS["ConfigLayerStack"] --> SR["skill_roots()"]
        PM["PluginsManager"] --> SR
        CWD["cwd"] --> RAR["repo_agents_skill_roots()"]
        RAR --> SR
    end

    subgraph "로딩"
        SR --> LR["load_skills_from_roots()"]
        LR -->|BFS 탐색| DSR["discover_skills_under_root()"]
        DSR -->|SKILL.md 파싱| PSF["parse_skill_file()"]
        PSF -->|agents/openai.yaml| LSM["load_skill_metadata()"]
        DSR --> SLO["SkillLoadOutcome"]
    end

    subgraph "필터링"
        SLO --> FP["filter_for_product()"]
        FP --> RDP["resolve_disabled_paths()"]
        RDP --> FIN["finalize_skill_outcome()"]
        FIN -->|implicit index 구축| IDX["by_scripts_dir / by_doc_path"]
    end

    subgraph "Trigger &#x26; 주입"
        UI["UserInput"] --> CEM["collect_explicit_mentions()"]
        FIN --> CEM
        CEM --> BSI["build_skill_injections()"]
        BSI -->|fs::read SKILL.md| INJ["SkillInjections"]
        INJ --> CTX["contextual user fragment&#x3C;br/>《skill》 wrapper"]
    end

    subgraph "Implicit (telemetry only)"
        CMD["shell command"] --> DET["detect_implicit_invocation()"]
        IDX --> DET
        DET --> TEL["otel counter + analytics"]
    end

    subgraph "Dependencies"
        CEM --> DEP_E["collect_env_var_deps()"]
        DEP_E --> RSD["resolve_skill_deps_for_turn()"]
        CEM --> DEP_M["MCP dep installer"]
        DEP_M --> GC["global config 수정"]
    end

    subgraph "UI 표면"
        FIN --> REN["render_skills_section()"]
        REN --> SYS["system prompt&#x3C;br/>《skills_instructions》"]
    end
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant User as 사용자
    participant Core as Codex Core
    participant SM as SkillsManager
    participant Loader as loader.rs
    participant FS as 파일 시스템
    participant Inj as injection.rs
    participant OTel as Telemetry

    User->>Core: "$pdf로 변환해줘" (UserInput::Text)
    Core->>SM: skills_for_config(config)
    SM->>SM: cache hit 확인
    alt cache miss
        SM->>Loader: skill_roots() → root 목록
        SM->>Loader: load_skills_from_roots(roots)
        Loader->>FS: BFS 탐색 (SKILL.md 검색)
        FS-->>Loader: SKILL.md + agents/openai.yaml
        Loader-->>SM: SkillLoadOutcome
        SM->>SM: filter_for_product + disabled_paths
        SM->>SM: build_implicit_indexes
        SM->>SM: cache에 저장
    end
    SM-->>Core: SkillLoadOutcome

    Core->>Inj: collect_explicit_skill_mentions(inputs, skills)
    Note over Inj: "$pdf" 파싱 → name 매칭&#x3C;br/>unique name이면 선택
    Inj-->>Core: mentioned_skills: [pdf]

    Core->>Inj: build_skill_injections(mentioned_skills)
    Inj->>FS: fs::read_to_string(SKILL.md)
    FS-->>Inj: SKILL.md 본문
    Inj->>OTel: codex.skill.injected (status=ok, invoke_type=explicit)
    Inj-->>Core: SkillInjections { items: [SkillInstructions] }

    Core->>Core: 〈skill〉 wrapper로 user message에 주입
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>기술 참조</h2>
<h3>핵심 데이터 구조</h3>
<table>

<h3>skill root와 scope</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>scope</th>
<th>경로</th>
<th>비고</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Repo</td>
<td><code>.codex/skills/</code>, <code>.agents/skills/</code> (cwd→project root 각 단계)</td>
<td>사용자가 만든 로컬 skill</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>User</td>
<td><code>$CODEX_HOME/skills/</code>, <code>$HOME/.agents/skills/</code>, plugin roots</td>
<td>범용 개인 skill</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>System</td>
<td><code>$CODEX_HOME/skills/.system/</code></td>
<td>바이너리에 임베딩된 번들 skill</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Admin</td>
<td><code>/etc/codex/skills/</code></td>
<td>조직 정책성 skill</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>lifecycle</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>단계</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>root 계산</td>
<td><code>skill_roots()</code>가 config layer + plugin + .agents 경로를 합친다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>탐색</td>
<td><code>discover_skills_under_root()</code>가 BFS로 <code>SKILL.md</code> 파일을 찾는다 (depth≤6, dirs≤2000)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>파싱</td>
<td><code>parse_skill_file()</code>이 frontmatter + <code>agents/openai.yaml</code>을 읽는다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>product 필터</td>
<td><code>filter_skill_load_outcome_for_product()</code>가 product 제한을 적용한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>config rules</td>
<td><code>resolve_disabled_skill_paths()</code>가 사용자 설정 기반 disabled를 적용한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>implicit index</td>
<td><code>build_implicit_skill_path_indexes()</code>가 scripts_dir/doc_path 인덱스를 구축한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>명시적 선택</td>
<td><code>collect_explicit_skill_mentions()</code>가 structured input과 <code>$skill-name</code>으로 현재 turn용 skill을 고른다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>본문 주입</td>
<td><code>build_skill_injections()</code>가 실제 <code>SKILL.md</code> 본문을 <code>&#x3C;skill></code> 태그로 감싸 넣는다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>목록 표시</td>
<td><code>render_skills_section()</code>이 available skills catalog를 <code>&#x3C;skills_instructions></code>로 만든다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>dependency 해결</td>
<td>env_var → session cache/env/UI 질문, MCP → global config 수정</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>trigger 종류</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>trigger</th>
<th>실제 동작</th>
<th>코드 경로</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>structured <code>UserInput::Skill</code></td>
<td>path 기준으로 명시적 선택, 가장 강한 explicit selection</td>
<td><code>skills/injection.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>텍스트 <code>$skill-name</code></td>
<td>plain name → unique match일 때만 선택</td>
<td><code>skills/injection.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>링크형 <code>[$name](skill://path)</code></td>
<td>path 기준 정확 매칭</td>
<td><code>skills/injection.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>plugin mention</td>
<td>skill 본문이 아니라 developer hint 생성</td>
<td><code>plugins/injection.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>shell script 실행 감지</td>
<td><code>scripts/</code> 하위 실행 시 telemetry 발행 (본문 주입 아님)</td>
<td><code>skills/invocation_utils.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>file read 감지</td>
<td><code>cat</code>/<code>head</code> 등으로 SKILL.md 읽기 시 telemetry 발행 (본문 주입 아님)</td>
<td><code>skills/invocation_utils.rs</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>실제 주입 형식</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>항목</th>
<th>형식</th>
<th>구현</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>skill 본문</td>
<td><code>&#x3C;skill></code> wrapper가 붙은 user message fragment</td>
<td><code>instructions/user_instructions.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>skill 목록 소개</td>
<td><code>&#x3C;skills_instructions></code> wrapper, system prompt에 삽입</td>
<td><code>skills/render.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>app-server skill 조회</td>
<td><code>skills/list</code> RPC</td>
<td><code>app-server/src/codex_message_processor.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>skill enable/disable</td>
<td><code>skills/config/write</code> RPC</td>
<td><code>app-server/src/codex_message_processor.rs</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>우리가 특히 기억해야 할 차이</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>이름</th>
<th>실제 의미</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>explicit skill mention</td>
<td>실제 본문 주입으로 이어진다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>implicit skill invocation</td>
<td>자동 본문 주입이 아니라 command 연관 telemetry가 핵심이다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>bundled system skills</td>
<td>바이너리에 <code>include_dir!</code>로 임베딩 → <code>$CODEX_HOME/skills/.system/</code>에 캐시</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>plugin skills</td>
<td>skill 자체보다 plugin capability hint와 함께 묶여 다뤄진다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>remote skills</td>
<td>ChatGPT API 기반 원격 스킬 (아직 미연결, future wiring)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>env_var dependency</td>
<td>session-local 메모리에만 저장, 디스크 미기록</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>MCP dependency</td>
<td>global config 수정까지 가능, 보안 정책 검토 필요</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>포크 체크리스트</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> skill loader와 injector는 다르다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> explicit trigger만이 실제 본문 주입으로 이어진다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> implicit invocation은 현재 telemetry 훅에 더 가깝다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> skill은 UI 메타데이터와 dependency를 가진 package에 가깝다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> system skill 설치 경로가 있다는 점을 기억한다 (<code>include_dir!</code> + fingerprint marker)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> MCP dependency 설치 기능은 강력하지만 별도 정책 검토가 필요하다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> config rules로 skill enable/disable을 user/session 단위로 제어할 수 있다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> remote skills API가 존재하지만 아직 미연결 상태다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> env_var dependency는 session-only이고, MCP dependency는 global config를 수정한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> global MCP config 수정 기능을 유지할지는 별도 결정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>default_prompt</code>와 icon 메타데이터를 우리 제품 UI에 그대로 쓸지 정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> product restriction과 disabled path 정책을 그대로 유지할지 정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> remote skills 클라이언트를 우리 인프라에 맞게 포크할지 아예 제거할지 정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> skill permission profile (network domain override, file_system, macos seatbelt)을 우리 sandbox에 통합할지 정해야 한다</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2025-07-21: remote skills, config rules, env_var dependency, system skill 임베딩 상세 코드 스니펫 추가. SKILL.md 포맷/파싱, progressive disclosure, 암시적 감지 인덱스, skill 탐색 BFS 로직 코드와 함께 상세화. 종합 아키텍처 mermaid 다이어그램 전면 개선. 핵심 파일 목록을 역할 기반 테이블로 재구성.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: skill root, metadata, explicit injection, implicit invocation, dependency 설치 경로를 상세히 정리했다.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: 요약본과 상세본을 통합했다.</li>
</ul>
19:["$","$L28","20-axis-04-skill",{"id":"20-axis-04-skill","order":21,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 04: Skill system","description":"004_skill-system/04_co_skill.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$3e"}}]}]
3f:T1cc79,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 05: Subagents</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — subagent/collaboration dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>Codex의 서브에이전트는 생각보다 제품 기능처럼 노출되어 있지만, 내부를 보면 사실상 "현재 turn을 기반으로 새 thread를 spawn하는 협업 툴 세트"다. 즉 독립된 에이전트 프레임워크가 따로 있는 것이 아니라, 기존 <code>Session</code>과 <code>TurnContext</code>를 확장해서 하위 conversation을 만드는 방식이다.</li>
<li>이 점이 중요한 이유는 우리 포크에서 subagent를 유지할지 판단하려면 UI가 아니라 상속 구조를 봐야 하기 때문이다. <code>spawn_agent</code>는 새 child를 만들 때 부모의 effective config를 복사하고, 현재 model, provider, reasoning effort, approval policy, sandbox, cwd, developer instructions를 다시 덮어쓴다. 그 위에 role co</li>
<li>즉 subagent는 "부모와 비슷한 설정의 별도 런타임"이지, 완전히 독립된 worker가 아니다. 이 덕분에 일관된 정책 상속은 쉽지만, 반대로 제품화할 때는 어떤 설정을 상속하고 어떤 것은 끊을지 결정해야 한다. 특히 <code>developer_instructions</code>까지 그대로 내려간다는 점은 매우 중요하다.</li>
<li>Codex는 이 협업면을 tool로 노출한다. core에는 <code>spawn_agent</code>, <code>send_input</code>, <code>wait_agent</code>, <code>resume_agent</code>, <code>close_agent</code> handler가 있고, app-server protocol은 이를 <code>CollabAgentToolCall</code>로 별도 기록한다. 즉 서브에이전트는 모델 내부의 숨겨진 기능이 아니라, 명시적인 tool surface를 가진다.</li>
<li>또한 <code>codex_delegate.rs</code>는 부모와 자식 사이에서 approval, <code>request_user_input</code>, MCP tool 이벤트를 중계한다. 그래서 child가 사용자에게 직접 질문하지 않고도 부모 세션을 통해 승인과 응답을 받을 수 있다. 제품 설계 관점에서는 이것이 "subagent orchestration bus" 역할을 한다.</li>
<li>마지막으로 mode와 role도 중요하다. collaboration mode preset은 <code>plan.md</code>, <code>default.md</code> 같은 템플릿에서 developer instructions를 공급하고, built-in role인 <code>awaiter.toml</code> 같은 파일은 특정 목적의 하위 에이전트를 만드는 최소 예시가 된다. 즉 Codex는 subagent를 단순 API가 아니라 **prompt plus config plus s</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li><code>AgentControl</code>은 멀티에이전트 시스템의 허브다. root thread 트리 하나당 인스턴스 하나가 만들어지며, 같은 root에서 파생된 모든 하위 에이전트가 이 인스턴스를 공유한다. 내부에는 <code>ThreadManagerState</code>에 대한 <code>Weak</code> 참조와 <code>AgentRegistry</code>의 <code>Arc</code>가 있다.</li>
<li>// core/src/agent/control.rs</li>
<li>pub(crate) struct AgentControl {</li>
<li>/// Weak handle back to the global thread registry/state.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Topics covered</h2>
<ul>
<li>
<ol>
<li>AgentControl — Subagent 제어 평면</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="2">
<li>spawn → delegate → wait 전체 흐름</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>2.1 spawn 단계 상세 코드</li>
<li>2.2 send_input — 메시지 전송</li>
<li>2.3 close_agent — 종료와 하위 트리 정리</li>
<li>2.4 완료 감시 — completion watcher</li>
<li>
<ol start="3">
<li>AgentRegistry — 슬롯·닉네임·트리 관리</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>3.1 슬롯 예약 — CAS 기반 동시성 제어</li>
<li>3.2 SpawnReservation — RAII 예약/롤백</li>
<li>3.3 닉네임 풀과 리셋</li>
<li>
<ol start="4">
<li>agent_resolver — 경로 기반 Agent 해석</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="5">
<li>Role 시스템 — 역할 기반 config 레이어</li>
</ol>
</li>

#[derive(Clone, Default)]
pub(crate) struct AgentControl {
    /// Weak handle back to the global thread registry/state.
    /// This is `Weak` to avoid reference cycles and shadow persistence of the form
    /// `ThreadManagerState -> CodexThread -> Session -> SessionServices -> ThreadManagerState`.
    manager: Weak&#x3C;ThreadManagerState>,
    state: Arc&#x3C;AgentRegistry>,
}

    A["부모 turn: spawn_agent 호출"] --> B["AgentControl::spawn_agent_internal"]
    B --> C["AgentRegistry::reserve_spawn_slot&#x3C;br/>(max_threads CAS 체크)"]
    C --> D{"SessionSource 유형?"}
    D -->|ThreadSpawn| E["prepare_thread_spawn&#x3C;br/>닉네임·경로 예약"]
    D -->|기타| F["기본 메타데이터"]
    E --> G["shell snapshot 상속&#x3C;br/>exec policy 상속"]
    F --> G
    G --> H{"fork 옵션?"}
    H -->|Yes| I["부모 rollout JSONL 스냅샷&#x3C;br/>fork_thread_with_source"]
    H -->|No| J["spawn_new_thread_with_source"]
    I --> K["reservation.commit&#x3C;br/>메타데이터 확정"]

    K --> L["notify_thread_created&#x3C;br/>(클라이언트 구독 트리거)"]

    style N fill:#ddf,stroke:#009

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs — spawn_agent_internal (축약)
async fn spawn_agent_internal(
    &#x26;self,
    config: Config,
    items: Vec&#x3C;UserInput>,
    session_source: Option&#x3C;SessionSource>,
    options: SpawnAgentOptions,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;LiveAgent> {
    let state = self.upgrade()?;                                   // Weak → Arc
    let mut reservation = self.state.reserve_spawn_slot(           // ① 슬롯 확보
        config.agent_max_threads
    )?;
    let inherited_shell_snapshot = self                             // ② 부모 shell 상속
        .inherited_shell_snapshot_for_source(&#x26;state, session_source.as_ref())
        .await;
    let inherited_exec_policy = self                               // ③ 실행 정책 상속
        .inherited_exec_policy_for_source(&#x26;state, session_source.as_ref(), &#x26;config)
        .await;

    // ④ ThreadSpawn이면 닉네임·경로 예약
    let (session_source, mut agent_metadata) = match session_source {
        Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
            parent_thread_id, depth, agent_path, agent_role, ..
        })) => {
            self.prepare_thread_spawn(
                &#x26;mut reservation, &#x26;config,
                parent_thread_id, depth, agent_path, agent_role,
                None, // preferred_agent_nickname
            )?
        }
        other => (other, AgentMetadata::default()),
    };

    // ⑤ 실제 thread 생성 (fork vs 일반)
    let new_thread = match session_source {
        Some(session_source) if options.fork_parent_spawn_call_id.is_some() => {
            // 부모 rollout을 JSONL 스냅샷으로 포크
            state.fork_thread_with_source(config, initial_history, self.clone(),
                session_source, false, inherited_shell_snapshot,
                inherited_exec_policy).await?
        }
        Some(session_source) => {
            state.spawn_new_thread_with_source(config, self.clone(),
                session_source, false, None,
                inherited_shell_snapshot, inherited_exec_policy).await?
        }
        None => state.spawn_new_thread(config, self.clone()).await?,
    };

    agent_metadata.agent_id = Some(new_thread.thread_id);
    reservation.commit(agent_metadata.clone());                    // ⑥ 예약 확정
    state.notify_thread_created(new_thread.thread_id);             // ⑦ 클라이언트 알림
    self.send_input(new_thread.thread_id, items).await?;           // ⑧ 초기 입력
    self.maybe_start_completion_watcher(                           // ⑨ 비동기 완료 감시
        new_thread.thread_id, notification_source,
        child_reference, agent_metadata.agent_path.clone(),
    );

    Ok(LiveAgent { thread_id: new_thread.thread_id, metadata: agent_metadata,
        status: self.get_status(new_thread.thread_id).await })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn send_input(
    &#x26;self,
    agent_id: ThreadId,
    items: Vec&#x3C;UserInput>,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    let last_task_message = render_input_preview(&#x26;items);
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    let result = self.handle_thread_request_result(
        agent_id, &#x26;state,
        state.send_op(agent_id, Op::UserInput {
            items,
            final_output_json_schema: None,
        }).await,
    ).await;
    if result.is_ok() {
        self.state.update_last_task_message(agent_id, last_task_message);
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn close_agent(&#x26;self, agent_id: ThreadId) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    // ① state_db에 Closed 상태 기록 (재시작 시 resume 안 함)
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    if let Ok(thread) = state.get_thread(agent_id).await
        &#x26;&#x26; let Some(state_db_ctx) = thread.state_db()
    {
        let _ = state_db_ctx.set_thread_spawn_edge_status(
            agent_id, DirectionalThreadSpawnEdgeStatus::Closed
        ).await;
    }
    // ② 자신 + 모든 하위 에이전트 shutdown
    self.shutdown_agent_tree(agent_id).await
}

async fn shutdown_agent_tree(&#x26;self, agent_id: ThreadId) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    let descendant_ids = self.live_thread_spawn_descendants(agent_id).await?;
    let result = self.shutdown_live_agent(agent_id).await;
    for descendant_id in descendant_ids {
        let _ = self.shutdown_live_agent(descendant_id).await;
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs (축약)
fn maybe_start_completion_watcher(&#x26;self, child_thread_id: ThreadId, ...) {
    let Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
        parent_thread_id, ..
    })) = session_source else { return; };

    let control = self.clone();
    tokio::spawn(async move {
        // watch::Receiver로 상태 변화를 구독
        let status = match control.subscribe_status(child_thread_id).await {
            Ok(mut status_rx) => {
                let mut status = status_rx.borrow().clone();
                while !is_final(&#x26;status) {            // Running/PendingInit이면 계속 대기
                    if status_rx.changed().await.is_err() { break; }
                    status = status_rx.borrow().clone();
                }
                status
            }
            Err(_) => control.get_status(child_thread_id).await,
        };

        if !is_final(&#x26;status) { return; }
        // 부모 thread에 완료 메시지 주입
        let message = format_subagent_notification_message(&#x26;child_reference, &#x26;status);
        // V2에서는 InterAgentCommunication, V1에서는 inject_user_message_without_turn
        // ...
    });
}
</code></pre>

    participant Parent as 부모 thread
    participant Control as AgentControl
    participant Registry as AgentRegistry
    participant Child as child thread
    participant Watcher as completion watcher
    participant Delegate as codex delegate

    Parent->>Control: spawn_agent(config, items)
    Control->>Registry: reserve_spawn_slot(max_threads)
    Registry-->>Control: SpawnReservation
    Control->>Registry: reserve_agent_nickname / reserve_agent_path
    Control->>Child: spawn_new_thread_with_source
    Control->>Registry: reservation.commit(metadata)
    Control->>Child: send_input(초기 프롬프트)
    Control->>Watcher: tokio::spawn(completion_watcher)

    Parent->>Control: send_input(추가 지시)
    Control->>Child: Op::UserInput 전달

    Child->>Delegate: approval 요청
    Delegate->>Parent: 부모 정책으로 중계
    Parent-->>Delegate: 승인 응답
    Delegate-->>Child: 응답 전달

    Child-->>Watcher: status → Completed
    Watcher->>Parent: inject notification message

    Parent->>Control: close_agent
    Control->>Child: shutdown_live_agent
    Control->>Registry: release_spawned_thread
