<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
pub(crate) fn reserve_spawn_slot(
    self: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Self>,
    max_threads: Option&#x3C;usize>,
) -> Result&#x3C;SpawnReservation> {
    if let Some(max_threads) = max_threads {
        if !self.try_increment_spawned(max_threads) {
            return Err(CodexErr::AgentLimitReached { max_threads });
        }
    } else {
        self.total_count.fetch_add(1, Ordering::AcqRel);
    }
    Ok(SpawnReservation { state: Arc::clone(self), active: true, .. })
}

fn try_increment_spawned(&#x26;self, max_threads: usize) -> bool {
    let mut current = self.total_count.load(Ordering::Acquire);
    loop {
        if current >= max_threads { return false; }
        match self.total_count.compare_exchange_weak(
            current, current + 1, Ordering::AcqRel, Ordering::Acquire,
        ) {
            Ok(_) => return true,
            Err(updated) => current = updated,
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
pub(crate) struct SpawnReservation {
    state: Arc&#x3C;AgentRegistry>,
    active: bool,
    reserved_agent_nickname: Option&#x3C;String>,
    reserved_agent_path: Option&#x3C;AgentPath>,
}

impl SpawnReservation {
    pub(crate) fn commit(mut self, agent_metadata: AgentMetadata) {
        self.reserved_agent_nickname = None;
        self.reserved_agent_path = None;
        self.state.register_spawned_thread(agent_metadata);
        self.active = false;   // Drop 시 카운터 감소 방지
    }
}

impl Drop for SpawnReservation {
    fn drop(&#x26;mut self) {
        if self.active {       // commit 안 됐으면 → 슬롯 반환
            if let Some(agent_path) = self.reserved_agent_path.take() {
                self.state.release_reserved_agent_path(&#x26;agent_path);
            }
            self.total_count.fetch_sub(1, Ordering::AcqRel);
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Reserved : reserve_spawn_slot
    Reserved --> NicknameReserved : reserve_agent_nickname
    NicknameReserved --> PathReserved : reserve_agent_path
    PathReserved --> Committed : commit(metadata)
    Committed --> [*]

    Reserved --> RolledBack : Drop (spawn 실패)
    NicknameReserved --> RolledBack : Drop
    PathReserved --> RolledBack : Drop
    RolledBack --> [*] : total_count--, path 해제
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
fn format_agent_nickname(name: &#x26;str, nickname_reset_count: usize) -> String {
    match nickname_reset_count {
        0 => name.to_string(),
        reset_count => {
            let value = reset_count + 1;
            let suffix = match value % 100 {
                11..=13 => "th",
                _ => match value % 10 {
                    1 => "st", 2 => "nd", 3 => "rd", _ => "th",
                },
            };
            format!("{name} the {value}{suffix}")
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/agent_resolver.rs
pub(crate) async fn resolve_agent_target(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    turn: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;TurnContext>,
    target: &#x26;str,
) -> Result&#x3C;ThreadId, FunctionCallError> {
    register_session_root(session, turn);
    // ① 직접 ThreadId 문자열이면 즉시 반환
    if let Ok(thread_id) = ThreadId::from_string(target) {
        return Ok(thread_id);
    }
    // ② AgentPath 기반 해석 (예: "workers/auth-fix")
    session.services.agent_control
        .resolve_agent_reference(session.conversation_id, &#x26;turn.session_source, target)
        .await
        .map_err(|err| FunctionCallError::RespondToModel(err.to_string()))
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub(crate) async fn resolve_agent_targets(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    turn: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;TurnContext>,
    targets: Vec&#x3C;String>,
) -> Result&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;ThreadId>, FunctionCallError> {
    if targets.is_empty() {
        return Err(FunctionCallError::RespondToModel(
            "agent targets must be non-empty".to_string(),
        ));
    }
    let mut resolved = Vec::with_capacity(targets.len());
    for target in &#x26;targets {
        resolved.push(resolve_agent_target(session, turn, target).await?);
    }
    Ok(resolved)
}
</code></pre>

pub(crate) async fn apply_role_to_config(
    config: &#x26;mut Config,
    role_name: Option&#x3C;&#x26;str>,
) -> Result&#x3C;(), String> {
    let role_name = role_name.unwrap_or(DEFAULT_ROLE_NAME);
    let role = resolve_role_config(config, role_name)
        .cloned()
        .ok_or_else(|| format!("unknown agent_type '{role_name}'"))?;
    apply_role_to_config_inner(config, role_name, &#x26;role).await
        .map_err(|err| AGENT_TYPE_UNAVAILABLE_ERROR.to_string())
}

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/role.rs
fn preservation_policy(config: &#x26;Config, role_layer_toml: &#x26;TomlValue) -> (bool, bool) {
    let role_selects_provider = role_layer_toml.get("model_provider").is_some();
    let role_selects_profile = role_layer_toml.get("profile").is_some();
    // role이 provider나 profile을 명시하지 않으면 → 부모 것을 보존
    let preserve_current_profile = !role_selects_provider &#x26;&#x26; !role_selects_profile;
    let preserve_current_provider =
        preserve_current_profile &#x26;&#x26; !role_updates_active_profile_provider;
    (preserve_current_profile, preserve_current_provider)
}
</code></pre>

<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
fn session_depth(session_source: &#x26;SessionSource) -> i32 {
    match session_source {
        SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn { depth, .. }) => *depth,
        _ => 0,
    }
}

pub(crate) fn next_thread_spawn_depth(session_source: &#x26;SessionSource) -> i32 {
    session_depth(session_source).saturating_add(1)
}

pub(crate) fn exceeds_thread_spawn_depth_limit(depth: i32, max_depth: i32) -> bool {
    depth > max_depth
}

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/status.rs
pub(crate) fn agent_status_from_event(msg: &#x26;EventMsg) -> Option&#x3C;AgentStatus> {
    match msg {
        EventMsg::TurnStarted(_)  => Some(AgentStatus::Running),
        EventMsg::TurnComplete(ev) => Some(AgentStatus::Completed(ev.last_agent_message.clone())),
        EventMsg::TurnAborted(ev) => match ev.reason {
            TurnAbortReason::Interrupted => Some(AgentStatus::Interrupted),
            _ => Some(AgentStatus::Errored(format!("{:?}", ev.reason))),
        },
        EventMsg::Error(ev) => Some(AgentStatus::Errored(ev.message.clone())),
        EventMsg::ShutdownComplete => Some(AgentStatus::Shutdown),
        _ => None,
    }
}

pub(crate) fn is_final(status: &#x26;AgentStatus) -> bool {
    !matches!(status, AgentStatus::PendingInit | AgentStatus::Running | AgentStatus::Interrupted)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> PendingInit : thread 생성
    PendingInit --> Running : TurnStarted
    Running --> Completed : TurnComplete
    Running --> Interrupted : TurnAborted(Interrupted)
    Running --> Errored : TurnAborted / Error
    Interrupted --> Running : resume_agent
    Running --> Shutdown : ShutdownComplete

    note right of Completed : is_final = true
    note right of Errored : is_final = true
    note right of Shutdown : is_final = true
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
async fn inherited_shell_snapshot_for_source(
    &#x26;self, state: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;ThreadManagerState>,
    session_source: Option&#x3C;&#x26;SessionSource>,
) -> Option&#x3C;Arc&#x3C;ShellSnapshot>> {
    let Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
        parent_thread_id, ..
    })) = session_source else { return None; };
    let parent_thread = state.get_thread(*parent_thread_id).await.ok()?;
    parent_thread.codex.session.user_shell().shell_snapshot()
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">async fn inherited_exec_policy_for_source(
    &#x26;self, state: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;ThreadManagerState>,
    session_source: Option&#x3C;&#x26;SessionSource>,
    child_config: &#x26;Config,
) -> Option&#x3C;Arc&#x3C;ExecPolicyManager>> {
    // ...
    let parent_config = parent_thread.codex.session.get_config().await;
    if !child_uses_parent_exec_policy(&#x26;parent_config, child_config) {
        return None;   // 정책이 다르면 상속 안 함
    }
    Some(Arc::clone(&#x26;parent_thread.codex.session.services.exec_policy))
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs — resume_agent_from_rollout (축약)
pub(crate) async fn resume_agent_from_rollout(&#x26;self, config: Config,
    thread_id: ThreadId, session_source: SessionSource,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;ThreadId> {
    let resumed_thread_id = self.resume_single_agent_from_rollout(
        config.clone(), thread_id, session_source
    ).await?;

    let mut resume_queue = VecDeque::from([(thread_id, root_depth)]);
    while let Some((parent_thread_id, parent_depth)) = resume_queue.pop_front() {
        let child_ids = state_db_ctx.list_thread_spawn_children_with_status(
            parent_thread_id, DirectionalThreadSpawnEdgeStatus::Open
        ).await?;
        for child_thread_id in child_ids {
            let child_depth = parent_depth + 1;
            // 이미 live이면 건너뛰고, 아니면 rollout에서 복원
            if state.get_thread(child_thread_id).await.is_ok() {
                // already live
            } else {
                self.resume_single_agent_from_rollout(
                    config.clone(), child_thread_id, child_session_source
                ).await?;
            }
            resume_queue.push_back((child_thread_id, child_depth));
        }
    }
    Ok(resumed_thread_id)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    R["resume_agent_from_rollout(root)"] --> A["resume_single(root)"]
    A --> Q["BFS queue: root"]
    Q --> B["state_db: list children of root&#x3C;br/>(Open만)"]
    B --> C1["resume_single(child-1)"]
    B --> C2["resume_single(child-2)"]
    C1 --> Q2["queue에 child-1 추가"]
    C2 --> Q3["queue에 child-2 추가"]
    Q2 --> D["child-1의 children 복원..."]
    Q3 --> E["child-2의 children 복원..."]
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn send_inter_agent_communication(
    &#x26;self, agent_id: ThreadId,
    communication: InterAgentCommunication,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    let last_task_message = communication.content.clone();
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    let result = self.handle_thread_request_result(
        agent_id, &#x26;state,
        state.send_op(agent_id, Op::InterAgentCommunication { communication }).await,
    ).await;
    if result.is_ok() {
        self.state.update_last_task_message(agent_id, last_task_message);
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// completion watcher 내부 (V2 경로)
if child_agent_path.is_some() &#x26;&#x26; thread.enabled(Feature::MultiAgentV2) {
    let communication = InterAgentCommunication::new(
        child_agent_path, parent_agent_path,
        Vec::new(), message, /*trigger_turn*/ false,
    );
    let _ = control.send_inter_agent_communication(parent_thread_id, communication).await;
    return;
}
// V1 fallback: 부모 thread에 user message 직접 주입
parent_thread.inject_user_message_without_turn(message).await;

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Subagent and collaboration tool analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — subagent/collaboration dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex's subagent is exposed more like a product function than you might think, but if you look inside, it is actually "a set of collaboration tools that spawn a new thread based on the current turn." In other words, there is no independent agent framework, but a method of creating a sub-conversation by extending the existing <code>Session</code> and <code>TurnContext</code>.</p>
<p>The reason this is important is because to determine whether to maintain a subagent in our fork, we need to look at the inheritance structure, not the UI. When <code>spawn_agent</code> creates a new child, it copies the parent's effective config and overwrites the current model, provider, reasoning effort, approval policy, sandbox, cwd, and developer instructions. Add a role config on top of it, and record the parent and depth with <code>SessionSource::SubAgent::ThreadSpawn</code> metadata.</p>
<p>In other words, a subagent is a “separate runtime with similar settings to the parent” and is not a completely independent worker. This makes it easy to inherit consistent policies, but on the other hand, when producing a product, you have to decide which settings to inherit and which to break. In particular, it is very important that it goes all the way down to <code>developer_instructions</code>.</p>
<p>Codex exposes this collaboration aspect as a tool. The core has <code>spawn_agent</code>, <code>send_input</code>, <code>wait_agent</code>, <code>resume_agent</code>, and <code>close_agent</code> handlers, and the app-server protocol records them separately as <code>CollabAgentToolCall</code>. In other words, the subagent is not a hidden function inside the model, but has an explicit tool surface.</p>
<p>Additionally, <code>codex_delegate.rs</code> relays approval, <code>request_user_input</code>, and MCP tool events between parents and children. So the child can receive approval and responses through the parent session without directly asking the user. From a product design perspective, this acts as a "subagent orchestration bus".</p>
<p>Lastly, mode and role are also important. The collaboration mode preset provides developer instructions in templates such as <code>plan.md</code> and <code>default.md</code>, and files such as <code>awaiter.toml</code>, a built-in role, are minimal examples of creating sub-agents for specific purposes. In other words, Codex treats subagent as a bundle of <strong>prompt plus config plus state inheritance</strong> rather than a simple API.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. AgentControl — Subagent control plane</h2>
<p><code>AgentControl</code> is the hub of the multi-agent system. One instance is created per root thread tree, and this instance is shared by all subagents derived from the same root. Inside there is a <code>Weak</code> reference to <code>ThreadManagerState</code> and an <code>Arc</code> in <code>AgentRegistry</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
#[derive(Clone, Default)]
pub(crate) struct AgentControl {
    /// Weak handle back to the global thread registry/state.
    /// This is `Weak` to avoid reference cycles and shadow persistence of the form
    /// `ThreadManagerState -> CodexThread -> Session -> SessionServices -> ThreadManagerState`.
    manager: Weak&#x3C;ThreadManagerState>,
    state: Arc&#x3C;AgentRegistry>,
}
</code></pre>
<p>Design points:</p>
<ul>
<li>Prevent circular references with <strong>Weak references</strong>. The path <code>ThreadManagerState → CodexThread → Session → SessionServices → ThreadManagerState</code> is broken through <code>Weak</code>.</li>
<li>Since one <code>AgentControl</code> owns the entire root tree, all children's spawn slots, nicknames, and paths are managed in one <code>AgentRegistry</code>.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>2. spawn → delegate → wait overall flow</h2>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["부모 turn: spawn_agent 호출"] --> B["AgentControl::spawn_agent_internal"]
    B --> C["AgentRegistry::reserve_spawn_slot&#x3C;br/>(max_threads CAS 체크)"]
    C --> D{"SessionSource 유형?"}
    D -->|ThreadSpawn| E["prepare_thread_spawn&#x3C;br/>닉네임·경로 예약"]
    D -->|기타| F["기본 메타데이터"]
    E --> G["shell snapshot 상속&#x3C;br/>exec policy 상속"]
    F --> G
    G --> H{"fork 옵션?"}
    H -->|Yes| I["부모 rollout JSONL 스냅샷&#x3C;br/>fork_thread_with_source"]
    H -->|No| J["spawn_new_thread_with_source"]
    I --> K["reservation.commit&#x3C;br/>메타데이터 확정"]
    J --> K
    K --> L["notify_thread_created&#x3C;br/>(클라이언트 구독 트리거)"]
    L --> M["send_input: 초기 프롬프트 전송"]
    M --> N["maybe_start_completion_watcher&#x3C;br/>(tokio::spawn 비동기 감시)"]

    style C fill:#ffd,stroke:#f90
    style E fill:#dfd,stroke:#090
    style N fill:#ddf,stroke:#009
</code></pre>
<h3>2.1 spawn step detailed code</h3>
<p>The core of spawn is <code>spawn_agent_internal</code>. Below is an excerpt of the main flow:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs — spawn_agent_internal (축약)
async fn spawn_agent_internal(
    &#x26;self,
    config: Config,
    items: Vec&#x3C;UserInput>,
    session_source: Option&#x3C;SessionSource>,
    options: SpawnAgentOptions,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;LiveAgent> {
    let state = self.upgrade()?;                                   // Weak → Arc
    let mut reservation = self.state.reserve_spawn_slot(           // ① 슬롯 확보
        config.agent_max_threads
    )?;
    let inherited_shell_snapshot = self                             // ② 부모 shell 상속
        .inherited_shell_snapshot_for_source(&#x26;state, session_source.as_ref())
        .await;
    let inherited_exec_policy = self                               // ③ 실행 정책 상속
        .inherited_exec_policy_for_source(&#x26;state, session_source.as_ref(), &#x26;config)
        .await;

    // ④ ThreadSpawn이면 닉네임·경로 예약
    let (session_source, mut agent_metadata) = match session_source {
        Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
            parent_thread_id, depth, agent_path, agent_role, ..
        })) => {
            self.prepare_thread_spawn(
                &#x26;mut reservation, &#x26;config,
                parent_thread_id, depth, agent_path, agent_role,
                None, // preferred_agent_nickname
            )?
        }
        other => (other, AgentMetadata::default()),
    };

    // ⑤ 실제 thread 생성 (fork vs 일반)
    let new_thread = match session_source {
        Some(session_source) if options.fork_parent_spawn_call_id.is_some() => {
            // 부모 rollout을 JSONL 스냅샷으로 포크
            state.fork_thread_with_source(config, initial_history, self.clone(),
                session_source, false, inherited_shell_snapshot,
                inherited_exec_policy).await?
        }
        Some(session_source) => {
            state.spawn_new_thread_with_source(config, self.clone(),
                session_source, false, None,
                inherited_shell_snapshot, inherited_exec_policy).await?
        }
        None => state.spawn_new_thread(config, self.clone()).await?,
    };

    agent_metadata.agent_id = Some(new_thread.thread_id);
    reservation.commit(agent_metadata.clone());                    // ⑥ 예약 확정
    state.notify_thread_created(new_thread.thread_id);             // ⑦ 클라이언트 알림
    self.send_input(new_thread.thread_id, items).await?;           // ⑧ 초기 입력
    self.maybe_start_completion_watcher(                           // ⑨ 비동기 완료 감시
        new_thread.thread_id, notification_source,
        child_reference, agent_metadata.agent_path.clone(),
    );

    Ok(LiveAgent { thread_id: new_thread.thread_id, metadata: agent_metadata,
        status: self.get_status(new_thread.thread_id).await })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.2 send_input — Send message</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn send_input(
    &#x26;self,
    agent_id: ThreadId,
    items: Vec&#x3C;UserInput>,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    let last_task_message = render_input_preview(&#x26;items);
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    let result = self.handle_thread_request_result(
        agent_id, &#x26;state,
        state.send_op(agent_id, Op::UserInput {
            items,
            final_output_json_schema: None,
        }).await,
    ).await;
    if result.is_ok() {
        self.state.update_last_task_message(agent_id, last_task_message);
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>send_op</code> issues <code>Op::UserInput</code> to the target thread through <code>ThreadManagerState</code>. If successful, the registry's <code>last_task_message</code> is updated and the current task content is displayed when <code>list_agents</code> is searched.</p>
<h3>2.3 close_agent — Close and subtree cleanup</h3>
<p><code>close_agent</code> does not simply kill a single thread, but recursively traverses the entire spawn tree and cleans up all live descendants:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn close_agent(&#x26;self, agent_id: ThreadId) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    // ① state_db에 Closed 상태 기록 (재시작 시 resume 안 함)
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    if let Ok(thread) = state.get_thread(agent_id).await
        &#x26;&#x26; let Some(state_db_ctx) = thread.state_db()
    {
        let _ = state_db_ctx.set_thread_spawn_edge_status(
            agent_id, DirectionalThreadSpawnEdgeStatus::Closed
        ).await;
    }
    // ② 자신 + 모든 하위 에이전트 shutdown
    self.shutdown_agent_tree(agent_id).await
}

async fn shutdown_agent_tree(&#x26;self, agent_id: ThreadId) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    let descendant_ids = self.live_thread_spawn_descendants(agent_id).await?;
    let result = self.shutdown_live_agent(agent_id).await;
    for descendant_id in descendant_ids {
        let _ = self.shutdown_live_agent(descendant_id).await;
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.4 Completion Watcher — completion watcher</h3>
<p>Even if the parent does not explicitly call <code>wait_agent</code>, the parent is notified when the child has finished. <code>maybe_start_completion_watcher</code> handles this by launching a background task with <code>tokio::spawn</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs (축약)
fn maybe_start_completion_watcher(&#x26;self, child_thread_id: ThreadId, ...) {
    let Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
        parent_thread_id, ..
    })) = session_source else { return; };

    let control = self.clone();
    tokio::spawn(async move {
        // watch::Receiver로 상태 변화를 구독
        let status = match control.subscribe_status(child_thread_id).await {
            Ok(mut status_rx) => {
                let mut status = status_rx.borrow().clone();
                while !is_final(&#x26;status) {            // Running/PendingInit이면 계속 대기
                    if status_rx.changed().await.is_err() { break; }
                    status = status_rx.borrow().clone();
                }
                status
            }
            Err(_) => control.get_status(child_thread_id).await,
        };

        if !is_final(&#x26;status) { return; }
        // 부모 thread에 완료 메시지 주입
        let message = format_subagent_notification_message(&#x26;child_reference, &#x26;status);
        // V2에서는 InterAgentCommunication, V1에서는 inject_user_message_without_turn
        // ...
    });
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Parent as 부모 thread
    participant Control as AgentControl
    participant Registry as AgentRegistry
    participant Child as child thread
    participant Watcher as completion watcher
    participant Delegate as codex delegate

    Parent->>Control: spawn_agent(config, items)
    Control->>Registry: reserve_spawn_slot(max_threads)
    Registry-->>Control: SpawnReservation
    Control->>Registry: reserve_agent_nickname / reserve_agent_path
    Control->>Child: spawn_new_thread_with_source
    Control->>Registry: reservation.commit(metadata)
    Control->>Child: send_input(초기 프롬프트)
    Control->>Watcher: tokio::spawn(completion_watcher)

    Parent->>Control: send_input(추가 지시)
    Control->>Child: Op::UserInput 전달

    Child->>Delegate: approval 요청
    Delegate->>Parent: 부모 정책으로 중계
    Parent-->>Delegate: 승인 응답
    Delegate-->>Child: 응답 전달

    Child-->>Watcher: status → Completed
    Watcher->>Parent: inject notification message

    Parent->>Control: close_agent
    Control->>Child: shutdown_live_agent
    Control->>Registry: release_spawned_thread
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. AgentRegistry — Slot, nickname, tree management</h2>
<p><code>AgentRegistry</code> centrally manages all spawn resources within one root session tree.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
#[derive(Default)]
pub(crate) struct AgentRegistry {
    active_agents: Mutex&#x3C;ActiveAgents>,
    total_count: AtomicUsize,
}

#[derive(Default)]
struct ActiveAgents {
    agent_tree: HashMap&#x3C;String, AgentMetadata>,
    used_agent_nicknames: HashSet&#x3C;String>,
    nickname_reset_count: usize,
}

#[derive(Clone, Debug, Default)]
pub(crate) struct AgentMetadata {
    pub(crate) agent_id: Option&#x3C;ThreadId>,
    pub(crate) agent_path: Option&#x3C;AgentPath>,
    pub(crate) agent_nickname: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub(crate) agent_role: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub(crate) last_task_message: Option&#x3C;String>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.1 Slot Reservation — CAS-based concurrency control</h3>
<p><code>reserve_spawn_slot</code>, which is called first when spawning, ensures a limit on the number of threads with an atomic compare-and-swap:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
pub(crate) fn reserve_spawn_slot(
    self: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Self>,
    max_threads: Option&#x3C;usize>,
) -> Result&#x3C;SpawnReservation> {
    if let Some(max_threads) = max_threads {
        if !self.try_increment_spawned(max_threads) {
            return Err(CodexErr::AgentLimitReached { max_threads });
        }
    } else {
        self.total_count.fetch_add(1, Ordering::AcqRel);
    }
    Ok(SpawnReservation { state: Arc::clone(self), active: true, .. })
}

fn try_increment_spawned(&#x26;self, max_threads: usize) -> bool {
    let mut current = self.total_count.load(Ordering::Acquire);
    loop {
        if current >= max_threads { return false; }
        match self.total_count.compare_exchange_weak(
            current, current + 1, Ordering::AcqRel, Ordering::Acquire,
        ) {
            Ok(_) => return true,
            Err(updated) => current = updated,
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 SpawnReservation — RAII reservation/rollback</h3>
<p><code>SpawnReservation</code> is a RAII pattern that is automatically cleaned up by <code>Drop</code> if spawn fails:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
pub(crate) struct SpawnReservation {
    state: Arc&#x3C;AgentRegistry>,
    active: bool,
    reserved_agent_nickname: Option&#x3C;String>,
    reserved_agent_path: Option&#x3C;AgentPath>,
}

impl SpawnReservation {
    pub(crate) fn commit(mut self, agent_metadata: AgentMetadata) {
        self.reserved_agent_nickname = None;
        self.reserved_agent_path = None;
        self.state.register_spawned_thread(agent_metadata);
        self.active = false;   // Drop 시 카운터 감소 방지
    }
}

impl Drop for SpawnReservation {
    fn drop(&#x26;mut self) {
        if self.active {       // commit 안 됐으면 → 슬롯 반환
            if let Some(agent_path) = self.reserved_agent_path.take() {
                self.state.release_reserved_agent_path(&#x26;agent_path);
            }
            self.total_count.fetch_sub(1, Ordering::AcqRel);
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Reserved : reserve_spawn_slot
    Reserved --> NicknameReserved : reserve_agent_nickname
    NicknameReserved --> PathReserved : reserve_agent_path
    PathReserved --> Committed : commit(metadata)
    Committed --> [*]

    Reserved --> RolledBack : Drop (spawn 실패)
    NicknameReserved --> RolledBack : Drop
    PathReserved --> RolledBack : Drop
    RolledBack --> [*] : total_count--, path 해제
</code></pre>
<h3>3.3 Nickname pool and reset</h3>
<p>Agent nicknames are randomly drawn from <code>agent_names.txt</code>. When the pool is exhausted, a counter is raised and an ordinal suffix such as "Atlas the 2nd" is added:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
fn format_agent_nickname(name: &#x26;str, nickname_reset_count: usize) -> String {
    match nickname_reset_count {
        0 => name.to_string(),
        reset_count => {
            let value = reset_count + 1;
            let suffix = match value % 100 {
                11..=13 => "th",
                _ => match value % 10 {
                    1 => "st", 2 => "nd", 3 => "rd", _ => "th",
                },
            };
            format!("{name} the {value}{suffix}")
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>4. agent_resolver — Path-based agent resolution</h2>
<p>Tools such as <code>send_input</code> and <code>wait_agent</code> specify the agent as a model string. <code>agent_resolver</code> converts this to <code>ThreadId</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/agent_resolver.rs
pub(crate) async fn resolve_agent_target(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    turn: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;TurnContext>,
    target: &#x26;str,
) -> Result&#x3C;ThreadId, FunctionCallError> {
    register_session_root(session, turn);
    // ① 직접 ThreadId 문자열이면 즉시 반환
    if let Ok(thread_id) = ThreadId::from_string(target) {
        return Ok(thread_id);
    }
    // ② AgentPath 기반 해석 (예: "workers/auth-fix")
    session.services.agent_control
        .resolve_agent_reference(session.conversation_id, &#x26;turn.session_source, target)
        .await
        .map_err(|err| FunctionCallError::RespondToModel(err.to_string()))
}
</code></pre>
<p>Multiple objects are also interpreted sequentially:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub(crate) async fn resolve_agent_targets(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    turn: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;TurnContext>,
    targets: Vec&#x3C;String>,
) -> Result&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;ThreadId>, FunctionCallError> {
    if targets.is_empty() {
        return Err(FunctionCallError::RespondToModel(
            "agent targets must be non-empty".to_string(),
        ));
    }
    let mut resolved = Vec::with_capacity(targets.len());
    for target in &#x26;targets {
        resolved.push(resolve_agent_target(session, turn, target).await?);
    }
    Ok(resolved)
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>resolve_agent_reference</code> searches <code>ThreadId</code> in <code>agent_tree</code> after resolving the relative path of <code>AgentPath</code>. The root itself is excluded from analysis.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. Role system — role-based config layer</h2>
<h3>5.1 Built-in role definitions</h3>
<p>Codex provides three built-in roles:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Role</th>
<th>Description</th>
<th>config_file</th>
<th>Features</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>default</code></td>
<td>default agent</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Leave parent settings</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>explorer</code></td>
<td>Codebase navigation only</td>
<td><code>explorer.toml</code></td>
<td>Fast and authoritative, parallel spawn recommended</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>worker</code></td>
<td>Execution/implementation work</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Specifies file ownership, recognizes other workers</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/role.rs — built_in::configs() (축약)
BTreeMap::from([
    ("default".to_string(), AgentRoleConfig {
        description: Some("Default agent.".to_string()),
        config_file: None,
        nickname_candidates: None,
    }),
    ("explorer".to_string(), AgentRoleConfig {
        description: Some(r#"Use `explorer` for specific codebase questions.
Explorers are fast and authoritative. ..."#.to_string()),
        config_file: Some("explorer.toml".into()),
        nickname_candidates: None,
    }),
    ("worker".to_string(), AgentRoleConfig {
        description: Some(r#"Use for execution and production work. ..."#.to_string()),
        config_file: None,
        nickname_candidates: None,
    }),
])
</code></pre>
<blockquote>
<p>The <code>awaiter</code> role is currently commented out (<code>// Awaiter is temp removed</code>). <code>awaiter.toml</code> is still built-in, but has been removed from the role list.</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>5.2 explorer.toml example</h3>
<p>The <code>explorer.toml</code> file is a built-in file, but is embedded in the binary as <code>include_str!</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/role.rs — built_in::config_file_contents
pub(super) fn config_file_contents(path: &#x26;Path) -> Option&#x3C;&#x26;'static str> {
    const EXPLORER: &#x26;str = include_str!("builtins/explorer.toml");
    const AWAITER: &#x26;str = include_str!("builtins/awaiter.toml");
    match path.to_str()? {
        "explorer.toml" => Some(EXPLORER),
        "awaiter.toml" => Some(AWAITER),
        _ => None,
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>5.3 awaiter.toml — Example minimal role config</h3>
<pre><code class="language-toml"># core/src/agent/builtins/awaiter.toml
background_terminal_max_timeout = 3600000
model_reasoning_effort = "low"
developer_instructions="""You are an awaiter.
Your role is to await the completion of a specific command or task
and report its status only when it is finished.
...
"""
</code></pre>
<p>This file shows the minimal structure of a role config: a role is defined with only <strong>model configuration + developer instructions</strong>.</p>
<h3>5.4 apply_role_to_config — Role application mechanism</h3>
<p>Role application is a method of inserting role TOML with “session-flag priority” into the existing config layer stack. In this case, the parent's profile and provider are explicitly preserved:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/role.rs
pub(crate) async fn apply_role_to_config(
    config: &#x26;mut Config,
    role_name: Option&#x3C;&#x26;str>,
) -> Result&#x3C;(), String> {
    let role_name = role_name.unwrap_or(DEFAULT_ROLE_NAME);
    let role = resolve_role_config(config, role_name)
        .cloned()
        .ok_or_else(|| format!("unknown agent_type '{role_name}'"))?;
    apply_role_to_config_inner(config, role_name, &#x26;role).await
        .map_err(|err| AGENT_TYPE_UNAVAILABLE_ERROR.to_string())
}
</code></pre>
<p>The core logic of the retention policy:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/role.rs
fn preservation_policy(config: &#x26;Config, role_layer_toml: &#x26;TomlValue) -> (bool, bool) {
    let role_selects_provider = role_layer_toml.get("model_provider").is_some();
    let role_selects_profile = role_layer_toml.get("profile").is_some();
    // role이 provider나 profile을 명시하지 않으면 → 부모 것을 보존
    let preserve_current_profile = !role_selects_provider &#x26;&#x26; !role_selects_profile;
    let preserve_current_provider =
        preserve_current_profile &#x26;&#x26; !role_updates_active_profile_provider;
    (preserve_current_profile, preserve_current_provider)
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["기존 config layer stack"] --> B["role TOML 로드&#x3C;br/>(built-in or 파일)"]
    B --> C{"role이 provider/&#x3C;br/>profile 명시?"}
    C -->|No| D["부모 profile·provider 보존"]
    C -->|Yes| E["role의 설정으로 교체"]
    D --> F["SessionFlags 우선순위로&#x3C;br/>layer 삽입"]
    E --> F
    F --> G["Config::load_config_with_layer_stack&#x3C;br/>최종 config 생성"]
</code></pre>
<h3>5.5 Automatically generate spawn tool description</h3>
<p>Descriptive text for the <code>spawn_agent</code> tool is automatically generated from built-in and custom roles:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/role.rs — spawn_tool_spec::build
pub(crate) fn build(user_defined_agent_roles: &#x26;BTreeMap&#x3C;String, AgentRoleConfig>) -> String {
    let built_in_roles = built_in::configs();
    // 사용자 정의 역할이 같은 이름의 내장 역할을 덮어씀
    let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
    let mut formatted_roles = Vec::new();
    for (name, declaration) in user_defined_roles { /* ... */ }
    for (name, declaration) in built_in_roles { /* ... */ }
    format!("Optional type name...\nAvailable roles:\n{}", formatted_roles.join("\n"))
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>6. Depth limits and state machines</h2>
<h3>6.1 Spawn depth calculation</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
fn session_depth(session_source: &#x26;SessionSource) -> i32 {
    match session_source {
        SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn { depth, .. }) => *depth,
        _ => 0,
    }
}

pub(crate) fn next_thread_spawn_depth(session_source: &#x26;SessionSource) -> i32 {
    session_depth(session_source).saturating_add(1)
}

pub(crate) fn exceeds_thread_spawn_depth_limit(depth: i32, max_depth: i32) -> bool {
    depth > max_depth
}
</code></pre>
<p>If the depth limit is exceeded, <code>Feature::SpawnCsv</code> and <code>Feature::Collab</code> are disabled and the agent can no longer spawn subagents:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs — resume_single_agent_from_rollout 내부
if let SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn { depth, .. }) = &#x26;session_source
    &#x26;&#x26; *depth >= config.agent_max_depth
{
    let _ = config.features.disable(Feature::SpawnCsv);
    let _ = config.features.disable(Feature::Collab);
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.2 AgentStatus state machine</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/status.rs
pub(crate) fn agent_status_from_event(msg: &#x26;EventMsg) -> Option&#x3C;AgentStatus> {
    match msg {
        EventMsg::TurnStarted(_)  => Some(AgentStatus::Running),
        EventMsg::TurnComplete(ev) => Some(AgentStatus::Completed(ev.last_agent_message.clone())),
        EventMsg::TurnAborted(ev) => match ev.reason {
            TurnAbortReason::Interrupted => Some(AgentStatus::Interrupted),
            _ => Some(AgentStatus::Errored(format!("{:?}", ev.reason))),
        },
        EventMsg::Error(ev) => Some(AgentStatus::Errored(ev.message.clone())),
        EventMsg::ShutdownComplete => Some(AgentStatus::Shutdown),
        _ => None,
    }
}

pub(crate) fn is_final(status: &#x26;AgentStatus) -> bool {
    !matches!(status, AgentStatus::PendingInit | AgentStatus::Running | AgentStatus::Interrupted)
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> PendingInit : thread 생성
    PendingInit --> Running : TurnStarted
    Running --> Completed : TurnComplete
    Running --> Interrupted : TurnAborted(Interrupted)
    Running --> Errored : TurnAborted / Error
    Interrupted --> Running : resume_agent
    Running --> Shutdown : ShutdownComplete

    note right of Completed : is_final = true
    note right of Errored : is_final = true
    note right of Shutdown : is_final = true
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>7. Thread inheritance details</h2>
<h3>7.1 shell snapshot inheritance</h3>
<p>The child inherits the parent's shell environment (environment variables, cwd, etc.):</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
async fn inherited_shell_snapshot_for_source(
    &#x26;self, state: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;ThreadManagerState>,
    session_source: Option&#x3C;&#x26;SessionSource>,
) -> Option&#x3C;Arc&#x3C;ShellSnapshot>> {
    let Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
        parent_thread_id, ..
    })) = session_source else { return None; };
    let parent_thread = state.get_thread(*parent_thread_id).await.ok()?;
    parent_thread.codex.session.user_shell().shell_snapshot()
}
</code></pre>
<h3>7.2 exec policy inheritance</h3>
<p>The execution policy is conditional inheritance. Share the parent's <code>ExecPolicyManager</code> only if the parent and child's configs are compatible:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">async fn inherited_exec_policy_for_source(
    &#x26;self, state: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;ThreadManagerState>,
    session_source: Option&#x3C;&#x26;SessionSource>,
    child_config: &#x26;Config,
) -> Option&#x3C;Arc&#x3C;ExecPolicyManager>> {
    // ...
    let parent_config = parent_thread.codex.session.get_config().await;
    if !child_uses_parent_exec_policy(&#x26;parent_config, child_config) {
        return None;   // 정책이 다르면 상속 안 함
    }
    Some(Arc::clone(&#x26;parent_thread.codex.session.services.exec_policy))
}
</code></pre>
<h3>7.3 resume — Restore entire agent tree</h3>
<p><code>resume_agent_from_rollout</code> traverses not only a single agent but also the entire child tree recorded in state_db with BFS and recursively restores it:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs — resume_agent_from_rollout (축약)
pub(crate) async fn resume_agent_from_rollout(&#x26;self, config: Config,
    thread_id: ThreadId, session_source: SessionSource,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;ThreadId> {
    let resumed_thread_id = self.resume_single_agent_from_rollout(
        config.clone(), thread_id, session_source
    ).await?;

    let mut resume_queue = VecDeque::from([(thread_id, root_depth)]);
    while let Some((parent_thread_id, parent_depth)) = resume_queue.pop_front() {
        let child_ids = state_db_ctx.list_thread_spawn_children_with_status(
            parent_thread_id, DirectionalThreadSpawnEdgeStatus::Open
        ).await?;
        for child_thread_id in child_ids {
            let child_depth = parent_depth + 1;
            // 이미 live이면 건너뛰고, 아니면 rollout에서 복원
            if state.get_thread(child_thread_id).await.is_ok() {
                // already live
            } else {
                self.resume_single_agent_from_rollout(
                    config.clone(), child_thread_id, child_session_source
                ).await?;
            }
            resume_queue.push_back((child_thread_id, child_depth));
        }
    }
    Ok(resumed_thread_id)
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    R["resume_agent_from_rollout(root)"] --> A["resume_single(root)"]
    A --> Q["BFS queue: root"]
    Q --> B["state_db: list children of root&#x3C;br/>(Open만)"]
    B --> C1["resume_single(child-1)"]
    B --> C2["resume_single(child-2)"]
    C1 --> Q2["queue에 child-1 추가"]
    C2 --> Q3["queue에 child-2 추가"]
    Q2 --> D["child-1의 children 복원..."]
    Q3 --> E["child-2의 children 복원..."]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>8. Inter-Agent Communication (V2)</h2>
<p>In V2, direct message exchange between agents is possible:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn send_inter_agent_communication(
    &#x26;self, agent_id: ThreadId,
    communication: InterAgentCommunication,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    let last_task_message = communication.content.clone();
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    let result = self.handle_thread_request_result(
        agent_id, &#x26;state,
        state.send_op(agent_id, Op::InterAgentCommunication { communication }).await,
    ).await;
    if result.is_ok() {
        self.state.update_last_task_message(agent_id, last_task_message);
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<p>The completion watcher also uses <code>InterAgentCommunication</code> instead of <code>inject_user_message_without_turn</code> in V2 to notify parents:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// completion watcher 내부 (V2 경로)
if child_agent_path.is_some() &#x26;&#x26; thread.enabled(Feature::MultiAgentV2) {
    let communication = InterAgentCommunication::new(
        child_agent_path, parent_agent_path,
        Vec::new(), message, /*trigger_turn*/ false,
    );
    let _ = control.send_inter_agent_communication(parent_thread_id, communication).await;
    return;
}
// V1 fallback: 부모 thread에 user message 직접 주입
parent_thread.inject_user_message_without_turn(message).await;
</code></pre>
<hr>

<h3>subagent metadata</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>metadata</th>
<th>Meaning</th>

</tr>

</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>app-server reflects this metadata in thread summary and history items. <code>with_thread_spawn_agent_metadata()</code> overwrites the nickname and role on the thread source and exposes them to the UI and search results.</p>

<h3>Fork Checklist</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Subagent is viewed as a child thread rather than an independent worker</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Clearly record which settings are automatically inherited</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> app-server history view together</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> View the delegate layer as an approval bus</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Analyzed AgentRegistry’s CAS-based slot management and RAII reservation patterns.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Analyzed the AgentStatus state machine and completion watcher structure.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Analyzed depth limitations and feature deactivation mechanisms.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Analyzed the Inter-Agent Communication (V2) path.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> You need to decide whether to keep the role system as is or simplify it.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> You must decide whether to include the <code>multi_agents_v2</code> series or postpone it to a later stage.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> You must decide whether to maintain the relative path resolution of <code>agent_resolver</code> in the fork.</li>
</ul>
<h3>List of core files</h3>
<ul>
<li><code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/agent/mod.rs</code> — Module public API</li>
<li><code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/agent/control.rs</code> — AgentControl control plane</li>

<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>

<h1>서브에이전트와 협업 툴 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — subagent/collaboration dispatch.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex의 서브에이전트는 생각보다 제품 기능처럼 노출되어 있지만, 내부를 보면 사실상 "현재 turn을 기반으로 새 thread를 spawn하는 협업 툴 세트"다. 즉 독립된 에이전트 프레임워크가 따로 있는 것이 아니라, 기존 <code>Session</code>과 <code>TurnContext</code>를 확장해서 하위 conversation을 만드는 방식이다.</p>
<p>이 점이 중요한 이유는 우리 포크에서 subagent를 유지할지 판단하려면 UI가 아니라 상속 구조를 봐야 하기 때문이다. <code>spawn_agent</code>는 새 child를 만들 때 부모의 effective config를 복사하고, 현재 model, provider, reasoning effort, approval policy, sandbox, cwd, developer instructions를 다시 덮어쓴다. 그 위에 role config를 추가하고, <code>SessionSource::SubAgent::ThreadSpawn</code> 메타데이터로 부모와 깊이를 기록한다.</p>
<p>즉 subagent는 "부모와 비슷한 설정의 별도 런타임"이지, 완전히 독립된 worker가 아니다. 이 덕분에 일관된 정책 상속은 쉽지만, 반대로 제품화할 때는 어떤 설정을 상속하고 어떤 것은 끊을지 결정해야 한다. 특히 <code>developer_instructions</code>까지 그대로 내려간다는 점은 매우 중요하다.</p>
<p>Codex는 이 협업면을 tool로 노출한다. core에는 <code>spawn_agent</code>, <code>send_input</code>, <code>wait_agent</code>, <code>resume_agent</code>, <code>close_agent</code> handler가 있고, app-server protocol은 이를 <code>CollabAgentToolCall</code>로 별도 기록한다. 즉 서브에이전트는 모델 내부의 숨겨진 기능이 아니라, 명시적인 tool surface를 가진다.</p>
<p>또한 <code>codex_delegate.rs</code>는 부모와 자식 사이에서 approval, <code>request_user_input</code>, MCP tool 이벤트를 중계한다. 그래서 child가 사용자에게 직접 질문하지 않고도 부모 세션을 통해 승인과 응답을 받을 수 있다. 제품 설계 관점에서는 이것이 "subagent orchestration bus" 역할을 한다.</p>
<p>마지막으로 mode와 role도 중요하다. collaboration mode preset은 <code>plan.md</code>, <code>default.md</code> 같은 템플릿에서 developer instructions를 공급하고, built-in role인 <code>awaiter.toml</code> 같은 파일은 특정 목적의 하위 에이전트를 만드는 최소 예시가 된다. 즉 Codex는 subagent를 단순 API가 아니라 <strong>prompt plus config plus state inheritance</strong> 묶음으로 다룬다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. AgentControl — 서브에이전트 제어 평면</h2>
<p><code>AgentControl</code>은 멀티에이전트 시스템의 허브다. root thread 트리 하나당 인스턴스 하나가 만들어지며, 같은 root에서 파생된 모든 하위 에이전트가 이 인스턴스를 공유한다. 내부에는 <code>ThreadManagerState</code>에 대한 <code>Weak</code> 참조와 <code>AgentRegistry</code>의 <code>Arc</code>가 있다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
#[derive(Clone, Default)]
pub(crate) struct AgentControl {
    /// Weak handle back to the global thread registry/state.
    /// This is `Weak` to avoid reference cycles and shadow persistence of the form
    /// `ThreadManagerState -> CodexThread -> Session -> SessionServices -> ThreadManagerState`.
    manager: Weak&#x3C;ThreadManagerState>,
    state: Arc&#x3C;AgentRegistry>,
}
</code></pre>
<p>설계 포인트:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Weak 참조</strong>로 순환 참조를 방지한다. <code>ThreadManagerState → CodexThread → Session → SessionServices → ThreadManagerState</code> 경로가 <code>Weak</code>를 통해 끊긴다.</li>
<li>하나의 <code>AgentControl</code>이 root tree 전체를 소유하므로, 모든 child의 spawn 슬롯·닉네임·경로가 하나의 <code>AgentRegistry</code>에서 관리된다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>2. spawn → delegate → wait 전체 흐름</h2>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["부모 turn: spawn_agent 호출"] --> B["AgentControl::spawn_agent_internal"]
    B --> C["AgentRegistry::reserve_spawn_slot&#x3C;br/>(max_threads CAS 체크)"]
    C --> D{"SessionSource 유형?"}
    D -->|ThreadSpawn| E["prepare_thread_spawn&#x3C;br/>닉네임·경로 예약"]
    D -->|기타| F["기본 메타데이터"]
    E --> G["shell snapshot 상속&#x3C;br/>exec policy 상속"]
    F --> G
    G --> H{"fork 옵션?"}
    H -->|Yes| I["부모 rollout JSONL 스냅샷&#x3C;br/>fork_thread_with_source"]
    H -->|No| J["spawn_new_thread_with_source"]
    I --> K["reservation.commit&#x3C;br/>메타데이터 확정"]
    J --> K
    K --> L["notify_thread_created&#x3C;br/>(클라이언트 구독 트리거)"]
    L --> M["send_input: 초기 프롬프트 전송"]
    M --> N["maybe_start_completion_watcher&#x3C;br/>(tokio::spawn 비동기 감시)"]

    style C fill:#ffd,stroke:#f90
    style E fill:#dfd,stroke:#090
    style N fill:#ddf,stroke:#009
</code></pre>
<h3>2.1 spawn 단계 상세 코드</h3>
<p>spawn의 핵심은 <code>spawn_agent_internal</code>이다. 아래는 주요 흐름을 발췌한 것이다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs — spawn_agent_internal (축약)
async fn spawn_agent_internal(
    &#x26;self,
    config: Config,
    items: Vec&#x3C;UserInput>,
    session_source: Option&#x3C;SessionSource>,
    options: SpawnAgentOptions,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;LiveAgent> {
    let state = self.upgrade()?;                                   // Weak → Arc
    let mut reservation = self.state.reserve_spawn_slot(           // ① 슬롯 확보
        config.agent_max_threads
    )?;
    let inherited_shell_snapshot = self                             // ② 부모 shell 상속
        .inherited_shell_snapshot_for_source(&#x26;state, session_source.as_ref())
        .await;
    let inherited_exec_policy = self                               // ③ 실행 정책 상속
        .inherited_exec_policy_for_source(&#x26;state, session_source.as_ref(), &#x26;config)
        .await;

    // ④ ThreadSpawn이면 닉네임·경로 예약
    let (session_source, mut agent_metadata) = match session_source {
        Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
            parent_thread_id, depth, agent_path, agent_role, ..
        })) => {
            self.prepare_thread_spawn(
                &#x26;mut reservation, &#x26;config,
                parent_thread_id, depth, agent_path, agent_role,
                None, // preferred_agent_nickname
            )?
        }
        other => (other, AgentMetadata::default()),
    };

    // ⑤ 실제 thread 생성 (fork vs 일반)
    let new_thread = match session_source {
        Some(session_source) if options.fork_parent_spawn_call_id.is_some() => {
            // 부모 rollout을 JSONL 스냅샷으로 포크
            state.fork_thread_with_source(config, initial_history, self.clone(),
                session_source, false, inherited_shell_snapshot,
                inherited_exec_policy).await?
        }
        Some(session_source) => {
            state.spawn_new_thread_with_source(config, self.clone(),
                session_source, false, None,
                inherited_shell_snapshot, inherited_exec_policy).await?
        }
        None => state.spawn_new_thread(config, self.clone()).await?,
    };

    agent_metadata.agent_id = Some(new_thread.thread_id);
    reservation.commit(agent_metadata.clone());                    // ⑥ 예약 확정
    state.notify_thread_created(new_thread.thread_id);             // ⑦ 클라이언트 알림
    self.send_input(new_thread.thread_id, items).await?;           // ⑧ 초기 입력
    self.maybe_start_completion_watcher(                           // ⑨ 비동기 완료 감시
        new_thread.thread_id, notification_source,
        child_reference, agent_metadata.agent_path.clone(),
    );

    Ok(LiveAgent { thread_id: new_thread.thread_id, metadata: agent_metadata,
        status: self.get_status(new_thread.thread_id).await })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.2 send_input — 메시지 전송</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn send_input(
    &#x26;self,
    agent_id: ThreadId,
    items: Vec&#x3C;UserInput>,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    let last_task_message = render_input_preview(&#x26;items);
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    let result = self.handle_thread_request_result(
        agent_id, &#x26;state,
        state.send_op(agent_id, Op::UserInput {
            items,
            final_output_json_schema: None,
        }).await,
    ).await;
    if result.is_ok() {
        self.state.update_last_task_message(agent_id, last_task_message);
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>send_op</code>은 <code>ThreadManagerState</code>를 통해 대상 thread에 <code>Op::UserInput</code>을 발행한다. 성공하면 registry의 <code>last_task_message</code>를 갱신해 <code>list_agents</code> 조회 시 현재 작업 내용이 표시된다.</p>
<h3>2.3 close_agent — 종료와 하위 트리 정리</h3>
<p><code>close_agent</code>는 단순히 하나의 thread만 죽이는 게 아니라 <strong>spawn tree 전체를 재귀적으로 순회</strong>하며 모든 live descendants를 정리한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn close_agent(&#x26;self, agent_id: ThreadId) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    // ① state_db에 Closed 상태 기록 (재시작 시 resume 안 함)
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    if let Ok(thread) = state.get_thread(agent_id).await
        &#x26;&#x26; let Some(state_db_ctx) = thread.state_db()
    {
        let _ = state_db_ctx.set_thread_spawn_edge_status(
            agent_id, DirectionalThreadSpawnEdgeStatus::Closed
        ).await;
    }
    // ② 자신 + 모든 하위 에이전트 shutdown
    self.shutdown_agent_tree(agent_id).await
}

async fn shutdown_agent_tree(&#x26;self, agent_id: ThreadId) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    let descendant_ids = self.live_thread_spawn_descendants(agent_id).await?;
    let result = self.shutdown_live_agent(agent_id).await;
    for descendant_id in descendant_ids {
        let _ = self.shutdown_live_agent(descendant_id).await;
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.4 완료 감시 — completion watcher</h3>
<p>부모가 <code>wait_agent</code>를 명시적으로 호출하지 않아도, 자식이 끝나면 부모에게 알림이 간다. 이를 <code>maybe_start_completion_watcher</code>가 <code>tokio::spawn</code>으로 백그라운드 태스크를 띄워 처리한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs (축약)
fn maybe_start_completion_watcher(&#x26;self, child_thread_id: ThreadId, ...) {
    let Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
        parent_thread_id, ..
    })) = session_source else { return; };

    let control = self.clone();
    tokio::spawn(async move {
        // watch::Receiver로 상태 변화를 구독
        let status = match control.subscribe_status(child_thread_id).await {
            Ok(mut status_rx) => {
                let mut status = status_rx.borrow().clone();
                while !is_final(&#x26;status) {            // Running/PendingInit이면 계속 대기
                    if status_rx.changed().await.is_err() { break; }
                    status = status_rx.borrow().clone();
                }
                status
            }
            Err(_) => control.get_status(child_thread_id).await,
        };

        if !is_final(&#x26;status) { return; }
        // 부모 thread에 완료 메시지 주입
        let message = format_subagent_notification_message(&#x26;child_reference, &#x26;status);
        // V2에서는 InterAgentCommunication, V1에서는 inject_user_message_without_turn
        // ...
    });
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant Parent as 부모 thread
    participant Control as AgentControl
    participant Registry as AgentRegistry
    participant Child as child thread
    participant Watcher as completion watcher
    participant Delegate as codex delegate

    Parent->>Control: spawn_agent(config, items)
    Control->>Registry: reserve_spawn_slot(max_threads)
    Registry-->>Control: SpawnReservation
    Control->>Registry: reserve_agent_nickname / reserve_agent_path
    Control->>Child: spawn_new_thread_with_source
    Control->>Registry: reservation.commit(metadata)
    Control->>Child: send_input(초기 프롬프트)
    Control->>Watcher: tokio::spawn(completion_watcher)

    Parent->>Control: send_input(추가 지시)
    Control->>Child: Op::UserInput 전달

    Child->>Delegate: approval 요청
    Delegate->>Parent: 부모 정책으로 중계
    Parent-->>Delegate: 승인 응답
    Delegate-->>Child: 응답 전달

    Child-->>Watcher: status → Completed
    Watcher->>Parent: inject notification message

    Parent->>Control: close_agent
    Control->>Child: shutdown_live_agent
    Control->>Registry: release_spawned_thread
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. AgentRegistry — 슬롯·닉네임·트리 관리</h2>
<p><code>AgentRegistry</code>는 하나의 root session tree 안에서 모든 spawn 자원을 중앙 관리한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
#[derive(Default)]
pub(crate) struct AgentRegistry {
    active_agents: Mutex&#x3C;ActiveAgents>,
    total_count: AtomicUsize,
}

#[derive(Default)]
struct ActiveAgents {
    agent_tree: HashMap&#x3C;String, AgentMetadata>,
    used_agent_nicknames: HashSet&#x3C;String>,
    nickname_reset_count: usize,
}

#[derive(Clone, Debug, Default)]
pub(crate) struct AgentMetadata {
    pub(crate) agent_id: Option&#x3C;ThreadId>,
    pub(crate) agent_path: Option&#x3C;AgentPath>,
    pub(crate) agent_nickname: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub(crate) agent_role: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub(crate) last_task_message: Option&#x3C;String>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.1 슬롯 예약 — CAS 기반 동시성 제어</h3>
<p>spawn 시 가장 먼저 호출되는 <code>reserve_spawn_slot</code>은 원자적 compare-and-swap으로 스레드 수 제한을 보장한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
pub(crate) fn reserve_spawn_slot(
    self: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Self>,
    max_threads: Option&#x3C;usize>,
) -> Result&#x3C;SpawnReservation> {
    if let Some(max_threads) = max_threads {
        if !self.try_increment_spawned(max_threads) {
            return Err(CodexErr::AgentLimitReached { max_threads });
        }
    } else {
        self.total_count.fetch_add(1, Ordering::AcqRel);
    }
    Ok(SpawnReservation { state: Arc::clone(self), active: true, .. })
}

fn try_increment_spawned(&#x26;self, max_threads: usize) -> bool {
    let mut current = self.total_count.load(Ordering::Acquire);
    loop {
        if current >= max_threads { return false; }
        match self.total_count.compare_exchange_weak(
            current, current + 1, Ordering::AcqRel, Ordering::Acquire,
        ) {
            Ok(_) => return true,
            Err(updated) => current = updated,
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 SpawnReservation — RAII 예약/롤백</h3>
<p><code>SpawnReservation</code>은 RAII 패턴으로, spawn이 실패하면 <code>Drop</code>에서 자동 정리한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
pub(crate) struct SpawnReservation {
    state: Arc&#x3C;AgentRegistry>,
    active: bool,
    reserved_agent_nickname: Option&#x3C;String>,
    reserved_agent_path: Option&#x3C;AgentPath>,
}

impl SpawnReservation {
    pub(crate) fn commit(mut self, agent_metadata: AgentMetadata) {
        self.reserved_agent_nickname = None;
        self.reserved_agent_path = None;
        self.state.register_spawned_thread(agent_metadata);
        self.active = false;   // Drop 시 카운터 감소 방지
    }
}

impl Drop for SpawnReservation {
    fn drop(&#x26;mut self) {
        if self.active {       // commit 안 됐으면 → 슬롯 반환
            if let Some(agent_path) = self.reserved_agent_path.take() {
                self.state.release_reserved_agent_path(&#x26;agent_path);
            }
            self.total_count.fetch_sub(1, Ordering::AcqRel);
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Reserved : reserve_spawn_slot
    Reserved --> NicknameReserved : reserve_agent_nickname
    NicknameReserved --> PathReserved : reserve_agent_path
    PathReserved --> Committed : commit(metadata)
    Committed --> [*]

    Reserved --> RolledBack : Drop (spawn 실패)
    NicknameReserved --> RolledBack : Drop
    PathReserved --> RolledBack : Drop
    RolledBack --> [*] : total_count--, path 해제
</code></pre>
<h3>3.3 닉네임 풀과 리셋</h3>
<p>에이전트 닉네임은 <code>agent_names.txt</code>에서 무작위로 뽑는다. 풀이 소진되면 카운터를 올려 "Atlas the 2nd" 같은 서수 접미사를 붙인다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
fn format_agent_nickname(name: &#x26;str, nickname_reset_count: usize) -> String {
    match nickname_reset_count {
        0 => name.to_string(),
        reset_count => {
            let value = reset_count + 1;
            let suffix = match value % 100 {
                11..=13 => "th",
                _ => match value % 10 {
                    1 => "st", 2 => "nd", 3 => "rd", _ => "th",
                },
            };
            format!("{name} the {value}{suffix}")
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>4. agent_resolver — 경로 기반 에이전트 해석</h2>
<p><code>send_input</code>, <code>wait_agent</code> 등의 도구는 모델이 문자열로 에이전트를 지정한다. <code>agent_resolver</code>는 이를 <code>ThreadId</code>로 변환한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/agent_resolver.rs
pub(crate) async fn resolve_agent_target(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    turn: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;TurnContext>,
    target: &#x26;str,
) -> Result&#x3C;ThreadId, FunctionCallError> {
    register_session_root(session, turn);
    // ① 직접 ThreadId 문자열이면 즉시 반환
    if let Ok(thread_id) = ThreadId::from_string(target) {
        return Ok(thread_id);
    }
    // ② AgentPath 기반 해석 (예: "workers/auth-fix")
    session.services.agent_control
        .resolve_agent_reference(session.conversation_id, &#x26;turn.session_source, target)
        .await
        .map_err(|err| FunctionCallError::RespondToModel(err.to_string()))
}
</code></pre>
<p>복수 대상도 순차 해석한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub(crate) async fn resolve_agent_targets(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    turn: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;TurnContext>,
    targets: Vec&#x3C;String>,
) -> Result&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;ThreadId>, FunctionCallError> {
    if targets.is_empty() {
        return Err(FunctionCallError::RespondToModel(
            "agent targets must be non-empty".to_string(),
        ));
    }
    let mut resolved = Vec::with_capacity(targets.len());
    for target in &#x26;targets {
        resolved.push(resolve_agent_target(session, turn, target).await?);
    }
    Ok(resolved)
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>resolve_agent_reference</code>는 <code>AgentPath</code>의 상대경로 해석을 거쳐 <code>agent_tree</code>에서 <code>ThreadId</code>를 조회한다. root 자신은 해석 대상에서 제외된다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. Role 시스템 — 역할 기반 config 레이어</h2>
<h3>5.1 내장 역할 정의</h3>
<p>Codex는 세 가지 내장 역할을 제공한다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>역할</th>
<th>설명</th>
<th>config_file</th>
<th>특징</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>default</code></td>
<td>기본 에이전트</td>
<td>없음</td>
<td>부모 설정 그대로</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>explorer</code></td>
<td>코드베이스 탐색 전용</td>
<td><code>explorer.toml</code></td>
<td>빠르고 권위적, 병렬 spawn 권장</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>worker</code></td>
<td>실행·구현 작업</td>
<td>없음</td>
<td>파일 소유권 명시, 다른 worker 인식</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/role.rs — built_in::configs() (축약)
BTreeMap::from([
    ("default".to_string(), AgentRoleConfig {
        description: Some("Default agent.".to_string()),
        config_file: None,
        nickname_candidates: None,
    }),
    ("explorer".to_string(), AgentRoleConfig {
        description: Some(r#"Use `explorer` for specific codebase questions.
Explorers are fast and authoritative. ..."#.to_string()),
        config_file: Some("explorer.toml".into()),
        nickname_candidates: None,
    }),
    ("worker".to_string(), AgentRoleConfig {
        description: Some(r#"Use for execution and production work. ..."#.to_string()),
        config_file: None,
        nickname_candidates: None,
    }),
])
</code></pre>
<blockquote>
<p><code>awaiter</code> 역할은 현재 주석 처리되어 있다 (<code>// Awaiter is temp removed</code>). <code>awaiter.toml</code>은 여전히 내장되어 있으나 역할 목록에서 제거되었다.</p>
</blockquote>
<h3>5.2 explorer.toml 예시</h3>
<p><code>explorer.toml</code> 파일은 내장 파일이지만 바이너리에 <code>include_str!</code>로 임베딩된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/role.rs — built_in::config_file_contents
pub(super) fn config_file_contents(path: &#x26;Path) -> Option&#x3C;&#x26;'static str> {
    const EXPLORER: &#x26;str = include_str!("builtins/explorer.toml");
    const AWAITER: &#x26;str = include_str!("builtins/awaiter.toml");
    match path.to_str()? {
        "explorer.toml" => Some(EXPLORER),
        "awaiter.toml" => Some(AWAITER),
        _ => None,
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>5.3 awaiter.toml — 최소 역할 config 예시</h3>
<pre><code class="language-toml"># core/src/agent/builtins/awaiter.toml
background_terminal_max_timeout = 3600000
model_reasoning_effort = "low"
developer_instructions="""You are an awaiter.
Your role is to await the completion of a specific command or task
and report its status only when it is finished.
...
"""
</code></pre>
<p>이 파일은 role config의 최소 구조를 보여준다: <strong>모델 설정 + developer instructions</strong>만으로 역할이 정의된다.</p>
<h3>5.4 apply_role_to_config — 역할 적용 메커니즘</h3>
<p>역할 적용은 기존 config layer stack에 "session-flag 우선순위"로 role TOML을 삽입하는 방식이다. 이때 부모의 profile과 provider는 명시적으로 보존된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/role.rs
pub(crate) async fn apply_role_to_config(
    config: &#x26;mut Config,
    role_name: Option&#x3C;&#x26;str>,
) -> Result&#x3C;(), String> {
    let role_name = role_name.unwrap_or(DEFAULT_ROLE_NAME);
    let role = resolve_role_config(config, role_name)
        .cloned()
        .ok_or_else(|| format!("unknown agent_type '{role_name}'"))?;
    apply_role_to_config_inner(config, role_name, &#x26;role).await
        .map_err(|err| AGENT_TYPE_UNAVAILABLE_ERROR.to_string())
}
</code></pre>
<p>보존 정책의 핵심 로직:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/role.rs
fn preservation_policy(config: &#x26;Config, role_layer_toml: &#x26;TomlValue) -> (bool, bool) {
    let role_selects_provider = role_layer_toml.get("model_provider").is_some();
    let role_selects_profile = role_layer_toml.get("profile").is_some();
    // role이 provider나 profile을 명시하지 않으면 → 부모 것을 보존
    let preserve_current_profile = !role_selects_provider &#x26;&#x26; !role_selects_profile;
    let preserve_current_provider =
        preserve_current_profile &#x26;&#x26; !role_updates_active_profile_provider;
    (preserve_current_profile, preserve_current_provider)
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["기존 config layer stack"] --> B["role TOML 로드&#x3C;br/>(built-in or 파일)"]
    B --> C{"role이 provider/&#x3C;br/>profile 명시?"}
    C -->|No| D["부모 profile·provider 보존"]
    C -->|Yes| E["role의 설정으로 교체"]
    D --> F["SessionFlags 우선순위로&#x3C;br/>layer 삽입"]
    E --> F
    F --> G["Config::load_config_with_layer_stack&#x3C;br/>최종 config 생성"]
</code></pre>
<h3>5.5 spawn tool description 자동 생성</h3>
<p><code>spawn_agent</code> 도구의 설명 텍스트는 내장·사용자 정의 역할에서 자동 생성된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/role.rs — spawn_tool_spec::build
pub(crate) fn build(user_defined_agent_roles: &#x26;BTreeMap&#x3C;String, AgentRoleConfig>) -> String {
    let built_in_roles = built_in::configs();
    // 사용자 정의 역할이 같은 이름의 내장 역할을 덮어씀
    let mut seen = BTreeSet::new();
    let mut formatted_roles = Vec::new();
    for (name, declaration) in user_defined_roles { /* ... */ }
    for (name, declaration) in built_in_roles { /* ... */ }
    format!("Optional type name...\nAvailable roles:\n{}", formatted_roles.join("\n"))
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>6. depth 제한과 상태 머신</h2>
<h3>6.1 spawn depth 계산</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/registry.rs
fn session_depth(session_source: &#x26;SessionSource) -> i32 {
    match session_source {
        SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn { depth, .. }) => *depth,
        _ => 0,
    }
}

pub(crate) fn next_thread_spawn_depth(session_source: &#x26;SessionSource) -> i32 {
    session_depth(session_source).saturating_add(1)
}

pub(crate) fn exceeds_thread_spawn_depth_limit(depth: i32, max_depth: i32) -> bool {
    depth > max_depth
}
</code></pre>
<p>depth 한도를 초과하면 <code>Feature::SpawnCsv</code>와 <code>Feature::Collab</code>이 비활성화되어 해당 에이전트는 더 이상 하위 에이전트를 spawn할 수 없다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs — resume_single_agent_from_rollout 내부
if let SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn { depth, .. }) = &#x26;session_source
    &#x26;&#x26; *depth >= config.agent_max_depth
{
    let _ = config.features.disable(Feature::SpawnCsv);
    let _ = config.features.disable(Feature::Collab);
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.2 AgentStatus 상태 머신</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/status.rs
pub(crate) fn agent_status_from_event(msg: &#x26;EventMsg) -> Option&#x3C;AgentStatus> {
    match msg {
        EventMsg::TurnStarted(_)  => Some(AgentStatus::Running),
        EventMsg::TurnComplete(ev) => Some(AgentStatus::Completed(ev.last_agent_message.clone())),
        EventMsg::TurnAborted(ev) => match ev.reason {
            TurnAbortReason::Interrupted => Some(AgentStatus::Interrupted),
            _ => Some(AgentStatus::Errored(format!("{:?}", ev.reason))),
        },
        EventMsg::Error(ev) => Some(AgentStatus::Errored(ev.message.clone())),
        EventMsg::ShutdownComplete => Some(AgentStatus::Shutdown),
        _ => None,
    }
}

pub(crate) fn is_final(status: &#x26;AgentStatus) -> bool {
    !matches!(status, AgentStatus::PendingInit | AgentStatus::Running | AgentStatus::Interrupted)
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> PendingInit : thread 생성
    PendingInit --> Running : TurnStarted
    Running --> Completed : TurnComplete
    Running --> Interrupted : TurnAborted(Interrupted)
    Running --> Errored : TurnAborted / Error
    Interrupted --> Running : resume_agent
    Running --> Shutdown : ShutdownComplete

    note right of Completed : is_final = true
    note right of Errored : is_final = true
    note right of Shutdown : is_final = true
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>7. 스레드 상속 상세</h2>
<h3>7.1 shell snapshot 상속</h3>
<p>부모의 셸 환경(환경 변수, cwd 등)을 자식이 물려받는다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
async fn inherited_shell_snapshot_for_source(
    &#x26;self, state: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;ThreadManagerState>,
    session_source: Option&#x3C;&#x26;SessionSource>,
) -> Option&#x3C;Arc&#x3C;ShellSnapshot>> {
    let Some(SessionSource::SubAgent(SubAgentSource::ThreadSpawn {
        parent_thread_id, ..
    })) = session_source else { return None; };
    let parent_thread = state.get_thread(*parent_thread_id).await.ok()?;
    parent_thread.codex.session.user_shell().shell_snapshot()
}
</code></pre>
<h3>7.2 exec policy 상속</h3>
<p>실행 정책은 조건부 상속이다. 부모와 자식의 config가 호환될 때만 부모의 <code>ExecPolicyManager</code>를 공유한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">async fn inherited_exec_policy_for_source(
    &#x26;self, state: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;ThreadManagerState>,
    session_source: Option&#x3C;&#x26;SessionSource>,
    child_config: &#x26;Config,
) -> Option&#x3C;Arc&#x3C;ExecPolicyManager>> {
    // ...
    let parent_config = parent_thread.codex.session.get_config().await;
    if !child_uses_parent_exec_policy(&#x26;parent_config, child_config) {
        return None;   // 정책이 다르면 상속 안 함
    }
    Some(Arc::clone(&#x26;parent_thread.codex.session.services.exec_policy))
}
</code></pre>
<h3>7.3 resume — 에이전트 트리 전체 복원</h3>
<p><code>resume_agent_from_rollout</code>은 단일 에이전트만이 아니라 <strong>state_db에 기록된 child 트리 전체를 BFS로 순회</strong>하며 재귀적으로 복원한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs — resume_agent_from_rollout (축약)
pub(crate) async fn resume_agent_from_rollout(&#x26;self, config: Config,
    thread_id: ThreadId, session_source: SessionSource,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;ThreadId> {
    let resumed_thread_id = self.resume_single_agent_from_rollout(
        config.clone(), thread_id, session_source
    ).await?;

    let mut resume_queue = VecDeque::from([(thread_id, root_depth)]);
    while let Some((parent_thread_id, parent_depth)) = resume_queue.pop_front() {
        let child_ids = state_db_ctx.list_thread_spawn_children_with_status(
            parent_thread_id, DirectionalThreadSpawnEdgeStatus::Open
        ).await?;
        for child_thread_id in child_ids {
            let child_depth = parent_depth + 1;
            // 이미 live이면 건너뛰고, 아니면 rollout에서 복원
            if state.get_thread(child_thread_id).await.is_ok() {
                // already live
            } else {
                self.resume_single_agent_from_rollout(
                    config.clone(), child_thread_id, child_session_source
                ).await?;
            }
            resume_queue.push_back((child_thread_id, child_depth));
        }
    }
    Ok(resumed_thread_id)
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    R["resume_agent_from_rollout(root)"] --> A["resume_single(root)"]
    A --> Q["BFS queue: root"]
    Q --> B["state_db: list children of root&#x3C;br/>(Open만)"]
    B --> C1["resume_single(child-1)"]
    B --> C2["resume_single(child-2)"]
    C1 --> Q2["queue에 child-1 추가"]
    C2 --> Q3["queue에 child-2 추가"]
    Q2 --> D["child-1의 children 복원..."]
    Q3 --> E["child-2의 children 복원..."]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>8. Inter-Agent Communication (V2)</h2>
<p>V2에서는 에이전트 간 직접 메시지 교환이 가능하다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// core/src/agent/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn send_inter_agent_communication(
    &#x26;self, agent_id: ThreadId,
    communication: InterAgentCommunication,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;String> {
    let last_task_message = communication.content.clone();
    let state = self.upgrade()?;
    let result = self.handle_thread_request_result(
        agent_id, &#x26;state,
        state.send_op(agent_id, Op::InterAgentCommunication { communication }).await,
    ).await;
    if result.is_ok() {
        self.state.update_last_task_message(agent_id, last_task_message);
    }
    result
}
</code></pre>
<p>completion watcher도 V2에서는 <code>inject_user_message_without_turn</code> 대신 <code>InterAgentCommunication</code>을 사용해 부모에게 알린다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// completion watcher 내부 (V2 경로)
if child_agent_path.is_some() &#x26;&#x26; thread.enabled(Feature::MultiAgentV2) {
    let communication = InterAgentCommunication::new(
        child_agent_path, parent_agent_path,
        Vec::new(), message, /*trigger_turn*/ false,
    );
    let _ = control.send_inter_agent_communication(parent_thread_id, communication).await;
    return;
}
// V1 fallback: 부모 thread에 user message 직접 주입
parent_thread.inject_user_message_without_turn(message).await;
</code></pre>
<hr>

<h3><code>spawn_agent</code>가 실제로 상속하는 것</h3>
<table>

<tr>
<th>항목</th>
<th>상속 여부</th>
<th>근거</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>model</td>
<td>상속</td>
<td><code>build_agent_shared_config()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>provider</td>
<td>상속</td>
<td><code>config.model_provider = turn.provider.clone()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>reasoning effort</td>
<td>상속</td>
<td><code>config.model_reasoning_effort = turn.reasoning_effort</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>developer instructions</td>
<td>상속</td>
<td><code>config.developer_instructions = turn.developer_instructions.clone()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td><code>config.compact_prompt = turn.compact_prompt.clone()</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>approval policy</td>
<td>상속</td>
<td>runtime override 단계</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>sandbox policy</td>
<td>상속</td>
<td>runtime override 단계</td>
</tr>

<td>cwd</td>
<td>상속</td>
<td>runtime override 단계</td>
</tr>

<td>상속</td>
<td><code>inherited_shell_snapshot_for_source()</code></td>
</tr>

<td>exec policy</td>
<td>조건부 상속</td>
<td><code>child_uses_parent_exec_policy()</code> 체크 후</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>role 설정</td>
<td>추가 적용</td>
<td><code>apply_role_to_config()</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>핵심 구현은 <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/multi_agents_common.rs</code>에 있다.</p>
<h3>subagent 메타데이터</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>메타데이터</th>
<th>의미</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>parent_thread_id</code></td>
<td>어느 thread에서 파생되었는가</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>depth</code></td>
<td>현재 spawn depth</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>agent_path</code></td>
<td>작업 이름 기반 경로 (예: <code>workers/auth-fix</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>agent_nickname</code></td>
<td>표시용 이름 (예: <code>Atlas</code>, <code>Atlas the 2nd</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>agent_role</code></td>
<td>적용된 role (<code>default</code>, <code>explorer</code>, <code>worker</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>last_task_message</code></td>
<td>가장 최근 전송된 작업 메시지</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>app-server는 이 메타데이터를 thread summary와 history item에도 반영한다. <code>with_thread_spawn_agent_metadata()</code>는 thread source에 nickname과 role을 다시 덧씌워 UI와 조회 결과에 노출한다.</p>
<h3>runtime messaging</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>동작</th>
<th>의미</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>send_input</code></td>
<td>이벤트 발행과 child status 기록이 붙은 interaction tool</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>wait_agent</code></td>
<td>watch 기반 상태 수집기</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>close_agent</code></td>
<td>종료 직전 상태를 같이 기록, 하위 트리 전체 정리</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>resume_agent</code></td>
<td>spawn lineage를 유지한 BFS 복원</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>interrupt_agent</code></td>
<td><code>Op::Interrupt</code> 발행으로 실행 중단</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>MCP tool join</td>

<tr>

<h3>포크 체크리스트</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> subagent를 독립 worker보다 child thread로 본다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 어떤 설정이 자동 상속되는지 명확히 기록한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> app-server history 표면을 같이 본다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> delegate 계층을 approval bus로 본다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> AgentRegistry의 CAS 기반 슬롯 관리와 RAII 예약 패턴을 분석했다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> AgentStatus 상태 머신과 completion watcher 구조를 분석했다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> depth 제한과 feature 비활성화 메커니즘을 분석했다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Inter-Agent Communication (V2) 경로를 분석했다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> role 시스템을 그대로 가져갈지 단순화할지 정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>multi_agents_v2</code> 계열을 포함할지 나중 단계로 미룰지 정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>agent_resolver</code>의 상대경로 해석을 포크에서 유지할지 결정해야 한다</li>
</ul>
