<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: 서브에이전트의 설정 상속, app-server history 표면, delegate 중계 구조를 정리했다.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: 요약본과 상세본을 통합했다.</li>
<li>2025-07-18: <code>agent/</code> 디렉토리 소스 코드 기반 대폭 보강. AgentControl 제어 평면 구조, AgentRegistry의 CAS 슬롯 관리·RAII SpawnReservation 패턴, agent_resolver 경로 해석, Role 시스템(내장 역할·config layer 적용·preservation policy), AgentStatus 상태 머신, depth 제한 메커니즘, completion watcher, Inter-Agent Communication V2, resume BFS 트리 복원 등 코드 스니펫과 Mermaid 다이어그램 추가.</li>
</ul>
1a:["$","$L28","20-axis-05-subagent",{"id":"20-axis-05-subagent","order":22,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 05: Subagents","description":"005_subagents-collab/05_co_subagent.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$3f"}}]}]
40:T1c3bf,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 06: App surfaces</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — app/server/client surfaces.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>Codex의 rich client 표면은 CLI 하나로 끝나지 않는다. 실제 중심은 <code>app-server</code>, <code>app-server-protocol</code>, <code>app-server-client</code> 삼각형이고, TypeScript SDK와 Python SDK는 그 위나 바깥에서 각각 다른 철학으로 붙는다.</li>
<li><code>app-server</code>는 Codex 코어를 장기 실행 서버로 노출하는 실제 런타임이다. <code>app-server-protocol</code>은 wire schema 전용 계층이고, <code>app-server-client</code>는 in-process와 remote를 가리지 않는 client facade다. 이 세 층이 rich client 표면의 핵심이다. 반면 TypeScript SDK는 CLI wrapper이고, Python SDK는 app-serv</li>
<li>즉 우리 제품이 브라우저나 데스크톱 같은 rich surface를 만들 계획이라면 포크 기준점은 CLI가 아니라 <code>app-server-protocol</code>부터 잡는 게 맞다. protocol 경계가 transport보다 더 중요하기 때문이다.</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A["core runtime"] --> B["app-server"]</li>
<li>B --> C["app-server-protocol"]</li>
<li>C --> D["in-process client"]</li>
<li>C --> E["remote client (WebSocket)"]</li>
<li>B --> F["Python SDK (app-server wrapper)"]</li>
<li>G["CLI (codex exec)"] --> H["TypeScript SDK (CLI wrapper)"]</li>
<li>subgraph transport</li>
</ul>

<h3>README / docs</h3>

{
  "id": 1,
  "method": "initialize",
  "params": {
    "clientInfo": {
      "name": "codex_vscode",
      "title": "Codex VS Code Extension",
      "version": "0.1.0"
    },
    "capabilities": {
      "experimentalApi": true,
      "optOutNotificationMethods": ["item/agentMessage/delta"]
    }
  }
}

// Server → Client: initialize 응답
{ "id": 1, "result": { "userAgent": "codex/1.0.0", "serverInfo": { ... } } }

// Client → Server: initialized 알림 (id 없음)
{ "method": "initialized", "params": {} }
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant C as Client
    participant S as App Server
    
    C->>S: thread/start
    S-->>C: thread/started (notification)
    C->>S: turn/start {threadId, input}
    S-->>C: turn/started
    S-->>C: item/started (AgentMessage)
    S-->>C: item/agentMessage/delta (반복)
    S-->>C: item/commandExecution/requestApproval (ServerRequest)
    C->>S: resolve {id, result: {decision: "accept"}}
    S-->>C: item/started (CommandExecution)
    S-->>C: item/commandExecution/outputDelta (반복)
    S-->>C: item/completed (CommandExecution)
    S-->>C: item/completed (AgentMessage)
    S-->>C: turn/completed
    S-->>C: thread/tokenUsage/updated
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>

pub struct Thread {
    pub id: String,
    pub preview: String,         // 보통 첫 번째 사용자 메시지
    pub ephemeral: bool,         // 디스크에 저장하지 않는 thread
    pub model_provider: String,  // "openai" 등
    pub created_at: i64,         // Unix timestamp
    pub updated_at: i64,
    pub status: ThreadStatus,
    pub cwd: PathBuf,
    pub cli_version: String,
    pub source: SessionSource,   // CLI, VSCode, exec, app-server 등
    pub agent_nickname: Option&#x3C;String>,  // sub-agent 닉네임
    pub agent_role: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub git_info: Option&#x3C;GitInfo>,
    pub name: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub turns: Vec&#x3C;Turn>,        // resume/fork/read 때만 채워짐
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub struct Turn {
    pub id: String,
    pub items: Vec&#x3C;ThreadItem>,  // resume/fork 응답에서만 채워짐
    pub status: TurnStatus,      // InProgress | Completed | Failed | Interrupted
    pub error: Option&#x3C;TurnError>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum ThreadItem {
    UserMessage { id, content: Vec&#x3C;UserInput> },
    HookPrompt { id, fragments },
    AgentMessage { id, text, phase, memory_citation },
    Plan { id, text },                    // experimental
    Reasoning { id, summary, content },
    CommandExecution { id, command, cwd, process_id, source,
                       status, command_actions, aggregated_output,
                       exit_code, duration_ms },
    FileChange { id, changes: Vec&#x3C;FileUpdateChange>, status },
    McpToolCall { id, server, tool, status, arguments,
                  result, error, duration_ms },
    DynamicToolCall { id, tool, arguments, status,
                      content_items, success, duration_ms },
    CollabAgentToolCall { id, tool, status, sender_thread_id,
                          receiver_thread_ids, prompt, model,
                          reasoning_effort, agents_states },
    WebSearch { id, query, action },
    ImageView { id, path },
    ImageGeneration { id, status, revised_prompt, result, saved_path },
    EnteredReviewMode { id, review },
    ExitedReviewMode { id, review },
    ContextCompaction { id },
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server/src/transport.rs
pub enum AppServerTransport {
    Stdio,
    WebSocket { bind_address: SocketAddr },
}

impl AppServerTransport {
    pub const DEFAULT_LISTEN_URL: &#x26;'static str = "stdio://";

    pub fn from_listen_url(listen_url: &#x26;str) -> Result&#x3C;Self, ...> {
        // "stdio://"  → Stdio
        // "ws://IP:PORT" → WebSocket { bind_address }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph "stdio transport"
        A["stdin (JSON line)"] --> B["MessageProcessor"]
        B --> C["stdout (JSON line)"]
    end
    
    subgraph "WebSocket transport"
        D["ws:// connect"] --> E["axum Router"]
        E --> F["MessageProcessor"]
        F --> G["ws:// frame"]
        E --> H["/readyz"]
        E --> I["/healthz"]
    end
    
    subgraph "in-process transport"
        J["InProcessClientHandle"] --> K["mpsc channels"]
        K --> L["MessageProcessor"]
        L --> M["broadcast events"]
    end
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server-client/src/lib.rs

/// 이벤트 수신 타입
pub enum AppServerEvent {
    Lagged { skipped: usize },      // backpressure 초과 시
    ServerNotification(ServerNotification),
    ServerRequest(ServerRequest),
    Disconnected { message: String },
}

/// 핵심 client facade
pub struct InProcessAppServerClient { /* ... */ }

impl InProcessAppServerClient {
    /// 런타임 시작 + initialize/initialized 핸드셰이크 자동 수행
    pub async fn start(args: InProcessClientStartArgs) -> IoResult&#x3C;Self>;

    /// typed JSON-RPC 요청 — 응답을 제네릭 T로 디코딩
    pub async fn request_typed&#x3C;T: DeserializeOwned>(
        &#x26;self, request: ClientRequest
    ) -> Result&#x3C;T, TypedRequestError>;

    /// raw JSON-RPC 요청
    pub async fn request(&#x26;self, request: ClientRequest) -> IoResult&#x3C;RequestResult>;

    /// 알림 전송
    pub async fn notify(&#x26;self, notification: ClientNotification) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;

    /// ServerRequest에 대한 응답 (approval 등)
    pub async fn resolve_server_request(
        &#x26;self, request_id: RequestId, result: JsonRpcResult
    ) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;

    /// ServerRequest 거부
    pub async fn reject_server_request(
        &#x26;self, request_id: RequestId, error: JSONRPCErrorError
    ) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;

    /// 다음 이벤트 수신 (backpressure-aware)
    pub async fn next_event(&#x26;mut self) -> Option&#x3C;InProcessServerEvent>;

    /// graceful shutdown (5초 타임아웃 후 abort)
    pub async fn shutdown(self) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
}
</code></pre>

        +request_typed~T~()
        +notify()
        +resolve_server_request()
        +reject_server_request()
        +next_event()

        +start(args) IoResult~Self~

    [*] --> Created: thread/start
    Created --> Running: turn/start
    Running --> Running: turn/steer (same-turn steering)
    Running --> Interrupted: turn/interrupt
    Running --> Completed: turn/completed
    Interrupted --> Running: turn/start (new turn)
    Completed --> Running: turn/start (new turn)
    Completed --> Compacting: thread/compact/start
    Compacting --> Completed: compaction done
    Completed --> Archived: thread/archive
    Archived --> Completed: thread/unarchive
    Completed --> Forked: thread/fork
    Completed --> RolledBack: thread/rollback
    RolledBack --> Running: turn/start
    
    Created --> Resumed: thread/resume
    Resumed --> Running: turn/start
</code></pre>

  get id(): string | null;

  async runStreamed(input: Input, turnOptions?: TurnOptions): Promise&#x3C;StreamedTurn>;

// 이벤트 타입 (exec JSONL 기반)
type ThreadEvent =
  | ThreadStartedEvent    // { type: "thread.started", thread_id }
  | TurnStartedEvent      // { type: "turn.started" }
  | TurnCompletedEvent    // { type: "turn.completed", usage }
  | TurnFailedEvent       // { type: "turn.failed", error }
  | ItemStartedEvent      // { type: "item.started", item }
  | ItemUpdatedEvent      // { type: "item.updated", item }
  | ItemCompletedEvent    // { type: "item.completed", item }
  | ThreadErrorEvent;     // { type: "error", message }

// Item 타입 (7가지 — app-server의 13가지보다 단순화)
type ThreadItem =
  | AgentMessageItem | ReasoningItem | CommandExecutionItem
  | FileChangeItem | McpToolCallItem | WebSearchItem
  | TodoListItem | ErrorItem;

class AppServerClient:
    """Synchronous typed JSON-RPC client for codex app-server over stdio."""

    def __init__(self, config=None, approval_handler=None): ...
    def start(self) -> None: ...
    def close(self) -> None: ...
    def initialize(self) -> InitializeResponse: ...

    # Thread lifecycle
    def thread_start(self, params=None) -> ThreadStartResponse: ...
    def thread_resume(self, thread_id, params=None) -> ThreadResumeResponse: ...
    def thread_list(self, params=None) -> ThreadListResponse: ...
    def thread_read(self, thread_id, include_turns=False) -> ThreadReadResponse: ...
    def thread_fork(self, thread_id, params=None) -> ThreadForkResponse: ...
    def thread_archive(self, thread_id) -> ThreadArchiveResponse: ...
    def thread_unarchive(self, thread_id) -> ThreadUnarchiveResponse: ...
    def thread_set_name(self, thread_id, name) -> ThreadSetNameResponse: ...
    def thread_compact(self, thread_id) -> ThreadCompactStartResponse: ...

    # Turn lifecycle
    def turn_start(self, thread_id, input_items, params=None) -> TurnStartResponse: ...
    def turn_interrupt(self, thread_id, turn_id) -> TurnInterruptResponse: ...
    def turn_steer(self, thread_id, expected_turn_id, input_items) -> TurnSteerResponse: ...

    # Model
    def model_list(self, include_hidden=False) -> ModelListResponse: ...

    # 편의 메서드
    def wait_for_turn_completed(self, turn_id) -> TurnCompletedNotification: ...
    def stream_until_methods(self, methods) -> list[Notification]: ...
    def stream_text(self, thread_id, text, params=None) -> Iterator[AgentMessageDeltaNotification]: ...

    # ServerRequest 자동 처리
    def _handle_server_request(self, msg) -> JsonObject: ...
</code></pre>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>App Server · Client Surface · Fork Extraction Strategy</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — app/server/client surfaces.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>1. App Server and Client Surface</h2>
<p>Codex's rich client surface does not end with CLI alone. The actual center is the triangle of <code>app-server</code>, <code>app-server-protocol</code>, and <code>app-server-client</code>, and TypeScript SDK and Python SDK adhere to different philosophies above and outside of it.</p>
<p><code>app-server</code> is the actual runtime that exposes the Codex core as a long-running server. <code>app-server-protocol</code> is a wire schema-specific layer, and <code>app-server-client</code> is a client facade that does not distinguish between in-process and remote. These three layers are the core of the rich client surface. On the other hand, the difference is that TypeScript SDK is a CLI wrapper, and Python SDK is an app-server wrapper.</p>
<p>In other words, if our product plans to create a rich surface such as a browser or desktop, it is correct to set the fork reference point from <code>app-server-protocol</code>, not CLI. This is because protocol boundaries are more important than transport.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["core runtime"] --> B["app-server"]
    B --> C["app-server-protocol"]
    C --> D["in-process client"]
    C --> E["remote client (WebSocket)"]
    B --> F["Python SDK (app-server wrapper)"]
    G["CLI (codex exec)"] --> H["TypeScript SDK (CLI wrapper)"]
    
    subgraph transport
        I["stdio://"]
        J["ws://IP:PORT"]
    end
    
    B --> I
    B --> J
    E --> J
</code></pre>
<h3>Exposed surface layer 4</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>floor</th>
<th>Meaning</th>
<th>file</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>app-server</code></td>
<td>Long-running Codex server runtime</td>
<td><code>app-server/src/lib.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>app-server-protocol</code></td>
<td>JSON-RPC wire schema (v1 legacy + v2 current)</td>
<td><code>app-server-protocol/src/protocol/common.rs</code>, <code>v2.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>app-server-client</code></td>
<td>in-process and remote facade</td>
<td><code>app-server-client/src/lib.rs</code>, <code>remote.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK</td>
<td>TS is a CLI wrapper, Python is an app-server wrapper</td>
<td><code>sdk/typescript/</code>, <code>sdk/python/</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>2. Protocol message details</h2>
<h3>2.1 Initialization handshake</h3>
<p>The client must complete the handshake in the following order: <code>initialize</code> → <code>initialized</code>. The <code>initialize</code> response includes the server version, supported capabilities, and user agent.</p>
<pre><code class="language-jsonc">// Client → Server: initialize 요청
{
  "id": 1,
  "method": "initialize",
  "params": {
    "clientInfo": {
      "name": "codex_vscode",
      "title": "Codex VS Code Extension",
      "version": "0.1.0"
    },
    "capabilities": {
      "experimentalApi": true,
      "optOutNotificationMethods": ["item/agentMessage/delta"]
    }
  }
}

// Server → Client: initialize 응답
{ "id": 1, "result": { "userAgent": "codex/1.0.0", "serverInfo": { ... } } }

// Client → Server: initialized 알림 (id 없음)
{ "method": "initialized", "params": {} }
</code></pre>
<p><code>optOutNotificationMethods</code> allows the client to proactively filter out events that are not needed. This is an important contract not only for bandwidth optimization but also for SDK design.</p>
<h3>2.2 Client → Server request (ClientRequest) full map</h3>
<p>The <code>client_request_definitions!</code> macro declaratively creates the entire <code>ClientRequest</code> enum. Below is a breakdown by category.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>

<h3>2.3 Server → Client Notification (ServerNotification) Full Map</h3>
<p>The <code>server_notification_definitions!</code> macro generates all server push events.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant C as Client
    participant S as App Server
    
    C->>S: thread/start
    S-->>C: thread/started (notification)
    C->>S: turn/start {threadId, input}
    S-->>C: turn/started
    S-->>C: item/started (AgentMessage)
    S-->>C: item/agentMessage/delta (반복)
    S-->>C: item/commandExecution/requestApproval (ServerRequest)
    C->>S: resolve {id, result: {decision: "accept"}}
    S-->>C: item/started (CommandExecution)
    S-->>C: item/commandExecution/outputDelta (반복)
    S-->>C: item/completed (CommandExecution)
    S-->>C: item/completed (AgentMessage)
    S-->>C: turn/completed
    S-->>C: thread/tokenUsage/updated
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Key notification categories:</strong></p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Category</th>
<th>wire name</th>
<th>Use</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Thread status</td>
<td><code>thread/started</code>, <code>thread/status/changed</code>, <code>thread/closed</code>, <code>thread/archived</code>, <code>thread/unarchived</code>, <code>thread/name/updated</code></td>
<td>thread life cycle</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Turn status</td>
<td><code>turn/started</code>, <code>turn/completed</code>, <code>turn/diff/updated</code>, <code>turn/plan/updated</code></td>
<td>turn life cycle, diff/plan streaming</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Item status</td>
<td><code>item/started</code>, <code>item/completed</code></td>
<td>item life cycle</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Streaming Delta</td>
<td><code>item/agentMessage/delta</code>, <code>item/commandExecution/outputDelta</code>, <code>item/fileChange/outputDelta</code>, <code>item/reasoning/summaryTextDelta</code>, <code>item/reasoning/textDelta</code>, <code>item/plan/delta</code></td>
<td>Real-time chunks</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Approval review</td>

<td>Guardian automatic approval</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>hook execution status</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>Setting change notification</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>Certification Status</td>
</tr>

</tr>

<td><code>thread/realtime/started</code>, <code>thread/realtime/itemAdded</code>, <code>thread/realtime/transcriptUpdated</code>, <code>thread/realtime/outputAudio/delta</code>, <code>thread/realtime/error</code>, <code>thread/realtime/closed</code></td>
<td>Voice real-time</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>2.4 Server → Client reverse request (ServerRequest)</h3>
<p>This is a <strong>reverse JSON-RPC request</strong> where the server asks the client to make a decision. The client must respond with <code>result</code>; if ignored, the turn stops.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>method</th>
<th>Use</th>
<th>Example response</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>item/commandExecution/requestApproval</code></td>
<td>Request permission to execute command</td>
<td><code>{ "decision": "accept" }</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>item/fileChange/requestApproval</code></td>
<td>File Change Approval Request</td>
<td><code>{ "decision": "accept" }</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>item/tool/requestUserInput</code></td>
<td>Request for user input (elicitation)</td>
<td>free form</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>item/tool/call</code></td>
<td>dynamic tool callback</td>
<td>tool return result</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>item/permissions/requestApproval</code></td>
<td>Grant additional permissions</td>
<td>permission grant</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>mcpServer/elicitation/request</code></td>
<td>MCP server elicitation</td>
<td>elicitation response</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>account/chatgptAuthTokens/refresh</code></td>
<td>Authentication token renewal</td>
<td>new token</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<pre><code class="language-jsonc">// Server → Client: 명령 실행 승인 요청
{
  "id": "req-42",
  "method": "item/commandExecution/requestApproval",
  "params": {
    "threadId": "abc-123",
    "turnId": "turn-1",
    "itemId": "item-5",
    "command": "rm -rf node_modules",
    "cwd": "/workspace/project"
  }
}

// Client → Server: 승인 응답
{ "id": "req-42", "result": { "decision": "accept" } }
</code></pre>
<h3>2.5 Core data model</h3>
<h4>Thread structure</h4>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v2.rs
pub struct Thread {
    pub id: String,
    pub preview: String,         // 보통 첫 번째 사용자 메시지
    pub ephemeral: bool,         // 디스크에 저장하지 않는 thread
    pub model_provider: String,  // "openai" 등
    pub created_at: i64,         // Unix timestamp
    pub updated_at: i64,
    pub status: ThreadStatus,
    pub cwd: PathBuf,
    pub cli_version: String,
    pub source: SessionSource,   // CLI, VSCode, exec, app-server 등
    pub agent_nickname: Option&#x3C;String>,  // sub-agent 닉네임
    pub agent_role: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub git_info: Option&#x3C;GitInfo>,
    pub name: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub turns: Vec&#x3C;Turn>,        // resume/fork/read 때만 채워짐
}
</code></pre>
<h4>Turn structure</h4>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub struct Turn {
    pub id: String,
    pub items: Vec&#x3C;ThreadItem>,  // resume/fork 응답에서만 채워짐
    pub status: TurnStatus,      // InProgress | Completed | Failed | Interrupted
    pub error: Option&#x3C;TurnError>,
}
</code></pre>
<h4>ThreadItem classification (13 types)</h4>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum ThreadItem {
    UserMessage { id, content: Vec&#x3C;UserInput> },
    HookPrompt { id, fragments },
    AgentMessage { id, text, phase, memory_citation },
    Plan { id, text },                    // experimental
    Reasoning { id, summary, content },
    CommandExecution { id, command, cwd, process_id, source,
                       status, command_actions, aggregated_output,
                       exit_code, duration_ms },
    FileChange { id, changes: Vec&#x3C;FileUpdateChange>, status },
    McpToolCall { id, server, tool, status, arguments,
                  result, error, duration_ms },
    DynamicToolCall { id, tool, arguments, status,
                      content_items, success, duration_ms },
    CollabAgentToolCall { id, tool, status, sender_thread_id,
                          receiver_thread_ids, prompt, model,
                          reasoning_effort, agents_states },
    WebSearch { id, query, action },
    ImageView { id, path },
    ImageGeneration { id, status, revised_prompt, result, saved_path },
    EnteredReviewMode { id, review },
    ExitedReviewMode { id, review },
    ContextCompaction { id },
}
</code></pre>
<h4>TurnStartParams — Turn unit override</h4>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub struct TurnStartParams {
    pub thread_id: String,
    pub input: Vec&#x3C;UserInput>,
    pub cwd: Option&#x3C;PathBuf>,                // 작업 디렉토리 오버라이드
    pub approval_policy: Option&#x3C;AskForApproval>,  // 승인 정책
    pub approvals_reviewer: Option&#x3C;ApprovalsReviewer>,
    pub sandbox_policy: Option&#x3C;SandboxPolicy>,
    pub model: Option&#x3C;String>,               // 모델 오버라이드
    pub service_tier: Option&#x3C;Option&#x3C;ServiceTier>>,
    pub effort: Option&#x3C;ReasoningEffort>,     // reasoning effort
    pub summary: Option&#x3C;ReasoningSummary>,
    pub personality: Option&#x3C;Personality>,
    pub output_schema: Option&#x3C;JsonValue>,    // structured output
    pub collaboration_mode: Option&#x3C;CollaborationMode>,  // experimental
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. Transport layer</h2>
<p>The <code>AppServerTransport</code> enum supports two transports.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server/src/transport.rs
pub enum AppServerTransport {
    Stdio,
    WebSocket { bind_address: SocketAddr },
}

impl AppServerTransport {
    pub const DEFAULT_LISTEN_URL: &#x26;'static str = "stdio://";

    pub fn from_listen_url(listen_url: &#x26;str) -> Result&#x3C;Self, ...> {
        // "stdio://"  → Stdio
        // "ws://IP:PORT" → WebSocket { bind_address }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>WebSocket transport is axum-based and exposes <code>/readyz</code> and <code>/healthz</code> endpoints. Channel capacity is fixed at <code>CHANNEL_CAPACITY = 128</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph "stdio transport"
        A["stdin (JSON line)"] --> B["MessageProcessor"]
        B --> C["stdout (JSON line)"]
    end
    
    subgraph "WebSocket transport"
        D["ws:// connect"] --> E["axum Router"]
        E --> F["MessageProcessor"]
        F --> G["ws:// frame"]
        E --> H["/readyz"]
        E --> I["/healthz"]
    end
    
    subgraph "in-process transport"
        J["InProcessClientHandle"] --> K["mpsc channels"]
        K --> L["MessageProcessor"]
        L --> M["broadcast events"]
    end
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>4. Client API details</h2>
<h3>4.1 In-Process Client (Rust)</h3>
<p>It is a facade for consumers within the same process, such as TUI and exec. It is connected to <code>MessageProcessor</code> and the bounded mpsc channel, and there is no separate process boundary.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server-client/src/lib.rs

/// 이벤트 수신 타입
pub enum AppServerEvent {
    Lagged { skipped: usize },      // backpressure 초과 시
    ServerNotification(ServerNotification),
    ServerRequest(ServerRequest),
    Disconnected { message: String },
}

/// 핵심 client facade
pub struct InProcessAppServerClient { /* ... */ }

impl InProcessAppServerClient {
    /// 런타임 시작 + initialize/initialized 핸드셰이크 자동 수행
    pub async fn start(args: InProcessClientStartArgs) -> IoResult&#x3C;Self>;

    /// typed JSON-RPC 요청 — 응답을 제네릭 T로 디코딩
    pub async fn request_typed&#x3C;T: DeserializeOwned>(
        &#x26;self, request: ClientRequest
    ) -> Result&#x3C;T, TypedRequestError>;

    /// raw JSON-RPC 요청
    pub async fn request(&#x26;self, request: ClientRequest) -> IoResult&#x3C;RequestResult>;

    /// 알림 전송
    pub async fn notify(&#x26;self, notification: ClientNotification) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;

    /// ServerRequest에 대한 응답 (approval 등)
    pub async fn resolve_server_request(
        &#x26;self, request_id: RequestId, result: JsonRpcResult
    ) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;

    /// ServerRequest 거부
    pub async fn reject_server_request(
        &#x26;self, request_id: RequestId, error: JSONRPCErrorError
    ) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;

    /// 다음 이벤트 수신 (backpressure-aware)
    pub async fn next_event(&#x26;mut self) -> Option&#x3C;InProcessServerEvent>;

    /// graceful shutdown (5초 타임아웃 후 abort)
    pub async fn shutdown(self) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>backpressure design</strong>: Uses <code>try_send</code> and returns <code>WouldBlock</code> when the channel is full. However, delivery of terminal events such as <code>TurnCompleted</code> is guaranteed.</p>
<h3>4.2 Remote Client (WebSocket)</h3>
<p>WebSocket-based remote access client. It is designed so that upper layers such as TUI are not aware of transport by providing the same <code>AppServerEvent</code> surface as <code>InProcessAppServerClient</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server-client/src/remote.rs

pub struct RemoteAppServerConnectArgs {
    pub websocket_url: String,
    pub client_name: String,
    pub client_version: String,
    pub experimental_api: bool,
    pub opt_out_notification_methods: Vec&#x3C;String>,
    pub channel_capacity: usize,
}

pub struct RemoteAppServerClient { /* ... */ }

impl RemoteAppServerClient {
    /// WebSocket 연결 + initialize 핸드셰이크 (10초 타임아웃)
    pub async fn connect(args: RemoteAppServerConnectArgs) -> IoResult&#x3C;Self>;
    pub async fn request(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;RequestResult>;
    pub async fn request_typed&#x3C;T>(&#x26;self, ...) -> Result&#x3C;T, TypedRequestError>;
    pub async fn notify(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
    pub async fn next_event(&#x26;mut self) -> Option&#x3C;AppServerEvent>;
    pub async fn shutdown(self) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 Integrated Client enum</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">/// transport 무관 통합 surface
pub enum AppServerClient {
    InProcess(InProcessAppServerClient),
    Remote(RemoteAppServerClient),
}

impl AppServerClient {
    pub async fn request(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;RequestResult>;
    pub async fn request_typed&#x3C;T>(&#x26;self, ...) -> Result&#x3C;T, TypedRequestError>;
    pub async fn notify(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
    pub async fn resolve_server_request(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
    pub async fn reject_server_request(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
    pub async fn next_event(&#x26;mut self) -> Option&#x3C;AppServerEvent>;
    pub async fn shutdown(self) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">classDiagram
    class AppServerClient {
        &#x3C;&#x3C;enum>>
        InProcess(InProcessAppServerClient)
        Remote(RemoteAppServerClient)
        +request()
        +request_typed~T~()
        +notify()
        +resolve_server_request()
        +reject_server_request()
        +next_event()
        +shutdown()
    }
    
    class InProcessAppServerClient {
        +start(args) IoResult~Self~
        +request_handle() Handle
    }
    
    class RemoteAppServerClient {
        +connect(args) IoResult~Self~
    }
    
    AppServerClient --> InProcessAppServerClient
    AppServerClient --> RemoteAppServerClient
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. Session management and Thread state machine</h2>
<h3>5.1 ThreadState internal structure</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server/src/thread_state.rs
pub struct ThreadState {
    pub pending_interrupts: Vec&#x3C;...>,
    pub pending_rollbacks: Option&#x3C;ConnectionRequestId>,
    pub turn_summary: TurnSummary,     // file_change, cmd 실행 상태 추적
    pub cancel_tx: Option&#x3C;oneshot::Sender&#x3C;()>>,
    pub experimental_raw_events: bool,
    pub listener_generation: u64,      // listener 교체 시 increment
    listener_command_tx: Option&#x3C;mpsc::UnboundedSender&#x3C;ThreadListenerCommand>>,
    current_turn_history: ThreadHistoryBuilder,
    listener_thread: Option&#x3C;Weak&#x3C;CodexThread>>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>5.2 Thread life cycle state machine</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Created: thread/start
    Created --> Running: turn/start
    Running --> Running: turn/steer (same-turn steering)
    Running --> Interrupted: turn/interrupt
    Running --> Completed: turn/completed
    Interrupted --> Running: turn/start (new turn)
    Completed --> Running: turn/start (new turn)
    Completed --> Compacting: thread/compact/start
    Compacting --> Completed: compaction done
    Completed --> Archived: thread/archive
    Archived --> Completed: thread/unarchive
    Completed --> Forked: thread/fork
    Completed --> RolledBack: thread/rollback
    RolledBack --> Running: turn/start
    
    Created --> Resumed: thread/resume
    Resumed --> Running: turn/start
</code></pre>
<h3>5.3 ThreadHistoryBuilder — rollout replay</h3>
<p>It is a core builder that reorganizes past events into <code>Turn[]</code> when thread resumes.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server-protocol/src/protocol/thread_history.rs
pub struct ThreadHistoryBuilder {
    turns: Vec&#x3C;Turn>,
    current_turn: Option&#x3C;PendingTurn>,
    next_item_index: i64,
    current_rollout_index: usize,
    next_rollout_index: usize,
}

impl ThreadHistoryBuilder {
    pub fn new() -> Self;
    pub fn handle_event(&#x26;mut self, event: &#x26;EventMsg);  // 공유 reducer
    pub fn handle_rollout_item(&#x26;mut self, item: &#x26;RolloutItem);
    pub fn finish(self) -> Vec&#x3C;Turn>;
    pub fn active_turn_snapshot(&#x26;self) -> Option&#x3C;Turn>;
    pub fn has_active_turn(&#x26;self) -> bool;
    pub fn reset(&#x26;mut self);
}

/// rollout 파일에서 Turn[] 재구성
pub fn build_turns_from_rollout_items(items: &#x26;[RolloutItem]) -> Vec&#x3C;Turn>;
</code></pre>
<p><code>handle_event</code> is a shared reducer that processes all variants of <code>EventMsg</code>, and uses the same logic for resume/rejoin/fork.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. SDK Surface Comparison</h2>
<h3>6.1 TypeScript SDK — CLI wrapper method</h3>
<p>TypeScript SDK is a thin wrapper that runs <code>codex exec</code> as a subprocess and parses the stdout JSONL stream. Do not use app-server protocol directly.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// sdk/typescript/src/codex.ts
export class Codex {
  constructor(options: CodexOptions = {});
  startThread(options?: ThreadOptions): Thread;
  resumeThread(id: string, options?: ThreadOptions): Thread;
}

// sdk/typescript/src/thread.ts
export class Thread {
  get id(): string | null;
  async run(input: Input, turnOptions?: TurnOptions): Promise&#x3C;Turn>;
  async runStreamed(input: Input, turnOptions?: TurnOptions): Promise&#x3C;StreamedTurn>;
}

// 이벤트 타입 (exec JSONL 기반)
type ThreadEvent =
  | ThreadStartedEvent    // { type: "thread.started", thread_id }
  | TurnStartedEvent      // { type: "turn.started" }
  | TurnCompletedEvent    // { type: "turn.completed", usage }
  | TurnFailedEvent       // { type: "turn.failed", error }
  | ItemStartedEvent      // { type: "item.started", item }
  | ItemUpdatedEvent      // { type: "item.updated", item }
  | ItemCompletedEvent    // { type: "item.completed", item }
  | ThreadErrorEvent;     // { type: "error", message }

// Item 타입 (7가지 — app-server의 13가지보다 단순화)
type ThreadItem =
  | AgentMessageItem | ReasoningItem | CommandExecutionItem
  | FileChangeItem | McpToolCallItem | WebSearchItem
  | TodoListItem | ErrorItem;
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Constraint</strong>: The event name is <code>dot-case</code> (<code>item.completed</code>) and is different from app-server's <code>slash-case</code> (<code>item/completed</code>). Only 7 out of 13 item types are exposed. In fact, a subset of the app-server protocol is wrapped in a separate contract.</p>
<h3>6.2 Python SDK — app-server wrapper method</h3>
<p>The Python SDK launches app-server as a stdio subprocess and directly implements the JSON-RPC protocol. Typed methods are provided for all methods in the v2 protocol.</p>
<pre><code class="language-python"># sdk/python/src/codex_app_server/client.py
class AppServerClient:
    """Synchronous typed JSON-RPC client for codex app-server over stdio."""

    def __init__(self, config=None, approval_handler=None): ...
    def start(self) -> None: ...
    def close(self) -> None: ...
    def initialize(self) -> InitializeResponse: ...

    # Thread lifecycle
    def thread_start(self, params=None) -> ThreadStartResponse: ...
    def thread_resume(self, thread_id, params=None) -> ThreadResumeResponse: ...
    def thread_list(self, params=None) -> ThreadListResponse: ...
    def thread_read(self, thread_id, include_turns=False) -> ThreadReadResponse: ...
    def thread_fork(self, thread_id, params=None) -> ThreadForkResponse: ...
    def thread_archive(self, thread_id) -> ThreadArchiveResponse: ...
    def thread_unarchive(self, thread_id) -> ThreadUnarchiveResponse: ...
    def thread_set_name(self, thread_id, name) -> ThreadSetNameResponse: ...
    def thread_compact(self, thread_id) -> ThreadCompactStartResponse: ...

    # Turn lifecycle
    def turn_start(self, thread_id, input_items, params=None) -> TurnStartResponse: ...
    def turn_interrupt(self, thread_id, turn_id) -> TurnInterruptResponse: ...
    def turn_steer(self, thread_id, expected_turn_id, input_items) -> TurnSteerResponse: ...

    # Model
    def model_list(self, include_hidden=False) -> ModelListResponse: ...

    # 편의 메서드
    def wait_for_turn_completed(self, turn_id) -> TurnCompletedNotification: ...
    def stream_until_methods(self, methods) -> list[Notification]: ...
    def stream_text(self, thread_id, text, params=None) -> Iterator[AgentMessageDeltaNotification]: ...

    # ServerRequest 자동 처리
    def _handle_server_request(self, msg) -> JsonObject: ...
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-python"># sdk/python/src/codex_app_server/api.py — 고수준 Codex API
class Codex:
    """Minimal typed SDK surface for app-server v2."""
    def __init__(self, config=None): ...
    def thread_start(self, ...) -> ThreadStartResponse: ...
    def run(self, thread_id, input, ...) -> RunResult: ...
    def run_streamed(self, thread_id, input, ...) -> Iterator[Notification]: ...
    def close(self): ...
</code></pre>
<p><strong>ServerRequest automatic processing</strong>: Python SDK automatically <code>accepts’ approval requests in </code>_handle_server_request`. This is an opinionated default at the SDK level.</p>
<pre><code class="language-python">def _default_approval_handler(self, method, params):
    if method == "item/commandExecution/requestApproval":
        return {"decision": "accept"}
    if method == "item/fileChange/requestApproval":
        return {"decision": "accept"}
    return {}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.3 SDK Comparison Summary</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TB
    subgraph "TypeScript SDK"
        TS_Codex["Codex"] --> TS_Thread["Thread"]
        TS_Thread --> TS_Exec["CodexExec (subprocess)"]
        TS_Exec --> TS_JSONL["stdout JSONL stream"]
        TS_JSONL --> TS_Events["ThreadEvent (dot-case)"]
    end
    
    subgraph "Python SDK"
        PY_Codex["Codex"] --> PY_Client["AppServerClient"]
        PY_Client --> PY_Proc["subprocess (stdio://)"]
        PY_Proc --> PY_JSONRPC["JSON-RPC v2 protocol"]
        PY_JSONRPC --> PY_Notif["Notification (slash-case)"]
    end
    
    subgraph "Rust Client"
        RS_Client["AppServerClient"] --> RS_InProc["InProcess (mpsc channels)"]
        RS_Client --> RS_Remote["Remote (WebSocket)"]
        RS_InProc --> RS_MP["MessageProcessor"]
        RS_Remote --> RS_MP
    end
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>dimension</th>
<th>TypeScript SDK</th>
<th>Python SDK</th>
<th>Rust Client</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>transport</td>
<td>subprocess stdout JSONL</td>
<td>subprocess stdio JSON-RPC</td>
<td>in-process channels or WebSocket</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>protocol level</td>
<td>exec event (subset)</td>
<td>app-server v2 full</td>
<td>app-server v2 full</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>thread management</td>
<td>default start/resume</td>
<td>full lifecycle</td>
<td>full lifecycle</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>approval processing</td>
<td>impossible (handled by exec)</td>
<td>approval_handler callback</td>
<td>resolve/reject_server_request</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>event name</td>
<td>dot-case (<code>item.completed</code>)</td>
<td>slash-case (<code>item/completed</code>)</td>
<td>enum variant</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>structured output</td>
<td>outputSchema file based</td>
<td>TurnStartParams.output_schema</td>
<td>TurnStartParams.output_schema</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>concurrency</td>
<td>single thread per turn</td>
<td>turn consumer lock</td>
<td>async mpsc</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>7. Message processor internal structure</h2>
<h3>7.1 MessageProcessor layer</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["TransportEvent (incoming)"] --> B["MessageProcessor"]
    B --> C["CodexMessageProcessor"]
    C --> D["ThreadManager (core)"]
    C --> E["ConfigApi"]
    C --> F["FsApi"]
    C --> G["FsWatchManager"]
    C --> H["ExternalAgentConfigApi"]
    B --> I["OutgoingMessageSender"]
    I --> J["OutboundConnectionState"]
    J --> K["transport writer"]
</code></pre>
<p><code>MessageProcessor</code> is the top-level dispatcher that routes incoming JSON-RPC, and <code>CodexMessageProcessor</code> is responsible for the actual thread/turn/skill logic. Between these two, <code>ConnectionSessionState</code> manages per-connection state.</p>
<h3>7.2 app-server module configuration</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>module</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>lib.rs</code></td>
<td>Bootstrap server, load config, start transport</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>transport.rs</code></td>
<td>stdio/WebSocket connection management, axum router</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>message_processor.rs</code></td>
<td>JSON-RPC dispatch, connection state</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>codex_message_processor.rs</code></td>
<td>thread/turn/skill business logic</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>bespoke_event_handling.rs</code></td>
<td>core EventMsg → ServerNotification conversion</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>thread_state.rs</code></td>
<td>per-thread runtime status</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>tracking thread state changes</td>
</tr>
<tr>

</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h2>8. What a rich client must handle</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/agentMessage/delta</code> — Streaming text chunk</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/tool/call</code> — dynamic tool callback (passed as ServerRequest)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/tool/requestUserInput</code> — elicitation request</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/commandExecution/requestApproval</code> — Approve command execution</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/fileChange/requestApproval</code> — File change approval</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/permissions/requestApproval</code> — Request additional permissions</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> collab agent status (<code>CollabAgentToolCall</code> item)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>skills/changed</code> — Notification of skill list change</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>turn/completed</code> — <strong>delivery guaranteed</strong> (also not dropped on backpressure)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>thread/tokenUsage/updated</code> — Track token usage</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>model/rerouted</code> — Notify model auto-switching</li>
</ul>
<h3>Reuse seam</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>seam</th>
<th>Reason</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>app-server-protocol</code></td>
<td>Can be immediately reused as a contract layer between UI and server — includes automatic JSON Schema generation</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>app-server-client</code></td>
<td>In-process and remote can be attached to the same model</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>app-server</code> message processor</td>
<td>Thread/turn/item lifecycle is well organized</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>Turn[] reconfiguration logic is separated in rollout file</td>
</tr>
<tr>

</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Combined Risk</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>risk</th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>app-server bootstrap binding</td>
<td>core state, auth, config loader, transport, arg0 dispatch are intertwined</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK philosophy differences</td>
<td>TS is a CLI wrapper (exec JSONL), Python is an app-server wrapper (JSON-RPC) — the event names are also different</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>connectors depend</td>
<td>ChatGPT account and directory endpoint premise</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>number of rich events</td>
<td>The entire operation cannot be replicated by only receiving <code>delta</code> — ServerRequest backcall processing required</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>v1/v2 dual maintenance</td>
<td>deprecated v1 API still exists in code, incurring cleanup costs</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>9. Our style fork extraction strategy</h2>
<p>What matters now is not how much analysis you did, but <strong>what you keep and what you throw away</strong>. <code>openai/codex</code> has many functions and a large surface area. If we fork it and push it into the product, our product will be dragged into the Codex structure. Conversely, if we precisely cut out only the necessary layers, we can quickly create already proven prompt assembly, tool runtime, and subagent orchestrator as our assets.</p>
<p>The judgment I have made after looking at the code so far is clear. What we need to get to first is not the CLI, but the middle layer of the core. In particular, <code>instructions</code>, <code>contextual_user_message</code>, <code>tools/router</code>, <code>tools/registry</code>, <code>tools/handlers</code>, <code>skills</code>, <code>codex_delegate</code>, and <code>app-server-protocol</code> are key. Conversely, in the early stages, there is almost no need for TUI, desktop UX, plugin marketplace, release script, or OS-specific packaging layers.</p>
<p>The extraction strategy is less of a “process of reducing a large reservoir into smaller products” and more of a process of “rebinding already separated layers into our own boundaries.”</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["prompt contract"] --> B["tool runtime"]
    B --> C["skill system"]
    B --> D["subagent runtime"]
    C --> E["dependency policy"]
    D --> F["app server control plane"]
    F --> G["our product API"]
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["leave behind"] --> B["TUI and packaging"]
    A --> C["desktop UX"]
    A --> D["marketplace UI"]
    E["extract first"] --> F["instructions and contextual fragments"]
    E --> G["router and registry and handlers"]
    E --> H["skills loader and injector"]
    E --> I["subagent control and protocol"]
</code></pre>
<h3>Priority extraction target</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Priority</th>
<th align="right">Bundle</th>
<th>Reason</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>

</tr>

<td>Can be reused with our own instruction package system</td>
</tr>

<td>Collaboration and API surfaces can come together</td>
</tr>

<h3>Recommendation extraction steps</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Step 1: Separate only the prompt contract into a separate package.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Step 2: Cut the tool router, registry, and core handler into separate runtime crates or modules.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Step 3: Attach skill loader and injector, but lock global config modification function.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Step 4: Attach a subagent control surface that includes only <code>spawn/send/wait</code> first.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Step 5: Connect the app-server protocol with our API and unify the history items.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Fork method recommended</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>method</th>
<th align="right">Recommendation</th>
<th>Reason</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Long-term maintenance fork of entire repository</td>
<td align="right">35</td>
<td>I keep getting pulled into the upstream UI and product layers</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>vendoring only the folders you need</td>
<td align="right">55</td>
<td>Fast but difficult to track updates</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Repackaging core functionality into our boundaries</td>
<td align="right">75</td>
<td>Most annoying, but best in the long run</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Final Judgment</h3>
<p>What we need is not “how to use the Codex,” but “how to dismantle the Codex.” Looking at the structure we've seen so far, the first thing we need to touch on is the prompt contract and tool runtime, and skill and subagent are the second layer on top of that. If this order is followed, the fork is not simply copied but can be reassembled under control.</p>

<h1>App Server · Client Surface · 포크 추출 전략</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — app/server/client surfaces.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>1. App Server와 Client Surface</h2>
<p>Codex의 rich client 표면은 CLI 하나로 끝나지 않는다. 실제 중심은 <code>app-server</code>, <code>app-server-protocol</code>, <code>app-server-client</code> 삼각형이고, TypeScript SDK와 Python SDK는 그 위나 바깥에서 각각 다른 철학으로 붙는다.</p>
<p><code>app-server</code>는 Codex 코어를 장기 실행 서버로 노출하는 실제 런타임이다. <code>app-server-protocol</code>은 wire schema 전용 계층이고, <code>app-server-client</code>는 in-process와 remote를 가리지 않는 client facade다. 이 세 층이 rich client 표면의 핵심이다. 반면 TypeScript SDK는 CLI wrapper이고, Python SDK는 app-server wrapper라는 차이가 있다.</p>
<p>즉 우리 제품이 브라우저나 데스크톱 같은 rich surface를 만들 계획이라면 포크 기준점은 CLI가 아니라 <code>app-server-protocol</code>부터 잡는 게 맞다. protocol 경계가 transport보다 더 중요하기 때문이다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["core runtime"] --> B["app-server"]
    B --> C["app-server-protocol"]
    C --> D["in-process client"]
    C --> E["remote client (WebSocket)"]
    B --> F["Python SDK (app-server wrapper)"]
    G["CLI (codex exec)"] --> H["TypeScript SDK (CLI wrapper)"]
    
    subgraph transport
        I["stdio://"]
        J["ws://IP:PORT"]
    end
    
    B --> I
    B --> J
    E --> J
</code></pre>
<h3>노출 표면 4층</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>층</th>
<th>의미</th>
<th>파일</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>app-server</code></td>
<td>장기 실행 Codex 서버 런타임</td>
<td><code>app-server/src/lib.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>app-server-protocol</code></td>
<td>JSON-RPC wire schema (v1 legacy + v2 current)</td>
<td><code>app-server-protocol/src/protocol/common.rs</code>, <code>v2.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>app-server-client</code></td>
<td>in-process와 remote facade</td>
<td><code>app-server-client/src/lib.rs</code>, <code>remote.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>SDK</td>
<td>TS는 CLI wrapper, Python은 app-server wrapper</td>
<td><code>sdk/typescript/</code>, <code>sdk/python/</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>2. 프로토콜 메시지 상세</h2>
<h3>2.1 초기화 핸드셰이크</h3>
<p>클라이언트는 반드시 <code>initialize</code> → <code>initialized</code> 순서로 핸드셰이크를 완료해야 한다. <code>initialize</code> 응답에는 서버 버전, 지원 capability, user agent이 포함된다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-jsonc">// Client → Server: initialize 요청
{
  "id": 1,
  "method": "initialize",
  "params": {
    "clientInfo": {
      "name": "codex_vscode",
      "title": "Codex VS Code Extension",
      "version": "0.1.0"
    },
    "capabilities": {
      "experimentalApi": true,
      "optOutNotificationMethods": ["item/agentMessage/delta"]
    }
  }
}

// Server → Client: initialize 응답
{ "id": 1, "result": { "userAgent": "codex/1.0.0", "serverInfo": { ... } } }

// Client → Server: initialized 알림 (id 없음)
{ "method": "initialized", "params": {} }
</code></pre>
<p><code>optOutNotificationMethods</code>를 통해 클라이언트가 필요 없는 이벤트를 사전에 필터할 수 있다. 이것은 대역폭 최적화뿐 아니라 SDK 설계 시에도 중요한 contract이다.</p>
<h3>2.2 Client → Server 요청 (ClientRequest) 전체 맵</h3>
<p><code>client_request_definitions!</code> 매크로가 <code>ClientRequest</code> enum 전체를 선언적으로 생성한다. 아래는 카테고리별 분류다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>카테고리</th>
<th>method wire name</th>
<th>params / response</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Thread lifecycle</strong></td>
<td><code>thread/start</code></td>
<td><code>ThreadStartParams</code> → <code>ThreadStartResponse</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/resume</code></td>
<td><code>ThreadResumeParams</code> → <code>ThreadResumeResponse</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/fork</code></td>
<td><code>ThreadForkParams</code> → <code>ThreadForkResponse</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/archive</code> / <code>thread/unarchive</code></td>
<td>단순 threadId 기반</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/list</code></td>
<td><code>ThreadListParams</code> → <code>ThreadListResponse</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/loaded/list</code></td>
<td>현재 메모리에 올라온 thread 목록</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/read</code></td>
<td><code>ThreadReadParams</code> → <code>ThreadReadResponse</code> (includeTurns 옵션)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/name/set</code></td>
<td>thread 이름 설정</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/metadata/update</code></td>
<td>thread 메타데이터 갱신</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/rollback</code></td>
<td>turn 단위 롤백</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/compact/start</code></td>
<td>context 압축 시작</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/shellCommand</code></td>
<td>thread 컨텍스트에서 shell 실행</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td></td>
<td><code>thread/unsubscribe</code></td>
<td>thread 이벤트 구독 해제</td>
</tr>

</tbody>
</table>
<h3>2.3 Server → Client 알림 (ServerNotification) 전체 맵</h3>
<p><code>server_notification_definitions!</code> 매크로가 모든 서버 push 이벤트를 생성한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant C as Client
    participant S as App Server
    
    C->>S: thread/start
    S-->>C: thread/started (notification)
    C->>S: turn/start {threadId, input}
    S-->>C: turn/started
    S-->>C: item/started (AgentMessage)
    S-->>C: item/agentMessage/delta (반복)
    S-->>C: item/commandExecution/requestApproval (ServerRequest)
    C->>S: resolve {id, result: {decision: "accept"}}
    S-->>C: item/started (CommandExecution)
    S-->>C: item/commandExecution/outputDelta (반복)
    S-->>C: item/completed (CommandExecution)
    S-->>C: item/completed (AgentMessage)
    S-->>C: turn/completed
    S-->>C: thread/tokenUsage/updated
</code></pre>
<p><strong>핵심 알림 분류:</strong></p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>분류</th>
<th>wire name</th>
<th>용도</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>

</tr>

<h3>2.4 Server → Client 역요청 (ServerRequest)</h3>
<p>서버가 클라이언트에게 결정을 요구하는 <strong>역방향 JSON-RPC 요청</strong>이다. 클라이언트는 반드시 <code>result</code>로 응답해야 하며, 무시하면 turn이 멈춘다.</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>method</th>
<th>용도</th>
<th>응답 예시</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>item/commandExecution/requestApproval</code></td>
<td>명령 실행 승인 요청</td>
<td><code>{ "decision": "accept" }</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>item/fileChange/requestApproval</code></td>
<td>파일 변경 승인 요청</td>
<td><code>{ "decision": "accept" }</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>item/tool/requestUserInput</code></td>
<td>사용자 입력 요청 (elicitation)</td>
<td>자유 형식</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>item/tool/call</code></td>
<td>dynamic tool 역호출</td>
<td>tool 결과 반환</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>item/permissions/requestApproval</code></td>
<td>추가 권한 승인</td>
<td>permission grant</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>mcpServer/elicitation/request</code></td>
<td>MCP 서버 elicitation</td>
<td>elicitation 응답</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>account/chatgptAuthTokens/refresh</code></td>
<td>인증 토큰 갱신</td>
<td>새 토큰</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<pre><code class="language-jsonc">// Server → Client: 명령 실행 승인 요청
{
  "id": "req-42",
  "method": "item/commandExecution/requestApproval",
  "params": {
    "threadId": "abc-123",
    "turnId": "turn-1",
    "itemId": "item-5",
    "command": "rm -rf node_modules",
    "cwd": "/workspace/project"
  }
}

// Client → Server: 승인 응답
{ "id": "req-42", "result": { "decision": "accept" } }
</code></pre>
<h3>2.5 핵심 데이터 모델</h3>
<h4>Thread 구조</h4>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server-protocol/src/protocol/v2.rs
pub struct Thread {
    pub id: String,
    pub preview: String,         // 보통 첫 번째 사용자 메시지
    pub ephemeral: bool,         // 디스크에 저장하지 않는 thread
    pub model_provider: String,  // "openai" 등
    pub created_at: i64,         // Unix timestamp
    pub updated_at: i64,
    pub status: ThreadStatus,
    pub cwd: PathBuf,
    pub cli_version: String,
    pub source: SessionSource,   // CLI, VSCode, exec, app-server 등
    pub agent_nickname: Option&#x3C;String>,  // sub-agent 닉네임
    pub agent_role: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub git_info: Option&#x3C;GitInfo>,
    pub name: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub turns: Vec&#x3C;Turn>,        // resume/fork/read 때만 채워짐
}
</code></pre>
<h4>Turn 구조</h4>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub struct Turn {
    pub id: String,
    pub items: Vec&#x3C;ThreadItem>,  // resume/fork 응답에서만 채워짐
    pub status: TurnStatus,      // InProgress | Completed | Failed | Interrupted
    pub error: Option&#x3C;TurnError>,
}
</code></pre>
<h4>ThreadItem 분류 (13가지)</h4>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum ThreadItem {
    UserMessage { id, content: Vec&#x3C;UserInput> },
    HookPrompt { id, fragments },
    AgentMessage { id, text, phase, memory_citation },
    Plan { id, text },                    // experimental
    Reasoning { id, summary, content },
    CommandExecution { id, command, cwd, process_id, source,
                       status, command_actions, aggregated_output,
                       exit_code, duration_ms },
    FileChange { id, changes: Vec&#x3C;FileUpdateChange>, status },
    McpToolCall { id, server, tool, status, arguments,
                  result, error, duration_ms },
    DynamicToolCall { id, tool, arguments, status,
                      content_items, success, duration_ms },
    CollabAgentToolCall { id, tool, status, sender_thread_id,
                          receiver_thread_ids, prompt, model,
                          reasoning_effort, agents_states },
    WebSearch { id, query, action },
    ImageView { id, path },
    ImageGeneration { id, status, revised_prompt, result, saved_path },
    EnteredReviewMode { id, review },
    ExitedReviewMode { id, review },
    ContextCompaction { id },
}
</code></pre>
<h4>TurnStartParams — turn 단위 오버라이드</h4>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub struct TurnStartParams {
    pub thread_id: String,
    pub input: Vec&#x3C;UserInput>,
    pub cwd: Option&#x3C;PathBuf>,                // 작업 디렉토리 오버라이드
    pub approval_policy: Option&#x3C;AskForApproval>,  // 승인 정책
    pub approvals_reviewer: Option&#x3C;ApprovalsReviewer>,
    pub sandbox_policy: Option&#x3C;SandboxPolicy>,
    pub model: Option&#x3C;String>,               // 모델 오버라이드
    pub service_tier: Option&#x3C;Option&#x3C;ServiceTier>>,
    pub effort: Option&#x3C;ReasoningEffort>,     // reasoning effort
    pub summary: Option&#x3C;ReasoningSummary>,
    pub personality: Option&#x3C;Personality>,
    pub output_schema: Option&#x3C;JsonValue>,    // structured output
    pub collaboration_mode: Option&#x3C;CollaborationMode>,  // experimental
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. Transport 계층</h2>
<p><code>AppServerTransport</code> enum이 두 가지 transport를 지원한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server/src/transport.rs
pub enum AppServerTransport {
    Stdio,
    WebSocket { bind_address: SocketAddr },
}

impl AppServerTransport {
    pub const DEFAULT_LISTEN_URL: &#x26;'static str = "stdio://";

    pub fn from_listen_url(listen_url: &#x26;str) -> Result&#x3C;Self, ...> {
        // "stdio://"  → Stdio
        // "ws://IP:PORT" → WebSocket { bind_address }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>WebSocket transport는 axum 기반이며, <code>/readyz</code>와 <code>/healthz</code> 엔드포인트를 함께 노출한다. 채널 용량은 <code>CHANNEL_CAPACITY = 128</code>로 고정되어 있다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    subgraph "stdio transport"
        A["stdin (JSON line)"] --> B["MessageProcessor"]
        B --> C["stdout (JSON line)"]
    end
    
    subgraph "WebSocket transport"
        D["ws:// connect"] --> E["axum Router"]
        E --> F["MessageProcessor"]
        F --> G["ws:// frame"]
        E --> H["/readyz"]
        E --> I["/healthz"]
    end
    
    subgraph "in-process transport"
        J["InProcessClientHandle"] --> K["mpsc channels"]
        K --> L["MessageProcessor"]
        L --> M["broadcast events"]
    end
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>4. Client API 상세</h2>
<h3>4.1 In-Process Client (Rust)</h3>
<p>TUI와 exec 같은 같은 프로세스 안의 소비자를 위한 facade다. <code>MessageProcessor</code>와 bounded mpsc 채널로 연결되며, 별도 프로세스 경계가 없다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server-client/src/lib.rs

/// 이벤트 수신 타입
pub enum AppServerEvent {
    Lagged { skipped: usize },      // backpressure 초과 시
    ServerNotification(ServerNotification),
    ServerRequest(ServerRequest),
    Disconnected { message: String },
}

/// 핵심 client facade
pub struct InProcessAppServerClient { /* ... */ }

impl InProcessAppServerClient {
    /// 런타임 시작 + initialize/initialized 핸드셰이크 자동 수행
    pub async fn start(args: InProcessClientStartArgs) -> IoResult&#x3C;Self>;

    /// typed JSON-RPC 요청 — 응답을 제네릭 T로 디코딩
    pub async fn request_typed&#x3C;T: DeserializeOwned>(
        &#x26;self, request: ClientRequest
    ) -> Result&#x3C;T, TypedRequestError>;

    /// raw JSON-RPC 요청
    pub async fn request(&#x26;self, request: ClientRequest) -> IoResult&#x3C;RequestResult>;

    /// 알림 전송
    pub async fn notify(&#x26;self, notification: ClientNotification) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;

    /// ServerRequest에 대한 응답 (approval 등)
    pub async fn resolve_server_request(
        &#x26;self, request_id: RequestId, result: JsonRpcResult
    ) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;

    /// ServerRequest 거부
    pub async fn reject_server_request(
        &#x26;self, request_id: RequestId, error: JSONRPCErrorError
    ) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;

    /// 다음 이벤트 수신 (backpressure-aware)
    pub async fn next_event(&#x26;mut self) -> Option&#x3C;InProcessServerEvent>;

    /// graceful shutdown (5초 타임아웃 후 abort)
    pub async fn shutdown(self) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>backpressure 설계</strong>: <code>try_send</code>를 사용하며, 채널이 가득 차면 <code>WouldBlock</code>을 반환한다. 단, <code>TurnCompleted</code>와 같은 terminal 이벤트는 delivery가 보장된다.</p>
<h3>4.2 Remote Client (WebSocket)</h3>
<p>WebSocket 기반 원격 접속 클라이언트. <code>InProcessAppServerClient</code>와 동일한 <code>AppServerEvent</code> surface를 제공하여 TUI 등의 상위 층이 transport를 의식하지 않도록 설계됐다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server-client/src/remote.rs

pub struct RemoteAppServerConnectArgs {
    pub websocket_url: String,
    pub client_name: String,
    pub client_version: String,
    pub experimental_api: bool,
    pub opt_out_notification_methods: Vec&#x3C;String>,
    pub channel_capacity: usize,
}

pub struct RemoteAppServerClient { /* ... */ }

impl RemoteAppServerClient {
    /// WebSocket 연결 + initialize 핸드셰이크 (10초 타임아웃)
    pub async fn connect(args: RemoteAppServerConnectArgs) -> IoResult&#x3C;Self>;
    pub async fn request(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;RequestResult>;
    pub async fn request_typed&#x3C;T>(&#x26;self, ...) -> Result&#x3C;T, TypedRequestError>;
    pub async fn notify(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
    pub async fn next_event(&#x26;mut self) -> Option&#x3C;AppServerEvent>;
    pub async fn shutdown(self) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 통합 Client enum</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">/// transport 무관 통합 surface
pub enum AppServerClient {
    InProcess(InProcessAppServerClient),
    Remote(RemoteAppServerClient),
}

impl AppServerClient {
    pub async fn request(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;RequestResult>;
    pub async fn request_typed&#x3C;T>(&#x26;self, ...) -> Result&#x3C;T, TypedRequestError>;
    pub async fn notify(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
    pub async fn resolve_server_request(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
    pub async fn reject_server_request(&#x26;self, ...) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
    pub async fn next_event(&#x26;mut self) -> Option&#x3C;AppServerEvent>;
    pub async fn shutdown(self) -> IoResult&#x3C;()>;
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">classDiagram
    class AppServerClient {
        &#x3C;&#x3C;enum>>
        InProcess(InProcessAppServerClient)
        Remote(RemoteAppServerClient)
        +request()
        +request_typed~T~()
        +notify()
        +resolve_server_request()
        +reject_server_request()
        +next_event()
        +shutdown()
    }
    
    class InProcessAppServerClient {
        +start(args) IoResult~Self~
        +request_handle() Handle
    }
    
    class RemoteAppServerClient {
        +connect(args) IoResult~Self~
    }
    
    AppServerClient --> InProcessAppServerClient
    AppServerClient --> RemoteAppServerClient
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. Session 관리와 Thread 상태 머신</h2>
<h3>5.1 ThreadState 내부 구조</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server/src/thread_state.rs
pub struct ThreadState {
    pub pending_interrupts: Vec&#x3C;...>,
    pub pending_rollbacks: Option&#x3C;ConnectionRequestId>,
    pub turn_summary: TurnSummary,     // file_change, cmd 실행 상태 추적
    pub cancel_tx: Option&#x3C;oneshot::Sender&#x3C;()>>,
    pub experimental_raw_events: bool,
    pub listener_generation: u64,      // listener 교체 시 increment
    listener_command_tx: Option&#x3C;mpsc::UnboundedSender&#x3C;ThreadListenerCommand>>,
    current_turn_history: ThreadHistoryBuilder,
    listener_thread: Option&#x3C;Weak&#x3C;CodexThread>>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>5.2 Thread 생명주기 상태 머신</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Created: thread/start
    Created --> Running: turn/start
    Running --> Running: turn/steer (same-turn steering)
    Running --> Interrupted: turn/interrupt
    Running --> Completed: turn/completed
    Interrupted --> Running: turn/start (new turn)
    Completed --> Running: turn/start (new turn)
    Completed --> Compacting: thread/compact/start
    Compacting --> Completed: compaction done
    Completed --> Archived: thread/archive
    Archived --> Completed: thread/unarchive
    Completed --> Forked: thread/fork
    Completed --> RolledBack: thread/rollback
    RolledBack --> Running: turn/start
    
    Created --> Resumed: thread/resume
    Resumed --> Running: turn/start
</code></pre>
<h3>5.3 ThreadHistoryBuilder — rollout replay</h3>
<p>thread resume 시 과거 이벤트를 <code>Turn[]</code>으로 재구성하는 핵심 빌더다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// app-server-protocol/src/protocol/thread_history.rs
pub struct ThreadHistoryBuilder {
    turns: Vec&#x3C;Turn>,
    current_turn: Option&#x3C;PendingTurn>,
    next_item_index: i64,
    current_rollout_index: usize,
    next_rollout_index: usize,
}

impl ThreadHistoryBuilder {
    pub fn new() -> Self;
    pub fn handle_event(&#x26;mut self, event: &#x26;EventMsg);  // 공유 reducer
    pub fn handle_rollout_item(&#x26;mut self, item: &#x26;RolloutItem);
    pub fn finish(self) -> Vec&#x3C;Turn>;
    pub fn active_turn_snapshot(&#x26;self) -> Option&#x3C;Turn>;
    pub fn has_active_turn(&#x26;self) -> bool;
    pub fn reset(&#x26;mut self);
}

/// rollout 파일에서 Turn[] 재구성
pub fn build_turns_from_rollout_items(items: &#x26;[RolloutItem]) -> Vec&#x3C;Turn>;
</code></pre>
<p><code>handle_event</code>는 <code>EventMsg</code>의 모든 variant를 처리하는 공유 reducer로, resume/rejoin/fork 모두에서 같은 로직을 사용한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. SDK Surface 비교</h2>
<h3>6.1 TypeScript SDK — CLI wrapper 방식</h3>
<p>TypeScript SDK는 <code>codex exec</code>을 subprocess로 실행하고, stdout JSONL 스트림을 파싱하는 thin wrapper다. app-server protocol을 직접 사용하지 않는다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// sdk/typescript/src/codex.ts
export class Codex {
  constructor(options: CodexOptions = {});
  startThread(options?: ThreadOptions): Thread;
  resumeThread(id: string, options?: ThreadOptions): Thread;
}

// sdk/typescript/src/thread.ts
export class Thread {
  get id(): string | null;
  async run(input: Input, turnOptions?: TurnOptions): Promise&#x3C;Turn>;
  async runStreamed(input: Input, turnOptions?: TurnOptions): Promise&#x3C;StreamedTurn>;
}

// 이벤트 타입 (exec JSONL 기반)
type ThreadEvent =
  | ThreadStartedEvent    // { type: "thread.started", thread_id }
  | TurnStartedEvent      // { type: "turn.started" }
  | TurnCompletedEvent    // { type: "turn.completed", usage }
  | TurnFailedEvent       // { type: "turn.failed", error }
  | ItemStartedEvent      // { type: "item.started", item }
  | ItemUpdatedEvent      // { type: "item.updated", item }
  | ItemCompletedEvent    // { type: "item.completed", item }
  | ThreadErrorEvent;     // { type: "error", message }

// Item 타입 (7가지 — app-server의 13가지보다 단순화)
type ThreadItem =
  | AgentMessageItem | ReasoningItem | CommandExecutionItem
  | FileChangeItem | McpToolCallItem | WebSearchItem
  | TodoListItem | ErrorItem;
</code></pre>
<p><strong>제약</strong>: 이벤트 이름이 <code>dot-case</code> (<code>item.completed</code>)이고 app-server의 <code>slash-case</code> (<code>item/completed</code>)와 다르다. Item 타입도 13가지 중 7가지만 노출된다. 사실상 app-server protocol의 서브셋을 별도 contract으로 감싼 것이다.</p>
<h3>6.2 Python SDK — app-server wrapper 방식</h3>
<p>Python SDK는 app-server를 stdio subprocess로 띄우고 JSON-RPC 프로토콜을 직접 구현한다. v2 protocol의 모든 method에 typed 메서드를 제공한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-python"># sdk/python/src/codex_app_server/client.py
class AppServerClient:
    """Synchronous typed JSON-RPC client for codex app-server over stdio."""

    def __init__(self, config=None, approval_handler=None): ...
    def start(self) -> None: ...
    def close(self) -> None: ...
    def initialize(self) -> InitializeResponse: ...

    # Thread lifecycle
    def thread_start(self, params=None) -> ThreadStartResponse: ...
    def thread_resume(self, thread_id, params=None) -> ThreadResumeResponse: ...
    def thread_list(self, params=None) -> ThreadListResponse: ...
    def thread_read(self, thread_id, include_turns=False) -> ThreadReadResponse: ...
    def thread_fork(self, thread_id, params=None) -> ThreadForkResponse: ...
    def thread_archive(self, thread_id) -> ThreadArchiveResponse: ...
    def thread_unarchive(self, thread_id) -> ThreadUnarchiveResponse: ...
    def thread_set_name(self, thread_id, name) -> ThreadSetNameResponse: ...
    def thread_compact(self, thread_id) -> ThreadCompactStartResponse: ...

    # Turn lifecycle
    def turn_start(self, thread_id, input_items, params=None) -> TurnStartResponse: ...
    def turn_interrupt(self, thread_id, turn_id) -> TurnInterruptResponse: ...
    def turn_steer(self, thread_id, expected_turn_id, input_items) -> TurnSteerResponse: ...

    # Model
    def model_list(self, include_hidden=False) -> ModelListResponse: ...

    # 편의 메서드
    def wait_for_turn_completed(self, turn_id) -> TurnCompletedNotification: ...
    def stream_until_methods(self, methods) -> list[Notification]: ...
    def stream_text(self, thread_id, text, params=None) -> Iterator[AgentMessageDeltaNotification]: ...

    # ServerRequest 자동 처리
    def _handle_server_request(self, msg) -> JsonObject: ...
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-python"># sdk/python/src/codex_app_server/api.py — 고수준 Codex API
class Codex:
    """Minimal typed SDK surface for app-server v2."""
    def __init__(self, config=None): ...
    def thread_start(self, ...) -> ThreadStartResponse: ...
    def run(self, thread_id, input, ...) -> RunResult: ...
    def run_streamed(self, thread_id, input, ...) -> Iterator[Notification]: ...
    def close(self): ...
</code></pre>
<p><strong>ServerRequest 자동 처리</strong>: Python SDK는 <code>_handle_server_request</code>에서 approval 요청을 자동으로 <code>accept</code>한다. 이것은 SDK 레벨의 opinionated default다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-python">def _default_approval_handler(self, method, params):
    if method == "item/commandExecution/requestApproval":
        return {"decision": "accept"}
    if method == "item/fileChange/requestApproval":
        return {"decision": "accept"}
    return {}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.3 SDK 비교 요약</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TB
    subgraph "TypeScript SDK"
        TS_Codex["Codex"] --> TS_Thread["Thread"]
        TS_Thread --> TS_Exec["CodexExec (subprocess)"]
        TS_Exec --> TS_JSONL["stdout JSONL stream"]
        TS_JSONL --> TS_Events["ThreadEvent (dot-case)"]
    end
    
    subgraph "Python SDK"
        PY_Codex["Codex"] --> PY_Client["AppServerClient"]
        PY_Client --> PY_Proc["subprocess (stdio://)"]
        PY_Proc --> PY_JSONRPC["JSON-RPC v2 protocol"]
        PY_JSONRPC --> PY_Notif["Notification (slash-case)"]
    end
    
    subgraph "Rust Client"
        RS_Client["AppServerClient"] --> RS_InProc["InProcess (mpsc channels)"]
        RS_Client --> RS_Remote["Remote (WebSocket)"]
        RS_InProc --> RS_MP["MessageProcessor"]
        RS_Remote --> RS_MP
    end
</code></pre>
<table>

<td>exec 이벤트 (서브셋)</td>
<td>app-server v2 전체</td>
<td>app-server v2 전체</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>thread 관리</td>
<td>기본 start/resume</td>
<td>전체 lifecycle</td>
<td>전체 lifecycle</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>approval 처리</td>
<td>불가능 (exec이 처리)</td>

</tr>

</tr>

<td>async mpsc</td>

<hr>
<h2>7. 메시지 프로세서 내부 구조</h2>
<h3>7.1 MessageProcessor 계층</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["TransportEvent (incoming)"] --> B["MessageProcessor"]
    B --> C["CodexMessageProcessor"]
    C --> D["ThreadManager (core)"]
    C --> E["ConfigApi"]
    C --> F["FsApi"]
    C --> G["FsWatchManager"]
    C --> H["ExternalAgentConfigApi"]
    B --> I["OutgoingMessageSender"]
    I --> J["OutboundConnectionState"]
    J --> K["transport writer"]
</code></pre>
<p><code>MessageProcessor</code>는 incoming JSON-RPC를 라우팅하는 최상위 디스패처이고, <code>CodexMessageProcessor</code>가 실제 thread/turn/skill 로직을 담당한다. 이 둘 사이에 <code>ConnectionSessionState</code>가 per-connection 상태를 관리한다.</p>
<h3>7.2 app-server 모듈 구성</h3>
<table>

<h2>8. rich client가 꼭 처리해야 하는 것</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/agentMessage/delta</code> — 스트리밍 텍스트 청크</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/tool/call</code> — dynamic tool 역호출 (ServerRequest로 전달됨)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/tool/requestUserInput</code> — elicitation 요청</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/commandExecution/requestApproval</code> — 명령 실행 승인</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/fileChange/requestApproval</code> — 파일 변경 승인</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>item/permissions/requestApproval</code> — 추가 권한 요청</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> collab agent 상태 (<code>CollabAgentToolCall</code> item)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>skills/changed</code> — skill 목록 변경 알림</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>turn/completed</code> — <strong>delivery 보장 대상</strong> (backpressure에도 드롭되지 않음)</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>thread/tokenUsage/updated</code> — 토큰 사용량 추적</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>model/rerouted</code> — 모델 자동 전환 알림</li>
</ul>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>v1/v2 이중 유지</td>
<td>deprecated v1 API가 아직 코드에 남아 있어 정리 비용 발생</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>9. 우리식 포크 추출 전략</h2>
<p>이제 중요한 건 분석을 얼마나 많이 했느냐가 아니라, <strong>무엇을 남기고 무엇을 버리느냐</strong>이다. <code>openai/codex</code>는 기능이 많고 표면도 넓다. 그대로 포크해서 제품으로 밀어 넣으면 우리 제품이 Codex 구조에 끌려가게 된다. 반대로 필요한 층만 정확히 잘라내면, 이미 검증된 프롬프트 조립과 tool runtime과 subagent orchestrator를 빠르게 우리 쪽 자산으로 만들 수 있다.</p>
<p>현재까지 코드를 보고 내린 판단은 명확하다. 우리가 먼저 가져가야 할 것은 CLI가 아니라 core의 중간 층이다. 특히 <code>instructions</code>, <code>contextual_user_message</code>, <code>tools/router</code>, <code>tools/registry</code>, <code>tools/handlers</code>, <code>skills</code>, <code>codex_delegate</code>, <code>app-server-protocol</code>이 핵심이다. 반대로 초기 단계에서 TUI, desktop UX, plugin marketplace, release 스크립트, OS별 포장층은 거의 필요 없다.</p>
<p>추출 전략은 "큰 저장소를 작은 제품으로 줄이는 과정"이라기보다, "이미 분리된 층을 우리 식 경계로 다시 묶는 과정"에 가깝다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["prompt contract"] --> B["tool runtime"]
    B --> C["skill system"]
    B --> D["subagent runtime"]
    C --> E["dependency policy"]
    D --> F["app server control plane"]
    F --> G["our product API"]
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["leave behind"] --> B["TUI and packaging"]
    A --> C["desktop UX"]
    A --> D["marketplace UI"]
    E["extract first"] --> F["instructions and contextual fragments"]
    E --> G["router and registry and handlers"]
    E --> H["skills loader and injector"]
    E --> I["subagent control and protocol"]
</code></pre>
<h3>우선 추출 대상</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>우선순위</th>
<th align="right">묶음</th>
<th>이유</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>1</td>
<td align="right">prompt contract</td>
<td>모델 행동의 기준선이다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>2</td>
<td align="right">tool router and registry</td>
<td>엔진 실행면의 중심이다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>3</td>
<td align="right">핵심 handlers</td>
<td>shell, patch, mcp, dynamic, multi_agents가 실제 기능이다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>4</td>
<td align="right">skills loader and injector</td>
<td>우리식 instruction package 시스템으로 재사용 가능하다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>5</td>
<td align="right">subagent and app-server protocol</td>
<td>협업과 API 표면을 같이 가져갈 수 있다</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>초기 단계에서 버려도 되는 것</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>영역</th>
<th>이유</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>TUI 렌더링</td>
<td>우리 제품 UI와 직접 상관없다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>desktop 앱 경험</td>
<td>제품 코어와 무관하다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>plugin marketplace 전체</td>
<td>나중에 capability catalog로 대체 가능하다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>release와 install 스크립트</td>
<td>포크 핵심이 아니다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>OS별 배포 포장층</td>
<td>제품 백엔드 추출과는 분리된다</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<tr>

<td>subagents</td>
<td><code>codex-rs/core/src/tools/handlers/multi_agents/*</code>, <code>codex-rs/core/src/codex_delegate.rs</code>, <code>codex-rs/app-server-protocol/src/protocol/thread_history.rs</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>추천 추출 단계</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 1단계: prompt contract만 별도 패키지로 분리한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 2단계: tool router와 registry와 핵심 handler를 별도 런타임 crate 또는 모듈로 자른다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 3단계: skill loader와 injector를 붙이되 global config 수정 기능은 잠근다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 4단계: <code>spawn/send/wait</code>만 우선 포함한 subagent control surface를 붙인다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 5단계: app-server protocol을 우리 API와 이어 붙이고 history item을 통일한다</li>
</ul>
<h3>포크 방식 권고</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>방식</th>
<th align="right">권고도</th>
<th>이유</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>

<h3>최종 판단</h3>
<p>우리에게 필요한 것은 "Codex를 쓰는 법"이 아니라 "Codex를 해체하는 법"이다. 지금까지 본 구조만 놓고 보면, 가장 먼저 손대야 할 것은 프롬프트 계약과 tool runtime이고, skill과 subagent는 그 위에 올리는 두 번째 층이다. 이 순서를 지키면 포크가 단순 복제가 아니라 통제 가능한 재조립이 된다.</p>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2025-07-18: 프로토콜 메시지 전체 맵 (ClientRequest 50+개, ServerNotification 40+개, ServerRequest 7개) 상세 추가. 코드 스니펫으로 핵심 데이터 모델(Thread, Turn, ThreadItem, TurnStartParams) 문서화. Transport 계층 (stdio/WebSocket/in-process) Mermaid 다이어그램 추가. Client API 3종 (InProcess, Remote, 통합 enum) 시그니처 상세. Session 관리와 Thread 상태 머신 다이어그램 추가. ThreadHistoryBuilder rollout replay 구조 문서화. SDK 3종 (TypeScript/Python/Rust) 비교표와 코드 스니펫 추가. MessageProcessor 내부 구조와 모듈 구성 정리.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: rich client 표면의 중심이 CLI가 아니라 app-server plus protocol plus client facade라는 점을 정리했다.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: 기존 MVP 판단 문서를 걷어내고, 우리식 포크 추출 우선순위와 단계별 전략을 정리했다.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: app-server surface 문서와 포크 추출 전략 문서를 통합했다.</li>
</ul>
1b:["$","$L28","20-axis-06-surface",{"id":"20-axis-06-surface","order":23,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 06: App surfaces","description":"006_app-server-client-surfaces/06_co_surface.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$40"}}]}]
41:T162ce,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 07: Sandbox &#x26; policy</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — sandbox and execution policy.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>Codex의 명령 실행 제어는 단순히 "허용/거부"가 아니다. 실제 구조는 세 겹이다. <strong>샌드박스</strong>(OS-레벨 격리), <strong>exec-policy</strong>(Starlark 기반 명령 규칙 엔진), <strong>approval routing</strong>(사용자 승인과 guardian 자동 판정)이 겹겹이 쌓여 있다.</li>
<li>샌드박스 타입은 플랫폼별로 다르다. macOS는 <code>seatbelt</code>(sandbox-exec 프로파일), Linux는 <code>bubblewrap</code> + <code>seccomp</code>(네임스페이스 격리 + syscall 필터링), Windows는 restricted token + 전용 사용자 + 방화벽 규칙 기반이다. <code>codex-sandboxing</code> 크레이트가 <code>SandboxType</code>을 결정하고, <code>SandboxExecRequest</code>로 변환해 `c</li>
<li>exec-policy는 더 흥미롭다. <code>codex-execpolicy</code> 크레이트는 <strong>Starlark</strong>(Python-like DSL)로 작성된 <code>.rules</code> 파일을 파싱해 <code>Policy</code>를 만든다. <code>ExecPolicyManager</code>는 config layer stack에서 rules 디렉토리를 precedence 순서로 읽고, 명령을 <code>Decision::Allow | Prompt | Forbidden</code>으로 분류한다. 여기에</li>
<li>approval routing은 <code>AskForApproval</code> 정책에 따라 분기한다. <code>Never</code>, <code>OnFailure</code>, <code>OnRequest</code>, <code>UnlessTrusted</code>, <code>Granular</code> 다섯 가지가 있고, <code>Granular</code>은 sandbox approval과 rules approval을 독립적으로 제어한다. 승인이 필요한 경우 guardian 자동 판정으로 넘어갈 수 있다(→ 12_guardian-approval</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A["model tool call"] --> B["exec-policy rules check"]</li>
<li>B -->|Allow| C["sandbox wrapping"]</li>
<li>B -->|Prompt| D["approval routing"]</li>
<li>B -->|Forbidden| E["reject"]</li>
<li>D -->|user approves| C</li>
<li>D -->|guardian auto-approves| C</li>
</ul>
