<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/sandboxing/src/manager.rs
pub fn get_platform_sandbox(windows_sandbox_enabled: bool) -> Option&#x3C;SandboxType> {
    if cfg!(target_os = "macos") {
        Some(SandboxType::MacosSeatbelt)
    } else if cfg!(target_os = "linux") {
        Some(SandboxType::LinuxSeccomp)
    } else if cfg!(target_os = "windows") {
        if windows_sandbox_enabled {
            Some(SandboxType::WindowsRestrictedToken)
        } else { None }
    } else { None }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/sandboxing/src/policy_transforms.rs
pub fn should_require_platform_sandbox(
    file_system_policy: &#x26;FileSystemSandboxPolicy,
    network_policy: NetworkSandboxPolicy,
    has_managed_network_requirements: bool,
) -> bool {
    if has_managed_network_requirements { return true; }
    if !network_policy.is_enabled() {
        return !matches!(file_system_policy.kind, FileSystemSandboxKind::ExternalSandbox);
    }
    match file_system_policy.kind {
        FileSystemSandboxKind::Restricted => !file_system_policy.has_full_disk_write_access(),
        FileSystemSandboxKind::Unrestricted | FileSystemSandboxKind::ExternalSandbox => false,
    }
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-scheme">; seatbelt_base_policy.sbpl — 발췌
(version 1)
(deny default)                         ; 모든 것을 기본 차단
(allow process-exec)                   ; 자식 프로세스 실행 허용
(allow process-fork)                   ; fork 허용
(allow signal (target same-sandbox))   ; 같은 샌드박스 내 시그널만
(allow sysctl-read                     ; CPU 정보, 커널 버전 등 제한적 sysctl
  (sysctl-name "hw.ncpu")
  (sysctl-name "kern.osversion")
  ;; ... 약 40개 항목
)
(allow pseudo-tty)                     ; PTY 할당 허용
</code></pre>

// 1. 전체 읽기: --ro-bind / /
// 2. 제한 읽기: --tmpfs / 로 시작, 개별 --ro-bind 추가
// 3. --dev /dev (최소 디바이스 노드: null, zero, urandom 등)
// 4. --bind &#x3C;root> &#x3C;root> 로 쓰기 가능 경로 재마운트
// 5. --ro-bind &#x3C;subpath> &#x3C;subpath> 로 보호 하위 경로 복원
</code></pre>

    "--new-session",         // 새 세션 리더
    "--die-with-parent",     // 부모 종료 시 함께 종료

deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_ptrace);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_io_uring_setup);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_io_uring_enter);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_io_uring_register);

// 네트워크 관련 차단
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_connect);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_accept);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_accept4);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_bind);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_listen);

deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_sendmmsg);
// ... shutdown, getpeername, getsockname, recvmmsg, getsockopt, setsockopt

// socket()/socketpair()는 AF_UNIX만 허용
let unix_only_rule = SeccompRule::new(vec![SeccompCondition::new(
    0,                        // 첫 번째 인자 (domain)
    SeccompCmpArgLen::Dword,
    SeccompCmpOp::Ne,
    libc::AF_UNIX as u64,    // AF_UNIX가 아니면 차단
)?])?;
rules.insert(libc::SYS_socket, vec![unix_only_rule]);

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/linux-sandbox/src/landlock.rs
fn install_filesystem_landlock_rules_on_current_thread(
    writable_roots: Vec&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,
) -> Result&#x3C;()> {
    let abi = ABI::V5;
    let access_rw = AccessFs::from_all(abi);
    let access_ro = AccessFs::from_read(abi);
    let mut ruleset = Ruleset::default()
        .handle_access(access_rw)?
        .create()?
        .add_rules(landlock::path_beneath_rules(&#x26;["/"], access_ro))?    // 전체 읽기
        .add_rules(landlock::path_beneath_rules(&#x26;["/dev/null"], access_rw))? // /dev/null 쓰기
        .set_no_new_privs(true);
    if !writable_roots.is_empty() {
        ruleset = ruleset.add_rules(
            landlock::path_beneath_rules(&#x26;writable_roots, access_rw)    // 허용 경로 쓰기
        )?;
    }
    ruleset.restrict_self()?;
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>

pub fn provision_sandbox_users(/* ... */) -> Result&#x3C;()> {

unsafe fn create_token_with_caps_from(
    base_token: HANDLE,
    psid_capabilities: &#x26;[*mut c_void],
) -> Result&#x3C;HANDLE> {
    let flags = DISABLE_MAX_PRIVILEGE   // 모든 특권 비활성화
              | LUA_TOKEN               // Limited User Account
              | WRITE_RESTRICTED;       // 쓰기 제한

    CreateRestrictedToken(
        base_token, flags,
        0, std::ptr::null(),            // SID 비활성화 없음
        0, std::ptr::null(),            // 특권 삭제 없음
        entries.len() as u32,           // 제한 SID: capability + logon + everyone
        entries.as_mut_ptr(),
        &#x26;mut new_token,
    );
    set_default_dacl(new_token, &#x26;dacl_sids)?;   // 파이프 IPC를 위한 DACL
    enable_single_privilege(new_token, "SeChangeNotifyPrivilege")?;
    Ok(new_token)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/windows-sandbox-rs/src/firewall.rs
const OFFLINE_BLOCK_RULE_NAME: &#x26;str = "codex_sandbox_offline_block_outbound";

fn configure_rule(rule: &#x26;INetFwRule3, /* ... */) -> Result&#x3C;()> {
    rule.SetDirection(NET_FW_RULE_DIR_OUT)?;   // 아웃바운드만
    rule.SetAction(NET_FW_ACTION_BLOCK)?;      // 차단
    rule.SetProtocol(NET_FW_IP_PROTOCOL_ANY.0)?;
    rule.SetLocalUserAuthorizedList(&#x26;BSTR::from(local_user_spec))?;
    // read-back 검증: SID가 올바르게 적용됐는지 확인
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["SandboxPolicy&#x3C;br/>(config에서)"] --> C["EffectiveSandboxPermissions"]
    B["PermissionProfile&#x3C;br/>(tool 요청)"] --> C
    C --> D["effective_file_system_policy"]
    C --> E["effective_network_policy"]
    D --> F["플랫폼별 래핑"]
    E --> F
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TB
    subgraph macOS
        M1["sandbox-exec (seatbelt)"]
        M2["SBPL deny-default 프로파일"]
        M3["파라미터화된 경로 정책"]
        M1 --> M2 --> M3
    end
    subgraph Linux
        L1["bubblewrap"]
        L2["네임스페이스 격리&#x3C;br/>user/pid/net"]
        L3["seccomp BPF 필터"]
        L4["Landlock 폴백"]
        L1 --> L2
        L2 --> L3
        L3 -.->|레거시| L4
    end
    subgraph Windows
        W1["setup orchestrator"]
        W2["전용 사용자 생성"]
        W3["CreateRestrictedToken"]
        W4["ACL 기반 파일 접근"]
        W5["방화벽 아웃바운드 차단"]
        W1 --> W2 --> W3
        W3 --> W4
        W3 --> W5
    end
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Codex sandbox and execution policy</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — sandbox and execution policy.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex's command execution control is not simply "allow/deny". The actual structure is three layers. <strong>Sandbox</strong> (OS-level isolation), <strong>exec-policy</strong> (Starlark-based command rule engine), and <strong>approval routing</strong> (user approval and automatic guardian determination) are layered.</p>
<p>Sandbox types vary by platform. macOS is <code>seatbelt</code> (sandbox-exec profile), Linux is <code>bubblewrap</code> + <code>seccomp</code> (namespace isolation + syscall filtering), and Windows is restricted token + dedicated user + firewall rule-based. The <code>codex-sandboxing</code> crate determines the <code>SandboxType</code>, converts it to <code>SandboxExecRequest</code>, and passes it to <code>ExecRequest</code> in <code>core/src/sandboxing/mod.rs</code>. In this process, network policy (<code>NetworkSandboxPolicy</code>) and file system policy (<code>FileSystemSandboxPolicy</code>) are applied together.</p>
<p>exec-policy is more interesting. The <code>codex-execpolicy</code> crate creates a <code>Policy</code> by parsing a <code>.rules</code> file written in <strong>Starlark</strong> (Python-like DSL). <code>ExecPolicyManager</code> reads the rules directory from the config layer stack in precedence order and executes the command <code>Decision::Allow | Prompt | Classified as ‘Forbidden’. Here, </code>is_known_safe_command()<code>(read-only command whitelist) and</code>command_might_be_dangerous()` (dangerous command heuristic) act as fallbacks.</p>
<p>Approval routing branches according to the <code>AskForApproval</code> policy. There are five types: <code>Never</code>, <code>OnFailure</code>, <code>OnRequest</code>, <code>UnlessTrusted</code>, and <code>Granular</code>. <code>Granular</code> independently controls sandbox approval and rules approval. If approval is required, it can proceed to automatic guardian determination (→ see 12_guardian-approval).</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["model tool call"] --> B["exec-policy rules check"]
    B -->|Allow| C["sandbox wrapping"]
    B -->|Prompt| D["approval routing"]
    B -->|Forbidden| E["reject"]
    D -->|user approves| C
    D -->|guardian auto-approves| C
    C --> F["OS sandbox: seatbelt / bubblewrap+seccomp / restricted token"]
    F --> G["process execution"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. Sandbox creation: <code>SandboxManager</code> pipeline</h2>
<p>The key entry point to the sandbox is the <code>SandboxManager</code> in the <code>codex-sandboxing</code> crate. It operates in two steps.</p>
<h3>1.1 Platform detection — <code>get_platform_sandbox()</code></h3>
<p>The compile-time <code>cfg!</code> macro detects the OS and returns the sandbox type for that platform:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/sandboxing/src/manager.rs
pub fn get_platform_sandbox(windows_sandbox_enabled: bool) -> Option&#x3C;SandboxType> {
    if cfg!(target_os = "macos") {
        Some(SandboxType::MacosSeatbelt)
    } else if cfg!(target_os = "linux") {
        Some(SandboxType::LinuxSeccomp)
    } else if cfg!(target_os = "windows") {
        if windows_sandbox_enabled {
            Some(SandboxType::WindowsRestrictedToken)
        } else { None }
    } else { None }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>1.2 Select sandbox type — <code>select_initial()</code></h3>
<p>Determines whether to activate the sandbox according to <code>SandboxablePreference</code> (Auto/Require/Forbid). In <code>Auto</code> mode, <code>should_require_platform_sandbox()</code> checks filesystem and network policies and activates the platform sandbox only if restrictions are needed:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/sandboxing/src/policy_transforms.rs
pub fn should_require_platform_sandbox(
    file_system_policy: &#x26;FileSystemSandboxPolicy,
    network_policy: NetworkSandboxPolicy,
    has_managed_network_requirements: bool,
) -> bool {
    if has_managed_network_requirements { return true; }
    if !network_policy.is_enabled() {
        return !matches!(file_system_policy.kind, FileSystemSandboxKind::ExternalSandbox);
    }
    match file_system_policy.kind {
        FileSystemSandboxKind::Restricted => !file_system_policy.has_full_disk_write_access(),
        FileSystemSandboxKind::Unrestricted | FileSystemSandboxKind::ExternalSandbox => false,
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>1.3 Transform — <code>SandboxManager::transform()</code></h3>
<p>Receives <code>SandboxTransformRequest</code> and creates a final <code>SandboxExecRequest</code>. In this process, additional permissions (the tool's <code>PermissionProfile</code>) are merged with the existing policy and platform-specific wrapping instructions are created:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["SandboxTransformRequest"] --> B["EffectiveSandboxPermissions 계산"]
    B --> C{"SandboxType?"}
    C -->|MacosSeatbelt| D["sandbox-exec -p &#x26;lt;SBPL&#x26;gt; -- cmd"]
    C -->|LinuxSeccomp| E["codex-linux-sandbox --sandbox-policy ... -- cmd"]
    C -->|WindowsRestrictedToken| F["restricted token으로 프로세스 생성"]
    C -->|None| G["원본 명령 그대로"]
    D --> H["SandboxExecRequest"]
    E --> H
    F --> H
    G --> H
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>2. Sandbox implementation for each platform</h2>
<h3>2.1 macOS — Seatbelt (<code>sandbox-exec</code>)</h3>
<p>On macOS, Apple's Seatbelt profile is applied through <code>/usr/bin/sandbox-exec</code>. Prevent PATH injection attacks by hardcoding the path:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/sandboxing/src/seatbelt.rs
pub const MACOS_PATH_TO_SEATBELT_EXECUTABLE: &#x26;str = "/usr/bin/sandbox-exec";
</code></pre>
<h4>2.1.1 SBPL profile structure</h4>
<p>Three <code>.sbpl</code> files are included at compile time with <code>include_str!</code>:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>file</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>seatbelt_base_policy.sbpl</code></td>
<td>Based on <code>(deny default)</code> — Allows minimal process forking, sysctl reading, PTY, IOKit, etc.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>seatbelt_network_policy.sbpl</code></td>
<td>Allow additional TLS certificate lookup, DNS settings reading, etc. when network is active</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>restricted_read_only_platform_defaults.sbpl</code></td>
<td>platform default read path</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>The core of the default policy</strong> (inspired by Chrome sandbox policies):</p>
<pre><code class="language-scheme">; seatbelt_base_policy.sbpl — 발췌
(version 1)
(deny default)                         ; 모든 것을 기본 차단
(allow process-exec)                   ; 자식 프로세스 실행 허용
(allow process-fork)                   ; fork 허용
(allow signal (target same-sandbox))   ; 같은 샌드박스 내 시그널만
(allow sysctl-read                     ; CPU 정보, 커널 버전 등 제한적 sysctl
  (sysctl-name "hw.ncpu")
  (sysctl-name "kern.osversion")
  ;; ... 약 40개 항목
)
(allow pseudo-tty)                     ; PTY 할당 허용
</code></pre>
<h4>2.1.2 Dynamic file system policy</h4>
<p><code>create_seatbelt_command_args_for_policies_with_extensions()</code> combines SBPL policies at runtime. Core logic:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Read policy</strong>: Parameterize the allowed path in the form <code>(allow file-read* (subpath (param "READABLE_ROOT_0")))</code></li>
<li><strong>Write policy</strong>: <code>(allow file-write* (regex #"^/"))</code> when allowing full writing, <code>WRITABLE_ROOT_N</code> parameter when restricting</li>
<li><strong>unreadable path exclusion</strong>: Exclude sensitive directories from writable root with <code>(require-not (subpath ...))</code> combination.</li>
</ul>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 정책 조합 순서 — seatbelt.rs 발췌
let mut policy_sections = vec![
    MACOS_SEATBELT_BASE_POLICY.to_string(),   // deny default 기반
    file_read_policy,                          // 읽기 허용 경로
    file_write_policy,                         // 쓰기 허용 경로
    network_policy,                            // 네트워크 정책
];
if include_platform_defaults {
    policy_sections.push(MACOS_RESTRICTED_READ_ONLY_PLATFORM_DEFAULTS.to_string());
}
</code></pre>
<p>Final command: <code>sandbox-exec -p &#x3C;full_policy> -DREADABLE_ROOT_0=/path -DWRITABLE_ROOT_0=/path -- &#x3C;command></code></p>
<h4>2.1.3 Network Policy</h4>
<p>Network policy branches into three modes:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Conditions</th>
<th>Action</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Has proxy environment variable</td>
<td>Allow loopback only for proxy ports + network policy</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Network active, no proxy</td>
<td><code>(allow network-outbound)</code> + <code>(allow network-inbound)</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>network inactive</td>
<td>No network rules (default deny)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Unix domain sockets are controlled with <code>AllowAll</code> or a per-path allowlist:</p>
<pre><code class="language-scheme">; 경로별 allowlist 예시 — 동적 생성
(allow system-socket (socket-domain AF_UNIX))
(allow network-bind (local unix-socket (subpath (param "UNIX_SOCKET_PATH_0"))))
(allow network-outbound (remote unix-socket (subpath (param "UNIX_SOCKET_PATH_0"))))
</code></pre>
<h3>2.2 Linux — Bubblewrap + Seccomp</h3>
<p>The Linux sandbox overlaps two layers: <strong>bubblewrap</strong> (filesystem namespace isolation) and <strong>seccomp</strong> (syscall filtering). Landlock remains a legacy fallback.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["codex-linux-sandbox 진입"] --> B{"--use-legacy-landlock?"}
    B -->|Yes| C["Landlock + seccomp 직접 적용"]
    B -->|No| D["bubblewrap 래핑"]
    D --> E["bwrap --new-session --die-with-parent ..."]
    E --> F["내부: --apply-seccomp-then-exec"]
    F --> G["PR_SET_NO_NEW_PRIVS + seccomp 필터 설치"]
    G --> H["execvp(command)"]
    C --> G
</code></pre>
<h4>2.2.1 Bubblewrap file system isolation</h4>
<p><code>create_bwrap_command_args()</code> determines the filesystem mount structure:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/linux-sandbox/src/bwrap.rs — 마운트 순서
// 1. 전체 읽기: --ro-bind / /
// 2. 제한 읽기: --tmpfs / 로 시작, 개별 --ro-bind 추가
// 3. --dev /dev (최소 디바이스 노드: null, zero, urandom 등)
// 4. --bind &#x3C;root> &#x3C;root> 로 쓰기 가능 경로 재마운트
// 5. --ro-bind &#x3C;subpath> &#x3C;subpath> 로 보호 하위 경로 복원
</code></pre>
<p>Namespace isolation flags:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 기본 bubblewrap 플래그 — bwrap.rs
vec![
    "--new-session",         // 새 세션 리더
    "--die-with-parent",     // 부모 종료 시 함께 종료
    "--unshare-user",        // 사용자 네임스페이스 분리
    "--unshare-pid",         // PID 네임스페이스 분리
    "--unshare-net",         // 네트워크 차단 시에만 추가
    "--proc", "/proc",       // 새 /proc 마운트
]
</code></pre>
<p>Platform default read path (automatically added in restricted mode):</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">const LINUX_PLATFORM_DEFAULT_READ_ROOTS: &#x26;[&#x26;str] = &#x26;[
    "/bin", "/sbin", "/usr", "/etc", "/lib", "/lib64",
    "/nix/store", "/run/current-system/sw",
];
</code></pre>
<p>The Bubblewrap executor will try the system <code>/usr/bin/bwrap</code> first, and fall back to the vendored bwrap if it is an older version that does not support <code>--argv0</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/linux-sandbox/src/launcher.rs
fn preferred_bwrap_launcher_for_path(system_bwrap_path: &#x26;Path) -> BubblewrapLauncher {
    if !system_bwrap_supports_argv0(system_bwrap_path) {
        return BubblewrapLauncher::Vendored;
    }
    BubblewrapLauncher::System(/* ... */)
}
</code></pre>
<h4>2.2.2 Seccomp syscall filtering</h4>
<p>If network blocking is necessary, the seccomp BPF filter is installed. There are two modes:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/linux-sandbox/src/landlock.rs
enum NetworkSeccompMode {
    Restricted,    // 모든 네트워크 syscall 차단, AF_UNIX만 허용
    ProxyRouted,   // AF_INET/INET6만 허용 (프록시 브릿지용), AF_UNIX 차단
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Restricted mode</strong> — List of syscalls to block:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 무조건 차단
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_ptrace);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_io_uring_setup);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_io_uring_enter);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_io_uring_register);

// 네트워크 관련 차단
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_connect);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_accept);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_accept4);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_bind);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_listen);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_sendto);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_sendmmsg);
// ... shutdown, getpeername, getsockname, recvmmsg, getsockopt, setsockopt

// socket()/socketpair()는 AF_UNIX만 허용
let unix_only_rule = SeccompRule::new(vec![SeccompCondition::new(
    0,                        // 첫 번째 인자 (domain)
    SeccompCmpArgLen::Dword,
    SeccompCmpOp::Ne,
    libc::AF_UNIX as u64,    // AF_UNIX가 아니면 차단
)?])?;
rules.insert(libc::SYS_socket, vec![unix_only_rule]);
</code></pre>
<p>Create a seccomp filter:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">let filter = SeccompFilter::new(
    rules,
    SeccompAction::Allow,                     // 기본: 허용
    SeccompAction::Errno(libc::EPERM as u32), // 규칙 매치 시: EPERM 반환
    TargetArch::x86_64,                       // 또는 aarch64
)?;
let prog: BpfProgram = filter.try_into()?;
apply_filter(&#x26;prog)?;
</code></pre>
<h4>2.2.3 Landlock legacy fallback</h4>
<p>Landlock ABI V5 based file system limitations. Currently bubblewrap is the default, but can be enabled with the <code>--use-legacy-landlock</code> flag:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/linux-sandbox/src/landlock.rs
fn install_filesystem_landlock_rules_on_current_thread(
    writable_roots: Vec&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,
) -> Result&#x3C;()> {
    let abi = ABI::V5;
    let access_rw = AccessFs::from_all(abi);
    let access_ro = AccessFs::from_read(abi);
    let mut ruleset = Ruleset::default()
        .handle_access(access_rw)?
        .create()?
        .add_rules(landlock::path_beneath_rules(&#x26;["/"], access_ro))?    // 전체 읽기
        .add_rules(landlock::path_beneath_rules(&#x26;["/dev/null"], access_rw))? // /dev/null 쓰기
        .set_no_new_privs(true);
    if !writable_roots.is_empty() {
        ruleset = ruleset.add_rules(
            landlock::path_beneath_rules(&#x26;writable_roots, access_rw)    // 허용 경로 쓰기
        )?;
    }
    ruleset.restrict_self()?;
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.3 Windows — Restricted Token + Firewall</h3>
<p>Windows Sandbox is the most complex. Create a dedicated local user, isolate the file system with restricted tokens and ACLs, and block the network with Windows Firewall rules.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["setup_orchestrator 실행"] --> B["전용 사용자 생성"]
    B --> B1["CodexSandboxOffline — 네트워크 차단"]
    B --> B2["CodexSandboxOnline — 네트워크 허용"]
    B1 --> C["방화벽 규칙 설치"]
    B2 --> C
    C --> D["ACL 설정 — 읽기/쓰기 경로 제어"]
    D --> E["CreateRestrictedToken"]
    E --> F["restricted token으로 프로세스 실행"]
</code></pre>
<h4>2.3.1 Dedicated user provisioning</h4>
<p>Create two local users and add them to the <code>CodexSandboxUsers</code> group:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/windows-sandbox-rs/src/setup_orchestrator.rs
pub const OFFLINE_USERNAME: &#x26;str = "CodexSandboxOffline";
pub const ONLINE_USERNAME: &#x26;str = "CodexSandboxOnline";

// codex-rs/windows-sandbox-rs/src/sandbox_users.rs
pub fn provision_sandbox_users(/* ... */) -> Result&#x3C;()> {
    ensure_sandbox_users_group(log)?;
    let offline_password = random_password();   // 24자 랜덤 비밀번호
    let online_password = random_password();
    ensure_sandbox_user(offline_username, &#x26;offline_password, log)?;
    ensure_sandbox_user(online_username, &#x26;online_password, log)?;
    write_secrets(codex_home, /* ... */)?;       // DPAPI로 암호화 저장
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>
<p>Automatically exclude sensitive directories (when reading user profile):</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">const USERPROFILE_READ_ROOT_EXCLUSIONS: &#x26;[&#x26;str] = &#x26;[
    ".ssh", ".gnupg", ".aws", ".azure", ".kube",
    ".docker", ".config", ".npm", ".pki", ".terraform.d",
];
</code></pre>
<h4>2.3.2 Restricted Token Generation</h4>
<p>Create a least-privilege token with the <code>CreateRestrictedToken</code> Win32 API:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/windows-sandbox-rs/src/token.rs
unsafe fn create_token_with_caps_from(
    base_token: HANDLE,
    psid_capabilities: &#x26;[*mut c_void],
) -> Result&#x3C;HANDLE> {
    let flags = DISABLE_MAX_PRIVILEGE   // 모든 특권 비활성화
              | LUA_TOKEN               // Limited User Account
              | WRITE_RESTRICTED;       // 쓰기 제한

    CreateRestrictedToken(
        base_token, flags,
        0, std::ptr::null(),            // SID 비활성화 없음
        0, std::ptr::null(),            // 특권 삭제 없음
        entries.len() as u32,           // 제한 SID: capability + logon + everyone
        entries.as_mut_ptr(),
        &#x26;mut new_token,
    );
    set_default_dacl(new_token, &#x26;dacl_sids)?;   // 파이프 IPC를 위한 DACL
    enable_single_privilege(new_token, "SeChangeNotifyPrivilege")?;
    Ok(new_token)
}
</code></pre>
<h4>2.3.3 Firewall Rules</h4>
<p>Block outbound traffic from offline users using the Windows Firewall COM API:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/windows-sandbox-rs/src/firewall.rs
const OFFLINE_BLOCK_RULE_NAME: &#x26;str = "codex_sandbox_offline_block_outbound";

fn configure_rule(rule: &#x26;INetFwRule3, /* ... */) -> Result&#x3C;()> {
    rule.SetDirection(NET_FW_RULE_DIR_OUT)?;   // 아웃바운드만
    rule.SetAction(NET_FW_ACTION_BLOCK)?;      // 차단
    rule.SetProtocol(NET_FW_IP_PROTOCOL_ANY.0)?;
    rule.SetLocalUserAuthorizedList(&#x26;BSTR::from(local_user_spec))?;
    // read-back 검증: SID가 올바르게 적용됐는지 확인
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. Policy transformation pipeline</h2>
<p><code>EffectiveSandboxPermissions</code> in <code>policy_transforms.rs</code> merges the base policy with tool-specific additional permissions:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["SandboxPolicy&#x3C;br/>(config에서)"] --> C["EffectiveSandboxPermissions"]
    B["PermissionProfile&#x3C;br/>(tool 요청)"] --> C
    C --> D["effective_file_system_policy"]
    C --> E["effective_network_policy"]
    D --> F["플랫폼별 래핑"]
    E --> F
</code></pre>
<p>Merge rules:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>File System</strong>: Add the read/write path requested by the tool to the existing policy (only in Restricted mode)</li>
<li><strong>Network</strong>: Promote to <code>NetworkSandboxPolicy::Enabled</code> if the tool requests a network, otherwise demote it to <code>Restricted</code>.</li>
<li><strong>macOS extension</strong>: intersection/merge seatbelt profile extension</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<td>No approval UI → Allowed when sandbox is disabled, otherwise prohibited</td>

<td>Run in sandbox, approve on failure</td>
</tr>
<tr>

</tr>

</tr>

<h2>5. Security comparison by platform</h2>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TB
    subgraph macOS
        M1["sandbox-exec (seatbelt)"]
        M2["SBPL deny-default 프로파일"]
        M3["파라미터화된 경로 정책"]
        M1 --> M2 --> M3
    end
    subgraph Linux
        L1["bubblewrap"]
        L2["네임스페이스 격리&#x3C;br/>user/pid/net"]
        L3["seccomp BPF 필터"]
        L4["Landlock 폴백"]
        L1 --> L2
        L2 --> L3
        L3 -.->|레거시| L4
    end
    subgraph Windows
        W1["setup orchestrator"]
        W2["전용 사용자 생성"]
        W3["CreateRestrictedToken"]
        W4["ACL 기반 파일 접근"]
        W5["방화벽 아웃바운드 차단"]
        W1 --> W2 --> W3
        W3 --> W4
        W3 --> W5
    end
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>side</th>
<th>macOS</th>
<th>Linux</th>
<th>Windows</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>File system isolation</td>
<td>SBPL <code>file-read*</code>/<code>file-write*</code> rules</td>
<td>bubblewrap bind mount (or Landlock)</td>
<td>ACL + restricted token DACL</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>network isolation</td>
<td>SBPL <code>network-outbound</code> deny</td>
<td>seccomp connect/bind/listen block + <code>--unshare-net</code></td>
<td>Windows Firewall outbound blocking rules</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Process Isolation</td>
<td><code>same-sandbox</code> signal restriction</td>
<td>Separate PID namespace</td>
<td>Separate user sessions</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Prevent privilege escalation</td>
<td>sandbox-exec limits itself</td>
<td><code>PR_SET_NO_NEW_PRIVS</code></td>
<td><code>DISABLE_MAX_PRIVILEGE | LUA_TOKEN</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>proxy support</td>
<td>Allow loopback per port + unix socket</td>
<td><code>ProxyRouted</code> seccomp mode + network bridge</td>
<td>online/offline user separation</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<hr>
<h2>6. Fork perspective</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The exec-policy engine is already separated into an independent crate (<code>codex-execpolicy</code>), making it easy to reuse.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>is_known_safe_command</code> and <code>command_might_be_dangerous</code> are worth taking</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The sandbox type determination logic is isolated in the <code>codex-sandboxing</code> crate.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Routing approval is combined with guardian and must be viewed together.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Linux sandbox has a dual structure of bubblewrap → seccomp, and each can be independently reused.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Windows Sandbox tightly combines three axes: user provisioning + token + firewall.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> You need to decide whether to use the Starlark DSL as is or change to a simpler rule format.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Need to review the distribution trade-off of bubblewrap vendoring strategy (system bwrap vs. bundle bwrap)</li>
</ul>
<hr>

<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: Sandbox type, exec-policy engine, and approval routing were organized into a triple structure.</li>
<li>2026-07-14: Added in-depth analysis based on source code — macOS seatbelt SBPL creation logic, Linux bubblewrap+seccomp dual layer (syscall filter details), Windows restricted token+firewall+dedicated user provisioning, policy transformation pipeline, security comparison table by platform, 5 Mermaid diagrams, and 20 code snippets added.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Latest update (2026-05-30)</h2>
<p>It reflects key changes related to the sandbox in the most recent 412 commits (2026-05-15 ~ 2026-05-29).</p>
<h3>Windows Sandbox major refactoring: PermissionProfile-centric shift</h3>
<p>The Windows Sandbox execution path has been completely converted from the legacy <code>SandboxPolicy</code> base to the <code>PermissionProfile</code> + <code>ResolvedWindowsSandboxPermissions</code> system. It is a gradual migration in seven stages.</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Introduction of <code>ResolvedWindowsSandboxPermissions</code></strong> (<code>windows-sandbox-rs/src/resolved_permissions.rs</code>, #22896): A new structure was created to interpret <code>PermissionProfile</code> for Windows Runtime. <code>try_from_permission_profile()</code> accepts only <code>Managed</code> profiles and includes the <code>FileSystemSandboxKind::Restricted</code> validation. `WindowsSandboxTokenMode::ReadOnlyCapability | Determination of WritableRootsCapability is also handled in this layer.</li>
<li><strong>Write Root Switch</strong> (#22923): ACL-based write path creation has been changed to consume <code>ResolvedWindowsSandboxPermissions::writable_roots_for_cwd()</code> directly. The deny glob rule that was missing in the legacy <code>SandboxPolicy</code> projection is reflected.</li>
<li><strong>Setup Switch</strong> (#23167): Gathering read/write roots in elevated setup has been changed to <code>gather_read_roots()</code> / <code>gather_write_roots_for_permissions()</code>, which derive directly from resolved permissions.</li>
<li><strong>elevated runner IPC</strong> (#22918, #23715): <code>SpawnRequest</code> has been updated to IPC protocol v2 to pass <code>permission_profile</code> + <code>permission_profile_cwd</code> fields.</li>
<li><strong>Remove SandboxPolicy runner plumbing</strong> (#23813): Delete <code>windows-sandbox-rs/src/policy.rs</code>. The restricted-token capture, session setup, world-writable audit, read-root grant, and command-runner session APIs all directly accept <code>PermissionProfile</code>. Complete removal of legacy <code>policy_json_or_preset</code> field from IPC protocol v2. 22 files, net -251 lines.</li>
<li><strong>Propagate workspace roots</strong> (#24108): Thread <code>workspace_roots: Vec&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf></code> instead of a single <code>permission_profile_cwd</code>. The <code>:workspace_roots</code> symbolic item is materialized for all runtime roots with <code>materialize_project_roots_with_workspace_roots()</code>. Bump to IPC protocol v3. The <code>windows_sandbox_workspace_roots</code> explicit argument has been added to <code>ExecRequest::new()</code> to prevent implicit fallback.</li>
<li><strong>Capture cancellation fix</strong> (#24974): Fixed an issue where test root settings were broken after switching workspace roots.</li>
</ol>
<h3>Introduction of WFP Network Isolation</h3>
<p>In addition to firewall rules based on the Windows Firewall COM API (<code>INetFwRule3</code>), a <strong>Windows Filtering Platform (WFP)</strong> kernel filter was added (#20101).</p>
<ul>
<li><code>windows-sandbox-rs/src/wfp.rs</code>: <code>FwpmEngineOpen0</code> → Install persistent provider/sublayer/filter within the transaction.</li>
<li><code>windows-sandbox-rs/src/wfp/filter_specs.rs</code>: Define filter specifications declaratively. Register WFP filters such as ICMP connect/assign (v4/v6) and DNS port 53 (v4/v6) as <code>FWPM_FILTER_FLAG_PERSISTENT</code>.</li>
<li><code>windows-sandbox-rs/src/wfp_setup.rs</code>: Calls <code>install_wfp_filters_for_account()</code> in the elevated setup helper, and issues non-fatal logging + OTel metrics (<code>codex.windows_sandbox.wfp_setup_*</code>) upon failure.</li>
<li>Firewall policy validation (#22353): Checks <code>INetFwPolicy2::LocalPolicyModifyState</code> and fails elevated setup if the local firewall policy is ignored on the managed host.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Guardian Circuit Breaker InterruptTurn Action</h3>
<p><code>GuardianRejectionCircuitBreaker</code> (<code>core/src/guardian/mod.rs</code>) triggers a turn interruption. It was a structure introduced outside the previous 412 scope, but within this scope, Guardian prompt cache key stabilization (#24891~#24895), review metrics (#24897), runtime permission profile update (#22931), and auto-review permission profile override modification (#23956) were applied.</p>
<p>Core flow: When calling <code>record_denial()</code>, returns <code>InterruptTurn</code> if the threshold of 3 consecutive rejections (<code>MAX_CONSECUTIVE_GUARDIAN_DENIALS_PER_TURN</code>) or 10 rejections out of the last 50 reviews (<code>MAX_RECENT_AUTO_REVIEW_DENIALS_PER_TURN</code>) is exceeded. <code>record_guardian_denial()</code> in <code>review.rs</code> receives this, issues a <code>GuardianWarning</code> event, and aborts the turn with <code>abort_turn_if_active(turn_id, TurnAbortReason::Interrupted)</code>.</p>
<h3>deny-read sandboxing preservation</h3>
<p>Fixed a bug where the <code>access = none</code>(deny) read restriction in the permission profile was missing from the safe command bypass (#23943). Even commands allowed with <code>is_known_safe_command()</code> (<code>cat</code>, <code>ls</code>, etc.) remain sandboxed if the deny-read item (<code>**/*.env</code>, etc.) is enabled. The same logic applies to the execpolicy <code>allow</code> rule. A modification to the deny-read glob interpretation of cloud requirements (#23729) has also been included.</p>
<h3>Sandbox cancellation when Windows network is rejected</h3>
<p>If the Guardian or network proxy denies network access, execution is canceled through <code>ExecExpiration</code>, but the Windows Sandbox capture path was propagating only the timeout component (#19880). With this fix, network rejection will also result in an immediate shutdown.</p>
<h3>Other sandbox-related changes</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Windows deny-read parity</strong> (#18202): The <code>access = none</code> read restriction supported only on macOS/Linux also applies to Windows. However, the unelevated restricted-token backend cannot force read denial, so it is processed as fail-closed.</li>
<li><strong>Specify write-root capability SID range</strong> (#21479): Limit the capability SID of legacy/elevated tokens to only the effective write root.</li>
<li><strong>Linux sandbox shell cleanup preserved</strong> (#22729): Fix shell cleanup script to run on interrupt.</li>
<li><strong>bundled bwrap installation context</strong> (#23634): Interpret the vendored bwrap binary path in the installation context.</li>
<li><strong>Unix socket deny configuration</strong> (#24970): Correctly apply the <code>deny</code> rule to Unix socket permissions.</li>
<li><strong>Windows sandbox log improvements</strong>: rolling file rotation (#24117) + attach log to feedback report (#24623).</li>
<li><strong>Windows sandbox firewall validation</strong> (#22353): Handle setup failure when firewall policy is invalid on managed hosts.</li>
</ul>

<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>

</blockquote>
<h1>Codex 샌드박스와 실행 정책</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — sandbox and execution policy.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex의 명령 실행 제어는 단순히 "허용/거부"가 아니다. 실제 구조는 세 겹이다. <strong>샌드박스</strong>(OS-레벨 격리), <strong>exec-policy</strong>(Starlark 기반 명령 규칙 엔진), <strong>approval routing</strong>(사용자 승인과 guardian 자동 판정)이 겹겹이 쌓여 있다.</p>
<p>샌드박스 타입은 플랫폼별로 다르다. macOS는 <code>seatbelt</code>(sandbox-exec 프로파일), Linux는 <code>bubblewrap</code> + <code>seccomp</code>(네임스페이스 격리 + syscall 필터링), Windows는 restricted token + 전용 사용자 + 방화벽 규칙 기반이다. <code>codex-sandboxing</code> 크레이트가 <code>SandboxType</code>을 결정하고, <code>SandboxExecRequest</code>로 변환해 <code>core/src/sandboxing/mod.rs</code>의 <code>ExecRequest</code>로 넘긴다. 이 과정에서 네트워크 정책(<code>NetworkSandboxPolicy</code>)과 파일시스템 정책(<code>FileSystemSandboxPolicy</code>)이 함께 적용된다.</p>
<p>exec-policy는 더 흥미롭다. <code>codex-execpolicy</code> 크레이트는 <strong>Starlark</strong>(Python-like DSL)로 작성된 <code>.rules</code> 파일을 파싱해 <code>Policy</code>를 만든다. <code>ExecPolicyManager</code>는 config layer stack에서 rules 디렉토리를 precedence 순서로 읽고, 명령을 <code>Decision::Allow | Prompt | Forbidden</code>으로 분류한다. 여기에 <code>is_known_safe_command()</code>(읽기 전용 명령 화이트리스트)와 <code>command_might_be_dangerous()</code>(위험 명령 휴리스틱)가 fallback으로 작동한다.</p>
<p>approval routing은 <code>AskForApproval</code> 정책에 따라 분기한다. <code>Never</code>, <code>OnFailure</code>, <code>OnRequest</code>, <code>UnlessTrusted</code>, <code>Granular</code> 다섯 가지가 있고, <code>Granular</code>은 sandbox approval과 rules approval을 독립적으로 제어한다. 승인이 필요한 경우 guardian 자동 판정으로 넘어갈 수 있다(→ 12_guardian-approval 참조).</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["model tool call"] --> B["exec-policy rules check"]
    B -->|Allow| C["sandbox wrapping"]
    B -->|Prompt| D["approval routing"]
    B -->|Forbidden| E["reject"]
    D -->|user approves| C
    D -->|guardian auto-approves| C
    C --> F["OS sandbox: seatbelt / bubblewrap+seccomp / restricted token"]
    F --> G["process execution"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>1. 샌드박스 생성: <code>SandboxManager</code> 파이프라인</h2>
<p>샌드박스의 핵심 진입점은 <code>codex-sandboxing</code> 크레이트의 <code>SandboxManager</code>다. 두 단계로 동작한다.</p>
<h3>1.1 플랫폼 감지 — <code>get_platform_sandbox()</code></h3>
<p>컴파일 타임 <code>cfg!</code> 매크로로 OS를 감지하고, 해당 플랫폼의 샌드박스 타입을 반환한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/sandboxing/src/manager.rs
pub fn get_platform_sandbox(windows_sandbox_enabled: bool) -> Option&#x3C;SandboxType> {
    if cfg!(target_os = "macos") {
        Some(SandboxType::MacosSeatbelt)
    } else if cfg!(target_os = "linux") {
        Some(SandboxType::LinuxSeccomp)
    } else if cfg!(target_os = "windows") {
        if windows_sandbox_enabled {
            Some(SandboxType::WindowsRestrictedToken)
        } else { None }
    } else { None }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>1.2 샌드박스 타입 선택 — <code>select_initial()</code></h3>
<p><code>SandboxablePreference</code>(Auto/Require/Forbid)에 따라 샌드박스 활성화 여부를 결정한다. <code>Auto</code> 모드에서는 <code>should_require_platform_sandbox()</code>가 파일시스템·네트워크 정책을 검사해, 제한이 필요한 경우에만 플랫폼 샌드박스를 활성화한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/sandboxing/src/policy_transforms.rs
pub fn should_require_platform_sandbox(
    file_system_policy: &#x26;FileSystemSandboxPolicy,
    network_policy: NetworkSandboxPolicy,
    has_managed_network_requirements: bool,
) -> bool {
    if has_managed_network_requirements { return true; }
    if !network_policy.is_enabled() {
        return !matches!(file_system_policy.kind, FileSystemSandboxKind::ExternalSandbox);
    }
    match file_system_policy.kind {
        FileSystemSandboxKind::Restricted => !file_system_policy.has_full_disk_write_access(),
        FileSystemSandboxKind::Unrestricted | FileSystemSandboxKind::ExternalSandbox => false,
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>1.3 변환 — <code>SandboxManager::transform()</code></h3>
<p><code>SandboxTransformRequest</code>를 받아 최종 <code>SandboxExecRequest</code>를 생성한다. 이 과정에서 추가 권한(tool의 <code>PermissionProfile</code>)이 기존 정책과 병합되고, 플랫폼별 래핑 명령이 생성된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["SandboxTransformRequest"] --> B["EffectiveSandboxPermissions 계산"]
    B --> C{"SandboxType?"}
    C -->|MacosSeatbelt| D["sandbox-exec -p &#x26;lt;SBPL&#x26;gt; -- cmd"]
    C -->|LinuxSeccomp| E["codex-linux-sandbox --sandbox-policy ... -- cmd"]
    C -->|WindowsRestrictedToken| F["restricted token으로 프로세스 생성"]
    C -->|None| G["원본 명령 그대로"]
    D --> H["SandboxExecRequest"]
    E --> H
    F --> H
    G --> H
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>2. 플랫폼별 샌드박스 구현</h2>
<h3>2.1 macOS — Seatbelt (<code>sandbox-exec</code>)</h3>
<p>macOS에서는 <code>/usr/bin/sandbox-exec</code>을 통해 Apple의 Seatbelt 프로파일을 적용한다. 경로를 하드코딩해 PATH 주입 공격을 방어한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/sandboxing/src/seatbelt.rs
pub const MACOS_PATH_TO_SEATBELT_EXECUTABLE: &#x26;str = "/usr/bin/sandbox-exec";
</code></pre>
<h4>2.1.1 SBPL 프로파일 구조</h4>
<p>세 개의 <code>.sbpl</code> 파일이 <code>include_str!</code>로 컴파일 타임에 포함된다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>파일</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>seatbelt_base_policy.sbpl</code></td>
<td><code>(deny default)</code> 기반 — 프로세스 포크, sysctl 읽기, PTY, IOKit 등 최소 허용</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>seatbelt_network_policy.sbpl</code></td>
<td>네트워크 활성 시 TLS 인증서 조회, DNS 설정 읽기 등 추가 허용</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>restricted_read_only_platform_defaults.sbpl</code></td>
<td>플랫폼 기본 읽기 경로</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>기본 정책의 핵심</strong>(Chrome 샌드박스 정책에서 영감):</p>
<pre><code class="language-scheme">; seatbelt_base_policy.sbpl — 발췌
(version 1)
(deny default)                         ; 모든 것을 기본 차단
(allow process-exec)                   ; 자식 프로세스 실행 허용
(allow process-fork)                   ; fork 허용
(allow signal (target same-sandbox))   ; 같은 샌드박스 내 시그널만
(allow sysctl-read                     ; CPU 정보, 커널 버전 등 제한적 sysctl
  (sysctl-name "hw.ncpu")
  (sysctl-name "kern.osversion")
  ;; ... 약 40개 항목
)
(allow pseudo-tty)                     ; PTY 할당 허용
</code></pre>
<h4>2.1.2 동적 파일시스템 정책</h4>
<p><code>create_seatbelt_command_args_for_policies_with_extensions()</code>가 런타임에 SBPL 정책을 조합한다. 핵심 로직:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>읽기 정책</strong>: <code>(allow file-read* (subpath (param "READABLE_ROOT_0")))</code> 형태로 허용 경로를 파라미터화</li>
<li><strong>쓰기 정책</strong>: 전체 쓰기 허용 시 <code>(allow file-write* (regex #"^/"))</code>, 제한 시 <code>WRITABLE_ROOT_N</code> 파라미터</li>
<li><strong>unreadable 경로 차감</strong>: <code>(require-not (subpath ...))</code> 조합으로 민감 디렉토리를 쓰기 가능 루트에서 제외</li>
</ul>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 정책 조합 순서 — seatbelt.rs 발췌
let mut policy_sections = vec![
    MACOS_SEATBELT_BASE_POLICY.to_string(),   // deny default 기반
    file_read_policy,                          // 읽기 허용 경로
    file_write_policy,                         // 쓰기 허용 경로
    network_policy,                            // 네트워크 정책
];
if include_platform_defaults {
    policy_sections.push(MACOS_RESTRICTED_READ_ONLY_PLATFORM_DEFAULTS.to_string());
}
</code></pre>
<p>최종 명령: <code>sandbox-exec -p &#x3C;full_policy> -DREADABLE_ROOT_0=/path -DWRITABLE_ROOT_0=/path -- &#x3C;command></code></p>
<h4>2.1.3 네트워크 정책</h4>
<p>네트워크 정책은 세 가지 모드로 분기한다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>조건</th>
<th>동작</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>프록시 환경 변수 있음</td>
<td>프록시 포트만 loopback 허용 + 네트워크 정책</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>네트워크 활성, 프록시 없음</td>
<td><code>(allow network-outbound)</code> + <code>(allow network-inbound)</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>네트워크 비활성</td>
<td>네트워크 규칙 없음 (기본 deny)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Unix 도메인 소켓은 <code>AllowAll</code> 또는 경로별 allowlist로 제어한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-scheme">; 경로별 allowlist 예시 — 동적 생성
(allow system-socket (socket-domain AF_UNIX))
(allow network-bind (local unix-socket (subpath (param "UNIX_SOCKET_PATH_0"))))
(allow network-outbound (remote unix-socket (subpath (param "UNIX_SOCKET_PATH_0"))))
</code></pre>
<h3>2.2 Linux — Bubblewrap + Seccomp</h3>
<p>Linux 샌드박스는 두 레이어를 겹친다: <strong>bubblewrap</strong>(파일시스템 네임스페이스 격리)과 <strong>seccomp</strong>(syscall 필터링). Landlock은 레거시 폴백으로 남아 있다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["codex-linux-sandbox 진입"] --> B{"--use-legacy-landlock?"}
    B -->|Yes| C["Landlock + seccomp 직접 적용"]
    B -->|No| D["bubblewrap 래핑"]
    D --> E["bwrap --new-session --die-with-parent ..."]
    E --> F["내부: --apply-seccomp-then-exec"]
    F --> G["PR_SET_NO_NEW_PRIVS + seccomp 필터 설치"]
    G --> H["execvp(command)"]
    C --> G
</code></pre>
<h4>2.2.1 Bubblewrap 파일시스템 격리</h4>
<p><code>create_bwrap_command_args()</code>가 파일시스템 마운트 구조를 결정한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/linux-sandbox/src/bwrap.rs — 마운트 순서
// 1. 전체 읽기: --ro-bind / /
// 2. 제한 읽기: --tmpfs / 로 시작, 개별 --ro-bind 추가
// 3. --dev /dev (최소 디바이스 노드: null, zero, urandom 등)
// 4. --bind &#x3C;root> &#x3C;root> 로 쓰기 가능 경로 재마운트
// 5. --ro-bind &#x3C;subpath> &#x3C;subpath> 로 보호 하위 경로 복원
</code></pre>
<p>네임스페이스 격리 플래그:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 기본 bubblewrap 플래그 — bwrap.rs
vec![
    "--new-session",         // 새 세션 리더
    "--die-with-parent",     // 부모 종료 시 함께 종료
    "--unshare-user",        // 사용자 네임스페이스 분리
    "--unshare-pid",         // PID 네임스페이스 분리
    "--unshare-net",         // 네트워크 차단 시에만 추가
    "--proc", "/proc",       // 새 /proc 마운트
]
</code></pre>
<p>플랫폼 기본 읽기 경로 (restricted 모드에서 자동 추가):</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">const LINUX_PLATFORM_DEFAULT_READ_ROOTS: &#x26;[&#x26;str] = &#x26;[
    "/bin", "/sbin", "/usr", "/etc", "/lib", "/lib64",
    "/nix/store", "/run/current-system/sw",
];
</code></pre>
<p>Bubblewrap 실행기는 시스템 <code>/usr/bin/bwrap</code>를 먼저 시도하고, <code>--argv0</code>을 지원하지 않는 구버전이면 벤더링된 bwrap으로 폴백한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/linux-sandbox/src/launcher.rs
fn preferred_bwrap_launcher_for_path(system_bwrap_path: &#x26;Path) -> BubblewrapLauncher {
    if !system_bwrap_supports_argv0(system_bwrap_path) {
        return BubblewrapLauncher::Vendored;
    }
    BubblewrapLauncher::System(/* ... */)
}
</code></pre>
<h4>2.2.2 Seccomp syscall 필터링</h4>
<p>네트워크 차단이 필요한 경우 seccomp BPF 필터가 설치된다. 두 가지 모드가 있다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/linux-sandbox/src/landlock.rs
enum NetworkSeccompMode {
    Restricted,    // 모든 네트워크 syscall 차단, AF_UNIX만 허용
    ProxyRouted,   // AF_INET/INET6만 허용 (프록시 브릿지용), AF_UNIX 차단
}
</code></pre>
<p><strong>Restricted 모드</strong> — 차단 대상 syscall 목록:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 무조건 차단
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_ptrace);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_io_uring_setup);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_io_uring_enter);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_io_uring_register);

// 네트워크 관련 차단
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_connect);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_accept);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_accept4);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_bind);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_listen);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_sendto);
deny_syscall(&#x26;mut rules, libc::SYS_sendmmsg);
// ... shutdown, getpeername, getsockname, recvmmsg, getsockopt, setsockopt

// socket()/socketpair()는 AF_UNIX만 허용
let unix_only_rule = SeccompRule::new(vec![SeccompCondition::new(
    0,                        // 첫 번째 인자 (domain)
    SeccompCmpArgLen::Dword,
    SeccompCmpOp::Ne,
    libc::AF_UNIX as u64,    // AF_UNIX가 아니면 차단
)?])?;
rules.insert(libc::SYS_socket, vec![unix_only_rule]);
</code></pre>
<p>seccomp 필터 생성:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">let filter = SeccompFilter::new(
    rules,
    SeccompAction::Allow,                     // 기본: 허용
    SeccompAction::Errno(libc::EPERM as u32), // 규칙 매치 시: EPERM 반환
    TargetArch::x86_64,                       // 또는 aarch64
)?;
let prog: BpfProgram = filter.try_into()?;
apply_filter(&#x26;prog)?;
</code></pre>
<h4>2.2.3 Landlock 레거시 폴백</h4>
<p>Landlock ABI V5 기반 파일시스템 제한. 현재는 bubblewrap이 기본이지만, <code>--use-legacy-landlock</code> 플래그로 활성화할 수 있다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/linux-sandbox/src/landlock.rs
fn install_filesystem_landlock_rules_on_current_thread(
    writable_roots: Vec&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,
) -> Result&#x3C;()> {
    let abi = ABI::V5;
    let access_rw = AccessFs::from_all(abi);
    let access_ro = AccessFs::from_read(abi);
    let mut ruleset = Ruleset::default()
        .handle_access(access_rw)?
        .create()?
        .add_rules(landlock::path_beneath_rules(&#x26;["/"], access_ro))?    // 전체 읽기
        .add_rules(landlock::path_beneath_rules(&#x26;["/dev/null"], access_rw))? // /dev/null 쓰기
        .set_no_new_privs(true);
    if !writable_roots.is_empty() {
        ruleset = ruleset.add_rules(
            landlock::path_beneath_rules(&#x26;writable_roots, access_rw)    // 허용 경로 쓰기
        )?;
    }
    ruleset.restrict_self()?;
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.3 Windows — Restricted Token + 방화벽</h3>
<p>Windows 샌드박스는 가장 복잡하다. 전용 로컬 사용자를 생성하고, restricted token과 ACL로 파일시스템을 격리하며, Windows Firewall 규칙으로 네트워크를 차단한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["setup_orchestrator 실행"] --> B["전용 사용자 생성"]
    B --> B1["CodexSandboxOffline — 네트워크 차단"]
    B --> B2["CodexSandboxOnline — 네트워크 허용"]
    B1 --> C["방화벽 규칙 설치"]
    B2 --> C
    C --> D["ACL 설정 — 읽기/쓰기 경로 제어"]
    D --> E["CreateRestrictedToken"]
    E --> F["restricted token으로 프로세스 실행"]
</code></pre>
<h4>2.3.1 전용 사용자 프로비저닝</h4>
<p>두 개의 로컬 사용자를 생성하고, <code>CodexSandboxUsers</code> 그룹에 추가한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/windows-sandbox-rs/src/setup_orchestrator.rs
pub const OFFLINE_USERNAME: &#x26;str = "CodexSandboxOffline";
pub const ONLINE_USERNAME: &#x26;str = "CodexSandboxOnline";

// codex-rs/windows-sandbox-rs/src/sandbox_users.rs
pub fn provision_sandbox_users(/* ... */) -> Result&#x3C;()> {
    ensure_sandbox_users_group(log)?;
    let offline_password = random_password();   // 24자 랜덤 비밀번호
    let online_password = random_password();
    ensure_sandbox_user(offline_username, &#x26;offline_password, log)?;
    ensure_sandbox_user(online_username, &#x26;online_password, log)?;
    write_secrets(codex_home, /* ... */)?;       // DPAPI로 암호화 저장
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>
<p>민감 디렉토리 자동 제외(사용자 프로필 읽기 시):</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">const USERPROFILE_READ_ROOT_EXCLUSIONS: &#x26;[&#x26;str] = &#x26;[
    ".ssh", ".gnupg", ".aws", ".azure", ".kube",
    ".docker", ".config", ".npm", ".pki", ".terraform.d",
];
</code></pre>
<h4>2.3.2 Restricted Token 생성</h4>
<p><code>CreateRestrictedToken</code> Win32 API로 최소 권한 토큰을 생성한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/windows-sandbox-rs/src/token.rs
unsafe fn create_token_with_caps_from(
    base_token: HANDLE,
    psid_capabilities: &#x26;[*mut c_void],
) -> Result&#x3C;HANDLE> {
    let flags = DISABLE_MAX_PRIVILEGE   // 모든 특권 비활성화
              | LUA_TOKEN               // Limited User Account
              | WRITE_RESTRICTED;       // 쓰기 제한

    CreateRestrictedToken(
        base_token, flags,
        0, std::ptr::null(),            // SID 비활성화 없음
        0, std::ptr::null(),            // 특권 삭제 없음
        entries.len() as u32,           // 제한 SID: capability + logon + everyone
        entries.as_mut_ptr(),
        &#x26;mut new_token,
    );
    set_default_dacl(new_token, &#x26;dacl_sids)?;   // 파이프 IPC를 위한 DACL
    enable_single_privilege(new_token, "SeChangeNotifyPrivilege")?;
    Ok(new_token)
}
</code></pre>
<h4>2.3.3 방화벽 규칙</h4>
<p>오프라인 사용자의 아웃바운드 트래픽을 Windows Firewall COM API로 차단한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/windows-sandbox-rs/src/firewall.rs
const OFFLINE_BLOCK_RULE_NAME: &#x26;str = "codex_sandbox_offline_block_outbound";

fn configure_rule(rule: &#x26;INetFwRule3, /* ... */) -> Result&#x3C;()> {
    rule.SetDirection(NET_FW_RULE_DIR_OUT)?;   // 아웃바운드만
    rule.SetAction(NET_FW_ACTION_BLOCK)?;      // 차단
    rule.SetProtocol(NET_FW_IP_PROTOCOL_ANY.0)?;
    rule.SetLocalUserAuthorizedList(&#x26;BSTR::from(local_user_spec))?;
    // read-back 검증: SID가 올바르게 적용됐는지 확인
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. 정책 변환 파이프라인</h2>
<p><code>policy_transforms.rs</code>의 <code>EffectiveSandboxPermissions</code>가 기본 정책과 tool별 추가 권한을 병합한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["SandboxPolicy&#x3C;br/>(config에서)"] --> C["EffectiveSandboxPermissions"]
    B["PermissionProfile&#x3C;br/>(tool 요청)"] --> C
    C --> D["effective_file_system_policy"]
    C --> E["effective_network_policy"]
    D --> F["플랫폼별 래핑"]
    E --> F
</code></pre>
<p>병합 규칙:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>파일시스템</strong>: tool이 요청한 읽기/쓰기 경로를 기존 정책에 추가 (Restricted 모드에서만)</li>
<li><strong>네트워크</strong>: tool이 네트워크를 요청하면 <code>NetworkSandboxPolicy::Enabled</code>로 승격, 아니면 <code>Restricted</code>로 강등</li>
<li><strong>macOS 확장</strong>: seatbelt profile extension을 intersection/merge</li>
</ul>
<hr>

</tr>
<tr>

<td><code>is_known_safe_command</code>가 true면 허용, 아니면 승인</td>

</tr>

    subgraph macOS
        M1["sandbox-exec (seatbelt)"]
        M2["SBPL deny-default 프로파일"]

        M1 --> M2 --> M3
    end
    subgraph Linux
        L1["bubblewrap"]
        L2["네임스페이스 격리&#x3C;br/>user/pid/net"]

        L4["Landlock 폴백"]
        L1 --> L2
        L2 --> L3
        L3 -.->|레거시| L4
    end

        W1["setup orchestrator"]
        W2["전용 사용자 생성"]

        W4["ACL 기반 파일 접근"]

<h2>6. 포크 관점</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> exec-policy 엔진은 독립 크레이트(<code>codex-execpolicy</code>)로 이미 분리돼 있어 재사용이 쉽다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>is_known_safe_command</code>과 <code>command_might_be_dangerous</code>는 가져갈 가치가 높다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> sandbox 타입 결정 로직은 <code>codex-sandboxing</code> 크레이트에 격리돼 있다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> approval routing은 guardian과 결합돼 있어 함께 봐야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Linux 샌드박스는 bubblewrap → seccomp 이중 구조로, 각각 독립 재사용 가능</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Windows 샌드박스는 사용자 프로비저닝 + 토큰 + 방화벽 세 축이 강결합</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Starlark DSL을 그대로 쓸지, 더 단순한 규칙 포맷으로 바꿀지 결정해야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> bubblewrap 벤더링 전략(시스템 bwrap vs 번들 bwrap)의 배포 트레이드오프 검토 필요</li>
</ul>

<h2>변경 기록</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: sandbox 타입, exec-policy 엔진, approval routing을 삼중 구조로 정리했다.</li>
<li>2026-07-14: 소스 코드 기반 심층 분석 추가 — macOS seatbelt SBPL 생성 로직, Linux bubblewrap+seccomp 이중 레이어(syscall 필터 상세), Windows restricted token+방화벽+전용 사용자 프로비저닝, 정책 변환 파이프라인, 플랫폼별 보안 비교표, Mermaid 다이어그램 5개, 코드 스니펫 20개 추가.</li>
</ul>
<h2>최신 갱신 (2026-05-30)</h2>
<p>최근 412개 커밋(2026-05-15 ~ 2026-05-29)에서 샌드박스 관련 핵심 변경을 반영한다.</p>
<h3>Windows Sandbox 대규모 리팩터링: PermissionProfile 중심 전환</h3>
<p>Windows 샌드박스의 실행 경로가 레거시 <code>SandboxPolicy</code> 기반에서 <code>PermissionProfile</code> + <code>ResolvedWindowsSandboxPermissions</code> 체계로 전면 전환됐다. 일곱 단계에 걸친 점진적 마이그레이션이다.</p>
<ol>
<li><strong><code>ResolvedWindowsSandboxPermissions</code> 도입</strong> (<code>windows-sandbox-rs/src/resolved_permissions.rs</code>, #22896): <code>PermissionProfile</code>을 Windows 런타임용으로 해석하는 구조체를 신설했다. <code>try_from_permission_profile()</code>이 <code>Managed</code> 프로파일만 수용하며, <code>FileSystemSandboxKind::Restricted</code> 검증을 포함한다. <code>WindowsSandboxTokenMode::ReadOnlyCapability | WritableRootsCapability</code> 결정도 이 레이어에서 처리한다.</li>
<li><strong>쓰기 루트 전환</strong> (#22923): ACL 기반 쓰기 경로 생성이 <code>ResolvedWindowsSandboxPermissions::writable_roots_for_cwd()</code>를 직접 소비하도록 변경됐다. 레거시 <code>SandboxPolicy</code> 프로젝션에서 누락되던 deny glob 규칙이 반영된다.</li>
<li><strong>셋업 전환</strong> (#23167): elevated setup의 읽기/쓰기 루트 수집이 <code>gather_read_roots()</code> / <code>gather_write_roots_for_permissions()</code>로 변경되어 resolved permissions에서 직접 파생한다.</li>
<li><strong>elevated runner IPC</strong> (#22918, #23715): <code>SpawnRequest</code>가 <code>permission_profile</code> + <code>permission_profile_cwd</code> 필드를 전달하도록 IPC 프로토콜 v2로 갱신됐다.</li>
<li><strong>SandboxPolicy runner plumbing 제거</strong> (#23813): <code>windows-sandbox-rs/src/policy.rs</code> 삭제. restricted-token 캡처, 세션 셋업, world-writable 감사, read-root grant, command-runner 세션 API 전체가 <code>PermissionProfile</code>을 직접 수용한다. IPC 프로토콜 v2에서 레거시 <code>policy_json_or_preset</code> 필드 완전 제거. 22개 파일, net -251줄.</li>
<li><strong>workspace roots 전파</strong> (#24108): 단일 <code>permission_profile_cwd</code> 대신 <code>workspace_roots: Vec&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf></code>를 스레딩한다. <code>:workspace_roots</code> 심볼릭 항목이 <code>materialize_project_roots_with_workspace_roots()</code>로 모든 런타임 루트에 대해 구체화된다. IPC 프로토콜 v3으로 범프. <code>ExecRequest::new()</code>에 <code>windows_sandbox_workspace_roots</code> 명시 인자가 추가돼 암묵적 폴백을 방지한다.</li>
<li><strong>캡처 취소 수정</strong> (#24974): workspace roots 전환 후 테스트 루트 설정이 깨지던 문제를 수정했다.</li>
</ol>
<h3>WFP 네트워크 격리 도입</h3>
<p>Windows Firewall COM API(<code>INetFwRule3</code>) 기반 방화벽 규칙 외에, <strong>Windows Filtering Platform(WFP)</strong> 커널 필터가 추가됐다 (#20101).</p>
<ul>
<li><code>windows-sandbox-rs/src/wfp.rs</code>: <code>FwpmEngineOpen0</code> → 트랜잭션 내에서 persistent provider/sublayer/filter를 설치한다.</li>
<li><code>windows-sandbox-rs/src/wfp/filter_specs.rs</code>: 필터 사양을 선언적으로 정의. ICMP connect/assign(v4/v6), DNS port 53(v4/v6) 등의 WFP 필터를 <code>FWPM_FILTER_FLAG_PERSISTENT</code>로 등록한다.</li>
<li><code>windows-sandbox-rs/src/wfp_setup.rs</code>: elevated setup 헬퍼에서 <code>install_wfp_filters_for_account()</code>를 호출하고, 실패 시 non-fatal 로깅 + OTel 메트릭(<code>codex.windows_sandbox.wfp_setup_*</code>)을 발행한다.</li>
<li>방화벽 정책 유효성 검증 (#22353): <code>INetFwPolicy2::LocalPolicyModifyState</code>를 조회해, 관리형 호스트에서 로컬 방화벽 정책이 무시되는 경우 elevated setup을 실패 처리한다.</li>
</ul>
<h3>Guardian 서킷 브레이커 InterruptTurn 액션</h3>
<p><code>GuardianRejectionCircuitBreaker</code>(<code>core/src/guardian/mod.rs</code>)가 턴 중단을 트리거한다. 이전 412 범위 바깥에서 도입된 구조이나, 이 범위 내에서 Guardian 프롬프트 캐시 키 안정화(#24891~#24895), 리뷰 메트릭(#24897), 런타임 permission profile 갱신(#22931), auto-review permission profile override 수정(#23956) 등이 적용됐다.</p>
<p>핵심 흐름: <code>record_denial()</code> 호출 시 연속 거부 3회(<code>MAX_CONSECUTIVE_GUARDIAN_DENIALS_PER_TURN</code>) 또는 최근 50회 리뷰 중 10회 거부(<code>MAX_RECENT_AUTO_REVIEW_DENIALS_PER_TURN</code>) 임계를 넘으면 <code>InterruptTurn</code>을 반환한다. <code>review.rs</code>의 <code>record_guardian_denial()</code>이 이를 받아 <code>GuardianWarning</code> 이벤트를 발행하고 <code>abort_turn_if_active(turn_id, TurnAbortReason::Interrupted)</code>로 턴을 중단한다.</p>
<h3>deny-read 샌드박싱 보존</h3>
<p>Permission profile의 <code>access = none</code>(deny) 읽기 제한이 안전 명령 바이패스에서 누락되던 버그가 수정됐다 (#23943). <code>is_known_safe_command()</code>로 허용된 명령(<code>cat</code>, <code>ls</code> 등)이라도 deny-read 항목(<code>**/*.env</code> 등)이 활성화돼 있으면 샌드박스를 유지한다. execpolicy <code>allow</code> 규칙에 대해서도 동일 논리가 적용된다. cloud requirements의 deny-read glob 해석 수정(#23729)도 함께 포함됐다.</p>
<h3>Windows 네트워크 거부 시 샌드박스 취소</h3>
<p>Guardian 또는 네트워크 프록시가 네트워크 접근을 거부하면 <code>ExecExpiration</code>을 통해 실행을 취소하는데, Windows 샌드박스 캡처 경로가 타임아웃 컴포넌트만 전파하고 있었다 (#19880). 이 수정으로 네트워크 거부 시에도 즉시 종료된다.</p>
<h3>기타 샌드박스 관련 변경</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Windows deny-read 패리티</strong> (#18202): macOS/Linux에서만 지원되던 <code>access = none</code> 읽기 제한을 Windows에도 적용. 단, unelevated restricted-token 백엔드는 읽기 거부를 강제할 수 없어 fail-closed 처리한다.</li>
<li><strong>write-root capability SID 범위 지정</strong> (#21479): 레거시/elevated 토큰의 capability SID를 실효 쓰기 루트에만 한정한다.</li>
<li><strong>Linux sandbox 셸 정리 보존</strong> (#22729): 인터럽트 시 셸 정리 스크립트가 실행되도록 수정.</li>
<li><strong>bundled bwrap 설치 컨텍스트</strong> (#23634): 벤더링된 bwrap 바이너리 경로를 설치 컨텍스트에서 해석한다.</li>
<li><strong>Unix socket deny 설정</strong> (#24970): Unix 소켓 권한에 <code>deny</code> 규칙을 올바르게 적용한다.</li>
<li><strong>Windows sandbox 로그 개선</strong>: rolling file 로테이션(#24117) + 피드백 보고서에 로그 첨부(#24623).</li>
<li><strong>Windows sandbox 방화벽 유효성 검증</strong> (#22353): 관리형 호스트에서 방화벽 정책 무효 시 setup 실패 처리.</li>
</ul>

42:T12f2c,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 08: Config system</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — configuration system.</p>
</blockquote>

<hr>
<ul>
<li>
<ol>
<li><strong>System</strong> — <code>/etc/codex/config.toml</code> (Unix) 또는 <code>%ProgramData%\OpenAI\Codex\config.toml</code> (Windows)</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="2">
<li><strong>User</strong> — <code>$CODEX_HOME/config.toml</code></li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="3">
<li><strong>Project</strong> — CWD 기준 <code>.codex/config.toml</code> (tree walk + repo root, untrusted 시 disabled)</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="4">
<li><strong>Session flags</strong> — CLI <code>--config</code> 오버라이드 (dotted-path TOML write)</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="5">
<li><strong>Legacy managed config</strong> — <code>managed_config.toml</code> (파일 또는 MDM)</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="6">
<li><strong>MDM managed config</strong> — macOS managed preferences (<code>defaults</code> 기반, macOS only)</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>별도로 <strong>Requirements</strong> 채널이 config 레이어와 독립적으로 작동한다:</li>
<li><strong>Cloud requirements</strong> — 원격 관리형 제약</li>
<li><strong>MDM requirements</strong> — macOS managed preferences 기반 제약</li>
<li><strong>System requirements</strong> — <code>/etc/codex/requirements.toml</code></li>
</ul>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// config_loader/mod.rs — 진입점
pub async fn load_config_layers_state(
    codex_home: &#x26;Path,
    cwd: Option&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,
    cli_overrides: &#x26;[(String, TomlValue)],
    overrides: LoaderOverrides,
    cloud_requirements: CloudRequirementsLoader,
) -> io::Result&#x3C;ConfigLayerStack> {
    // 1) requirements 수집: cloud → MDM → system requirements.toml
    let mut config_requirements_toml = ConfigRequirementsWithSources::default();
    if let Some(requirements) = cloud_requirements.get().await...? {
        config_requirements_toml.merge_unset_fields(
            RequirementSource::CloudRequirements, requirements);
    }
    // macOS MDM requirements
    #[cfg(target_os = "macos")]
    macos::load_managed_admin_requirements_toml(&#x26;mut config_requirements_toml, ...);
    // /etc/codex/requirements.toml
    load_requirements_toml(&#x26;mut config_requirements_toml, system_requirements_toml_file()?);

    // 2) config 레이어 조립: system → user → project → session flags → legacy managed
    let mut layers = Vec::&#x3C;ConfigLayerEntry>::new();
    layers.push(/* system */);
    layers.push(/* user */);
    // project 레이어: cwd에서 .codex/ 폴더를 tree-walk로 검색
    if let Some(cwd) = cwd {
        let project_layers = load_project_layers(&#x26;cwd, ...);
        layers.extend(project_layers);
    }
    if let Some(cli_overrides_layer) = cli_overrides_layer {
        layers.push(ConfigLayerEntry::new(ConfigLayerSource::SessionFlags, ...));
    }
    // legacy managed_config.toml (파일 + MDM)
    ...

    // 3) ConfigLayerStack 구성 — layers + requirements → 최종 스택
    ConfigLayerStack::new(layers, config_requirements_toml.try_into()?, ...)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// config/mod.rs — ConfigBuilder::build()
pub async fn build(self) -> std::io::Result&#x3C;Config> {
    let config_layer_stack = load_config_layers_state(
        &#x26;codex_home, Some(cwd), &#x26;cli_overrides, loader_overrides, cloud_requirements,
    ).await?;

    // effective_config(): disabled 레이어 제외, 재귀 TOML 병합
    let merged_toml = config_layer_stack.effective_config();

    // TOML Value → ConfigToml 역직렬화
    let config_toml: ConfigToml = merged_toml.try_into()?;

    // ConfigToml + ConfigOverrides + requirements → 최종 Config
    Config::load_config_with_layer_stack(config_toml, harness_overrides, codex_home, config_layer_stack)
}
</code></pre>

<pre><code class="language-rust">// config/mod.rs — load_config_with_layer_stack()
let ConfigRequirements {
    approval_policy: mut constrained_approval_policy,
    sandbox_policy: mut constrained_sandbox_policy,
    web_search_mode: mut constrained_web_search_mode,
    feature_requirements,
    mcp_servers,
    exec_policy: _,
    enforce_residency,
    network: network_requirements,
} = config_layer_stack.requirements().clone();

// 사용자 설정값이 requirement 제약에 위반되면 fallback 적용 + 경고 발행
apply_requirement_constrained_value(
    "approval_policy", configured_value,
    &#x26;mut constrained_approval_policy, &#x26;mut startup_warnings)?;
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">fn apply_requirement_constrained_value&#x3C;T>(
    field_name: &#x26;'static str,
    configured_value: T,
    constrained_value: &#x26;mut ConstrainedWithSource&#x3C;T>,
    startup_warnings: &#x26;mut Vec&#x3C;String>,
) -> std::io::Result&#x3C;()> {
    if let Err(err) = constrained_value.set(configured_value) {
        let fallback_value = constrained_value.get().clone();
        startup_warnings.push(format!(
            "Configured value for `{field_name}` is disallowed by requirements; \
             falling back to required value {fallback_value:?}. Details: {err}"
        ));
        constrained_value.set(fallback_value)?;
    }
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// config/permissions.rs — 핵심 타입
pub struct PermissionsToml {
    pub entries: BTreeMap&#x3C;String, PermissionProfileToml>,  // 이름별 프로파일
}

pub struct PermissionProfileToml {
    pub filesystem: Option&#x3C;FilesystemPermissionsToml>,  // 파일시스템 규칙
    pub network: Option&#x3C;NetworkToml>,                    // 네트워크 규칙
}

// 파일시스템 경로별 접근 권한
pub enum FilesystemPermissionToml {
    Access(FileSystemAccessMode),                        // 단순: read/write/read_write
    Scoped(BTreeMap&#x3C;String, FileSystemAccessMode>),      // 하위경로별 세분화
}
</code></pre>

[permissions.strict.filesystem]
":project_roots" = "read_write"
":tmpdir" = "read_write"
"/usr/local/bin" = "read"

[permissions.strict.network]
enabled = true
mode = "limited"
allowed_domains = ["api.openai.com", "github.com"]

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// config/permissions.rs — 퍼미션 컴파일
pub(crate) fn compile_permission_profile(
    permissions: &#x26;PermissionsToml,
    profile_name: &#x26;str,
    startup_warnings: &#x26;mut Vec&#x3C;String>,
) -> io::Result&#x3C;(FileSystemSandboxPolicy, NetworkSandboxPolicy)> {
    let profile = resolve_permission_profile(permissions, profile_name)?;

    // 파일시스템: 각 경로를 FileSystemSandboxEntry로 컴파일
    let mut entries = Vec::new();
    if let Some(filesystem) = profile.filesystem.as_ref() {
        for (path, permission) in &#x26;filesystem.entries {
            compile_filesystem_permission(path, permission, &#x26;mut entries, startup_warnings)?;
        }
    }
    // 네트워크: enabled 여부에 따라 Enabled/Restricted
    let network_sandbox_policy = compile_network_sandbox_policy(profile.network.as_ref());

    Ok((FileSystemSandboxPolicy::restricted(entries), network_sandbox_policy))
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 전방 호환 파서: 새 특수 경로 추가 시 구버전이 reject하지 않음
fn parse_special_path(path: &#x26;str) -> Option&#x3C;FileSystemSpecialPath> {
    match path {
        ":root"          => Some(FileSystemSpecialPath::Root),
        ":minimal"       => Some(FileSystemSpecialPath::Minimal),
        ":project_roots" => Some(FileSystemSpecialPath::project_roots(None)),
        ":tmpdir"        => Some(FileSystemSpecialPath::Tmpdir),
        _ if path.starts_with(':') => Some(FileSystemSpecialPath::unknown(path, None)),
        _ => None,
    }
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// config/managed_features.rs
pub struct ManagedFeatures {
    value: ConstrainedWithSource&#x3C;Features>,
    pinned_features: BTreeMap&#x3C;Feature, bool>,  // requirements가 고정한 feature
}

impl ManagedFeatures {
    // requirements에서 pinned feature 파싱 → 후보 정규화 → 검증
    pub(crate) fn from_configured(
        configured_features: Features,
        feature_requirements: Option&#x3C;Sourced&#x3C;FeatureRequirementsToml>>,
    ) -> std::io::Result&#x3C;Self> {
        let (pinned_features, source) = match feature_requirements {
            Some(Sourced { value, source }) => (
                parse_feature_requirements(value, &#x26;source)?, Some(source)
            ),
            None => (BTreeMap::new(), None),
        };
        // pinned feature를 candidate에 강제 적용 후 의존성 정규화
        let normalized = normalize_candidate(configured_features, &#x26;pinned_features);
        validate_pinned_features(&#x26;normalized, &#x26;pinned_features, source.as_ref())?;
        Ok(Self { ... })
    }

    // 변경 시도 시 pinned feature 제약 검증
    pub fn set(&#x26;mut self, candidate: Features) -> ConstraintResult&#x3C;()> {
        let normalized = self.normalize_and_validate(candidate)?;
        self.value.value.set(normalized)
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    A["사용자 features\n(config.toml)"] --> B["Features::from_sources()"]
    C["프로파일 features"] --> B
    D["CLI overrides"] --> B
    B --> E["configured_features"]
    F["requirements.toml\nfeature_requirements"] --> G["parse_feature_requirements()"]
    G --> H["pinned_features\nBTreeMap&#x3C;Feature, bool>"]
    E --> I["normalize_candidate()"]
    H --> I
    I --> J["pin 적용 + 의존성 정규화"]
    J --> K["validate_pinned_features()"]
    K --> L["ManagedFeatures"]
</code></pre>

let configured_features = Features::from_sources(
    FeatureConfigSource {
        features: cfg.features.as_ref(),
        include_apply_patch_tool: None,
        experimental_use_freeform_apply_patch: cfg.experimental_use_freeform_apply_patch,
        experimental_use_unified_exec_tool: cfg.experimental_use_unified_exec_tool,

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// model_provider_info.rs
pub struct ModelProviderInfo {
    pub name: String,                               // 표시명
    pub base_url: Option&#x3C;String>,                   // API 엔드포인트
    pub env_key: Option&#x3C;String>,                    // API 키 환경변수
    pub wire_api: WireApi,                          // responses (chat는 제거됨)
    pub query_params: Option&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;String, String>>,
    pub http_headers: Option&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;String, String>>,
    pub env_http_headers: Option&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;String, String>>,
    pub request_max_retries: Option&#x3C;u64>,
    pub stream_max_retries: Option&#x3C;u64>,
    pub stream_idle_timeout_ms: Option&#x3C;u64>,
    // ...
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-toml"># config.toml 예시
[model_providers.my-local]
name = "My Local LLM"
base_url = "http://localhost:8080/v1"
wire_api = "responses"
env_key = "MY_LOCAL_API_KEY"
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>

    pub model: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub model_provider: Option&#x3C;String>,

pub enum ConfigEdit {
    SetModel { model: Option&#x3C;String>, effort: Option&#x3C;ReasoningEffort> },
    SetServiceTier { service_tier: Option&#x3C;ServiceTier> },
    SetModelPersonality { personality: Option&#x3C;Personality> },

    // 각종 notice/flag 토글...

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// config/agent_roles.rs — 레이어별 역할 병합
pub(crate) fn load_agent_roles(
    cfg: &#x26;ConfigToml,
    config_layer_stack: &#x26;ConfigLayerStack,
    startup_warnings: &#x26;mut Vec&#x3C;String>,
) -> std::io::Result&#x3C;BTreeMap&#x3C;String, AgentRoleConfig>> {
    // 낮은 우선순위 레이어부터 순회하며 역할 수집
    let layers = config_layer_stack.get_layers(
        ConfigLayerStackOrdering::LowestPrecedenceFirst, false);
    let mut roles: BTreeMap&#x3C;String, AgentRoleConfig> = BTreeMap::new();
    for layer in layers {
        // 1) [agents.roles] 선언 파싱
        // 2) agents/ 디렉토리에서 .toml 파일 자동 발견
        // 3) 같은 이름 → 상위 레이어가 하위 필드 merge
    }
    Ok(roles)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    APP["App Server / TUI"] --> SVC["ConfigService"]
    SVC --> READ["ConfigReadParams\n레이어 메타 + per-key origin"]
    SVC --> WRITE["ConfigValueWriteParams\ndotted-path 단일 쓰기"]
    SVC --> BATCH["ConfigBatchWriteParams\n다중 키 atomic 쓰기"]
    SVC --> TOML["config.toml\natomic file write"]
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// config/schema.rs
pub fn config_schema() -> RootSchema {
    SchemaSettings::draft07()
        .with(|settings| { settings.option_add_null_type = false; })
        .into_generator()
        .into_root_schema_for::&#x3C;ConfigToml>()
}

// features 키: 알려진 feature + legacy key만 허용, additional_properties = false
pub(crate) fn features_schema(schema_gen: &#x26;mut SchemaGenerator) -> Schema {
    for feature in FEATURES {
        validation.properties.insert(feature.key.to_string(), ...);
    }
    validation.additional_properties = Some(Box::new(Schema::Bool(false)));
    ...
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>

    subgraph "ConfigToml 주요 섹션"
        M["model / model_provider\n모델 선택"]

    end
