<tbody>
<tr>
<td>MCP server 설정이 어디서 모이고 합쳐지는가</td>
<td>config layer 병합은 <code>load_config_layers_state()</code>와 <code>Config::load_config_with_layer_stack()</code>가 하고, plugin MCP merge는 <code>configured_mcp_servers()</code>, <code>codex_apps</code> 주입은 <code>effective_mcp_servers()</code>와 <code>with_codex_apps_mcp()</code>가 한다</td>
<td><code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/config_loader/mod.rs</code>, <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/config/mod.rs</code>, <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/mcp/mod.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>연결 lifecycle, listing, auth, sandbox state 주입은 어디서 이뤄지는가</td>
<td><code>McpConnectionManager::new()</code>가 startup lifecycle을 만들고, <code>list_all_tools</code>, <code>list_all_resources</code>, <code>list_all_resource_templates</code>가 listing을 맡고, auth status는 <code>compute_auth_statuses()</code>, sandbox state는 <code>notify_sandbox_state_change()</code>가 넣는다</td>
<td><code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/mcp_connection_manager.rs</code>, <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/mcp/auth.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tool call approval, timeout, normalization, error handling은 어떤 파이프라인을 거치는가</td>
<td>approval은 <code>maybe_request_mcp_tool_approval()</code>, timeout은 <code>ManagedClient.tool_timeout</code>에서 <code>RmcpClient::run_service_operation_once()</code>로 전달되고, normalization은 <code>McpConnectionManager::call_tool()</code>와 <code>sanitize_mcp_tool_result_for_model()</code>, error handling은 startup display helper와 tool call wrapping이 맡는다</td>
<td><code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/mcp_tool_call.rs</code>, <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/mcp_connection_manager.rs</code>, <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/rmcp-client/src/rmcp_client.rs</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>plugin 또는 codex_apps와 어떤 결합점이 있는가</td>
<td>plugin은 active plugin MCP servers와 tool provenance annotation으로 결합하고, <code>codex_apps</code>는 connector directory와 approval persistence와 accessible connector cache까지 이어진다</td>
<td><code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/plugins/manager.rs</code>, <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/mcp/mod.rs</code>, <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/connectors.rs</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<table>

<th>구성요소</th>

<tr>
<td>config layer</td>
<td>MCP 서버 raw 설정 수집과 requirements 적용</td>

<tr>
<td>server map assembler</td>
<td>config, plugin, codex_apps를 하나의 맵으로 조립</td>
<td><code>McpManager</code>, <code>configured_mcp_servers</code>, <code>effective_mcp_servers</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>connection runtime</td>
<td>서버 startup, tool listing, resource listing, sandbox state update</td>
<td><code>McpConnectionManager</code>, <code>AsyncManagedClient</code>, <code>ManagedClient</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>rmcp transport</td>
<td>stdio와 streamable HTTP 연결, OAuth refresh, session recovery</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>approval runtime</td>
<td>Guardian, elicitation, session remember, persistent remember</td>

</tr>
<tr>
<td>template layer</td>
<td>승인 문구와 파라미터 표시 정규화</td>
<td><code>render_mcp_tool_approval_template</code>, <code>consequential_tool_message_templates.json</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>timeout과 정규화 포인트</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>주제</th>
<th>구현 위치</th>
<th>관찰 포인트</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>startup timeout</td>
<td><code>mcp_connection_manager.rs</code>, <code>rmcp_client.rs</code></td>
<td>handshake와 초기 tool listing 이전 단계에 적용된다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tool timeout</td>
<td><code>mcp_connection_manager.rs</code>, <code>rmcp_client.rs</code></td>
<td><code>tool_timeout_sec</code>이 서버별 기본 timeout으로 쓰인다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>tool name normalization</td>
<td><code>mcp_connection_manager.rs</code></td>
<td><code>codex_apps</code> connector prefix 제거, sanitize, hash 기반 disambiguation</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>result normalization</td>
<td><code>mcp_connection_manager.rs</code>, <code>mcp_tool_call.rs</code></td>
<td>rmcp content를 JSON value로 바꾸고 image block을 모델 capability에 맞게 치환한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>startup error display</td>
<td><code>mcp_connection_manager.rs</code></td>
<td>auth required, GitHub PAT 안내, startup timeout 메시지를 사람이 읽기 쉽게 바꾼다</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h2>포크 관점</h2>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>McpManager</code>와 <code>McpConnectionManager</code>의 분리는 유지 가치가 높다. 서버 조립과 연결 lifecycle을 분리해 두어야 plugin merge와 runtime cache를 독립적으로 바꿀 수 있다.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>rmcp-client</code>의 session expiry recovery와 OAuth refresh는 범용성이 높다. streamable HTTP MCP를 계속 쓸 포크라면 그대로 가져갈 만하다.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> <code>SandboxState</code> custom request는 꽤 좋은 확장점이다. 서버가 capability를 광고할 때만 상태를 받는 방식이라 강제 결합보다 이식성이 높다.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> requirements 기반 <code>disabled_reason</code> 보존은 운영 디버깅에 유리하다. 단순 allowlist 필터로 축소하면 왜 비활성화됐는지 설명력이 떨어진다.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>codex_apps</code> 자동 주입은 OpenAI와 ChatGPT auth에 강하게 묶여 있다. 범용 포크라면 feature flag 뒤로 숨기거나 별도 adapter로 분리하는 편이 낫다.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>connectors.rs</code>와 MCP의 양방향 결합은 크다. 앱 디렉터리, accessible connector cache, approval persistence가 필요 없으면 이 레이어는 과감히 걷어낼 수 있다.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>mcp_tool_approval_templates.rs</code>와 <code>consequential_tool_message_templates.json</code>은 UX 품질에는 좋지만 필수 코어는 아니다. app connector 제품군이 없다면 축약 가능하다.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> 스킬의 MCP dependency 자동 설치는 first-party originator 전제에 기대고 있다. 외부 배포용 포크라면 설치 UX를 다시 설계해야 한다.</li>
</ul>
<h2>핵심 파일 목록</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>경로</th>

<li>2026-03-26: <code>120_codex-cli/...</code> 오경로를 <code>121_openai-codex/...</code>로 바로잡고, 설정 병합, connection lifecycle, approval timeout normalization 경로를 실제 구현 기준으로 다시 썼다.</li>
<li>2026-03-26: <code>codex_apps</code>, plugin provenance, connector 결합점을 별도 섹션으로 분리해 포크 시 유지 또는 제거 판단 포인트를 드러냈다.</li>

1e:["$","$L28","20-axis-09-mcp",{"id":"20-axis-09-mcp","order":26,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 09: MCP orchestration","description":"009_mcp-orchestration/09_co_mcp.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$43"}}]}]
44:T1cd90,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 10: Memory pipeline</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — memory pipeline.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li>
<ol start="2">
<li><strong>State DB 중심 coordination</strong>: SQLite 기반 state DB가 job 소유권, lease, watermark을 관리하여 다중 세션 간 중복 작업을 방지한다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="3">
<li><strong>Progressive disclosure</strong>: 메모리 파일을 <code>memory_summary.md</code> → <code>MEMORY.md</code> → <code>rollout_summaries/</code> → <code>skills/</code> 순으로 계층화하여, 에이전트가 필요한 깊이만큼만 탐색한다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>
<ol start="4">
<li><strong>Secret redaction</strong>: 추출된 메모리에서 토큰/키/비밀번호를 자동 제거한다.</li>
</ol>
</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A["session start"] --> B["start_memories_startup_task()"]</li>
<li>B --> B1{"ephemeral? / MemoryTool disabled? / SubAgent?"}</li>
<li>B1 -->|"yes"| SKIP["skip"]</li>
<li>B1 -->|"no"| C["Phase 1: prune → run"]</li>
<li>C --> C1["claim eligible rollouts from state DB"]</li>
<li>C1 --> C2["parallel extraction (concurrency cap=8)"]</li>
</ul>

<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["session start"] --> B["start_memories_startup_task()"]
    B --> B1{"ephemeral? / MemoryTool disabled? / SubAgent?"}
    B1 -->|"yes"| SKIP["skip"]
    B1 -->|"no"| C["Phase 1: prune → run"]
    C --> C1["claim eligible rollouts from state DB"]
    C1 --> C2["parallel extraction (concurrency cap=8)"]
    C2 -->|"gpt-5.1-codex-mini"| C3["StageOneOutput: raw_memory + rollout_summary + rollout_slug"]
    C3 --> C4["redact_secrets() → state DB persist"]
    C4 --> D["Phase 2: run"]
    D --> D1["claim global consolidation lock"]
    D1 --> D2["load stage-1 outputs + compute selection diff"]
    D2 --> D3["sync filesystem artifacts"]
    D3 --> D4["spawn consolidation sub-agent"]
    D4 -->|"gpt-5.3-codex"| D5["update memory_summary.md / MEMORY.md / skills/"]
    D5 --> D6["heartbeat loop + status watch"]
    D6 --> D7["mark job succeeded/failed in state DB"]
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/start.rs
pub(crate) fn start_memories_startup_task(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    config: Arc&#x3C;Config>,
    source: &#x26;SessionSource,
) {
    // 다음 조건에서 skip:
    if config.ephemeral
        || !config.features.enabled(Feature::MemoryTool)
        || matches!(source, SessionSource::SubAgent(_))
    {
        return;
    }

    if session.services.state_db.is_none() {
        warn!("state db unavailable for memories startup pipeline; skipping");
        return;
    }

    let weak_session = Arc::downgrade(session);
    tokio::spawn(async move {
        let Some(session) = weak_session.upgrade() else { return; };
        phase1::prune(&#x26;session, &#x26;config).await;  // 오래된 메모리 정리
        phase1::run(&#x26;session, &#x26;config).await;     // Phase 1 실행
        phase2::run(&#x26;session, config).await;      // Phase 2 실행
    });
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/project_doc.rs
pub const DEFAULT_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "AGENTS.md";
pub const LOCAL_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "AGENTS.override.md";

fn candidate_filenames&#x3C;'a>(config: &#x26;'a Config) -> Vec&#x3C;&#x26;'a str> {
    let mut names = Vec::with_capacity(2 + config.project_doc_fallback_filenames.len());
    names.push(LOCAL_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME);   // 최우선
    names.push(DEFAULT_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME); // 기본
    for candidate in &#x26;config.project_doc_fallback_filenames {
        if !candidate.is_empty() &#x26;&#x26; !names.contains(&#x26;candidate.as_str()) {
            names.push(candidate);
        }
    }
    names
}
</code></pre>

pub const USER_INSTRUCTIONS_PREFIX: &#x26;str = "# AGENTS.md instructions for ";

impl UserInstructions {
    pub(crate) fn serialize_to_text(&#x26;self) -> String {
        format!(
            "{prefix}{directory}\n\n&#x3C;INSTRUCTIONS>\n{contents}\n{suffix}",
            prefix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.start_marker(),
            directory = self.directory,
            contents = self.text,
            suffix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.end_marker(),
        )
    }
}

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/prompts.rs
pub(crate) async fn build_memory_tool_developer_instructions(
    codex_home: &#x26;Path,
) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let base_path = memory_root(codex_home);
    let memory_summary_path = base_path.join("memory_summary.md");
    let memory_summary = fs::read_to_string(&#x26;memory_summary_path).await.ok()?
        .trim().to_string();
    let memory_summary = truncate_text(
        &#x26;memory_summary,
        TruncationPolicy::Tokens(
            phase_one::MEMORY_TOOL_DEVELOPER_INSTRUCTIONS_SUMMARY_TOKEN_LIMIT // 5,000 토큰
        ),
    );
    if memory_summary.is_empty() { return None; }
    // read_path.md 템플릿으로 렌더링
    let template = MemoryToolDeveloperInstructionsTemplate {
        base_path: &#x26;base_path.display().to_string(),
        memory_summary: &#x26;memory_summary,
    };
    template.render().ok()
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
pub(in crate::memories) async fn run(session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>, config: &#x26;Config) {
    // 1. claim eligible rollout jobs
    let Some(claimed_candidates) = claim_startup_jobs(session, &#x26;config.memories).await
        else { return; };

    // 2. build one stage-1 request context
    let stage_one_context = build_request_context(session, config).await;

    // 3. run stage-1 extraction jobs in parallel
    let outcomes = run_jobs(session, claimed_candidates, stage_one_context).await;

    // 4. emit metrics and logs
    let counts = aggregate_stats(outcomes);
    emit_metrics(session, &#x26;counts);
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/state/src/runtime/memories.rs — claim_stage1_jobs_for_startup()
// 필터 조건:
// - memory_mode = 'enabled'
// - 현재 세션의 thread_id 제외
// - updated_at >= now - max_age_days  (너무 오래된 건 제외)
// - updated_at &#x3C;= now - min_rollout_idle_hours  (아직 활성인 건 제외)
// - COALESCE(stage1_outputs.source_updated_at, -1) &#x3C; updated_at  (이미 처리된 건 제외)
// - COALESCE(jobs.last_success_watermark, -1) &#x3C; updated_at  (이미 성공한 건 제외)
// ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
// LIMIT scan_limit (5,000)
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
async fn run_jobs(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    claimed_candidates: Vec&#x3C;codex_state::Stage1JobClaim>,
    stage_one_context: RequestContext,
) -> Vec&#x3C;JobResult> {
    futures::stream::iter(claimed_candidates.into_iter())
        .map(|claim| {
            let session = Arc::clone(session);
            let stage_one_context = stage_one_context.clone();
            async move { job::run(session.as_ref(), claim, &#x26;stage_one_context).await }
        })
        .buffer_unordered(phase_one::CONCURRENCY_LIMIT)  // 최대 8개 동시
        .collect::&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;_>>()
        .await
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs — job::sample()
async fn sample(session, rollout_path, rollout_cwd, stage_one_context) {
    // 1. 롤아웃 아이템 로드
    let (rollout_items, _, _) = RolloutRecorder::load_rollout_items(rollout_path).await?;

    // 2. 메모리 관련 response items만 필터링 + 직렬화
    let rollout_contents = serialize_filtered_rollout_response_items(&#x26;rollout_items)?;

    // 3. 컨텍스트 윈도우의 70%까지 truncate
    let prompt = Prompt {
        input: vec![/* build_stage_one_input_message() */],
        base_instructions: BaseInstructions {
            text: phase_one::PROMPT.to_string(),  // stage_one_system.md
        },
        output_schema: Some(output_schema()),     // JSON schema 강제
        ..
    };

    // 4. 스트리밍 응답 수집
    let mut stream = client_session.stream(&#x26;prompt, ...).await?;
    // ...

    // 5. secret redaction
    let mut output: StageOneOutput = serde_json::from_str(&#x26;result)?;
    output.raw_memory = redact_secrets(output.raw_memory);
    output.rollout_summary = redact_secrets(output.rollout_summary);
    output.rollout_slug = output.rollout_slug.map(redact_secrets);
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
pub fn output_schema() -> Value {
    json!({
        "type": "object",
        "properties": {
            "rollout_summary": { "type": "string" },
            "rollout_slug": { "type": ["string", "null"] },
            "raw_memory": { "type": "string" }
        },
        "required": ["rollout_summary", "rollout_slug", "raw_memory"],
        "additionalProperties": false
    })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
pub(in crate::memories) async fn prune(session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>, config: &#x26;Config) {
    if let Some(db) = session.services.state_db.as_deref() {
        let max_unused_days = config.memories.max_unused_days;
        match db.prune_stage1_outputs_for_retention(max_unused_days, PRUNE_BATCH_SIZE).await {
            Ok(pruned) => { /* log */ },
            Err(err) => { /* warn */ },
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs — run()
pub(super) async fn run(session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>, config: Arc&#x3C;Config>) {
    // 1. Claim the global consolidation job
    let claim = job::claim(session, db).await?;

    // 2. Get agent config (sandbox policy 등)
    let agent_config = agent::get_config(config.clone());

    // 3. Query stage-1 outputs with selection rules
    let selection = db.get_phase2_input_selection(max_raw_memories, max_unused_days).await?;

    // 4. Sync filesystem artifacts
    sync_rollout_summaries_from_memories(&#x26;root, &#x26;artifact_memories, ...).await?;
    rebuild_raw_memories_file_from_memories(&#x26;root, &#x26;artifact_memories, ...).await?;

    // 5. Spawn consolidation sub-agent
    let prompt = agent::get_prompt(config, &#x26;selection);
    let thread_id = session.services.agent_control
        .spawn_agent(agent_config, prompt, Some(source)).await?;

    // 6. Handle agent lifecycle (heartbeat + status watch)
    agent::handle(session, claim, new_watermark, raw_memories, thread_id, timer);

    // 7. Emit metrics
}
</code></pre>

    .try_claim_global_phase2_job(session.conversation_id, phase_two::JOB_LEASE_SECONDS)
    .await?;

// 가능한 결과:

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/storage.rs

// 1. rollout_summaries/ 동기화: 유지 대상만 남기고 나머지 삭제
async fn sync_rollout_summaries_from_memories(root, memories, max) {
    let retained = retained_memories(memories, max);
    let keep = retained.iter().map(rollout_summary_file_stem).collect::&#x3C;HashSet&#x3C;_>>();
    prune_rollout_summaries(root, &#x26;keep).await?;
    for memory in retained {
        write_rollout_summary_for_thread(root, memory).await?;
    }
    // retained가 비어 있으면 MEMORY.md, memory_summary.md, skills/ 도 삭제
}

// 2. raw_memories.md 재생성: 최신 순으로 병합
async fn rebuild_raw_memories_file(root, memories, max) {
    let mut body = String::from("# Raw Memories\n\n");
    body.push_str("Merged stage-1 raw memories (latest first):\n\n");
    for memory in retained {
        // ## Thread `{thread_id}`
        // updated_at: {rfc3339}
        // cwd: {path}
        // rollout_path: {path}
        // rollout_summary_file: {file}
        // {raw_memory content}
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/storage.rs
fn rollout_summary_file_stem_from_parts(thread_id, source_updated_at, rollout_slug) -> String {
    // UUID에서 타임스탬프 추출 → "2026-03-26T14-30-00"
    // UUID 하위 32비트 → 62진법 4자리 short hash
    // rollout_slug → 소문자화 + 특수문자 → '_' 변환, 최대 60자
    // 결과: "2026-03-26T14-30-00-aB3x-fix_login_bug"
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs — agent::get_config()
pub(super) fn get_config(config: Arc&#x3C;Config>) -> Option&#x3C;Config> {
    let mut agent_config = config.as_ref().clone();

    agent_config.cwd = memory_root(&#x26;config.codex_home);  // memories/ 디렉토리

    // 재귀적 메모리 생성 차단
    agent_config.memories.generate_memories = false;

    // 승인 불필요
    agent_config.permissions.approval_policy =
        Constrained::allow_only(AskForApproval::Never);

    // 하위 에이전트 생성/협업/메모리 도구 비활성화
    agent_config.features.disable(Feature::SpawnCsv);
    agent_config.features.disable(Feature::Collab);
    agent_config.features.disable(Feature::MemoryTool);

    // 샌드박스: codex_home만 쓰기 가능, 네트워크 차단
    let consolidation_sandbox_policy = SandboxPolicy::WorkspaceWrite {
        writable_roots: vec![codex_home],
        network_access: false,       // 네트워크 완전 차단
        ..
    };

    agent_config.model = Some(
        config.memories.consolidation_model.clone()
            .unwrap_or(phase_two::MODEL.to_string())  // "gpt-5.3-codex"
    );
    agent_config.model_reasoning_effort = Some(phase_two::REASONING_EFFORT);  // Medium
    Some(agent_config)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs — agent::loop_agent()
async fn loop_agent(db, token, thread_id, mut rx) -> AgentStatus {
    let mut heartbeat_interval =
        tokio::time::interval(Duration::from_secs(phase_two::JOB_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS)); // 90초

    loop {
        let status = rx.borrow().clone();
        if is_final_agent_status(&#x26;status) { break status; }

        tokio::select! {
            update = rx.changed() => {
                if update.is_err() { break status; }  // 채널 끊김
            }
            _ = heartbeat_interval.tick() => {
                match db.heartbeat_global_phase2_job(&#x26;token, JOB_LEASE_SECONDS).await {
                    Ok(true) => {},                    // lease 갱신 성공
                    Ok(false) => break Errored(..),    // 소유권 상실
                    Err(err) => break Errored(..),     // DB 오류
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs
pub(super) fn get_watermark(
    claimed_watermark: i64,
    latest_memories: &#x26;[codex_state::Stage1Output],
) -> i64 {
    latest_memories.iter()
        .map(|m| m.source_updated_at.timestamp())
        .max()
        .unwrap_or(claimed_watermark)
        .max(claimed_watermark)  // 절대 뒤로 가지 않음
}
</code></pre>

pub(crate) async fn run_inline_auto_compact_task(
    sess: Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    turn_context: Arc&#x3C;TurnContext>,
    initial_context_injection: InitialContextInjection,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;()> {
    let prompt = turn_context.compact_prompt().to_string(); // compact/prompt.md
    // ...
    // 1. 모델에게 히스토리 요약 요청
    // 2. 응답에서 요약 추출
    let summary_text = format!("{SUMMARY_PREFIX}\n{summary_suffix}");
    // 3. 사용자 메시지 수집 (최근 20,000 토큰까지)
    let user_messages = collect_user_messages(history_items);
    // 4. 새 히스토리 구성: 초기 컨텍스트 + 사용자 메시지 + 요약
    let new_history = build_compacted_history(Vec::new(), &#x26;user_messages, &#x26;summary_text);
    // 5. 히스토리 교체
    sess.replace_compacted_history(new_history, reference_context_item, compacted_item).await;
}

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/compact.rs
fn build_compacted_history_with_limit(
    mut history, user_messages, summary_text, max_tokens,
) -> Vec&#x3C;ResponseItem> {
    let mut remaining = max_tokens;
    for message in user_messages.iter().rev() {  // 최신 → 과거 순
        let tokens = approx_token_count(message);
        if tokens &#x3C;= remaining {
            selected_messages.push(message.clone());
            remaining -= tokens;
        } else {
            let truncated = truncate_text(message, TruncationPolicy::Tokens(remaining));
            selected_messages.push(truncated);
            break;
        }
    }
    selected_messages.reverse();
    // history에 사용자 메시지 추가 → 마지막에 요약 추가
}
</code></pre>

pub(crate) async fn clear_memory_root_contents(memory_root: &#x26;Path) -> std::io::Result&#x3C;()> {
    // symlink인 경우 거부 (보안)
    match tokio::fs::symlink_metadata(memory_root).await {
        Ok(metadata) if metadata.file_type().is_symlink() => {
            return Err(std::io::Error::new(
                std::io::ErrorKind::InvalidInput,
                format!("refusing to clear symlinked memory root {}", memory_root.display()),
            ));
        }
        // ...
    }
    // 모든 파일/디렉토리 삭제
}

│   └── YYYY/MM/DD/     # 날짜별 디렉토리
│       └── {thread_id}.jsonl
├── archived_sessions/  # 아카이브된 세션
└── memories/           # Phase 2 출력
    ├── memory_summary.md
    ├── MEMORY.md
    ├── raw_memories.md
    ├── rollout_summaries/
    │   └── {timestamp}-{hash}-{slug}.md

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Codex memory pipeline analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis snapshot</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — memory pipeline.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex's memory system is an asynchronous two-stage pipeline for inter-session learning. Rather than simply “storing conversation history,” it is an agent-based pipeline that extracts and integrates structured memories from the rollout.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. Memory architecture overview</h2>
<h3>1.1 Design philosophy</h3>
<p>Codex memory has an “agent teaches agent” structure. LLM analyzes the user's past sessions (rollout), converts them into structured memories, and injects them into the system prompt for future sessions. Core principles:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>2-Phase Separation</strong>: Separates individual rollout extraction (Phase 1) and global integration (Phase 2), achieving both parallel extraction and safe global state update.</li>
<li><strong>State DB-centered coordination</strong>: SQLite-based state DB manages job ownership, lease, and watermark to prevent duplicate work between multiple sessions.</li>
<li><strong>Progressive disclosure</strong>: Memory files are layered in the following order: <code>memory_summary.md</code> → <code>MEMORY.md</code> → <code>rollout_summaries/</code> → <code>skills/</code>, and the agent searches only to the required depth.</li>
<li><strong>Secret redaction</strong>: Automatically removes tokens/keys/passwords from extracted memory.</li>
<li><strong>No-op allowed</strong>: If there is no meaningful learning, an empty result is returned to prevent noise.</li>
</ol>
<h3>1.2 Overall flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["session start"] --> B["start_memories_startup_task()"]
    B --> B1{"ephemeral? / MemoryTool disabled? / SubAgent?"}
    B1 -->|"yes"| SKIP["skip"]
    B1 -->|"no"| C["Phase 1: prune → run"]
    C --> C1["claim eligible rollouts from state DB"]
    C1 --> C2["parallel extraction (concurrency cap=8)"]
    C2 -->|"gpt-5.1-codex-mini"| C3["StageOneOutput: raw_memory + rollout_summary + rollout_slug"]
    C3 --> C4["redact_secrets() → state DB persist"]
    C4 --> D["Phase 2: run"]
    D --> D1["claim global consolidation lock"]
    D1 --> D2["load stage-1 outputs + compute selection diff"]
    D2 --> D3["sync filesystem artifacts"]
    D3 --> D4["spawn consolidation sub-agent"]
    D4 -->|"gpt-5.3-codex"| D5["update memory_summary.md / MEMORY.md / skills/"]
    D5 --> D6["heartbeat loop + status watch"]
    D6 --> D7["mark job succeeded/failed in state DB"]
</code></pre>
<h3>1.3 Entry point</h3>
<p>The single entry point into the pipeline is <code>start_memories_startup_task()</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/start.rs
pub(crate) fn start_memories_startup_task(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    config: Arc&#x3C;Config>,
    source: &#x26;SessionSource,
) {
    // 다음 조건에서 skip:
    if config.ephemeral
        || !config.features.enabled(Feature::MemoryTool)
        || matches!(source, SessionSource::SubAgent(_))
    {
        return;
    }

    if session.services.state_db.is_none() {
        warn!("state db unavailable for memories startup pipeline; skipping");
        return;
    }

    let weak_session = Arc::downgrade(session);
    tokio::spawn(async move {
        let Some(session) = weak_session.upgrade() else { return; };
        phase1::prune(&#x26;session, &#x26;config).await;  // 오래된 메모리 정리
        phase1::run(&#x26;session, &#x26;config).await;     // Phase 1 실행
        phase2::run(&#x26;session, config).await;      // Phase 2 실행
    });
}
</code></pre>
<p>If the session has already been terminated using <code>Arc::downgrade</code>, the pipeline will abort quietly. The entire pipeline runs in the background asynchronously with <code>tokio::spawn</code>, so it doesn't block user interaction.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. Loading project instructions (AGENTS.md)</h2>
<p>Apart from the memory pipeline, Codex loads project-level instructions through the <code>AGENTS.md</code> file. This mechanism corresponds to the "static" path of memory injection.</p>
<h3>2.1 File navigation mechanism</h3>
<p>Search algorithm implemented in <code>project_doc.rs</code>:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Determine Project root</strong>: Go up in cwd and find <code>project_root_markers</code> (default: <code>.git</code>).</li>
<li><strong>Hierarchical collection</strong>: Search for <code>AGENTS.md</code> in all directories from project root to cwd.</li>
<li><strong>Priority</strong>: <code>AGENTS.override.md</code> > <code>AGENTS.md</code> > <code>project_doc_fallback_filenames</code> setting value order.</li>
<li><strong>Size Limit</strong>: Limit total bytes by setting <code>project_doc_max_bytes</code>. truncate when exceeded.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/project_doc.rs
pub const DEFAULT_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "AGENTS.md";
pub const LOCAL_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "AGENTS.override.md";

fn candidate_filenames&#x3C;'a>(config: &#x26;'a Config) -> Vec&#x3C;&#x26;'a str> {
    let mut names = Vec::with_capacity(2 + config.project_doc_fallback_filenames.len());
    names.push(LOCAL_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME);   // 최우선
    names.push(DEFAULT_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME); // 기본
    for candidate in &#x26;config.project_doc_fallback_filenames {
        if !candidate.is_empty() &#x26;&#x26; !names.contains(&#x26;candidate.as_str()) {
            names.push(candidate);
        }
    }
    names
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.2 Instruction Injection Format</h3>
<p>The loaded <code>AGENTS.md</code> content is encapsulated in a <code>UserInstructions</code> structure and injected into the history as a contextual user message fragment:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/instructions/user_instructions.rs
pub const USER_INSTRUCTIONS_PREFIX: &#x26;str = "# AGENTS.md instructions for ";

impl UserInstructions {
    pub(crate) fn serialize_to_text(&#x26;self) -> String {
        format!(
            "{prefix}{directory}\n\n&#x3C;INSTRUCTIONS>\n{contents}\n{suffix}",
            prefix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.start_marker(),
            directory = self.directory,
            contents = self.text,
            suffix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.end_marker(),
        )
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>It is passed to the model in a form wrapped in marker tags (<code># AGENTS.md instructions for ...</code> ~ <code>&#x3C;/INSTRUCTIONS></code>), and when extracting memory, this fragment becomes <strong>filtered</strong> — it is removed along with the <code>developer</code> role message when serializing the rollout in Phase 1.</p>
<h3>2.3 Memory read path (Read Path)</h3>
<p>There is a separate path to inject <code>memory_summary.md</code> created in the previous session into the developer instructions of the current session:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/prompts.rs
pub(crate) async fn build_memory_tool_developer_instructions(
    codex_home: &#x26;Path,
) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let base_path = memory_root(codex_home);
    let memory_summary_path = base_path.join("memory_summary.md");
    let memory_summary = fs::read_to_string(&#x26;memory_summary_path).await.ok()?
        .trim().to_string();
    let memory_summary = truncate_text(
        &#x26;memory_summary,
        TruncationPolicy::Tokens(
            phase_one::MEMORY_TOOL_DEVELOPER_INSTRUCTIONS_SUMMARY_TOKEN_LIMIT // 5,000 토큰
        ),
    );
    if memory_summary.is_empty() { return None; }
    // read_path.md 템플릿으로 렌더링
    let template = MemoryToolDeveloperInstructionsTemplate {
        base_path: &#x26;base_path.display().to_string(),
        memory_summary: &#x26;memory_summary,
    };
    template.render().ok()
}
</code></pre>
<p>The <code>read_path.md</code> template guides the agent to a memory folder navigation strategy:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>memory_summary.md</code> always included in system prompt (already provided)</li>
<li><code>MEMORY.md</code> is a handbook for keyword search</li>
<li><code>rollout_summaries/</code> is detailed evidence of individual rollouts</li>
<li><code>skills/&#x3C;name>/</code> is a reusable procedure</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>3. Phase 1: Rollout Extraction</h2>
<h3>3.1 Operation sequence</h3>
<p>The <code>run()</code> function in Phase 1 is executed in a strict four-step sequence:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
pub(in crate::memories) async fn run(session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>, config: &#x26;Config) {
    // 1. claim eligible rollout jobs
    let Some(claimed_candidates) = claim_startup_jobs(session, &#x26;config.memories).await
        else { return; };

    // 2. build one stage-1 request context
    let stage_one_context = build_request_context(session, config).await;

    // 3. run stage-1 extraction jobs in parallel
    let outcomes = run_jobs(session, claimed_candidates, stage_one_context).await;

    // 4. emit metrics and logs
    let counts = aggregate_stats(outcomes);
    emit_metrics(session, &#x26;counts);
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 Rollout screening and Job Claiming</h3>
<p>Select eligible rollouts by JOINing the <code>threads</code> table and the <code>stage1_outputs</code> and <code>jobs</code> tables in the State DB:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/state/src/runtime/memories.rs — claim_stage1_jobs_for_startup()
// 필터 조건:
// - memory_mode = 'enabled'
// - 현재 세션의 thread_id 제외
// - updated_at >= now - max_age_days  (너무 오래된 건 제외)
// - updated_at &#x3C;= now - min_rollout_idle_hours  (아직 활성인 건 제외)
// - COALESCE(stage1_outputs.source_updated_at, -1) &#x3C; updated_at  (이미 처리된 건 제외)
// - COALESCE(jobs.last_success_watermark, -1) &#x3C; updated_at  (이미 성공한 건 제외)
// ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
// LIMIT scan_limit (5,000)
</code></pre>
<p>For each candidate, a lease is acquired with <code>try_claim_stage1_job()</code>. Possible results:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th><code>Stage1JobClaimOutcome</code></th>
<th>Meaning</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>Claimed { ownership_token }</code></td>
<td>Lease acquisition successful, extraction in progress</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SkippedUpToDate</code></td>
<td>Already has the latest output</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SkippedRunning</code></td>
<td>Another worker is holding the lease</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SkippedRetryBackoff</code></td>
<td>During backoff period after failure</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SkippedRetryExhausted</code></td>
<td>Number of retries exhausted (default 3 times)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>3.3 Parallel Sampling</h3>
<p>Parallelize claimed jobs with <code>futures::stream::buffer_unordered</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
async fn run_jobs(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    claimed_candidates: Vec&#x3C;codex_state::Stage1JobClaim>,
    stage_one_context: RequestContext,
) -> Vec&#x3C;JobResult> {
    futures::stream::iter(claimed_candidates.into_iter())
        .map(|claim| {
            let session = Arc::clone(session);
            let stage_one_context = stage_one_context.clone();
            async move { job::run(session.as_ref(), claim, &#x26;stage_one_context).await }
        })
        .buffer_unordered(phase_one::CONCURRENCY_LIMIT)  // 최대 8개 동시
        .collect::&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;_>>()
        .await
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.4 Individual job execution flow</h3>
<p>Each job loads the rollout file, filters out items that don't fit in memory, and sends them to the model:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs — job::sample()
async fn sample(session, rollout_path, rollout_cwd, stage_one_context) {
    // 1. 롤아웃 아이템 로드
    let (rollout_items, _, _) = RolloutRecorder::load_rollout_items(rollout_path).await?;

    // 2. 메모리 관련 response items만 필터링 + 직렬화
    let rollout_contents = serialize_filtered_rollout_response_items(&#x26;rollout_items)?;

    // 3. 컨텍스트 윈도우의 70%까지 truncate
    let prompt = Prompt {
        input: vec![/* build_stage_one_input_message() */],
        base_instructions: BaseInstructions {
            text: phase_one::PROMPT.to_string(),  // stage_one_system.md
        },
        output_schema: Some(output_schema()),     // JSON schema 강제
        ..
    };

    // 4. 스트리밍 응답 수집
    let mut stream = client_session.stream(&#x26;prompt, ...).await?;
    // ...

    // 5. secret redaction
    let mut output: StageOneOutput = serde_json::from_str(&#x26;result)?;
    output.raw_memory = redact_secrets(output.raw_memory);
    output.rollout_summary = redact_secrets(output.rollout_summary);
    output.rollout_slug = output.rollout_slug.map(redact_secrets);
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.5 Rollout filtering rules</h3>
<p>Not all items in a rollout are included in memory. In <code>sanitize_response_item_for_memories()</code>:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>developer</code> role message → <strong>Remove</strong> (structural fragments such as system prompt, AGENTS.md, etc.)</li>
<li><code>is_memory_excluded_contextual_user_fragment()</code> in <code>user</code> role message → <strong>Remove</strong> (environment context, AGENTS.md fragment, etc.)</li>
<li>Other <code>user</code>/<code>assistant</code> messages → <strong>Preservation</strong></li>
<li><code>should_persist_response_item_for_memories()</code> → Determination of function call, tool output, etc.</li>
</ul>
<h3>3.6 Phase 1 output schema</h3>
<p>The model returns structured output enforced as a JSON Schema:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
pub fn output_schema() -> Value {
    json!({
        "type": "object",
        "properties": {
            "rollout_summary": { "type": "string" },
            "rollout_slug": { "type": ["string", "null"] },
            "raw_memory": { "type": "string" }
        },
        "required": ["rollout_summary", "rollout_slug", "raw_memory"],
        "additionalProperties": false
    })
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>field</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>raw_memory</code></td>
<td>Raw memory in detailed Markdown format</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>rollout_summary</code></td>
<td>One-line summary for routing and indexing</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>rollout_slug</code></td>
<td>Short identifier for creating file name (optional)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>3.7 Stage 1 System Prompt Key Contents</h3>
<p>Key instructions for the <code>stage_one_system.md</code> template:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>No-op gate</strong>: "Will a future agent plausibly act better because of what I write here?" — Otherwise return an empty field</li>
<li><strong>High-signal memory criteria</strong>: (1) stable user preference, (2) high leverage procedural knowledge, (3) decision trigger, (4) environment/workflow evidence</li>
<li><strong>Secret redaction</strong>: Replace token/key/password with <code>[REDACTED_SECRET]</code></li>
<li><strong>Immutable evidence</strong>: raw rollout is never modified.</li>
</ul>
<h3>3.8 Prune old memory (Prune)</h3>
<p>Before Phase 1 execution, <code>prune()</code> is called to batch-prune any unused stage-1 output that exceeds <code>max_unused_days</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
pub(in crate::memories) async fn prune(session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>, config: &#x26;Config) {
    if let Some(db) = session.services.state_db.as_deref() {
        let max_unused_days = config.memories.max_unused_days;
        match db.prune_stage1_outputs_for_retention(max_unused_days, PRUNE_BATCH_SIZE).await {
            Ok(pruned) => { /* log */ },
            Err(err) => { /* warn */ },
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>4. Phase 2: Global Consolidation</h2>
<h3>4.1 Operation sequence</h3>
<p>Phase 2 is a strictly linear flow consisting of 7 steps:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs — run()
pub(super) async fn run(session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>, config: Arc&#x3C;Config>) {
    // 1. Claim the global consolidation job
    let claim = job::claim(session, db).await?;

    // 2. Get agent config (sandbox policy 등)
    let agent_config = agent::get_config(config.clone());

    // 3. Query stage-1 outputs with selection rules
    let selection = db.get_phase2_input_selection(max_raw_memories, max_unused_days).await?;

    // 4. Sync filesystem artifacts
    sync_rollout_summaries_from_memories(&#x26;root, &#x26;artifact_memories, ...).await?;
    rebuild_raw_memories_file_from_memories(&#x26;root, &#x26;artifact_memories, ...).await?;

    // 5. Spawn consolidation sub-agent
    let prompt = agent::get_prompt(config, &#x26;selection);
    let thread_id = session.services.agent_control
        .spawn_agent(agent_config, prompt, Some(source)).await?;

    // 6. Handle agent lifecycle (heartbeat + status watch)
    agent::handle(session, claim, new_watermark, raw_memories, thread_id, timer);

    // 7. Emit metrics
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 Global Lock (Phase 2 Job Claim)</h3>
<p>Phase 2 ensures that only one consolidation runs globally:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs — job::claim()
let claim = db
    .try_claim_global_phase2_job(session.conversation_id, phase_two::JOB_LEASE_SECONDS)
    .await?;

// 가능한 결과:
// Phase2JobClaimOutcome::Claimed { ownership_token, input_watermark }
// Phase2JobClaimOutcome::SkippedNotDirty   — 새 입력 없음
// Phase2JobClaimOutcome::SkippedRunning    — 다른 워커가 실행 중
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 Input Selection and Diff</h3>
<p>Phase 2 doesn't simply fetch the latest N, it computes the <strong>diff</strong> from the previous successful Phase 2 run:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/state/src/model/memories.rs
pub struct Phase2InputSelection {
    pub selected: Vec&#x3C;Stage1Output>,           // 현재 선택된 입력
    pub previous_selected: Vec&#x3C;Stage1Output>,  // 이전 Phase 2에서 선택됐던 입력
    pub retained_thread_ids: Vec&#x3C;ThreadId>,    // 이전에도 현재에도 선택된 thread
    pub removed: Vec&#x3C;Stage1OutputRef>,         // 이전에 선택됐지만 현재 빠진 입력
}
</code></pre>
<p>Selection Policy:</p>
<ul>
<li>Exclude memory with <code>last_usage</code> exceeding <code>max_unused_days</code></li>
<li>If there is no <code>last_usage</code>, fallback to <code>generated_at</code></li>
<li>Sort by <code>usage_count</code> highest → most recent <code>last_usage</code>/<code>generated_at</code></li>
</ul>
<h3>4.4 File system synchronization</h3>
<p>Phase 2 synchronizes the DB's stage-1 outputs to the file system:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/storage.rs

// 1. rollout_summaries/ 동기화: 유지 대상만 남기고 나머지 삭제
async fn sync_rollout_summaries_from_memories(root, memories, max) {
    let retained = retained_memories(memories, max);
    let keep = retained.iter().map(rollout_summary_file_stem).collect::&#x3C;HashSet&#x3C;_>>();
    prune_rollout_summaries(root, &#x26;keep).await?;
    for memory in retained {
        write_rollout_summary_for_thread(root, memory).await?;
    }
    // retained가 비어 있으면 MEMORY.md, memory_summary.md, skills/ 도 삭제
}

// 2. raw_memories.md 재생성: 최신 순으로 병합
async fn rebuild_raw_memories_file(root, memories, max) {
    let mut body = String::from("# Raw Memories\n\n");
    body.push_str("Merged stage-1 raw memories (latest first):\n\n");
    for memory in retained {
        // ## Thread `{thread_id}`
        // updated_at: {rfc3339}
        // cwd: {path}
        // rollout_path: {path}
        // rollout_summary_file: {file}
        // {raw_memory content}
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.5 Rollout Summary file name creation</h3>
<p>The file name is generated by extracting the timestamp and short hash from the UUID-based thread_id:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/storage.rs
fn rollout_summary_file_stem_from_parts(thread_id, source_updated_at, rollout_slug) -> String {
    // UUID에서 타임스탬프 추출 → "2026-03-26T14-30-00"
    // UUID 하위 32비트 → 62진법 4자리 short hash
    // rollout_slug → 소문자화 + 특수문자 → '_' 변환, 최대 60자
    // 결과: "2026-03-26T14-30-00-aB3x-fix_login_bug"
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.6 Consolidation Sub-Agent Settings</h3>
<p>The sub-agent created by Phase 2 runs in a very restricted environment:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs — agent::get_config()
pub(super) fn get_config(config: Arc&#x3C;Config>) -> Option&#x3C;Config> {
    let mut agent_config = config.as_ref().clone();

    agent_config.cwd = memory_root(&#x26;config.codex_home);  // memories/ 디렉토리

    // 재귀적 메모리 생성 차단
    agent_config.memories.generate_memories = false;

    // 승인 불필요
    agent_config.permissions.approval_policy =
        Constrained::allow_only(AskForApproval::Never);

    // 하위 에이전트 생성/협업/메모리 도구 비활성화
    agent_config.features.disable(Feature::SpawnCsv);
    agent_config.features.disable(Feature::Collab);
    agent_config.features.disable(Feature::MemoryTool);

    // 샌드박스: codex_home만 쓰기 가능, 네트워크 차단
    let consolidation_sandbox_policy = SandboxPolicy::WorkspaceWrite {
        writable_roots: vec![codex_home],
        network_access: false,       // 네트워크 완전 차단
        ..
    };

    agent_config.model = Some(
        config.memories.consolidation_model.clone()
            .unwrap_or(phase_two::MODEL.to_string())  // "gpt-5.3-codex"
    );
    agent_config.model_reasoning_effort = Some(phase_two::REASONING_EFFORT);  // Medium
    Some(agent_config)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.7 Heartbeat and health monitoring</h3>
<p>While the sub-agent is running, a heartbeat is sent every 90 seconds to renew the lease. Immediate suspension upon failure to renew Lease:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs — agent::loop_agent()
async fn loop_agent(db, token, thread_id, mut rx) -> AgentStatus {
    let mut heartbeat_interval =
        tokio::time::interval(Duration::from_secs(phase_two::JOB_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS)); // 90초

    loop {
        let status = rx.borrow().clone();
        if is_final_agent_status(&#x26;status) { break status; }

        tokio::select! {
            update = rx.changed() => {
                if update.is_err() { break status; }  // 채널 끊김
            }
            _ = heartbeat_interval.tick() => {
                match db.heartbeat_global_phase2_job(&#x26;token, JOB_LEASE_SECONDS).await {
                    Ok(true) => {},                    // lease 갱신 성공
                    Ok(false) => break Errored(..),    // 소유권 상실
                    Err(err) => break Errored(..),     // DB 오류
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.8 Watermark management</h3>
<p>Watermark tracks the timestamp of the last input processed by Phase 2:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs
pub(super) fn get_watermark(
    claimed_watermark: i64,
    latest_memories: &#x26;[codex_state::Stage1Output],
) -> i64 {
    latest_memories.iter()
        .map(|m| m.source_updated_at.timestamp())
        .max()
        .unwrap_or(claimed_watermark)
        .max(claimed_watermark)  // 절대 뒤로 가지 않음
}
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li>Use the larger value between the watermark at the time of claim and the latest timestamp of the actually loaded input.</li>
<li>If successful, save to DB → Next Phase 2 uses to determine “dirty status”</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>5. Conversation history management</h2>
<h3>5.1 ContextManager structure</h3>
<p>The conversation history within a session is managed with <code>ContextManager</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/context_manager/history.rs
pub(crate) struct ContextManager {
    items: Vec&#x3C;ResponseItem>,              // oldest → newest 순서
    token_info: Option&#x3C;TokenUsageInfo>,     // 마지막 API 응답의 토큰 사용량
    reference_context_item: Option&#x3C;TurnContextItem>,  // 다음 턴의 context 기준선
}
</code></pre>
<p>Core methods:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>record_items()</code> — Applies truncation policy while adding new items to history</li>
<li><code>for_prompt()</code> — Normalizes and returns the history to be sent to the model (GhostSnapshot removal, image filtering, etc.)</li>
<li><code>remove_first_item()</code> / <code>remove_last_item()</code> — Remove item when context window exceeds</li>
<li><code>replace()</code> — Replace entire history after compaction</li>
</ul>
<h3>5.2 History normalization</h3>
<p><code>normalize_history()</code> is called before sending to the model:</p>
<ul>
<li>Remove modalities (e.g. images) not supported by the model</li>
<li>Clean up orphan function call output (remove output without a corresponding call)</li>
<li>Removed GhostSnapshot item (for UI use only, not needed for model)</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>6. Context window management and compaction</h2>
<h3>6.1 Two compaction strategies</h3>
<p>Codex performs compaction, compressing the conversation content when the context window is full:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Inline Compaction</strong> (<code>compact.rs</code>): Request a history summary from the model and process it locally</li>
<li><strong>Remote Compaction</strong> (<code>compact_remote.rs</code>): Processed on the server side when using OpenAI provider.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/compact.rs
pub(crate) fn should_use_remote_compact_task(provider: &#x26;ModelProviderInfo) -> bool {
    provider.is_openai()  // OpenAI인 경우만 remote compaction
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.2 Inline Compaction Flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/compact.rs
pub(crate) async fn run_inline_auto_compact_task(
    sess: Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    turn_context: Arc&#x3C;TurnContext>,
    initial_context_injection: InitialContextInjection,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;()> {
    let prompt = turn_context.compact_prompt().to_string(); // compact/prompt.md
    // ...
    // 1. 모델에게 히스토리 요약 요청
    // 2. 응답에서 요약 추출
    let summary_text = format!("{SUMMARY_PREFIX}\n{summary_suffix}");
    // 3. 사용자 메시지 수집 (최근 20,000 토큰까지)
    let user_messages = collect_user_messages(history_items);
    // 4. 새 히스토리 구성: 초기 컨텍스트 + 사용자 메시지 + 요약
    let new_history = build_compacted_history(Vec::new(), &#x26;user_messages, &#x26;summary_text);
    // 5. 히스토리 교체
    sess.replace_compacted_history(new_history, reference_context_item, compacted_item).await;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.3 Initial Context reinjection after compaction</h3>
<p>Depending on the compaction type, the initial context injection strategy is different:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/compact.rs
pub(crate) enum InitialContextInjection {
    BeforeLastUserMessage,  // mid-turn compaction: 마지막 사용자 메시지 직전에 주입
    DoNotInject,            // pre-turn compaction: 다음 턴에서 자동 재주입
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.4 User message retention strategy</h3>
<p>When compacting, user messages are preserved in reverse chronological order, starting from the most recent, up to a maximum of <code>COMPACT_USER_MESSAGE_MAX_TOKENS</code> (20,000 tokens):</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/compact.rs
fn build_compacted_history_with_limit(
    mut history, user_messages, summary_text, max_tokens,
) -> Vec&#x3C;ResponseItem> {
    let mut remaining = max_tokens;
    for message in user_messages.iter().rev() {  // 최신 → 과거 순
        let tokens = approx_token_count(message);
        if tokens &#x3C;= remaining {
            selected_messages.push(message.clone());
            remaining -= tokens;
        } else {
            let truncated = truncate_text(message, TruncationPolicy::Tokens(remaining));
            selected_messages.push(truncated);
            break;
        }
    }
    selected_messages.reverse();
    // history에 사용자 메시지 추가 → 마지막에 요약 추가
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>7. Memory Trace (Legacy Path)</h2>
<p><code>memory_trace.rs</code> provides a separate path to build memory from raw trace files. Operates independently of the Phase 1/2 pipeline:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memory_trace.rs
pub struct BuiltMemory {
    pub memory_id: String,
    pub source_path: PathBuf,
    pub raw_memory: String,
    pub memory_summary: String,
}

pub async fn build_memories_from_trace_files(
    client: &#x26;ModelClient,
    trace_paths: &#x26;[PathBuf],
    model_info: &#x26;ModelInfo,
    effort: Option&#x3C;ReasoningEffortConfig>,
    session_telemetry: &#x26;SessionTelemetry,
) -> Result&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;BuiltMemory>> {
    // 1. trace 파일 로드 (JSON array 또는 JSONL)
    // 2. BOM 처리, 항목 정규화
    // 3. 허용된 trace item만 필터링 (message: assistant/system/developer/user)
    // 4. client.summarize_memories()로 요약 생성
}
</code></pre>
<p>Trace loading supports two formats:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>JSON array</strong>: <code>[{...}, {...}]</code> format</li>
<li><strong>JSONL</strong>: One JSON object per line</li>
</ul>
<p>When normalizing, extract the payload from the event where <code>payload.type == "response_item"</code> and check whether the <code>message</code> role is one of <code>assistant</code>, <code>system</code>, <code>developer</code>, or <code>user</code> using <code>is_allowed_trace_item()</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>8. Memory Citation System</h2>
<p>There is a citation system that tracks the source when an agent references a memory:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/citations.rs
pub fn parse_memory_citation(citations: Vec&#x3C;String>) -> Option&#x3C;MemoryCitation> {
    // &#x3C;citation_entries> ... &#x3C;/citation_entries> 블록 파싱
    // &#x3C;rollout_ids> 또는 &#x3C;thread_ids> 블록에서 UUID 추출
}

pub fn get_thread_id_from_citations(citations: Vec&#x3C;String>) -> Vec&#x3C;ThreadId> {
    // citation에서 thread_id 추출 → usage 추적에 사용
}
</code></pre>
<p>Citation format:</p>
<pre><code>&#x3C;oai-mem-citation>
&#x3C;citation_entries>
MEMORY.md:234-236|note=[responses api citation extraction code pointer]
rollout_summaries/2026-02-17T21-23-02-LN3m-weekly_report.md:10-12|note=[weekly report format]
&#x3C;/citation_entries>
&#x3C;rollout_ids>
019c6e27-e55b-73d1-87d8-4e01f1f75043
&#x3C;/rollout_ids>
&#x3C;/oai-mem-citation>
</code></pre>
<p>The extracted <code>thread_id</code> is recorded in the state DB with <code>record_stage1_output_usage()</code>, and <code>usage_count</code> and <code>last_usage</code> of the corresponding memory are updated. This data affects the input selection priority of Phase 2.</p>
<hr>
<h2>9. Memory Usage Telemetry</h2>
<p>When the agent reads a memory file, it collects usage metrics:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/usage.rs
enum MemoriesUsageKind {
    MemoryMd,          // memories/MEMORY.md
    MemorySummary,     // memories/memory_summary.md
    RawMemories,       // memories/raw_memories.md
    RolloutSummaries,  // memories/rollout_summaries/
    Skills,            // memories/skills/
}

pub(crate) async fn emit_metric_for_tool_read(invocation: &#x26;ToolInvocation, success: bool) {
    // shell/shell_command/exec_command 도구에서 메모리 파일 읽기 감지
    // → codex.memories.usage 카운터 emit
    //   tags: (kind, tool, success)
}
</code></pre>
<p>Parses the command of the tool call to determine whether the read target path is a memory folder, and issues a metric only if it is <code>is_known_safe_command()</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>10. State DB schema</h2>
<p>The persistence of the memory pipeline relies on a SQLite-based state DB.</p>
<h3>10.1 Core tables</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>table</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>threads</code></td>
<td>Session (thread) metadata + <code>memory_mode</code> column</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>stage1_outputs</code></td>
<td>Phase 1 extraction results (raw_memory, rollout_summary, rollout_slug, etc.)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>jobs</code></td>
<td>job ownership, lease, watermark, retry status</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>10.2 Stage1Output schema</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/state/src/model/memories.rs
pub struct Stage1Output {
    pub thread_id: ThreadId,
    pub rollout_path: PathBuf,
    pub source_updated_at: DateTime&#x3C;Utc>,
    pub raw_memory: String,
    pub rollout_summary: String,
    pub rollout_slug: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub cwd: PathBuf,
    pub git_branch: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub generated_at: DateTime&#x3C;Utc>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>10.3 Memory initialization</h3>
<p>Two ways to completely initialize memory data:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/state/src/runtime/memories.rs

// 1. clear_memory_data: stage1_outputs + memory jobs 삭제
pub async fn clear_memory_data(&#x26;self) -> anyhow::Result&#x3C;()>;

// 2. reset_memory_data_for_fresh_start: 위 + 기존 thread의 memory_mode를 'disabled'로 변경
//    → 히스토리 롤아웃이 즉시 재처리되는 것을 방지
pub async fn reset_memory_data_for_fresh_start(&#x26;self) -> anyhow::Result&#x3C;()>;
</code></pre>
<h3>10.4 Memory Root Management</h3>
<p>Root initialization of the memory file system also takes security into account:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn clear_memory_root_contents(memory_root: &#x26;Path) -> std::io::Result&#x3C;()> {
    // symlink인 경우 거부 (보안)
    match tokio::fs::symlink_metadata(memory_root).await {
        Ok(metadata) if metadata.file_type().is_symlink() => {
            return Err(std::io::Error::new(
                std::io::ErrorKind::InvalidInput,
                format!("refusing to clear symlinked memory root {}", memory_root.display()),
            ));
        }
        // ...
    }
    // 모든 파일/디렉토리 삭제
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>11. Session persistence (Rollout Recording)</h2>
<p>Permanence of conversation history is achieved through a rollout recording system.</p>
<h3>11.1 Rollout structure</h3>
<p>The conversation content of each session is recorded as a JSONL file:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>session_meta</code> — Session metadata (id, source, model, etc.)</li>
<li><code>turn_context</code> — Turn boundary marker</li>
<li><code>event_msg</code> — lightweight state stream</li>
<li><code>response_item</code> — actual message, tool call, tool output</li>
</ul>
<h3>11.2 Rollout path structure</h3>
<pre><code>$CODEX_HOME/
├── sessions/           # 활성 세션 롤아웃
│   └── YYYY/MM/DD/     # 날짜별 디렉토리
│       └── {thread_id}.jsonl
├── archived_sessions/  # 아카이브된 세션
└── memories/           # Phase 2 출력
    ├── memory_summary.md
    ├── MEMORY.md
    ├── raw_memories.md
    ├── rollout_summaries/
    │   └── {timestamp}-{hash}-{slug}.md
    └── skills/
        └── {skill-name}/
            ├── SKILL.md
            ├── scripts/
            ├── templates/
            └── examples/
</code></pre>
<hr>

<h3>Fork Perspective</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Two-stage separation (extraction → integration) is architecturally clean and has high reuse value.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> State DB-based job coordination is essential in a multi-session environment</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Security is considered as a secret redaction step is included.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Quantify the “value” of memory with citation-based usage tracking</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> progressive disclosure pattern contributes to token efficiency</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> Security hardening is well implemented, such as symlink rejection and network blocking.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> The part that uses <code>gpt-5.1-codex-mini</code> in phase 1 and <code>gpt-5.3-codex</code> in phase 2 is model dependent, so abstraction is required.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Injection method of <code>memory_tool_developer_instructions</code> (5,000 token limit) cross-references 02_co_prompt</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> You must bring the state DB schema (<code>codex-rs/state/</code>) together.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> compaction’s inline/remote branch logic is provider dependent</li>
</ul>
