<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: Memory was organized into a 2-phase extraction/consolidation pipeline.</li>
<li>2025-07-25: Fully expanded based on source code. Phase 1/2 detailed flow, AGENTS.md loading, ContextManager, compaction, citation, state DB schema, metrics, memory trace path added.</li>
</ul>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>010_memory-pipeline/10_co_memory.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>Codex 메모리 파이프라인 분석</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — memory pipeline.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex의 메모리 시스템은 세션 간 학습을 위한 비동기 2단계 파이프라인이다. 단순 "대화 기록 저장"이 아니라, <strong>롤아웃에서 구조화된 기억을 추출하고 통합하는 에이전트 기반 파이프라인</strong>이다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. 메모리 아키텍처 개요</h2>
<h3>1.1 설계 철학</h3>
<p>Codex 메모리는 <strong>"에이전트가 에이전트를 가르치는"</strong> 구조다. 사용자의 과거 세션(rollout)을 LLM이 분석하여 구조화된 기억으로 변환하고, 이를 다시 미래 세션의 system prompt에 주입한다. 핵심 원칙:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>2단계 분리</strong>: 개별 롤아웃 추출(Phase 1)과 전역 통합(Phase 2)을 분리하여, 병렬 추출과 안전한 전역 상태 갱신을 모두 달성한다.</li>
<li><strong>State DB 중심 coordination</strong>: SQLite 기반 state DB가 job 소유권, lease, watermark을 관리하여 다중 세션 간 중복 작업을 방지한다.</li>
<li><strong>Progressive disclosure</strong>: 메모리 파일을 <code>memory_summary.md</code> → <code>MEMORY.md</code> → <code>rollout_summaries/</code> → <code>skills/</code> 순으로 계층화하여, 에이전트가 필요한 깊이만큼만 탐색한다.</li>
<li><strong>Secret redaction</strong>: 추출된 메모리에서 토큰/키/비밀번호를 자동 제거한다.</li>
<li><strong>No-op 허용</strong>: 의미 있는 학습이 없으면 빈 결과를 반환하여 노이즈를 방지한다.</li>
</ol>
<h3>1.2 전체 흐름</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    A["session start"] --> B["start_memories_startup_task()"]
    B --> B1{"ephemeral? / MemoryTool disabled? / SubAgent?"}
    B1 -->|"yes"| SKIP["skip"]
    B1 -->|"no"| C["Phase 1: prune → run"]
    C --> C1["claim eligible rollouts from state DB"]
    C1 --> C2["parallel extraction (concurrency cap=8)"]
    C2 -->|"gpt-5.1-codex-mini"| C3["StageOneOutput: raw_memory + rollout_summary + rollout_slug"]
    C3 --> C4["redact_secrets() → state DB persist"]
    C4 --> D["Phase 2: run"]
    D --> D1["claim global consolidation lock"]
    D1 --> D2["load stage-1 outputs + compute selection diff"]
    D2 --> D3["sync filesystem artifacts"]
    D3 --> D4["spawn consolidation sub-agent"]
    D4 -->|"gpt-5.3-codex"| D5["update memory_summary.md / MEMORY.md / skills/"]
    D5 --> D6["heartbeat loop + status watch"]
    D6 --> D7["mark job succeeded/failed in state DB"]
</code></pre>
<h3>1.3 진입점</h3>
<p>파이프라인의 단일 진입점은 <code>start_memories_startup_task()</code>이다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/start.rs
pub(crate) fn start_memories_startup_task(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    config: Arc&#x3C;Config>,
    source: &#x26;SessionSource,
) {
    // 다음 조건에서 skip:
    if config.ephemeral
        || !config.features.enabled(Feature::MemoryTool)
        || matches!(source, SessionSource::SubAgent(_))
    {
        return;
    }

    if session.services.state_db.is_none() {
        warn!("state db unavailable for memories startup pipeline; skipping");
        return;
    }

    let weak_session = Arc::downgrade(session);
    tokio::spawn(async move {
        let Some(session) = weak_session.upgrade() else { return; };
        phase1::prune(&#x26;session, &#x26;config).await;  // 오래된 메모리 정리
        phase1::run(&#x26;session, &#x26;config).await;     // Phase 1 실행
        phase2::run(&#x26;session, config).await;      // Phase 2 실행
    });
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>Arc::downgrade</code>를 사용하여 세션이 이미 종료된 경우 파이프라인이 조용히 중단된다. 전체 파이프라인은 <code>tokio::spawn</code>으로 비동기 백그라운드에서 실행되므로 사용자 상호작용을 차단하지 않는다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>2. 프로젝트 지시 로딩 (AGENTS.md)</h2>
<p>메모리 파이프라인과 별도로, Codex는 프로젝트 수준의 지시사항을 <code>AGENTS.md</code> 파일을 통해 로딩한다. 이 메커니즘은 메모리 주입의 "정적" 경로에 해당한다.</p>
<h3>2.1 파일 탐색 메커니즘</h3>
<p><code>project_doc.rs</code>에서 구현된 탐색 알고리즘:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Project root 결정</strong>: cwd에서 상위로 올라가며 <code>project_root_markers</code> (기본값: <code>.git</code>)를 찾는다.</li>
<li><strong>계층적 수집</strong>: project root부터 cwd까지 모든 디렉토리에서 <code>AGENTS.md</code>를 탐색한다.</li>
<li><strong>우선순위</strong>: <code>AGENTS.override.md</code> > <code>AGENTS.md</code> > <code>project_doc_fallback_filenames</code> 설정값 순서.</li>
<li><strong>크기 제한</strong>: <code>project_doc_max_bytes</code> 설정으로 총 바이트 제한. 초과 시 truncate.</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/project_doc.rs
pub const DEFAULT_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "AGENTS.md";
pub const LOCAL_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME: &#x26;str = "AGENTS.override.md";

fn candidate_filenames&#x3C;'a>(config: &#x26;'a Config) -> Vec&#x3C;&#x26;'a str> {
    let mut names = Vec::with_capacity(2 + config.project_doc_fallback_filenames.len());
    names.push(LOCAL_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME);   // 최우선
    names.push(DEFAULT_PROJECT_DOC_FILENAME); // 기본
    for candidate in &#x26;config.project_doc_fallback_filenames {
        if !candidate.is_empty() &#x26;&#x26; !names.contains(&#x26;candidate.as_str()) {
            names.push(candidate);
        }
    }
    names
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.2 지시사항 주입 형식</h3>
<p>로딩된 <code>AGENTS.md</code> 내용은 <code>UserInstructions</code> 구조체로 캡슐화되어, contextual user message 프래그먼트로 히스토리에 주입된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/instructions/user_instructions.rs
pub const USER_INSTRUCTIONS_PREFIX: &#x26;str = "# AGENTS.md instructions for ";

impl UserInstructions {
    pub(crate) fn serialize_to_text(&#x26;self) -> String {
        format!(
            "{prefix}{directory}\n\n&#x3C;INSTRUCTIONS>\n{contents}\n{suffix}",
            prefix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.start_marker(),
            directory = self.directory,
            contents = self.text,
            suffix = AGENTS_MD_FRAGMENT.end_marker(),
        )
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>마커 태그(<code># AGENTS.md instructions for ...</code> ~ <code>&#x3C;/INSTRUCTIONS></code>)로 감싸진 형태로 모델에 전달되며, 메모리 추출 시에는 이 프래그먼트가 <strong>필터링 대상</strong>이 된다 — Phase 1에서 롤아웃을 직렬화할 때 <code>developer</code> role 메시지와 함께 제거된다.</p>
<h3>2.3 메모리 읽기 경로 (Read Path)</h3>
<p>이전 세션에서 생성된 <code>memory_summary.md</code>를 현재 세션의 developer instructions에 주입하는 경로가 별도로 존재한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/prompts.rs
pub(crate) async fn build_memory_tool_developer_instructions(
    codex_home: &#x26;Path,
) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let base_path = memory_root(codex_home);
    let memory_summary_path = base_path.join("memory_summary.md");
    let memory_summary = fs::read_to_string(&#x26;memory_summary_path).await.ok()?
        .trim().to_string();
    let memory_summary = truncate_text(
        &#x26;memory_summary,
        TruncationPolicy::Tokens(
            phase_one::MEMORY_TOOL_DEVELOPER_INSTRUCTIONS_SUMMARY_TOKEN_LIMIT // 5,000 토큰
        ),
    );
    if memory_summary.is_empty() { return None; }
    // read_path.md 템플릿으로 렌더링
    let template = MemoryToolDeveloperInstructionsTemplate {
        base_path: &#x26;base_path.display().to_string(),
        memory_summary: &#x26;memory_summary,
    };
    template.render().ok()
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>read_path.md</code> 템플릿은 에이전트에게 메모리 폴더 탐색 전략을 안내한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>memory_summary.md</code>는 항상 system prompt에 포함 (이미 제공됨)</li>
<li><code>MEMORY.md</code>는 keyword 검색용 핸드북</li>
<li><code>rollout_summaries/</code>는 개별 롤아웃의 상세 증거</li>
<li><code>skills/&#x3C;name>/</code>는 재사용 가능한 절차</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>3. Phase 1: 롤아웃 추출 (Rollout Extraction)</h2>
<h3>3.1 동작 순서</h3>
<p>Phase 1의 <code>run()</code> 함수는 엄격한 4단계 순서로 실행된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
pub(in crate::memories) async fn run(session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>, config: &#x26;Config) {
    // 1. claim eligible rollout jobs
    let Some(claimed_candidates) = claim_startup_jobs(session, &#x26;config.memories).await
        else { return; };

    // 2. build one stage-1 request context
    let stage_one_context = build_request_context(session, config).await;

    // 3. run stage-1 extraction jobs in parallel
    let outcomes = run_jobs(session, claimed_candidates, stage_one_context).await;

    // 4. emit metrics and logs
    let counts = aggregate_stats(outcomes);
    emit_metrics(session, &#x26;counts);
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 롤아웃 선별 및 Job Claiming</h3>
<p>State DB의 <code>threads</code> 테이블과 <code>stage1_outputs</code>, <code>jobs</code> 테이블을 JOIN하여 적격 롤아웃을 선별한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/state/src/runtime/memories.rs — claim_stage1_jobs_for_startup()
// 필터 조건:
// - memory_mode = 'enabled'
// - 현재 세션의 thread_id 제외
// - updated_at >= now - max_age_days  (너무 오래된 건 제외)
// - updated_at &#x3C;= now - min_rollout_idle_hours  (아직 활성인 건 제외)
// - COALESCE(stage1_outputs.source_updated_at, -1) &#x3C; updated_at  (이미 처리된 건 제외)
// - COALESCE(jobs.last_success_watermark, -1) &#x3C; updated_at  (이미 성공한 건 제외)
// ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
// LIMIT scan_limit (5,000)
</code></pre>
<p>각 후보에 대해 <code>try_claim_stage1_job()</code>으로 lease를 획득한다. 가능한 결과:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th><code>Stage1JobClaimOutcome</code></th>
<th>의미</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>Claimed { ownership_token }</code></td>
<td>lease 획득 성공, 추출 진행</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SkippedUpToDate</code></td>
<td>이미 최신 출력이 있음</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SkippedRunning</code></td>
<td>다른 워커가 lease 보유 중</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SkippedRetryBackoff</code></td>
<td>실패 후 backoff 기간 중</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>SkippedRetryExhausted</code></td>
<td>재시도 횟수 소진 (기본 3회)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>3.3 병렬 추출 (Parallel Sampling)</h3>
<p>Claimed job들을 <code>futures::stream::buffer_unordered</code>로 병렬 처리한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
async fn run_jobs(
    session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    claimed_candidates: Vec&#x3C;codex_state::Stage1JobClaim>,
    stage_one_context: RequestContext,
) -> Vec&#x3C;JobResult> {
    futures::stream::iter(claimed_candidates.into_iter())
        .map(|claim| {
            let session = Arc::clone(session);
            let stage_one_context = stage_one_context.clone();
            async move { job::run(session.as_ref(), claim, &#x26;stage_one_context).await }
        })
        .buffer_unordered(phase_one::CONCURRENCY_LIMIT)  // 최대 8개 동시
        .collect::&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;_>>()
        .await
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.4 개별 Job 실행 흐름</h3>
<p>각 job은 롤아웃 파일을 로드하고, 메모리에 부적합한 항목을 필터링한 뒤, 모델에 보낸다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs — job::sample()
async fn sample(session, rollout_path, rollout_cwd, stage_one_context) {
    // 1. 롤아웃 아이템 로드
    let (rollout_items, _, _) = RolloutRecorder::load_rollout_items(rollout_path).await?;

    // 2. 메모리 관련 response items만 필터링 + 직렬화
    let rollout_contents = serialize_filtered_rollout_response_items(&#x26;rollout_items)?;

    // 3. 컨텍스트 윈도우의 70%까지 truncate
    let prompt = Prompt {
        input: vec![/* build_stage_one_input_message() */],
        base_instructions: BaseInstructions {
            text: phase_one::PROMPT.to_string(),  // stage_one_system.md
        },
        output_schema: Some(output_schema()),     // JSON schema 강제
        ..
    };

    // 4. 스트리밍 응답 수집
    let mut stream = client_session.stream(&#x26;prompt, ...).await?;
    // ...

    // 5. secret redaction
    let mut output: StageOneOutput = serde_json::from_str(&#x26;result)?;
    output.raw_memory = redact_secrets(output.raw_memory);
    output.rollout_summary = redact_secrets(output.rollout_summary);
    output.rollout_slug = output.rollout_slug.map(redact_secrets);
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.5 롤아웃 필터링 규칙</h3>
<p>롤아웃의 모든 아이템이 메모리에 포함되는 것은 아니다. <code>sanitize_response_item_for_memories()</code>에서:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>developer</code> role 메시지 → <strong>제거</strong> (system prompt, AGENTS.md 등 구조적 프래그먼트)</li>
<li><code>user</code> role 메시지 중 <code>is_memory_excluded_contextual_user_fragment()</code> → <strong>제거</strong> (환경 컨텍스트, AGENTS.md 프래그먼트 등)</li>
<li>기타 <code>user</code>/<code>assistant</code> 메시지 → <strong>보존</strong></li>
<li><code>should_persist_response_item_for_memories()</code> → function call, tool output 등 판정</li>
</ul>
<h3>3.6 Phase 1 출력 스키마</h3>
<p>모델은 JSON Schema로 강제된 structured output을 반환한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
pub fn output_schema() -> Value {
    json!({
        "type": "object",
        "properties": {
            "rollout_summary": { "type": "string" },
            "rollout_slug": { "type": ["string", "null"] },
            "raw_memory": { "type": "string" }
        },
        "required": ["rollout_summary", "rollout_slug", "raw_memory"],
        "additionalProperties": false
    })
}
</code></pre>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>필드</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>raw_memory</code></td>
<td>상세 마크다운 형태의 원시 기억</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>rollout_summary</code></td>
<td>라우팅·인덱싱용 1줄 요약</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>rollout_slug</code></td>
<td>파일명 생성용 짧은 식별자 (선택)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>3.7 Stage 1 System Prompt 핵심 내용</h3>
<p><code>stage_one_system.md</code> 템플릿의 핵심 지침:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>No-op gate</strong>: "Will a future agent plausibly act better because of what I write here?" — 아니면 빈 필드 반환</li>
<li><strong>High-signal memory 기준</strong>: (1) 안정적 사용자 선호, (2) 고레버리지 절차적 지식, (3) 의사결정 트리거, (4) 환경/워크플로우 증거</li>
<li><strong>Secret redaction</strong>: 토큰/키/비밀번호는 <code>[REDACTED_SECRET]</code>으로 대체</li>
<li><strong>Immutable evidence</strong>: raw rollout은 절대 수정하지 않음</li>
</ul>
<h3>3.8 오래된 메모리 정리 (Prune)</h3>
<p>Phase 1 실행 전에 <code>prune()</code>가 호출되어, <code>max_unused_days</code>를 초과한 미사용 stage-1 output을 배치 삭제한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase1.rs
pub(in crate::memories) async fn prune(session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>, config: &#x26;Config) {
    if let Some(db) = session.services.state_db.as_deref() {
        let max_unused_days = config.memories.max_unused_days;
        match db.prune_stage1_outputs_for_retention(max_unused_days, PRUNE_BATCH_SIZE).await {
            Ok(pruned) => { /* log */ },
            Err(err) => { /* warn */ },
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>4. Phase 2: 전역 통합 (Global Consolidation)</h2>
<h3>4.1 동작 순서</h3>
<p>Phase 2는 7단계로 구성된 strictly linear flow다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs — run()
pub(super) async fn run(session: &#x26;Arc&#x3C;Session>, config: Arc&#x3C;Config>) {
    // 1. Claim the global consolidation job
    let claim = job::claim(session, db).await?;

    // 2. Get agent config (sandbox policy 등)
    let agent_config = agent::get_config(config.clone());

    // 3. Query stage-1 outputs with selection rules
    let selection = db.get_phase2_input_selection(max_raw_memories, max_unused_days).await?;

    // 4. Sync filesystem artifacts
    sync_rollout_summaries_from_memories(&#x26;root, &#x26;artifact_memories, ...).await?;
    rebuild_raw_memories_file_from_memories(&#x26;root, &#x26;artifact_memories, ...).await?;

    // 5. Spawn consolidation sub-agent
    let prompt = agent::get_prompt(config, &#x26;selection);
    let thread_id = session.services.agent_control
        .spawn_agent(agent_config, prompt, Some(source)).await?;

    // 6. Handle agent lifecycle (heartbeat + status watch)
    agent::handle(session, claim, new_watermark, raw_memories, thread_id, timer);

    // 7. Emit metrics
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 Global Lock (Phase 2 Job Claim)</h3>
<p>Phase 2는 전역에서 단 하나의 consolidation만 실행되도록 보장한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs — job::claim()
let claim = db
    .try_claim_global_phase2_job(session.conversation_id, phase_two::JOB_LEASE_SECONDS)
    .await?;

// 가능한 결과:
// Phase2JobClaimOutcome::Claimed { ownership_token, input_watermark }
// Phase2JobClaimOutcome::SkippedNotDirty   — 새 입력 없음
// Phase2JobClaimOutcome::SkippedRunning    — 다른 워커가 실행 중
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 Input Selection 및 Diff</h3>
<p>Phase 2는 단순히 최신 N개를 가져오는 것이 아니라, 이전 성공적 Phase 2 실행과의 <strong>diff</strong>를 계산한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/state/src/model/memories.rs
pub struct Phase2InputSelection {
    pub selected: Vec&#x3C;Stage1Output>,           // 현재 선택된 입력
    pub previous_selected: Vec&#x3C;Stage1Output>,  // 이전 Phase 2에서 선택됐던 입력
    pub retained_thread_ids: Vec&#x3C;ThreadId>,    // 이전에도 현재에도 선택된 thread
    pub removed: Vec&#x3C;Stage1OutputRef>,         // 이전에 선택됐지만 현재 빠진 입력
}
</code></pre>
<p>Selection 정책:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>max_unused_days</code> 초과한 <code>last_usage</code> 가진 메모리 제외</li>
<li><code>last_usage</code> 없으면 <code>generated_at</code>으로 fallback</li>
<li><code>usage_count</code> 높은 순 → 최근 <code>last_usage</code>/<code>generated_at</code> 순으로 정렬</li>
</ul>
<h3>4.4 파일시스템 동기화</h3>
<p>Phase 2는 DB의 stage-1 outputs를 파일시스템에 동기화한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/storage.rs

// 1. rollout_summaries/ 동기화: 유지 대상만 남기고 나머지 삭제
async fn sync_rollout_summaries_from_memories(root, memories, max) {
    let retained = retained_memories(memories, max);
    let keep = retained.iter().map(rollout_summary_file_stem).collect::&#x3C;HashSet&#x3C;_>>();
    prune_rollout_summaries(root, &#x26;keep).await?;
    for memory in retained {
        write_rollout_summary_for_thread(root, memory).await?;
    }
    // retained가 비어 있으면 MEMORY.md, memory_summary.md, skills/ 도 삭제
}

// 2. raw_memories.md 재생성: 최신 순으로 병합
async fn rebuild_raw_memories_file(root, memories, max) {
    let mut body = String::from("# Raw Memories\n\n");
    body.push_str("Merged stage-1 raw memories (latest first):\n\n");
    for memory in retained {
        // ## Thread `{thread_id}`
        // updated_at: {rfc3339}
        // cwd: {path}
        // rollout_path: {path}
        // rollout_summary_file: {file}
        // {raw_memory content}
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.5 Rollout Summary 파일명 생성</h3>
<p>파일명은 UUID 기반 thread_id에서 타임스탬프와 short hash를 추출하여 생성된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/storage.rs
fn rollout_summary_file_stem_from_parts(thread_id, source_updated_at, rollout_slug) -> String {
    // UUID에서 타임스탬프 추출 → "2026-03-26T14-30-00"
    // UUID 하위 32비트 → 62진법 4자리 short hash
    // rollout_slug → 소문자화 + 특수문자 → '_' 변환, 최대 60자
    // 결과: "2026-03-26T14-30-00-aB3x-fix_login_bug"
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.6 Consolidation Sub-Agent 설정</h3>
<p>Phase 2가 생성하는 sub-agent는 매우 제한적인 환경에서 실행된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs — agent::get_config()
pub(super) fn get_config(config: Arc&#x3C;Config>) -> Option&#x3C;Config> {
    let mut agent_config = config.as_ref().clone();

    agent_config.cwd = memory_root(&#x26;config.codex_home);  // memories/ 디렉토리

    // 재귀적 메모리 생성 차단
    agent_config.memories.generate_memories = false;

    // 승인 불필요
    agent_config.permissions.approval_policy =
        Constrained::allow_only(AskForApproval::Never);

    // 하위 에이전트 생성/협업/메모리 도구 비활성화
    agent_config.features.disable(Feature::SpawnCsv);
    agent_config.features.disable(Feature::Collab);
    agent_config.features.disable(Feature::MemoryTool);

    // 샌드박스: codex_home만 쓰기 가능, 네트워크 차단
    let consolidation_sandbox_policy = SandboxPolicy::WorkspaceWrite {
        writable_roots: vec![codex_home],
        network_access: false,       // 네트워크 완전 차단
        ..
    };

    agent_config.model = Some(
        config.memories.consolidation_model.clone()
            .unwrap_or(phase_two::MODEL.to_string())  // "gpt-5.3-codex"
    );
    agent_config.model_reasoning_effort = Some(phase_two::REASONING_EFFORT);  // Medium
    Some(agent_config)
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.7 Heartbeat 및 상태 감시</h3>
<p>Sub-agent 실행 중 90초마다 heartbeat를 보내 lease를 갱신한다. Lease 갱신 실패 시 즉시 중단:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs — agent::loop_agent()
async fn loop_agent(db, token, thread_id, mut rx) -> AgentStatus {
    let mut heartbeat_interval =
        tokio::time::interval(Duration::from_secs(phase_two::JOB_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS)); // 90초

    loop {
        let status = rx.borrow().clone();
        if is_final_agent_status(&#x26;status) { break status; }

        tokio::select! {
            update = rx.changed() => {
                if update.is_err() { break status; }  // 채널 끊김
            }
            _ = heartbeat_interval.tick() => {
                match db.heartbeat_global_phase2_job(&#x26;token, JOB_LEASE_SECONDS).await {
                    Ok(true) => {},                    // lease 갱신 성공
                    Ok(false) => break Errored(..),    // 소유권 상실
                    Err(err) => break Errored(..),     // DB 오류
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.8 Watermark 관리</h3>
<p>Watermark는 Phase 2가 마지막으로 처리한 입력의 타임스탬프를 추적한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/phase2.rs
pub(super) fn get_watermark(
    claimed_watermark: i64,
    latest_memories: &#x26;[codex_state::Stage1Output],
) -> i64 {
    latest_memories.iter()
        .map(|m| m.source_updated_at.timestamp())
        .max()
        .unwrap_or(claimed_watermark)
        .max(claimed_watermark)  // 절대 뒤로 가지 않음
}
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li>claim 시점의 watermark와 실제 로드된 입력의 최신 타임스탬프 중 큰 값을 사용</li>
<li>성공 시 DB에 저장 → 다음 Phase 2가 "dirty 여부" 판단에 사용</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>5. 대화 히스토리 관리</h2>
<h3>5.1 ContextManager 구조체</h3>
<p>세션 내 대화 히스토리는 <code>ContextManager</code>로 관리된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/context_manager/history.rs
pub(crate) struct ContextManager {
    items: Vec&#x3C;ResponseItem>,              // oldest → newest 순서
    token_info: Option&#x3C;TokenUsageInfo>,     // 마지막 API 응답의 토큰 사용량
    reference_context_item: Option&#x3C;TurnContextItem>,  // 다음 턴의 context 기준선
}
</code></pre>
<p>핵심 메서드:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>record_items()</code> — 새 아이템을 히스토리에 추가하면서 truncation policy 적용</li>
<li><code>for_prompt()</code> — 모델에 보낼 히스토리를 정규화하여 반환 (GhostSnapshot 제거, 이미지 필터링 등)</li>
<li><code>remove_first_item()</code> / <code>remove_last_item()</code> — 컨텍스트 윈도우 초과 시 아이템 제거</li>
<li><code>replace()</code> — compaction 후 히스토리 전체 교체</li>
</ul>
<h3>5.2 히스토리 정규화</h3>
<p>모델에 보내기 전에 <code>normalize_history()</code>가 호출되어:</p>
<ul>
<li>모델이 지원하지 않는 modality(예: 이미지) 제거</li>
<li>고아 function call output 정리 (대응하는 call이 없는 output 제거)</li>
<li>GhostSnapshot 아이템 제거 (UI용이므로 모델에 불필요)</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>6. 컨텍스트 윈도우 관리 및 Compaction</h2>
<h3>6.1 두 가지 Compaction 전략</h3>
<p>Codex는 컨텍스트 윈도우가 가득 차면 대화 내용을 압축하는 compaction을 수행한다:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Inline Compaction</strong> (<code>compact.rs</code>): 모델에게 히스토리 요약을 요청하여 로컬에서 처리</li>
<li><strong>Remote Compaction</strong> (<code>compact_remote.rs</code>): OpenAI 제공자 사용 시 서버측에서 처리</li>
</ol>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/compact.rs
pub(crate) fn should_use_remote_compact_task(provider: &#x26;ModelProviderInfo) -> bool {
    provider.is_openai()  // OpenAI인 경우만 remote compaction
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.2 Inline Compaction 흐름</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/compact.rs
pub(crate) async fn run_inline_auto_compact_task(
    sess: Arc&#x3C;Session>,
    turn_context: Arc&#x3C;TurnContext>,
    initial_context_injection: InitialContextInjection,
) -> CodexResult&#x3C;()> {
    let prompt = turn_context.compact_prompt().to_string(); // compact/prompt.md
    // ...
    // 1. 모델에게 히스토리 요약 요청
    // 2. 응답에서 요약 추출
    let summary_text = format!("{SUMMARY_PREFIX}\n{summary_suffix}");
    // 3. 사용자 메시지 수집 (최근 20,000 토큰까지)
    let user_messages = collect_user_messages(history_items);
    // 4. 새 히스토리 구성: 초기 컨텍스트 + 사용자 메시지 + 요약
    let new_history = build_compacted_history(Vec::new(), &#x26;user_messages, &#x26;summary_text);
    // 5. 히스토리 교체
    sess.replace_compacted_history(new_history, reference_context_item, compacted_item).await;
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.3 Compaction 후 Initial Context 재주입</h3>
<p>Compaction 유형에 따라 initial context 주입 전략이 다르다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/compact.rs
pub(crate) enum InitialContextInjection {
    BeforeLastUserMessage,  // mid-turn compaction: 마지막 사용자 메시지 직전에 주입
    DoNotInject,            // pre-turn compaction: 다음 턴에서 자동 재주입
}
</code></pre>
<h3>6.4 사용자 메시지 보존 전략</h3>
<p>Compaction 시 사용자 메시지는 최근 것부터 역순으로 최대 <code>COMPACT_USER_MESSAGE_MAX_TOKENS</code> (20,000 토큰)까지 보존된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/compact.rs
fn build_compacted_history_with_limit(
    mut history, user_messages, summary_text, max_tokens,
) -> Vec&#x3C;ResponseItem> {
    let mut remaining = max_tokens;
    for message in user_messages.iter().rev() {  // 최신 → 과거 순
        let tokens = approx_token_count(message);
        if tokens &#x3C;= remaining {
            selected_messages.push(message.clone());
            remaining -= tokens;
        } else {
            let truncated = truncate_text(message, TruncationPolicy::Tokens(remaining));
            selected_messages.push(truncated);
            break;
        }
    }
    selected_messages.reverse();
    // history에 사용자 메시지 추가 → 마지막에 요약 추가
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>7. Memory Trace (레거시 경로)</h2>
<p><code>memory_trace.rs</code>는 raw trace 파일에서 메모리를 빌드하는 별도 경로를 제공한다. Phase 1/2 파이프라인과 독립적으로 동작:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memory_trace.rs
pub struct BuiltMemory {
    pub memory_id: String,
    pub source_path: PathBuf,
    pub raw_memory: String,
    pub memory_summary: String,
}

pub async fn build_memories_from_trace_files(
    client: &#x26;ModelClient,
    trace_paths: &#x26;[PathBuf],
    model_info: &#x26;ModelInfo,
    effort: Option&#x3C;ReasoningEffortConfig>,
    session_telemetry: &#x26;SessionTelemetry,
) -> Result&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;BuiltMemory>> {
    // 1. trace 파일 로드 (JSON array 또는 JSONL)
    // 2. BOM 처리, 항목 정규화
    // 3. 허용된 trace item만 필터링 (message: assistant/system/developer/user)
    // 4. client.summarize_memories()로 요약 생성
}
</code></pre>
<p>Trace 로딩은 두 가지 형식을 지원한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>JSON array</strong>: <code>[{...}, {...}]</code> 형태</li>
<li><strong>JSONL</strong>: 한 줄에 하나의 JSON object</li>
</ul>
<p>정규화 시 <code>payload.type == "response_item"</code>인 이벤트에서 payload를 추출하고, <code>is_allowed_trace_item()</code>으로 <code>message</code> role이 <code>assistant</code>, <code>system</code>, <code>developer</code>, <code>user</code> 중 하나인지 확인한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>8. Memory Citation 시스템</h2>
<p>에이전트가 메모리를 참조했을 때 출처를 추적하는 citation 시스템이 있다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/citations.rs
pub fn parse_memory_citation(citations: Vec&#x3C;String>) -> Option&#x3C;MemoryCitation> {
    // &#x3C;citation_entries> ... &#x3C;/citation_entries> 블록 파싱
    // &#x3C;rollout_ids> 또는 &#x3C;thread_ids> 블록에서 UUID 추출
}

pub fn get_thread_id_from_citations(citations: Vec&#x3C;String>) -> Vec&#x3C;ThreadId> {
    // citation에서 thread_id 추출 → usage 추적에 사용
}
</code></pre>
<p>Citation 형식:</p>
<pre><code>&#x3C;oai-mem-citation>
&#x3C;citation_entries>
MEMORY.md:234-236|note=[responses api citation extraction code pointer]
rollout_summaries/2026-02-17T21-23-02-LN3m-weekly_report.md:10-12|note=[weekly report format]
&#x3C;/citation_entries>
&#x3C;rollout_ids>
019c6e27-e55b-73d1-87d8-4e01f1f75043
&#x3C;/rollout_ids>
&#x3C;/oai-mem-citation>
</code></pre>
<p>추출된 <code>thread_id</code>들은 <code>record_stage1_output_usage()</code>로 state DB에 기록되어, 해당 메모리의 <code>usage_count</code>와 <code>last_usage</code>를 갱신한다. 이 데이터는 Phase 2의 input selection 우선순위에 영향을 미친다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>9. Memory Usage 텔레메트리</h2>
<p>에이전트가 메모리 파일을 읽을 때 usage 메트릭을 수집한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/usage.rs
enum MemoriesUsageKind {
    MemoryMd,          // memories/MEMORY.md
    MemorySummary,     // memories/memory_summary.md
    RawMemories,       // memories/raw_memories.md
    RolloutSummaries,  // memories/rollout_summaries/
    Skills,            // memories/skills/
}

pub(crate) async fn emit_metric_for_tool_read(invocation: &#x26;ToolInvocation, success: bool) {
    // shell/shell_command/exec_command 도구에서 메모리 파일 읽기 감지
    // → codex.memories.usage 카운터 emit
    //   tags: (kind, tool, success)
}
</code></pre>
<p>도구 호출의 command를 파싱하여 읽기 대상 경로가 메모리 폴더인지 판별하고, <code>is_known_safe_command()</code>인 경우에만 메트릭을 발행한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>10. State DB 스키마</h2>
<p>메모리 파이프라인의 영속성은 SQLite 기반 state DB에 의존한다.</p>
<h3>10.1 핵심 테이블</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>테이블</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>threads</code></td>
<td>세션(thread) 메타데이터 + <code>memory_mode</code> 컬럼</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>stage1_outputs</code></td>
<td>Phase 1 추출 결과 (raw_memory, rollout_summary, rollout_slug 등)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>jobs</code></td>
<td>job 소유권, lease, watermark, 재시도 상태</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>10.2 Stage1Output 스키마</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/state/src/model/memories.rs
pub struct Stage1Output {
    pub thread_id: ThreadId,
    pub rollout_path: PathBuf,
    pub source_updated_at: DateTime&#x3C;Utc>,
    pub raw_memory: String,
    pub rollout_summary: String,
    pub rollout_slug: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub cwd: PathBuf,
    pub git_branch: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub generated_at: DateTime&#x3C;Utc>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>10.3 메모리 초기화</h3>
<p>메모리 데이터를 완전히 초기화하는 두 가지 방법:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/state/src/runtime/memories.rs

// 1. clear_memory_data: stage1_outputs + memory jobs 삭제
pub async fn clear_memory_data(&#x26;self) -> anyhow::Result&#x3C;()>;

// 2. reset_memory_data_for_fresh_start: 위 + 기존 thread의 memory_mode를 'disabled'로 변경
//    → 히스토리 롤아웃이 즉시 재처리되는 것을 방지
pub async fn reset_memory_data_for_fresh_start(&#x26;self) -> anyhow::Result&#x3C;()>;
</code></pre>
<h3>10.4 Memory Root 관리</h3>
<p>메모리 파일시스템의 root 초기화도 보안을 고려한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/memories/control.rs
pub(crate) async fn clear_memory_root_contents(memory_root: &#x26;Path) -> std::io::Result&#x3C;()> {
    // symlink인 경우 거부 (보안)
    match tokio::fs::symlink_metadata(memory_root).await {
        Ok(metadata) if metadata.file_type().is_symlink() => {
            return Err(std::io::Error::new(
                std::io::ErrorKind::InvalidInput,
                format!("refusing to clear symlinked memory root {}", memory_root.display()),
            ));
        }
        // ...
    }
    // 모든 파일/디렉토리 삭제
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>11. 세션 영속성 (Rollout Recording)</h2>
<p>대화 히스토리의 영속성은 rollout recording 시스템을 통해 이루어진다.</p>
<h3>11.1 Rollout 구조</h3>
<p>각 세션의 대화 내용은 JSONL 파일로 기록된다:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>session_meta</code> — 세션 메타데이터 (id, source, model 등)</li>
<li><code>turn_context</code> — 턴 경계 마커</li>
<li><code>event_msg</code> — 경량 상태 스트림</li>
<li><code>response_item</code> — 실제 메시지, 도구 호출, 도구 출력</li>
</ul>
<h3>11.2 Rollout 경로 구조</h3>
<pre><code>$CODEX_HOME/
├── sessions/           # 활성 세션 롤아웃
│   └── YYYY/MM/DD/     # 날짜별 디렉토리
│       └── {thread_id}.jsonl
├── archived_sessions/  # 아카이브된 세션
└── memories/           # Phase 2 출력
    ├── memory_summary.md
    ├── MEMORY.md
    ├── raw_memories.md
    ├── rollout_summaries/
    │   └── {timestamp}-{hash}-{slug}.md
    └── skills/
        └── {skill-name}/
            ├── SKILL.md
            ├── scripts/
            ├── templates/
            └── examples/
</code></pre>
<hr>

<td>retry backoff</td>
<td>3,600초</td>
<td><code>phase_two::JOB_RETRY_DELAY_SECONDS</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>heartbeat 간격</td>
<td>90초</td>
<td><code>phase_two::JOB_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<h3>포크 관점</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> 2단계 분리(추출 → 통합)는 아키텍처적으로 깔끔하고 재사용 가치가 높다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> state DB 기반 job coordination은 다중 세션 환경에서 필수</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> secret redaction 단계가 포함돼 있어 보안이 고려돼 있다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> citation 기반 usage tracking으로 메모리의 "가치"를 정량화한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> progressive disclosure 패턴은 토큰 효율성에 기여한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> symlink 거부, 네트워크 차단 등 보안 hardening이 잘 되어 있다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> phase 1에서 <code>gpt-5.1-codex-mini</code>, phase 2에서 <code>gpt-5.3-codex</code>를 쓰는 부분은 모델 종속이므로 추상화 필요</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> <code>memory_tool_developer_instructions</code>(5,000 토큰 한도)의 주입 방식은 02_co_prompt와 교차 참조</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> state DB 스키마(<code>codex-rs/state/</code>)를 함께 가져가야 한다</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> compaction의 inline/remote 분기 로직이 provider 종속적</li>
</ul>

<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: memory를 2-phase extraction/consolidation 파이프라인으로 정리했다.</li>
<li>2025-07-25: 소스 코드 기반으로 전면 확장. Phase 1/2 상세 흐름, AGENTS.md 로딩, ContextManager, compaction, citation, state DB 스키마, 메트릭스, memory trace 경로 추가.</li>

1f:["$","$L28","20-axis-10-memory",{"id":"20-axis-10-memory","order":27,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 10: Memory pipeline","description":"010_memory-pipeline/10_co_memory.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$44"}}]}]
45:T12ab1,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 11: Plugin system</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — plugin system.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>Codex의 플러그인은 skill보다 훨씬 무거운 확장 단위다. skill이 <code>SKILL.md</code> 본문 주입이라면, plugin은 <strong>MCP 서버 + app connector + marketplace 배포 + OAuth 인증 + 런타임 동기화</strong>까지 포함하는 패키지다.</li>
<li>핵심은 <code>PluginsManager</code>(67KB)이다. 이 매니저가 로컬 설치된 플러그인, curated marketplace 플러그인, remote featured 플러그인을 통합 관리한다. 플러그인의 identity는 <code>PluginId</code>(store에서 관리)이고, 실제 capability는 <code>PluginCapabilitySummary</code>에 <code>app_connector_ids</code>와 <code>mcp_server_names</code>로 노출된다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li>stateDiagram-v2</li>
<li>[*] --> Discovery : marketplace 탐색</li>
<li>Discovery --> Install : resolve + validate</li>
<li>Install --> Store : atomic copy to cache</li>
<li>Store --> Load : manifest 파싱 + capability 수집</li>
<li>Load --> Injection : developer instructions 주입</li>
<li>Injection --> Sync : remote/curated 동기화</li>
<li>Sync --> Discovery : SHA 비교 후 재발견</li>
</ul>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// store.rs — PluginId
pub struct PluginId {
    pub plugin_name: String,
    pub marketplace_name: String,
}

impl PluginId {
    pub fn parse(plugin_key: &#x26;str) -> Result&#x3C;Self, PluginIdError> {
        // "github@openai-curated" → plugin_name="github", marketplace_name="openai-curated"
        let Some((plugin_name, marketplace_name)) = plugin_key.rsplit_once('@') else {
            return Err(PluginIdError::Invalid(/* ... */));
        };
        Self::new(plugin_name.to_string(), marketplace_name.to_string())
    }

    pub fn as_key(&#x26;self) -> String {
        format!("{}@{}", self.plugin_name, self.marketplace_name)
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">fn validate_plugin_segment(segment: &#x26;str, kind: &#x26;str) -> Result&#x3C;(), String> {
    if !segment.chars().all(|ch| ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() || ch == '-' || ch == '_') {
        return Err(format!("invalid {kind}: only ASCII letters, digits, `_`, and `-` are allowed"));
    }
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// store.rs — 디렉토리 구조
pub struct PluginStore { root: AbsolutePathBuf }

impl PluginStore {
    // $CODEX_HOME/plugins/cache/&#x3C;marketplace>/&#x3C;plugin>
    pub fn plugin_base_root(&#x26;self, plugin_id: &#x26;PluginId) -> AbsolutePathBuf { /* ... */ }

    // $CODEX_HOME/plugins/cache/&#x3C;marketplace>/&#x3C;plugin>/&#x3C;version>
    pub fn plugin_root(&#x26;self, plugin_id: &#x26;PluginId, version: &#x26;str) -> AbsolutePathBuf { /* ... */ }

    pub fn is_installed(&#x26;self, plugin_id: &#x26;PluginId) -> bool {
        self.active_plugin_version(plugin_id).is_some()
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">fn replace_plugin_root_atomically(source: &#x26;Path, target_root: &#x26;Path, plugin_version: &#x26;str)
    -> Result&#x3C;(), PluginStoreError>
{
    // 1. staged_dir = tempdir in parent
    // 2. copy_dir_recursive(source → staged_version_root)
    // 3. if target exists: backup_dir = tempdir, rename(target → backup)
    // 4. rename(staged → target)
    // 5. 실패 시 rename(backup → target) 롤백
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn active_plugin_version(&#x26;self, plugin_id: &#x26;PluginId) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let mut discovered_versions = /* read_dir → filter dirs → collect */;
    discovered_versions.sort_unstable();
    if discovered_versions.iter().any(|v| v == "local") {
        Some("local".to_string())
    } else {
        discovered_versions.pop() // 사전순 마지막 = 최신
    }
}
</code></pre>

    GR["git repo root 탐색"] --> LP
    LP --> M1["Marketplace A"]
    LP --> M2["Marketplace B"]

    additional_roots: &#x26;[AbsolutePathBuf],
    home_dir: Option&#x3C;&#x26;Path>,
) -> Vec&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf> {
    // 1. ~/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json
    // 2. each root: root/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json (HTTP 다운로드 디렉토리 지원)
    // 3. fallback: git repo root of each additional root

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum MarketplacePluginInstallPolicy {
    NotAvailable,       // 설치 불가
    Available,          // 사용자가 선택하면 설치 (기본값)
    InstalledByDefault, // 자동 설치
}

pub enum MarketplacePluginAuthPolicy {
    OnInstall, // 설치 시 인증 (기본값)
    OnUse,     // 첫 사용 시 인증
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>

  "name": "openai-curated",
  "interface": { "displayName": "ChatGPT Official" },
  "plugins": [
    {
      "name": "github",
      "source": { "source": "local", "path": "./plugins/github" },
      "policy": {
        "installation": "AVAILABLE",
        "authentication": "ON_INSTALL"

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn resolve_marketplace_plugin(
    marketplace_path: &#x26;AbsolutePathBuf,
    plugin_name: &#x26;str,
    restriction_product: Option&#x3C;Product>,
) -> Result&#x3C;ResolvedMarketplacePlugin, MarketplaceError> {
    let marketplace = load_raw_marketplace_manifest(marketplace_path)?;
    let plugin = marketplace.plugins.find(|p| p.name == plugin_name)?;
    
    // 정책 검증: NotAvailable이면 거부
    // 제품 게이팅: products 필드가 있으면 restriction_product 매칭 확인
    // PluginId 생성 + source_path 해석
    Ok(ResolvedMarketplacePlugin { plugin_id, source_path, auth_policy })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>

const TOOL_SUGGEST_DISCOVERABLE_PLUGIN_ALLOWLIST: &#x26;[&#x26;str] = &#x26;[

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn list_tool_suggest_discoverable_plugins(config: &#x26;Config)
    -> anyhow::Result&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;PluginCapabilitySummary>>
{
    // 1. Feature::Plugins 활성 여부 확인
    // 2. curated marketplace에서 플러그인 목록 로드
    // 3. 이미 설치된 플러그인은 제외
    // 4. allowlist 또는 config의 tool_suggest.discoverables에 있는 것만 포함
    // 5. display_name 기준으로 정렬
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart LR
    A["Feature::Plugins 확인"] --> B["curated marketplace 로드"]
    B --> C{"설치됨?"}
    C -->|Yes| D["제외"]
    C -->|No| E{"allowlist&#x3C;br/>or config?"}
    E -->|Yes| F["PluginCapabilitySummary 로드"]
    E -->|No| D
    F --> G["display_name 정렬"]
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub struct PluginManifest {
    pub name: String,
    pub description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub paths: PluginManifestPaths,
    pub interface: Option&#x3C;PluginManifestInterface>,
}

pub struct PluginManifestPaths {
    pub skills: Option&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,      // ./skills/
    pub mcp_servers: Option&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,  // ./.mcp.json
    pub apps: Option&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,         // ./.app.json
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant S as Session Start
    participant G as Git
    participant H as GitHub HTTP API
    participant FS as $CODEX_HOME/.tmp/

    S->>G: git ls-remote HEAD SHA
    alt Git 성공
        G->>S: remote_sha
        S->>FS: read local .tmp/plugins.sha
        alt SHA 일치 + .git 존재
            S->>S: skip (이미 최신)
        else SHA 불일치
            S->>G: git clone --depth 1
            G->>FS: cloned_repo → temp dir
            S->>FS: atomic rename → .tmp/plugins/
            S->>FS: write .tmp/plugins.sha
        end
    else Git 실패
        S->>H: GitHub API fallback
        H->>S: repo summary → default_branch → HEAD SHA
        H->>S: zipball 다운로드
        S->>FS: extract + activate
    end
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">const OPENAI_PLUGINS_OWNER: &#x26;str = "openai";
const OPENAI_PLUGINS_REPO: &#x26;str = "plugins";
const CURATED_PLUGINS_RELATIVE_DIR: &#x26;str = ".tmp/plugins";
const CURATED_PLUGINS_SHA_FILE: &#x26;str = ".tmp/plugins.sha";
const CURATED_PLUGINS_GIT_TIMEOUT: Duration = Duration::from_secs(30);
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn build_plugin_injections(
    mentioned_plugins: &#x26;[PluginCapabilitySummary],
    mcp_tools: &#x26;HashMap&#x3C;String, ToolInfo>,
    available_connectors: &#x26;[connectors::AppInfo],
) -> Vec&#x3C;ResponseItem> {
    mentioned_plugins.iter().filter_map(|plugin| {
        // 1. 플러그인에 속한 MCP 서버 필터링 (CODEX_APPS 제외)
        let available_mcp_servers = mcp_tools.values()
            .filter(|tool| tool.plugin_display_names.contains(&#x26;plugin.display_name))
            .map(|tool| tool.server_name.clone())
            .collect();
        // 2. 활성화된 app connector 필터링
        let available_apps = available_connectors.iter()
            .filter(|c| c.is_enabled &#x26;&#x26; c.plugin_display_names.contains(&#x26;plugin.display_name))
            .map(connector_display_label)
            .collect();
        // 3. DeveloperInstructions로 래핑
        render_explicit_plugin_instructions(plugin, &#x26;available_mcp_servers, &#x26;available_apps)
            .map(DeveloperInstructions::new)
            .map(ResponseItem::from)
    }).collect()
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-text">## Plugins
### Available plugins
- `GitHub`: Manage repos, issues, and PRs
- `Notion`: Create and edit Notion pages
### How to use plugins
- Discovery: The list above is the plugins available in this session.
- Trigger rules: If the user explicitly names a plugin, prefer capabilities associated with that plugin.
- Preference: When a relevant plugin is available, prefer using capabilities associated with that plugin.
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant U as 사용자
    participant M as PluginsManager
    participant MK as Marketplace
    participant ST as PluginStore
    participant MF as PluginManifest
    participant INJ as Injection

    U->>M: install_plugin("github", "openai-curated")
    M->>MK: resolve_marketplace_plugin()
    MK-->>M: ResolvedMarketplacePlugin { plugin_id, source_path, auth_policy }
    M->>ST: install(source_path, plugin_id)
    ST->>ST: replace_plugin_root_atomically()
    ST-->>M: PluginInstallResult { installed_path }
    
    Note over M: 세션 로딩 시
    M->>ST: active_plugin_root(plugin_id)
    ST-->>M: installed_path
    M->>MF: load_plugin_manifest(installed_path)
    MF-->>M: PluginManifest { paths, interface }
    M->>INJ: build_plugin_injections()
    INJ-->>M: Vec&#x3C;ResponseItem> → developer instructions
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Codex plugin system analysis</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — plugin system.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Codex's plug-in is an extension unit that is much heavier than a skill. If skill is <code>SKILL.md</code> body injection, plugin is a package that includes <strong>MCP server + app connector + marketplace distribution + OAuth authentication + runtime synchronization</strong>.</p>
<p>The core is <code>PluginsManager</code> (67KB). This manager integrates and manages locally installed plugins, curated marketplace plugins, and remote featured plugins. The identity of the plugin is <code>PluginId</code> (managed in the store), and the actual capability is exposed as <code>app_connector_ids</code> and <code>mcp_server_names</code> in <code>PluginCapabilitySummary</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. Plugin life cycle</h2>
<p>Plug-ins go through five steps: <strong>Discovery → Installation → Loading → Injection → Synchronization</strong>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Discovery : marketplace 탐색
    Discovery --> Install : resolve + validate
    Install --> Store : atomic copy to cache
    Store --> Load : manifest 파싱 + capability 수집
    Load --> Injection : developer instructions 주입
    Injection --> Sync : remote/curated 동기화
    Sync --> Discovery : SHA 비교 후 재발견
    
    Store --> Uninstall : remove from cache
    Uninstall --> [*]
</code></pre>
<h3>1.1 Overall architecture</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    PM["PluginsManager"] --> LS["PluginStore&#x3C;br/>(로컬 캐시)"]
    PM --> MP["Marketplace&#x3C;br/>(marketplace.json)"]
    PM --> RF["Remote Featured&#x3C;br/>(ChatGPT API)"]
    PM --> CS["CuratedSync&#x3C;br/>(Git/HTTP)"]
    
    MP --> |"resolve_marketplace_plugin"| LS
    RF --> |"fetch_remote_featured_plugin_ids"| PM
    CS --> |"sync_openai_plugins_repo"| MP
    
    LS --> MF["PluginManifest&#x3C;br/>(.codex-plugin/plugin.json)"]
    MF --> SK["skills/"]
    MF --> MC["MCP servers&#x3C;br/>(.mcp.json)"]
    MF --> AC["App connectors&#x3C;br/>(.app.json)"]
    
    PM --> INJ["injection.rs"]
    INJ --> DI["developer instructions"]
    
    PM --> DSC["discoverable.rs"]
    DSC --> TS["tool_suggest"]
    
    PM --> RND["render.rs"]
    RND --> UI["시스템 프롬프트"]

    style PM fill:#e1f5fe
    style LS fill:#fff3e0
    style MP fill:#f3e5f5
    style MF fill:#e8f5e9
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>2. Plugin Identity — <code>PluginId</code> and <code>PluginStore</code></h2>
<p>The unique identifier of the plugin is in the format <code>&#x3C;plugin_name>@&#x3C;marketplace_name></code>. <code>PluginId</code> parses and verifies this.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// store.rs — PluginId
pub struct PluginId {
    pub plugin_name: String,
    pub marketplace_name: String,
}

impl PluginId {
    pub fn parse(plugin_key: &#x26;str) -> Result&#x3C;Self, PluginIdError> {
        // "github@openai-curated" → plugin_name="github", marketplace_name="openai-curated"
        let Some((plugin_name, marketplace_name)) = plugin_key.rsplit_once('@') else {
            return Err(PluginIdError::Invalid(/* ... */));
        };
        Self::new(plugin_name.to_string(), marketplace_name.to_string())
    }

    pub fn as_key(&#x26;self) -> String {
        format!("{}@{}", self.plugin_name, self.marketplace_name)
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Name validation only accepts ASCII alphabets, numbers, <code>-</code>, and <code>_</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">fn validate_plugin_segment(segment: &#x26;str, kind: &#x26;str) -> Result&#x3C;(), String> {
    if !segment.chars().all(|ch| ch.is_ascii_alphanumeric() || ch == '-' || ch == '_') {
        return Err(format!("invalid {kind}: only ASCII letters, digits, `_`, and `-` are allowed"));
    }
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.1 Store — Local cache management</h3>
<p><code>PluginStore</code> manages plugins in the path <code>$CODEX_HOME/plugins/cache/&#x3C;marketplace>/&#x3C;plugin>/&#x3C;version>/</code>.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// store.rs — 디렉토리 구조
pub struct PluginStore { root: AbsolutePathBuf }

impl PluginStore {
    // $CODEX_HOME/plugins/cache/&#x3C;marketplace>/&#x3C;plugin>
    pub fn plugin_base_root(&#x26;self, plugin_id: &#x26;PluginId) -> AbsolutePathBuf { /* ... */ }

    // $CODEX_HOME/plugins/cache/&#x3C;marketplace>/&#x3C;plugin>/&#x3C;version>
    pub fn plugin_root(&#x26;self, plugin_id: &#x26;PluginId, version: &#x26;str) -> AbsolutePathBuf { /* ... */ }

    pub fn is_installed(&#x26;self, plugin_id: &#x26;PluginId) -> bool {
        self.active_plugin_version(plugin_id).is_some()
    }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Installation uses the <strong>atomic replace</strong> pattern. Copy to temporary directory → backup existing cache → replace with rename. Rollback on failure:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">fn replace_plugin_root_atomically(source: &#x26;Path, target_root: &#x26;Path, plugin_version: &#x26;str)
    -> Result&#x3C;(), PluginStoreError>
{
    // 1. staged_dir = tempdir in parent
    // 2. copy_dir_recursive(source → staged_version_root)
    // 3. if target exists: backup_dir = tempdir, rename(target → backup)
    // 4. rename(staged → target)
    // 5. 실패 시 rename(backup → target) 롤백
}
</code></pre>
<p>The version selection logic prioritizes the <code>"local"</code> version, and if not found, uses the last (latest) version in alphabetical order:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn active_plugin_version(&#x26;self, plugin_id: &#x26;PluginId) -> Option&#x3C;String> {
    let mut discovered_versions = /* read_dir → filter dirs → collect */;
    discovered_versions.sort_unstable();
    if discovered_versions.iter().any(|v| v == "local") {
        Some("local".to_string())
    } else {
        discovered_versions.pop() // 사전순 마지막 = 최신
    }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. Marketplace — Plugin discovery and policy</h2>
<p><code>marketplace.rs</code> constructs a plugin catalog by parsing the <code>&#x3C;root>/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json</code> file.</p>
<h3>3.1 Marketplace navigation path</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph LR
    H["~/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json"] --> LP["list_marketplaces"]
    AR["additional_roots&#x3C;br/>(config에서 전달)"] --> LP
    GR["git repo root 탐색"] --> LP
    LP --> M1["Marketplace A"]
    LP --> M2["Marketplace B"]
</code></pre>
<p>Navigation order: <strong>home directory → additional_roots directly → git repo root in additional_roots</strong>. Duplicate paths are automatically removed.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">fn discover_marketplace_paths_from_roots(
    additional_roots: &#x26;[AbsolutePathBuf],
    home_dir: Option&#x3C;&#x26;Path>,
) -> Vec&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf> {
    // 1. ~/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json
    // 2. each root: root/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json (HTTP 다운로드 디렉토리 지원)
    // 3. fallback: git repo root of each additional root
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 Marketplace policy model</h3>
<p>Each plugin item has an installation policy and an authentication policy:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum MarketplacePluginInstallPolicy {
    NotAvailable,       // 설치 불가
    Available,          // 사용자가 선택하면 설치 (기본값)
    InstalledByDefault, // 자동 설치
}

pub enum MarketplacePluginAuthPolicy {
    OnInstall, // 설치 시 인증 (기본값)
    OnUse,     // 첫 사용 시 인증
}
</code></pre>
<p>Gating by product is also supported with the <code>products</code> field. It can be restricted to only be visible in certain products such as <code>Codex</code>/<code>ChatGPT</code>.</p>
<h3>3.3 Marketplace JSON structure</h3>
<pre><code class="language-json">{
  "name": "openai-curated",
  "interface": { "displayName": "ChatGPT Official" },
  "plugins": [
    {
      "name": "github",
      "source": { "source": "local", "path": "./plugins/github" },
      "policy": {
        "installation": "AVAILABLE",
        "authentication": "ON_INSTALL"
      },
      "category": "Productivity"
    }
  ]
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>source.path</code> must start with <code>./</code>, and references to higher-level directories such as <code>..</code> are rejected. It is interpreted based on the second-level upper directory of the marketplace root (<code>&#x3C;root>/.agents/plugins/</code>).</p>
<h3>3.4 Plugin Resolve flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn resolve_marketplace_plugin(
    marketplace_path: &#x26;AbsolutePathBuf,
    plugin_name: &#x26;str,
    restriction_product: Option&#x3C;Product>,
) -> Result&#x3C;ResolvedMarketplacePlugin, MarketplaceError> {
    let marketplace = load_raw_marketplace_manifest(marketplace_path)?;
    let plugin = marketplace.plugins.find(|p| p.name == plugin_name)?;
    
    // 정책 검증: NotAvailable이면 거부
    // 제품 게이팅: products 필드가 있으면 restriction_product 매칭 확인
    // PluginId 생성 + source_path 해석
    Ok(ResolvedMarketplacePlugin { plugin_id, source_path, auth_policy })
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>4. Discovering plugins — <code>discoverable.rs</code></h2>
<p>The tool suggest system provides “plugins that have not been installed yet but can be recommended.”</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 하드코딩된 allowlist — curated marketplace의 주요 플러그인
const TOOL_SUGGEST_DISCOVERABLE_PLUGIN_ALLOWLIST: &#x26;[&#x26;str] = &#x26;[
    "github@openai-curated",
    "notion@openai-curated",
    "slack@openai-curated",
    "gmail@openai-curated",
    "google-calendar@openai-curated",
    "google-docs@openai-curated",
    "google-drive@openai-curated",
    "google-sheets@openai-curated",
    "google-slides@openai-curated",
];
</code></pre>
<p>The core of the discovery logic:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn list_tool_suggest_discoverable_plugins(config: &#x26;Config)
    -> anyhow::Result&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;PluginCapabilitySummary>>
{
    // 1. Feature::Plugins 활성 여부 확인
    // 2. curated marketplace에서 플러그인 목록 로드
    // 3. 이미 설치된 플러그인은 제외
    // 4. allowlist 또는 config의 tool_suggest.discoverables에 있는 것만 포함
    // 5. display_name 기준으로 정렬
}
</code></pre>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart LR
    A["Feature::Plugins 확인"] --> B["curated marketplace 로드"]
    B --> C{"설치됨?"}
    C -->|Yes| D["제외"]
    C -->|No| E{"allowlist&#x3C;br/>or config?"}
    E -->|Yes| F["PluginCapabilitySummary 로드"]
    E -->|No| D
    F --> G["display_name 정렬"]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>5. Plugin Manifest — <code>manifest.rs</code></h2>
<p>All plugins have a manifest in <code>.codex-plugin/plugin.json</code>.</p>
<h3>5.1 Manifest structure</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub struct PluginManifest {
    pub name: String,
    pub description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub paths: PluginManifestPaths,
    pub interface: Option&#x3C;PluginManifestInterface>,
}

pub struct PluginManifestPaths {
    pub skills: Option&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,      // ./skills/
    pub mcp_servers: Option&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,  // ./.mcp.json
    pub apps: Option&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,         // ./.app.json
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>PluginManifestInterface</code> contains metadata for displaying the UI:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub struct PluginManifestInterface {
    pub display_name: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub short_description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub long_description: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub developer_name: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub category: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub capabilities: Vec&#x3C;String>,
    pub default_prompt: Option&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;String>>,  // 최대 3개, 각 128자 제한
    pub brand_color: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub composer_icon: Option&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,
    pub logo: Option&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,
    pub screenshots: Vec&#x3C;AbsolutePathBuf>,
    // ...
}
</code></pre>
<h3>5.2 plugin.json full schema</h3>
<pre><code class="language-json">{
  "name": "plugin-name",
  "version": "1.2.0",
  "description": "Brief plugin description",
  "author": { "name": "Author", "email": "a@b.com", "url": "..." },
  "skills": "./skills/",
  "hooks": "./hooks.json",
  "mcpServers": "./.mcp.json",
  "apps": "./.app.json",
  "interface": {
    "displayName": "Plugin Display Name",
    "shortDescription": "Short description",
    "longDescription": "Long description",
    "developerName": "OpenAI",
    "category": "Productivity",
    "capabilities": ["Interactive", "Write"],
    "defaultPrompt": [
      "Summarize my inbox and draft replies for me.",
      "Find open bugs and turn them into tickets."
    ],
    "brandColor": "#3B82F6",
    "composerIcon": "./assets/icon.png",
    "logo": "./assets/logo.png"
  }
}
</code></pre>
<p>Path rule: All paths must start with <code>./</code>, and if <code>..</code> is included, it is ignored. <code>load_plugin_manifest()</code> verifies each path with <code>resolve_manifest_path()</code> and converts it to an absolute path.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. Curated synchronization — <code>startup_sync.rs</code></h2>
<p>When starting a session, OpenAI's curated plugin repo (<code>openai/plugins</code>) is synchronized to <code>$CODEX_HOME/.tmp/plugins/</code>.</p>
<h3>6.1 Synchronization Strategy</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant S as Session Start
    participant G as Git
    participant H as GitHub HTTP API
    participant FS as $CODEX_HOME/.tmp/

    S->>G: git ls-remote HEAD SHA
    alt Git 성공
        G->>S: remote_sha
        S->>FS: read local .tmp/plugins.sha
        alt SHA 일치 + .git 존재
            S->>S: skip (이미 최신)
        else SHA 불일치
            S->>G: git clone --depth 1
            G->>FS: cloned_repo → temp dir
            S->>FS: atomic rename → .tmp/plugins/
            S->>FS: write .tmp/plugins.sha
        end
    else Git 실패
        S->>H: GitHub API fallback
        H->>S: repo summary → default_branch → HEAD SHA
        H->>S: zipball 다운로드
        S->>FS: extract + activate
    end
</code></pre>
<p>Key constants:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">const OPENAI_PLUGINS_OWNER: &#x26;str = "openai";
const OPENAI_PLUGINS_REPO: &#x26;str = "plugins";
const CURATED_PLUGINS_RELATIVE_DIR: &#x26;str = ".tmp/plugins";
const CURATED_PLUGINS_SHA_FILE: &#x26;str = ".tmp/plugins.sha";
const CURATED_PLUGINS_GIT_TIMEOUT: Duration = Duration::from_secs(30);
</code></pre>
<p>If Git fails, it automatically falls back to the GitHub HTTP API. The method is to download and unzip the zipball.</p>
<h3>6.2 Remote plugin synchronization</h3>
<p><code>start_startup_remote_plugin_sync_once()</code> in <code>startup_sync.rs</code> retrieves the user's plug-in activation status from the ChatGPT server and reflects it locally. Prevent duplicate execution with a marker file (<code>.tmp/app-server-remote-plugin-sync-v1</code>).</p>
<hr>
<h2>7. Injection — Prompt injection</h2>
<p><code>injection.rs</code> injects the capabilities of the active plugin into developer instructions. Unlike skills that are injected as user contextual fragments, plugins use the <strong>developer channel</strong> (→ see [[02_co_prompt]]).</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn build_plugin_injections(
    mentioned_plugins: &#x26;[PluginCapabilitySummary],
    mcp_tools: &#x26;HashMap&#x3C;String, ToolInfo>,
    available_connectors: &#x26;[connectors::AppInfo],
) -> Vec&#x3C;ResponseItem> {
    mentioned_plugins.iter().filter_map(|plugin| {
        // 1. 플러그인에 속한 MCP 서버 필터링 (CODEX_APPS 제외)
        let available_mcp_servers = mcp_tools.values()
            .filter(|tool| tool.plugin_display_names.contains(&#x26;plugin.display_name))
            .map(|tool| tool.server_name.clone())
            .collect();
        // 2. 활성화된 app connector 필터링
        let available_apps = available_connectors.iter()
            .filter(|c| c.is_enabled &#x26;&#x26; c.plugin_display_names.contains(&#x26;plugin.display_name))
            .map(connector_display_label)
            .collect();
        // 3. DeveloperInstructions로 래핑
        render_explicit_plugin_instructions(plugin, &#x26;available_mcp_servers, &#x26;available_apps)
            .map(DeveloperInstructions::new)
            .map(ResponseItem::from)
    }).collect()
}
</code></pre>
<h3>7.1 Render — Render system prompt</h3>
<p><code>render.rs</code> is responsible for two rendering tasks:</p>
<p><strong>a) Plugin List Section</strong> (<code>render_plugins_section</code>) — Insert the entire list of plugins in the session into the system prompt, wrapped in <code>&#x3C;plugins_instructions></code> tags:</p>
<pre><code>## Plugins
### Available plugins
- `GitHub`: Manage repos, issues, and PRs
- `Notion`: Create and edit Notion pages
### How to use plugins
- Discovery: The list above is the plugins available in this session.
- Trigger rules: If the user explicitly names a plugin, prefer capabilities associated with that plugin.
- Preference: When a relevant plugin is available, prefer using capabilities associated with that plugin.
</code></pre>
<p><strong>b) Individual plugin hints</strong> (<code>render_explicit_plugin_instructions</code>) — When the user mentions a specific plugin, the plugin's MCP server, app, and skill prefix are injected into developer instructions:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 출력 예시:
// Capabilities from the `GitHub` plugin:
// - Skills from this plugin are prefixed with `GitHub:`.
// - MCP servers: `github-mcp-server`.
// - Apps: `GitHub Issues`, `GitHub PRs`.
// Use these plugin-associated capabilities to help solve the task.
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>8. Remote Featured — Server Integration</h2>
<p><code>remote.rs</code> is responsible for synchronizing the plugin state with the ChatGPT server.</p>
<h3>8.1 API endpoint</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Endpoint</th>
<th>method</th>
<th>Role</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>{base_url}/plugins/list</code></td>
<td>GET</td>
<td>user's overall plugin status fetch</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>{base_url}/plugins/featured</code></td>
<td>GET</td>
<td>Featured plugin ID list (by product)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>{base_url}/plugins/{id}/enable</code></td>
<td>POST</td>
<td>Activate plugin</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>{base_url}/plugins/{id}/uninstall</code></td>
<td>POST</td>
<td>Remove plugin</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>All mutations require ChatGPT authentication (bearer token + account-id header). API key authentication is not supported.</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// remote.rs — featured 플러그인 조회 (인증 선택적)
pub async fn fetch_remote_featured_plugin_ids(
    config: &#x26;Config,
    auth: Option&#x3C;&#x26;CodexAuth>,
    product: Option&#x3C;Product>,
) -> Result&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;String>, RemotePluginFetchError> {
    let url = format!("{base_url}/plugins/featured");
    let request = client.get(&#x26;url)
        .query(&#x26;[("platform", product.unwrap_or(Product::Codex).to_app_platform())])
        .timeout(Duration::from_secs(10));
    // 인증이 있으면 bearer token 추가
    // ...
}
</code></pre>
<h3>8.2 Featured Cache</h3>
<p><code>PluginsManager</code> caches the featured plugin ID with a TTL of 3 hours. The cache key is a combination of <code>(chatgpt_base_url, account_id, chatgpt_user_id, is_workspace_account)</code>.</p>
<hr>
<h2>9. Toggle — Enable/Disable control</h2>
<p><code>toggles.rs</code> extracts plugin enable/disable changes from config edit events. Three route patterns are supported:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn collect_plugin_enabled_candidates(edits: impl Iterator&#x3C;Item = (&#x26;String, &#x26;JsonValue)>)
    -> BTreeMap&#x3C;String, bool>
{
    // "plugins.sample@test.enabled" → true        (직접 경로)
    // "plugins.other@test" → { "enabled": false } (객체 경로)
    // "plugins" → { "nested@test": { "enabled": true } } (테이블 경로)
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>10. Plugin Creator — Scaffolding tool</h2>
<p><code>skills/src/assets/samples/plugin-creator/</code> contains a plugin creation tool. The plugin directory structure and marketplace items are automatically created with a Python script.</p>
<h3>10.1 Usage</h3>
<pre><code class="language-bash"># 기본 플러그인 스캐폴드
python3 scripts/create_basic_plugin.py my-plugin

# 전체 옵션 포함
python3 scripts/create_basic_plugin.py my-plugin \
  --with-skills --with-hooks --with-scripts --with-assets \
  --with-mcp --with-apps --with-marketplace

# 홈 로컬 플러그인
python3 scripts/create_basic_plugin.py my-plugin \
  --path ~/plugins \
  --marketplace-path ~/.agents/plugins/marketplace.json \
  --with-marketplace
</code></pre>
<h3>10.2 Creation structure</h3>
<pre><code>my-plugin/
├── .codex-plugin/
│   └── plugin.json        # 필수 — manifest
├── skills/                # --with-skills
├── hooks/                 # --with-hooks
├── scripts/               # --with-scripts
├── assets/                # --with-assets
├── .mcp.json              # --with-mcp
└── .app.json              # --with-apps
</code></pre>
<p>Name normalization rules: <code>My Plugin</code> → <code>my-plugin</code>, convert special characters to <code>-</code>, merge consecutive hyphens, maximum 64 characters.</p>
<hr>

<h3>Difference between skill and plugin</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Item</th>
<th>skill</th>
<th>plugin</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Unit</td>
<td><code>SKILL.md</code> text file</td>
<td>manifest + MCP server + connector package</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>injection channel</td>
<td>user contextual fragment</td>
<td>developer instructions</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Distribution</td>
<td>local file</td>
<td>marketplace + git sync + remote API</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Certification</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>OAuth enabled (<code>ON_INSTALL</code> / <code>ON_USE</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Tool Exposure</td>
<td>None (prompt only)</td>
<td>MCP tools + app connector</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Identity</td>
<td>route based</td>
<td><code>&#x3C;name>@&#x3C;marketplace></code> format</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Version Control</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Directory management by version in <code>PluginStore</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>UI meta</td>
<td>None</td>
<td><code>interface</code> block (icons, screenshots, brand colors, etc.)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Core data flow</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">sequenceDiagram
    participant U as 사용자
    participant M as PluginsManager
    participant MK as Marketplace
    participant ST as PluginStore
    participant MF as PluginManifest
    participant INJ as Injection

    U->>M: install_plugin("github", "openai-curated")
    M->>MK: resolve_marketplace_plugin()
    MK-->>M: ResolvedMarketplacePlugin { plugin_id, source_path, auth_policy }
    M->>ST: install(source_path, plugin_id)
    ST->>ST: replace_plugin_root_atomically()
    ST-->>M: PluginInstallResult { installed_path }
    
    Note over M: 세션 로딩 시
    M->>ST: active_plugin_root(plugin_id)
    ST-->>M: installed_path
    M->>MF: load_plugin_manifest(installed_path)
    MF-->>M: PluginManifest { paths, interface }
    M->>INJ: build_plugin_injections()
    INJ-->>M: Vec&#x3C;ResponseItem> → developer instructions
</code></pre>
<h3>Fork Perspective</h3>
<ul class="contains-task-list">
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> developer channel injection in <code>injection.rs</code> is consistent with channel separation in 02_co_prompt</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The structure of <code>manifest.rs</code> is useful as a reference for designing our expansion system.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> The atomic install pattern in <code>store.rs</code> can be reused for safe plugin deployment.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> config edit based toggle patterns in <code>toggles.rs</code> now integrate well with the config system.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" checked disabled> For system prompt rendering in <code>render.rs</code>, see Plugin UX Design.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Marketplace integration is OpenAI dependent and will be removed when forking</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> curated repo git sync can be replaced with our own repo</li>
<li>The [ ] app connector is linked to the ChatGPT app, so a general-purpose alternative design is required.</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> ChatGPT API dependence in <code>remote.rs</code> needs to be replaced with its own backend</li>
<li class="task-list-item"><input type="checkbox" disabled> Hardcoded allowlist in <code>discoverable.rs</code> needs to be switched based on configuration file</li>
</ul>
