<h3>Dependency graph (crossing concerns)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    CLI[cli] --> Core[core]
    TUI[tui] --> Core
    AppServer[app-server] --> Core
    Core --> GitUtils[git-utils]
    Core --> Otel[otel]
    Core --> Features[features]
    Core --> Login[login]
    Core --> CodexApi[codex-api]
    Core --> Protocol[protocol]
    Login --> KeyringStore[keyring-store]
    CodexApi --> |SSE/WS| OpenAI[OpenAI API]
    Ollama[ollama] --> Core
    LMStudio[lmstudio] --> Core
    Otel --> |OTLP| Statsig[Statsig/OTLP Backend]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Judgment</h2>
<h3>Strengths</h3>
<ol>
<li>
<p><strong>Depth of Git integration</strong>: Rather than simple command execution, it has sophisticated VCS integration such as ghost commit-based undo, smart diff-to-remote, and merge-base calculation. Dependencies were minimized by using CLI instead of <code>git2</code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Telemetry Maturity</strong>: Fully accepts the OpenTelemetry standard and supports all 3 axes of log/trace/metric. Sensitive information filtering (<code>trace_safe</code> vs <code>log_only</code>) was considered from the design stage.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Feature flag system</strong>: It is a highly complete system that manages more than 50 features in 5 stages and includes dependency normalization, legacy compatibility, experiment menu, and telemetry integration.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Error handling consistency</strong>: Retryability determination, protocol conversion, and user plan-specific messages are integrated into the <code>CodexErr</code> central type.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Authentication multi-layer structure</strong>: Supports both CLI and IDE by combining Device Code, PKCE, API Key, and Keyring.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<h3>Weaknesses</h3>
<ol>
<li>
<p><strong>Complete lack of internationalization</strong>: All user-facing strings are hard-coded into English.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Accessibility not considered</strong>: Because it is TUI-based, it relies on terminal accessibility, but there is no separate a11y support.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Voice function incomplete</strong>: Realtime Conversation remains in the UnderDevelopment stage, and legacy WebSocket transport has already been converted to Removed.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Informality of the event system</strong>: Since we use <code>async_channel</code> directly without a dedicated event bus, we have to navigate through the code to trace the flow of events.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<h3>Singularity</h3>
<ol>
<li>
<p><strong>Statsig Built-in</strong>: Basic metrics export is sent directly to OpenAI internal Statsig endpoint. The API key is hardcoded in the source code (<code>client-MkRuleRQBd6qakfnDYqJVR9JuXcY57Ljly3vi5JVUIO</code>).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Ghost Commit after Feature Flag</strong>: It is disabled by default (<code>default_enabled: false</code>), so to use the undo function, explicit activation is required with <code>[features].undo = true</code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Complete removal of Chat Wire API</strong>: Displays an explicit error message and migration guide when using <code>wire_api = "chat"</code>.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Dual build system</strong>: Supports Cargo and Bazel simultaneously, covering both development (Cargo) and large-scale CI (Bazel).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>5 second git timeout</strong>: A 5 second hard timeout is applied to all asynchronous git commands to prevent hangs in large monorepos.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>
<blockquote>
<p>Verbatim KO corpus <code>013_etc/13_co_etc.md</code> for cross-check; code blocks unchanged.</p>
</blockquote>
<h1>Codex 잔여 교차 관심사 분석</h1>
<h2>개요</h2>
<p>Codex(OpenAI)는 Rust 기반 코딩 에이전트로, 핵심 12개 분석 차원(TUI, Prompt, Tool, Skill, Subagent, Surface, Sandbox, Config, MCP, Memory, Plugin, Guardian) 외에도 Git 통합, 모델 프로바이더 추상화, 에러 처리, 텔레메트리(OpenTelemetry), 피처 플래그, 인증, 음성/멀티모달, 패키징/배포, 테스트 인프라 등 다양한 교차 관심사를 포함한다. 특히 <code>git-utils</code>, <code>otel</code>, <code>features</code>, <code>login</code> 크레이트가 독립된 관심사 영역으로 설계되어 있으며, 이벤트 기반 비동기 아키텍처(<code>async_channel</code> + <code>tokio::sync::watch</code>)가 전체를 관통한다. 국제화(i18n)와 접근성(a11y)은 현재 구현되어 있지 않다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>1. Git/VCS 통합</h2>
<h3>1.1 전용 크레이트: <code>git-utils</code></h3>
<p>Git 통합의 핵심은 <code>codex-rs/git-utils/</code> 크레이트에 집중되어 있다. 모듈 구성:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>모듈</th>
<th>역할</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>operations.rs</code></td>
<td>저수준 git CLI 래퍼 (<code>run_git</code>, <code>run_git_for_stdout</code>)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>info.rs</code></td>
<td>저장소 정보 수집 (branch, commit, remote, diff)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>branch.rs</code></td>
<td>merge-base 계산, upstream 추적</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>ghost_commits.rs</code></td>
<td>스냅샷용 고스트 커밋 생성/복원</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>apply.rs</code></td>
<td><code>git apply --3way</code> 기반 패치 적용</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>errors.rs</code></td>
<td><code>GitToolingError</code> 에러 타입</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>platform.rs</code></td>
<td>크로스 플랫폼 심볼릭 링크</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>1.2 Git 명령 실행 패턴</h3>
<p>모든 git 명령은 <code>std::process::Command</code> (동기) 또는 <code>tokio::process::Command</code> (비동기) 로 실행되며, <code>git2</code> 라이브러리를 사용하지 <strong>않는다</strong>. 타임아웃 5초가 하드코딩되어 대형 저장소에서의 행(hang) 방지:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/git-utils/src/info.rs
const GIT_COMMAND_TIMEOUT: TokioDuration = TokioDuration::from_secs(5);

async fn run_git_command_with_timeout(args: &#x26;[&#x26;str], cwd: &#x26;Path) -> Option&#x3C;std::process::Output> {
    let mut command = Command::new("git");
    command
        .env("GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS", "0")  // 잠금 충돌 방지
        .args(args)
        .current_dir(cwd)
        .kill_on_drop(true);
    let result = timeout(GIT_COMMAND_TIMEOUT, command.output()).await;
    match result {
        Ok(Ok(output)) => Some(output),
        _ => None,
    }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>1.3 고스트 커밋 (Ghost Commits)</h3>
<p>Codex의 <strong>undo</strong> 기능의 핵심이다. 에이전트 턴마다 작업 트리의 전체 스냅샷을 git commit으로 저장한다:</p>
<ul>
<li>기본 커밋 메시지: <code>"codex snapshot"</code></li>
<li>대형 파일/디렉터리 자동 제외: <code>node_modules</code>, <code>.venv</code>, <code>dist</code>, <code>build</code> 등</li>
<li>대형 미추적 파일 임계값: 10 MiB</li>
<li>대형 미추적 디렉터리 임계값: 200개 항목</li>
</ul>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/git-utils/src/ghost_commits.rs
const DEFAULT_IGNORED_DIR_NAMES: &#x26;[&#x26;str] = &#x26;[
    "node_modules", ".venv", "venv", "env", ".env",
    "dist", "build", ".pytest_cache", ".mypy_cache",
    ".cache", ".tox", "__pycache__",
];
</code></pre>
<h3>1.4 Diff 전략</h3>
<p><code>git_diff_to_remote()</code> 함수는 가장 가까운 리모트 SHA를 찾아 diff를 계산한다:</p>
<ol>
<li>브랜치 ancestry 구축 (현재 브랜치 -> 기본 브랜치 -> 리모트 포함 브랜치)</li>
<li>각 브랜치의 리모트 SHA와 HEAD로부터의 거리(커밋 수) 계산</li>
<li>가장 가까운 리모트 SHA 선택</li>
<li><code>git diff --no-textconv --no-ext-diff</code> 로 diff 생성</li>
<li>미추적 파일은 <code>/dev/null</code> 대비 diff로 추가</li>
</ol>
<h3>1.5 패치 적용</h3>
<p><code>apply.rs</code>에서 <code>git apply --3way</code>를 사용하며, dry-run(<code>--check</code>) 모드와 revert(<code>-R</code>) 모드를 지원한다. <code>CODEX_APPLY_GIT_CFG</code> 환경변수로 추가 git config를 주입할 수 있다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart TD
    A[사용자/모델이 패치 제출] --> B[임시 파일에 diff 저장]
    B --> C{revert 모드?}
    C -->|Yes| D[git add로 경로 스테이징]
    C -->|No| E[git apply --3way]
    D --> F[git apply --3way -R]
    E --> G[결과 파싱: applied/skipped/conflicted]
    F --> G
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>2. 모델 라우팅 / 프로바이더 추상화</h2>
<h3>2.1 프로바이더 레지스트리</h3>
<p><code>codex-rs/core/src/model_provider_info.rs</code>에서 프로바이더 시스템을 정의한다. 빌트인 프로바이더 3개:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>ID</th>
<th>이름</th>
<th>기본 포트</th>
<th>와이어 API</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>openai</code></td>
<td>OpenAI</td>
<td>-</td>
<td>Responses</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>ollama</code></td>
<td>gpt-oss</td>
<td>11434</td>
<td>Responses</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>lmstudio</code></td>
<td>gpt-oss</td>
<td>1234</td>
<td>Responses</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><strong>Chat API(<code>wire_api = "chat"</code>)는 완전히 제거</strong>되어 <code>WireApi</code>는 <code>Responses</code> 단일 변형만 남아있다.</p>
<h3>2.2 ModelProviderInfo 구조</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub struct ModelProviderInfo {
    pub name: String,
    pub base_url: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub env_key: Option&#x3C;String>,
    pub wire_api: WireApi,
    pub query_params: Option&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;String, String>>,
    pub http_headers: Option&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;String, String>>,
    pub env_http_headers: Option&#x3C;HashMap&#x3C;String, String>>,
    pub request_max_retries: Option&#x3C;u64>,
    pub stream_max_retries: Option&#x3C;u64>,
    pub stream_idle_timeout_ms: Option&#x3C;u64>,
    pub requires_openai_auth: bool,
    pub supports_websockets: bool,
    // ...
}
</code></pre>
<p>사용자 정의 프로바이더는 <code>~/.codex/config.toml</code>의 <code>model_providers</code> 섹션에서 추가/오버라이드 가능하다.</p>
<h3>2.3 OSS 프로바이더 (Ollama / LM Studio)</h3>
<p>각각 독립 크레이트로 존재:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>codex-rs/ollama/</code></strong>: Ollama 클라이언트, 모델 pull, 버전 확인 (Responses API 지원 최소 0.13.4)</li>
<li><strong><code>codex-rs/lmstudio/</code></strong>: LM Studio 클라이언트, 모델 다운로드 및 로드</li>
</ul>
<p>둘 다 <code>ensure_oss_ready()</code> 패턴을 따른다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/ollama/src/lib.rs
pub async fn ensure_oss_ready(config: &#x26;Config) -> std::io::Result&#x3C;()> {
    let ollama_client = OllamaClient::try_from_oss_provider(config).await?;
    match ollama_client.fetch_models().await {
        Ok(models) => {
            if !models.iter().any(|m| m == model) {
                ollama_client.pull_with_reporter(model, &#x26;mut reporter).await?;
            }
        }
        Err(err) => {
            tracing::warn!("Failed to query local models from Ollama: {}.", err);
        }
    }
    Ok(())
}
</code></pre>
<h3>2.4 리트라이/폴백 설정</h3>
<p>프로바이더별 리트라이 설정이 <code>ApiRetryConfig</code>로 변환된다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>파라미터</th>
<th>기본값</th>
<th>최대값</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>request_max_retries</code></td>
<td>4</td>
<td>100</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>stream_max_retries</code></td>
<td>5</td>
<td>100</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>stream_idle_timeout_ms</code></td>
<td>300,000 (5분)</td>
<td>-</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>websocket_connect_timeout_ms</code></td>
<td>15,000 (15초)</td>
<td>-</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>2.5 전송 계층</h3>
<p><code>ModelClient</code>(<code>core/src/client.rs</code>)는 세션 수명 동안 유지되며, SSE와 WebSocket 두 전송 계층을 지원한다. WebSocket은 v2에서 prewarm(<code>generate=false</code>) 전략으로 재사용을 최적화한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart LR
    A[ModelClient] --> B{전송 선택}
    B -->|SSE| C[ResponsesClient / reqwest]
    B -->|WebSocket| D[ResponsesWebsocketClient]
    D --> E[Prewarm: response.create generate=false]
    E --> F[실제 요청 재사용]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>3. 에러 처리 / 복구 패턴</h2>
<h3>3.1 CodexErr 열거형</h3>
<p><code>codex-rs/core/src/error.rs</code>에 정의된 <code>CodexErr</code>는 약 20개의 변형을 갖는 중앙 에러 타입이다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum CodexErr {
    TurnAborted,
    Stream(String, Option&#x3C;Duration>),      // 재시도 가능
    ContextWindowExceeded,                  // 재시도 불가
    UnexpectedStatus(UnexpectedResponseError),
    UsageLimitReached(UsageLimitReachedError),
    ServerOverloaded,
    ConnectionFailed(ConnectionFailedError),
    RetryLimit(RetryLimitReachedError),
    RefreshTokenFailed(RefreshTokenFailedError),
    Sandbox(SandboxErr),
    Fatal(String),
    // ...
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.2 재시도 가능성 판정</h3>
<p><code>is_retryable()</code> 메서드가 에러별 재시도 가능 여부를 결정한다:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>재시도 가능</th>
<th>재시도 불가</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>Stream</code>, <code>Timeout</code>, <code>UnexpectedStatus</code></td>
<td><code>TurnAborted</code>, <code>Interrupted</code>, <code>EnvVar</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>ConnectionFailed</code>, <code>ResponseStreamFailed</code></td>
<td><code>UsageLimitReached</code>, <code>ServerOverloaded</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>InternalServerError</code>, <code>InternalAgentDied</code></td>
<td><code>QuotaExceeded</code>, <code>InvalidRequest</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Io</code>, <code>Json</code>, <code>TokioJoin</code></td>
<td><code>ContextWindowExceeded</code>, <code>RefreshTokenFailed</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>3.3 프로토콜 에러 변환</h3>
<p><code>to_codex_protocol_error()</code> 메서드가 내부 에러를 클라이언트 프로토콜 에러(<code>CodexErrorInfo</code>)로 매핑:</p>
<pre><code>CodexErr::ContextWindowExceeded -> CodexErrorInfo::ContextWindowExceeded
CodexErr::UsageLimitReached     -> CodexErrorInfo::UsageLimitExceeded
CodexErr::RetryLimit            -> CodexErrorInfo::ResponseTooManyFailedAttempts
CodexErr::RefreshTokenFailed    -> CodexErrorInfo::Unauthorized
</code></pre>
<h3>3.4 사용량 제한 에러 UX</h3>
<p><code>UsageLimitReachedError</code>는 사용자의 플랜 유형(Free, Plus, Pro, Team, Enterprise 등)에 따라 다른 메시지를 표시하며, <code>resets_at</code> 타임스탬프를 로컬 시간대로 변환하여 안내한다.</p>
<h3>3.5 SandboxErr</h3>
<p>샌드박스 에러는 별도 enum으로:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum SandboxErr {
    Denied { output, network_policy_decision },
    Timeout { output },
    Signal(i32),
    // Linux 전용: SeccompInstall, SeccompBackend, LandlockRestrict
}
</code></pre>
<h3>3.6 Git 에러 타입</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum GitToolingError {
    GitCommand { command, status, stderr },
    GitOutputUtf8 { command, source },
    NotAGitRepository { path },
    NonRelativePath { path },
    PathEscapesRepository { path },
    PathPrefix(StripPrefixError),
    Walkdir(WalkdirError),
    Io(io::Error),
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>4. 텔레메트리 / 관측성</h2>
<h3>4.1 전용 크레이트: <code>otel</code></h3>
<p><code>codex-rs/otel/</code> 크레이트가 OpenTelemetry 통합을 전담한다.</p>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart TD
    A[OtelProvider] --> B[LoggerProvider / OTLP]
    A --> C[TracerProvider / OTLP]
    A --> D[MetricsClient / Statsig]
    B --> E[OpenTelemetryTracingBridge]
    C --> F[tracing_opentelemetry layer]
    D --> G[전역 MetricsClient]
</code></pre>
<h3>4.2 OtelSettings</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub struct OtelSettings {
    pub environment: String,
    pub service_name: String,
    pub service_version: String,
    pub codex_home: PathBuf,
    pub exporter: OtelExporter,        // 로그 내보내기
    pub trace_exporter: OtelExporter,  // 트레이스 내보내기
    pub metrics_exporter: OtelExporter, // 메트릭 내보내기
    pub runtime_metrics: bool,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>4.3 내보내기 백엔드</h3>
<p><code>OtelExporter</code> enum:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>변형</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>None</code></td>
<td>비활성화</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>Statsig</code></td>
<td>Codex 내부 메트릭 수집 (Statsig OTLP HTTP)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>OtlpGrpc</code></td>
<td>gRPC OTLP (endpoint, headers, TLS)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>OtlpHttp</code></td>
<td>HTTP OTLP (endpoint, headers, protocol, TLS)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>기본 메트릭 내보내기는 Statsig으로 <code>https://ab.chatgpt.com/otlp/v1/metrics</code>에 전송된다.</p>
<h3>4.4 메트릭 이름 체계</h3>
<p><code>SessionTelemetry</code>에서 수집하는 주요 메트릭:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>codex.api_call.count</code> / <code>codex.api_call.duration</code></li>
<li><code>codex.tool_call.count</code> / <code>codex.tool_call.duration</code></li>
<li><code>codex.sse_event.count</code> / <code>codex.sse_event.duration</code></li>
<li><code>codex.websocket_event.count</code> / <code>codex.websocket_event.duration</code></li>
<li><code>codex.responses_api.overhead_duration</code> / <code>codex.responses_api.inference_time</code></li>
<li><code>codex.feature.state</code> (피처 플래그 상태)</li>
</ul>
<h3>4.5 트레이싱 필터</h3>
<p>로그와 트레이스에 별도 필터를 적용:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>로그 내보내기</strong>: <code>codex_otel.log_only</code>, <code>codex_otel.network_proxy</code> 타겟</li>
<li><strong>트레이스 내보내기</strong>: <code>codex_otel.trace_safe</code> 타겟 (민감 정보 제외)</li>
<li>스팬은 항상 트레이스에 포함</li>
</ul>
<h3>4.6 W3C Trace Context</h3>
<p><code>trace_context.rs</code>에서 W3C Trace Context 전파를 지원하며, 환경변수 <code>TRACEPARENT</code>에서 부모 컨텍스트를 읽을 수 있다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>5. IDE 통합</h2>
<h3>5.1 VSCode 언급</h3>
<p><code>SessionSource</code> enum에 <code>VSCode</code> 변형이 존재하며, 롤아웃 세션 소스로 사용된다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/rollout/src/lib.rs
pub static INTERACTIVE_SESSION_SOURCES: LazyLock&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;SessionSource>> = LazyLock::new(|| {
    vec![
        SessionSource::Cli,
        SessionSource::VSCode,
        SessionSource::Custom("atlas".to_string()),
        SessionSource::Custom("chatgpt".to_string()),
    ]
});
</code></pre>
<h3>5.2 App-Server Protocol</h3>
<p>Codex는 LSP와 유사한 <strong>App-Server Protocol</strong>을 정의하여 다양한 IDE 프론트엔드와 통신한다:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>codex-rs/app-server-protocol/</code>: JSON-RPC 기반 프로토콜 정의</li>
<li><code>codex-rs/app-server/</code>: 서버 구현 (WebSocket + Unix Domain Socket)</li>
<li><code>codex-rs/app-server-client/</code>: 클라이언트 라이브러리</li>
</ul>
<p>TypeScript 스키마도 자동 생성(<code>schema/typescript/</code>)되어 VSCode 확장 등에서 타입 안전하게 사용할 수 있다.</p>
<h3>5.3 현재 상태</h3>
<p>코드베이스에 VSCode 확장 소스코드는 포함되어 있지 않다. App-Server Protocol이 IDE 통합 인터페이스 역할을 하며, <code>InitializeParams</code>, <code>Settings</code>, <code>ThreadId</code> 등의 프로토콜 타입이 VSCode/ChatGPT 등 다양한 서페이스를 지원하도록 설계되어 있다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>6. 패키징 / 배포</h2>
<h3>6.1 Rust 바이너리 배포</h3>
<p>릴리스는 GitHub Actions 워크플로우(<code>rust-release.yml</code>)로 자동화된다:</p>
<p><strong>릴리스 트리거</strong>: <code>rust-v*.*.*</code> 태그 푸시</p>
<p><strong>빌드 타겟</strong>:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Runner</th>
<th>타겟</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>macos-15-xlarge</td>
<td><code>aarch64-apple-darwin</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>macos-15-xlarge</td>
<td><code>x86_64-apple-darwin</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ubuntu-24.04</td>
<td><code>x86_64-unknown-linux-musl</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ubuntu-24.04</td>
<td><code>x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ubuntu-24.04-arm</td>
<td><code>aarch64-unknown-linux-musl</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>ubuntu-24.04-arm</td>
<td><code>aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>별도 Windows 릴리스 워크플로우(<code>rust-release-windows.yml</code>)도 존재한다.</p>
<h3>6.2 빌드 시스템</h3>
<p>이중 빌드 시스템:</p>
<ul>
<li><strong>Cargo</strong>: 기본 Rust 빌드 (<code>codex-rs/Cargo.toml</code> workspace)</li>
<li><strong>Bazel</strong>: <code>MODULE.bazel</code>, <code>BUILD.bazel</code> (대규모 모노레포 지원)</li>
</ul>
<p><code>justfile</code>로 개발자 편의 명령 제공:</p>
<pre><code class="language-makefile">codex *args:
    cargo run --bin codex -- "$@"
test:
    cargo nextest run --no-fail-fast
clippy *args:
    cargo clippy --tests "$@"
</code></pre>
<h3>6.3 npm 패키지</h3>
<p>TypeScript SDK는 <code>sdk/typescript/</code>에 위치하며 <code>tsup</code>으로 번들링된다. <code>120_codex-cli/</code>에도 npm 패키지가 존재한다.</p>
<h3>6.4 Nix</h3>
<p><code>flake.nix</code>와 <code>flake.lock</code>이 존재하여 Nix 기반 재현 가능 빌드를 지원한다.</p>
<h3>6.5 LTO 설정</h3>
<p>릴리스 빌드에서 thin LTO를 사용한다 (ARM Ubuntu에서 60분 타임아웃 문제로 full LTO 대신):</p>
<pre><code class="language-yaml">CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_LTO: thin
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>7. 테스트 인프라</h2>
<h3>7.1 테스트 전략</h3>
<p><strong>단위 테스트</strong>: <code>#[cfg(test)]</code> 모듈과 <code>_tests.rs</code> 파일 패턴 병용. 거의 모든 핵심 모듈에 테스트 파일이 존재한다.</p>
<p><strong>통합 테스트</strong>: <code>tests/suite/</code> 디렉터리에 시나리오별 테스트:</p>
<pre><code>codex-rs/core/tests/suite/
    exec.rs, compact.rs, review.rs, js_repl.rs,
    agent_jobs.rs, abort_tasks.rs, seatbelt.rs, ...

codex-rs/app-server/tests/suite/v2/
    turn_start.rs, thread_list.rs, plugin_install.rs,
    realtime_conversation.rs, rate_limits.rs, ...
</code></pre>
<h3>7.2 테스트 도구</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong><code>cargo nextest</code></strong>: 기본 테스트 러너 (병렬 실행, <code>--no-fail-fast</code>)</li>
<li><strong>Mock Model Server</strong>: <code>tests/common/mock_model_server.rs</code></li>
<li><strong>SSE Streaming Fixtures</strong>: <code>tests/common/streaming_sse.rs</code></li>
<li><strong>Tracing 테스트</strong>: <code>tests/common/tracing.rs</code></li>
</ul>
<h3>7.3 CI 워크플로우</h3>
<p><code>rust-ci.yml</code>의 주요 잡:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>잡</th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>changed</code></td>
<td>변경 영역 감지 (선택적 테스트 실행)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>general</code></td>
<td><code>cargo fmt</code> 포맷 검증</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>cargo_shear</code></td>
<td>미사용 의존성 검사</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>clippy</td>
<td>린트 검사</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>test</td>
<td><code>cargo nextest</code> 테스트 실행</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>변경 감지 기반으로 <code>codex-rs/</code>, <code>tools/argument-comment-lint/</code>, <code>.github/</code> 변경 여부에 따라 선택적 실행한다.</p>
<h3>7.4 SDK 테스트</h3>
<p>TypeScript SDK(<code>sdk/typescript/tests/</code>)에서 Jest 기반 테스트:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>exec.test.ts</code>: 실행 테스트</li>
<li><code>run.test.ts</code>: 일반 실행 테스트</li>
<li><code>runStreamed.test.ts</code>: 스트리밍 테스트</li>
<li><code>abort.test.ts</code>: 중단 테스트</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<h2>8. 인증 / API 키 관리</h2>
<h3>8.1 전용 크레이트: <code>login</code></h3>
<p><code>codex-rs/login/</code> 크레이트가 모든 인증 로직을 담당한다.</p>
<h3>8.2 인증 모드</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum AuthMode {
    ApiKey,           // OPENAI_API_KEY 환경변수
    Chatgpt,          // ChatGPT OAuth 로그인
    ChatgptAuthTokens, // ChatGPT 인증 토큰
}
</code></pre>
<h3>8.3 Device Code 인증</h3>
<p><code>device_code_auth.rs</code>에서 OAuth 2.0 Device Code Flow를 구현:</p>
<ol>
<li><code>POST /deviceauth/usercode</code>로 device code + user code 요청</li>
<li>사용자에게 verification URL 표시</li>
<li>폴링 간격으로 토큰 완료 대기</li>
</ol>
<h3>8.4 PKCE 인증</h3>
<p><code>pkce.rs</code>에서 PKCE(Proof Key for Code Exchange) 구현:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn generate_pkce() -> PkceCodes {
    let mut bytes = [0u8; 64];
    rand::rng().fill_bytes(&#x26;mut bytes);
    let code_verifier = base64::URL_SAFE_NO_PAD.encode(bytes);
    let digest = Sha256::digest(code_verifier.as_bytes());
    let code_challenge = base64::URL_SAFE_NO_PAD.encode(digest);
    PkceCodes { code_verifier, code_challenge }
}
</code></pre>
<h3>8.5 로컬 OAuth 서버</h3>
<p><code>server.rs</code>에서 <code>tiny_http</code> 기반 로컬 콜백 서버(기본 포트 1455)를 실행하여 브라우저 기반 로그인을 처리한다. PKCE 코드와 state 파라미터로 보안을 확보한다.</p>
<h3>8.6 API 키 관리</h3>
<ul>
<li>환경변수 우선순위: <code>CODEX_API_KEY</code> > <code>OPENAI_API_KEY</code></li>
<li>프로바이더별 <code>env_key</code> 설정으로 커스텀 환경변수 지원</li>
<li><code>experimental_bearer_token</code>으로 프로그래밍적 사용 지원 (보안상 비권장)</li>
<li>Keyring 스토어: <code>codex-rs/keyring-store/</code> 크레이트로 OS 키체인 연동</li>
<li><code>auth.json</code>에 토큰 저장</li>
</ul>
<h3>8.7 토큰 갱신</h3>
<p><code>RefreshTokenError</code> / <code>UnauthorizedRecovery</code> 타입으로 토큰 갱신 실패 시 복구 경로를 정의한다. <code>AuthManager</code>가 세션 전반의 인증 상태를 관리한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>9. 음성 / 멀티모달</h2>
<h3>9.1 Realtime Conversation</h3>
<p><code>codex-rs/core/src/realtime_conversation.rs</code>에서 WebSocket 기반 실시간 음성 대화를 구현한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">const AUDIO_IN_QUEUE_CAPACITY: usize = 256;
const USER_TEXT_IN_QUEUE_CAPACITY: usize = 64;
const OUTPUT_EVENTS_QUEUE_CAPACITY: usize = 256;
</code></pre>
<p><code>codex_api</code> 크레이트의 <code>RealtimeWebsocketClient</code>, <code>RealtimeAudioFrame</code>, <code>RealtimeEvent</code> 등을 사용하여:</p>
<ul>
<li>오디오 프레임 입출력 (Base64 인코딩)</li>
<li>텍스트 입력</li>
<li>핸드오프(handoff) 이벤트</li>
</ul>
<h3>9.2 피처 플래그</h3>
<p>음성/멀티모달 관련 피처 플래그:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>플래그</th>
<th>스테이지</th>
<th>기본값</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>voice_transcription</code></td>
<td>UnderDevelopment</td>
<td>false</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>realtime_conversation</code></td>
<td>UnderDevelopment</td>
<td>false</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>image_detail_original</code></td>
<td>UnderDevelopment</td>
<td>false</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>image_generation</code></td>
<td>UnderDevelopment</td>
<td>false</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>9.3 이미지 처리</h3>
<p><code>codex-rs/utils/image/</code>에 이미지 유틸리티가 존재하며, <code>view_image</code> 도구 핸들러(<code>core/src/tools/handlers/view_image.rs</code>)로 이미지 입력을 지원한다. <code>InputModality</code> 타입이 프로토콜에 정의되어 있다.</p>
<h3>9.4 현재 상태</h3>
<p>음성 기능은 아직 개발 중(UnderDevelopment)이며, 기본 비활성화 상태이다. Realtime API WebSocket 전송은 레거시로 전환되었다(<code>ResponsesWebsockets</code>, <code>ResponsesWebsocketsV2</code>는 <code>Stage::Removed</code>).</p>
<hr>
<h2>10. 이벤트 버스</h2>
<h3>10.1 async_channel 기반 아키텍처</h3>
<p>Codex는 전용 "이벤트 버스" 추상화를 사용하지 않고, <code>async_channel</code> + <code>tokio::sync::watch</code>를 직접 사용한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/codex.rs (Session 초기화)
let (tx_sub, rx_sub) = async_channel::bounded(SUBMISSION_CHANNEL_CAPACITY);
let (tx_event, rx_event) = async_channel::unbounded();
</code></pre>
<ul>
<li><strong>tx_sub / rx_sub</strong>: 사용자 입력 -> 세션으로의 제출 채널 (bounded)</li>
<li><strong>tx_event / rx_event</strong>: 세션 -> UI로의 이벤트 채널 (unbounded)</li>
</ul>
<h3>10.2 watch 채널</h3>
<p>상태 변화 관찰에 <code>tokio::sync::watch</code> 사용:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">let (agent_status_tx, agent_status_rx) = watch::channel(AgentStatus::PendingInit);
</code></pre>
<h3>10.3 프로토콜 이벤트</h3>
<p>SDK에서 정의하는 스트림 이벤트 타입:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">type ThreadEvent =
  | ThreadStartedEvent
  | TurnStartedEvent
  | TurnCompletedEvent
  | TurnFailedEvent
  | ItemStartedEvent
  | ItemUpdatedEvent
  | ItemCompletedEvent
  | ThreadErrorEvent;
</code></pre>
<h3>10.4 App-Server 이벤트</h3>
<p><code>app-server-protocol</code>에서 JSON-RPC 알림 형태의 이벤트를 정의:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>ThreadRealtimeItemAddedNotification</code></li>
<li><code>CommandExecOutputDeltaNotification</code></li>
<li><code>ContextCompactedNotification</code></li>
<li><code>ItemGuardianApprovalReviewStartedNotification</code></li>
</ul>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">flowchart LR
    U[사용자 입력] -->|tx_sub| S[Session Loop]
    S -->|tx_event| T[TUI / App-Server]
    S -->|watch| W[AgentStatus 관찰자]
    S -->|async_channel| R[Realtime Audio Queue]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>11. 피처 플래그</h2>
<h3>11.1 전용 크레이트: <code>features</code></h3>
<p><code>codex-rs/features/src/lib.rs</code>에 <strong>50개 이상</strong>의 피처 플래그가 정의되어 있다.</p>
<h3>11.2 Feature enum 및 Stage</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub enum Feature {
    GhostCommit, ShellTool, JsRepl, CodeMode, UnifiedExec,
    WebSearchRequest, WebSearchCached, ApplyPatchFreeform,
    CodexHooks, GuardianApproval, VoiceTranscription,
    RealtimeConversation, TuiAppServer, FastMode,
    Plugins, Apps, MultiAgentV2, Artifact,
    // ... 50개 이상
}

pub enum Stage {
    UnderDevelopment,
    Experimental { name, menu_description, announcement },
    Stable,
    Deprecated,
    Removed,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>11.3 피처 스테이지 분포</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>스테이지</th>
<th>예시</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Stable</strong></td>
<td><code>ShellTool</code>, <code>UnifiedExec</code>, <code>ShellSnapshot</code>, <code>Apps</code>, <code>Plugins</code>, <code>FastMode</code>, <code>Personality</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Experimental</strong></td>
<td><code>JsRepl</code>, <code>GuardianApproval</code>, <code>TuiAppServer</code>, <code>PreventIdleSleep</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>UnderDevelopment</strong></td>
<td><code>CodeMode</code>, <code>VoiceTranscription</code>, <code>RealtimeConversation</code>, <code>MemoryTool</code>, <code>ImageGeneration</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Deprecated</strong></td>
<td><code>WebSearchRequest</code>, <code>WebSearchCached</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Removed</strong></td>
<td><code>SearchTool</code>, <code>UseLinuxSandboxBwrap</code>, <code>Steer</code>, <code>CollaborationModes</code>, <code>ResponsesWebsockets</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>11.4 피처 해석 파이프라인</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn from_sources(
    base: FeatureConfigSource,
    profile: FeatureConfigSource,
    overrides: FeatureOverrides,
) -> Features {
    let mut features = Features::with_defaults();
    // 1. base config 적용
    // 2. profile config 적용
    // 3. overrides 적용
    // 4. normalize_dependencies() -- 의존성 자동 활성화
    features
}
</code></pre>
<p>의존성 정규화 예시:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>SpawnCsv</code> 활성화 시 <code>Collab</code> 자동 활성화</li>
<li><code>CodeModeOnly</code> 활성화 시 <code>CodeMode</code> 자동 활성화</li>
<li><code>JsReplToolsOnly</code>는 <code>JsRepl</code> 없이 비활성화</li>
</ul>
<h3>11.5 레거시 호환</h3>
<p><code>legacy.rs</code>에서 이전 키 이름(<code>web_search</code>, <code>include_apply_patch_tool</code> 등)을 새 피처 키로 매핑하며 deprecation 경고를 생성한다.</p>
<h3>11.6 Experimental 메뉴</h3>
<p><code>Stage::Experimental</code> 변형에 <code>name</code>, <code>menu_description</code>, <code>announcement</code> 필드가 있어, TUI의 <code>/experimental</code> 메뉴에서 사용자가 실험적 기능을 토글할 수 있다.</p>
<h3>11.7 텔레메트리 연동</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">pub fn emit_metrics(&#x26;self, otel: &#x26;SessionTelemetry) {
    for feature in FEATURES {
        if self.enabled(feature.id) != feature.default_enabled {
            otel.counter("codex.feature.state", 1,
                &#x26;[("feature", feature.key), ("value", &#x26;enabled.to_string())]);
        }
    }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>12. 국제화 / 접근성</h2>
<h3>12.1 현재 상태: 미구현</h3>
<p>코드베이스에 i18n(국제화) 또는 a11y(접근성) 전용 인프라는 <strong>존재하지 않는다</strong>.</p>
<ul>
<li>모든 사용자 대면 문자열은 영어 하드코딩</li>
<li>locale 감지나 번역 파일 시스템 없음</li>
<li>ARIA 속성이나 스크린 리더 지원 코드 없음 (TUI 기반이므로 터미널 접근성에 의존)</li>
<li><code>ansi-escape</code> 크레이트가 ANSI 이스케이프 시퀀스를 처리하나, 이는 접근성이 아닌 터미널 호환성 목적</li>
</ul>
<h3>12.2 관련 코드</h3>
<p>유일하게 관련된 부분은 에러 메시지의 시간 포맷팅에서 로컬 시간대를 사용하는 정도:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// codex-rs/core/src/error.rs
let local_reset = resets_at.with_timezone(&#x26;Local);
</code></pre>
<hr>

<h3>의존성 그래프 (교차 관심사)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-mermaid">graph TD
    CLI[cli] --> Core[core]
    TUI[tui] --> Core
    AppServer[app-server] --> Core
    Core --> GitUtils[git-utils]
    Core --> Otel[otel]
    Core --> Features[features]
    Core --> Login[login]
    Core --> CodexApi[codex-api]
    Core --> Protocol[protocol]
    Login --> KeyringStore[keyring-store]
    CodexApi --> |SSE/WS| OpenAI[OpenAI API]
    Ollama[ollama] --> Core
    LMStudio[lmstudio] --> Core
    Otel --> |OTLP| Statsig[Statsig/OTLP Backend]
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>판정</h2>
<h3>강점</h3>
<ol>
<li>
<p><strong>Git 통합의 깊이</strong>: 단순 명령 실행이 아닌, ghost commit 기반 undo, 스마트 diff-to-remote, merge-base 계산 등 정교한 VCS 통합을 갖추고 있다. <code>git2</code> 대신 CLI를 사용하여 의존성을 최소화했다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>텔레메트리 성숙도</strong>: OpenTelemetry 표준을 완전히 수용하며, 로그/트레이스/메트릭 3축을 모두 지원한다. 민감 정보 필터링(<code>trace_safe</code> vs <code>log_only</code>)이 설계 단계부터 고려되었다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>피처 플래그 체계</strong>: 50개 이상의 피처를 5단계 스테이지로 관리하며, 의존성 정규화, 레거시 호환, 실험 메뉴, 텔레메트리 연동까지 갖춘 완성도 높은 시스템이다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>에러 처리 일관성</strong>: <code>CodexErr</code> 중앙 타입에 재시도 가능성 판정, 프로토콜 변환, 사용자 플랜별 메시지가 통합되어 있다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>인증 다층 구조</strong>: Device Code, PKCE, API Key, Keyring을 조합하여 CLI와 IDE 양쪽을 지원한다.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<h3>약점</h3>
<ol>
<li>
<p><strong>국제화 완전 부재</strong>: 사용자 대면 문자열이 모두 영어 하드코딩이다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>접근성 미고려</strong>: TUI 기반이므로 터미널 접근성에 의존하나, 별도 a11y 지원은 없다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>음성 기능 미완성</strong>: Realtime Conversation이 UnderDevelopment 단계에 머물러 있으며, 레거시 WebSocket 전송이 이미 Removed로 전환되었다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>이벤트 시스템의 비공식성</strong>: 전용 이벤트 버스 없이 <code>async_channel</code>을 직접 사용하므로, 이벤트 흐름을 추적하려면 코드 전체를 탐색해야 한다.</p>
</li>
</ol>
<h3>특이점</h3>
<ol>
<li>
<p><strong>Statsig 내장</strong>: 기본 메트릭 내보내기가 OpenAI 내부 Statsig 엔드포인트로 직접 전송된다. API 키가 소스 코드에 하드코딩되어 있다(<code>client-MkRuleRQBd6qakfnDYqJVR9JuXcY57Ljly3vi5JVUIO</code>).</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Ghost Commit이 Feature Flag 뒤에</strong>: 기본적으로 비활성화(<code>default_enabled: false</code>)되어 있어, undo 기능을 사용하려면 <code>[features].undo = true</code>로 명시적 활성화가 필요하다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>Chat Wire API 완전 제거</strong>: <code>wire_api = "chat"</code> 사용 시 명시적 에러 메시지와 마이그레이션 가이드를 표시한다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>이중 빌드 시스템</strong>: Cargo와 Bazel을 동시 지원하여 개발(Cargo)과 대규모 CI(Bazel) 양쪽을 커버한다.</p>
</li>
<li>
<p><strong>5초 git 타임아웃</strong>: 대형 모노레포에서의 행 방지를 위해 모든 비동기 git 명령에 5초 하드 타임아웃이 적용된다.</p>
</li>
</ol>
22:["$","$L28","20-axis-13-etc",{"id":"20-axis-13-etc","order":30,"tier":"deep","title":"Axis 13: Cross-cutting","description":"013_etc/13_co_etc.md","lang":"en","badge":"AXIS","children":["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$47"}}]}]
48:T9b4b,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Axis 14: Web search</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — web search integration.</p>
</blockquote>
</li>
<li>Codex는 OpenAI Responses API의 <strong>내장 <code>web_search</code> 도구</strong>를 사용한다. Rust 코어에서 <code>ToolSpec::WebSearch</code> 변형으로 정의되며, API 서버 측에서 검색을 수행하고 결과를 스트리밍으로 반환한다. 3단계 모드(<code>live</code>/<code>cached</code>/<code>disabled</code>)로 비용과 속도를 제어할 수 있으며, 도메인 필터링, 지리적 위치, 컨텍스트 크기 등 세밀한 설정을 지원한다.</li>
</ul>
<hr>
<ul>
<li>// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/tools/src/tool_spec.rs:36-48</li>
<li>WebSearch {</li>
<li>external_web_access: Option,</li>
<li>filters: Option,</li>
<li>user_location: Option,</li>
<li>search_context_size: Option,</li>
<li>search_content_types: Option&#x3C;Vec>,</li>
<li>}</li>
<li>// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/protocol/src/models.rs:1191-1216</li>
</ul>

pub fn web_search_action_detail(action: &#x26;WebSearchAction) -> String {
    match action {
        WebSearchAction::Search { query, queries } => search_action_detail(query, queries),
        WebSearchAction::OpenPage { url } => url.clone().unwrap_or_default(),
        WebSearchAction::FindInPage { url, pattern } => /* ... */,
        WebSearchAction::Other => String::new(),
    }
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/hosted_spec.rs:20-49
pub fn create_web_search_tool(options: WebSearchToolOptions&#x3C;'_>) -> Option&#x3C;ToolSpec> {
    let external_web_access = match options.web_search_mode {
        Some(WebSearchMode::Cached) => Some(false),
        Some(WebSearchMode::Live) => Some(true),
        Some(WebSearchMode::Disabled) | None => None,
    }?;
    Some(ToolSpec::WebSearch { external_web_access: Some(external_web_access), /* filters, location */ })
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/config/mod.rs:2186-2196
fn resolve_web_search_mode(config_toml: &#x26;ConfigToml, features: &#x26;Features) -> Option&#x3C;WebSearchMode> {
    if let Some(mode) = config_toml.web_search { return Some(mode); }
    if features.enabled(Feature::WebSearchCached) { return Some(WebSearchMode::Cached); }
    if features.enabled(Feature::WebSearchRequest) { return Some(WebSearchMode::Live); }
    None
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>

    web_search_mode: &#x26;Constrained&#x3C;WebSearchMode>,
    permission_profile: &#x26;PermissionProfile,
) -> WebSearchMode { /* downgrades when PermissionProfile::Disabled */ }
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/event_mapping.rs:183-192
ResponseItem::WebSearchCall { id, action, .. } => {
    let (action, query) = match action {
        Some(action) => (action.clone(), web_search_action_detail(action)),
        None => (WebSearchAction::Other, String::new()),
    };
    Some(TurnItem::WebSearch(WebSearchItem { id, query, action }))
}
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/stream_events_utils.rs:184-208
fn response_item_may_include_external_context(item: &#x26;ResponseItem) -> bool {
    matches!(item, ResponseItem::ToolSearchCall { .. }
        | ResponseItem::ToolSearchOutput { .. }
        | ResponseItem::WebSearchCall { .. })
}
pub(crate) async fn mark_thread_memory_mode_polluted_if_external_context(...) {
    if !turn_context.config.memories.disable_on_external_context
        || !response_item_may_include_external_context(item) { return; }
    state_db::mark_thread_memory_mode_polluted(...).await;
}
</code></pre>

<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-text">사용자 쿼리 → ToolSpec::WebSearch 직렬화 → OpenAI 서버
   ↓
[Stage 1] 쿼리 분해 (Query Decomposition)
  · LLM이 원본 쿼리를 분석, 서브쿼리로 분해
  · 모호한 용어 명확화, 동의어 확장
  · 사용자에게 보이지 않는 중간 리라이팅
   ↓
[Stage 2] 다중 소스 검색
  · Bing Index (1차 소스, MS 파트너십)
  · OAI-SearchBot (자체 크롤러, GPTBot과 별개)
  · Partial Index (자체 보조 인덱스)
   ↓
[Stage 3] URL 방문 + 패시지 추출
  · 후보 URL의 실제 페이지 방문
  · HTML → 본문 텍스트 → 관련 패시지 단위 추출
   ↓
[Stage 4] LLM 기반 재순위화
  · Bing 순위와 독립적으로 LLM이 재평가
  · relevance, trust, context 기반
   ↓
[Stage 5] 응답 생성 + 인용
  · web_search_call 이벤트 (action, sources)
  · url_citation 어노테이션 자동 삽입
</code></pre>
<h3>README / docs</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/analytics/src/events.rs:72, 673-684
AnalyticsEvent::WebSearch(CodexWebSearchEventRequest),
pub(crate) struct CodexWebSearchEventParams {
    pub(crate) web_search_action: Option&#x3C;WebSearchActionKind>,
    // ...
}
</code></pre>
<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h1>Codex — Web Search Implementation</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>Analysis Snapshot</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — web search integration.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>Overview</h2>
<p>Codex uses the <strong>built-in <code>web_search</code> tool</strong> of the OpenAI Responses API. Defined in the Rust core as the <code>ToolSpec::WebSearch</code> variant, which performs a search on the API server side and returns the results streaming. Cost and speed can be controlled in three levels of mode (<code>live</code>/<code>cached</code>/<code>disabled</code>), and detailed settings such as domain filtering, geographic location, and context size are supported.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Core type definition</h2>
<h3>ToolSpec::WebSearch</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/tools/src/tool_spec.rs:36-48
#[serde(rename = "web_search")]
WebSearch {
    external_web_access: Option&#x3C;bool>,
    filters: Option&#x3C;ResponsesApiWebSearchFilters>,
    user_location: Option&#x3C;ResponsesApiWebSearchUserLocation>,
    search_context_size: Option&#x3C;WebSearchContextSize>,
    search_content_types: Option&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;String>>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>WebSearchAction (protocol level)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/protocol/src/models.rs:1191-1216
pub enum WebSearchAction {
    Search { query: Option&#x3C;String>, queries: Option&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;String>> },
    OpenPage { url: Option&#x3C;String> },
    FindInPage { url: Option&#x3C;String>, pattern: Option&#x3C;String> },
    #[serde(other)]
    Other,
}
</code></pre>
<p>We classify the web search life cycle into four action types:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Search</strong>: Run a keyword-based search</li>
<li><strong>OpenPage</strong>: Open a specific URL page</li>
<li><strong>FindInPage</strong>: Search for patterns within a page</li>
<li><strong>Other</strong>: Other</li>
</ol>
<h3>Display search results</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/web_search.rs:18-29
pub fn web_search_action_detail(action: &#x26;WebSearchAction) -> String {
    match action {
        WebSearchAction::Search { query, queries } => search_action_detail(query, queries),
        WebSearchAction::OpenPage { url } => url.clone().unwrap_or_default(),
        WebSearchAction::FindInPage { url, pattern } => /* ... */,
        WebSearchAction::Other => String::new(),
    }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Mode settings</h2>
<h3>Level 3 mode</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>mode</th>
<th><code>external_web_access</code></th>
<th>Description</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>live</code></td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td>Live Internet Access, Latest Results</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>cached</code></td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td>Use only cached search results</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disabled</code></td>
<td>(Tools not included)</td>
<td>Completely disable web browsing</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Setting path</h3>
<pre><code class="language-toml"># ~/.codex/config.toml
web_search = "live"        # or "cached" or "disabled"
</code></pre>
<p>From the CLI:</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">codex --config web_search="live"
</code></pre>
<p>In the SDK:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// sdk/typescript/src/exec.ts
commandArgs.push("--config", `web_search="${args.webSearchMode}"`);
</code></pre>
<h3>Cloud requirements integration</h3>
<p>Organization administrators can restrict allowed modes with <code>allowed_web_search_modes</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-toml"># cloud requirements
allowed_web_search_modes = ["cached"]  # live 검색 차단
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>Filtering options</h2>
<h3>Domain filter</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">struct ResponsesApiWebSearchFilters {
    allowed_domains: Option&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;String>>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Geographic location</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">struct ResponsesApiWebSearchUserLocation {
    r#type: WebSearchUserLocationType,  // "approximate"
    country: Option&#x3C;String>,   // ISO 코드
    region: Option&#x3C;String>,
    city: Option&#x3C;String>,
    timezone: Option&#x3C;String>,  // IANA 시간대
}
</code></pre>
<h3>Context size</h3>
<p>Control the amount of context in search results with the <code>WebSearchContextSize</code> enum.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Tool assembly (<code>create_web_search_tool</code>)</h2>
<p>Hosted tools are built in <code>core/src/tools/hosted_spec.rs</code> — not routed through <code>ToolRouter</code> like shell/MCP tools:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/hosted_spec.rs:20-49
pub fn create_web_search_tool(options: WebSearchToolOptions&#x3C;'_>) -> Option&#x3C;ToolSpec> {
    let external_web_access = match options.web_search_mode {
        Some(WebSearchMode::Cached) => Some(false),
        Some(WebSearchMode::Live) => Some(true),
        Some(WebSearchMode::Disabled) | None => None,
    }?;
    Some(ToolSpec::WebSearch { external_web_access: Some(external_web_access), /* filters, location */ })
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>WebSearchMode::Disabled</code> or <code>None</code> → function returns <code>None</code> → tool omitted from Responses API tool list for that turn.</p>
<h2>Config resolution</h2>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/config/mod.rs:2186-2196
fn resolve_web_search_mode(config_toml: &#x26;ConfigToml, features: &#x26;Features) -> Option&#x3C;WebSearchMode> {
    if let Some(mode) = config_toml.web_search { return Some(mode); }
    if features.enabled(Feature::WebSearchCached) { return Some(WebSearchMode::Cached); }
    if features.enabled(Feature::WebSearchRequest) { return Some(WebSearchMode::Live); }
    None
}
</code></pre>
<p>Per-turn override with permission profile:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/config/mod.rs:2302-2318
pub(crate) fn resolve_web_search_mode_for_turn(
    web_search_mode: &#x26;Constrained&#x3C;WebSearchMode>,
    permission_profile: &#x26;PermissionProfile,
) -> WebSearchMode { /* downgrades when PermissionProfile::Disabled */ }
</code></pre>
<p>Called from <code>core/src/session/turn_context.rs:403</code> when assembling turn tools.</p>
<h2>Event mapping (Responses → TurnItem)</h2>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/event_mapping.rs:183-192
ResponseItem::WebSearchCall { id, action, .. } => {
    let (action, query) = match action {
        Some(action) => (action.clone(), web_search_action_detail(action)),
        None => (WebSearchAction::Other, String::new()),
    };
    Some(TurnItem::WebSearch(WebSearchItem { id, query, action }))
}
</code></pre>
<p>Unit tests in <code>core/src/event_mapping_tests.rs:427-501</code> cover Search, OpenPage, FindInPage variants.</p>
<h2>Prevent memory contamination</h2>
<p>To prevent web search results from being stored in long-term memory, pollute the thread memory mode when setting <code>disable_on_external_context</code>:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/stream_events_utils.rs:184-208
fn response_item_may_include_external_context(item: &#x26;ResponseItem) -> bool {
    matches!(item, ResponseItem::ToolSearchCall { .. }
        | ResponseItem::ToolSearchOutput { .. }
        | ResponseItem::WebSearchCall { .. })
}
pub(crate) async fn mark_thread_memory_mode_polluted_if_external_context(...) {
    if !turn_context.config.memories.disable_on_external_context
        || !response_item_may_include_external_context(item) { return; }
    state_db::mark_thread_memory_mode_polluted(...).await;
}
</code></pre>
<p>Invoked from <code>core/src/session/turn.rs:1674</code> after completed response items.</p>

<hr>
<h2>Server-side pipeline (inside OpenAI)</h2>
<p>When Codex calls the <code>web_search</code> tool, the following processing is performed inside the OpenAI Responses API server:</p>
<pre><code>사용자 쿼리 → ToolSpec::WebSearch 직렬화 → OpenAI 서버
   ↓
[Stage 1] 쿼리 분해 (Query Decomposition)
  · LLM이 원본 쿼리를 분석, 서브쿼리로 분해
  · 모호한 용어 명확화, 동의어 확장
  · 사용자에게 보이지 않는 중간 리라이팅
   ↓
[Stage 2] 다중 소스 검색
  · Bing Index (1차 소스, MS 파트너십)
  · OAI-SearchBot (자체 크롤러, GPTBot과 별개)
  · Partial Index (자체 보조 인덱스)
   ↓
[Stage 3] URL 방문 + 패시지 추출
  · 후보 URL의 실제 페이지 방문
  · HTML → 본문 텍스트 → 관련 패시지 단위 추출
   ↓
[Stage 4] LLM 기반 재순위화
  · Bing 순위와 독립적으로 LLM이 재평가
  · relevance, trust, context 기반
   ↓
[Stage 5] 응답 생성 + 인용
  · web_search_call 이벤트 (action, sources)
  · url_citation 어노테이션 자동 삽입
</code></pre>
<h3>3 search modes (server side)</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>mode</th>
<th>model</th>
<th>Server operation</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><strong>Non-reasoning</strong></td>
<td><code>gpt-4o</code></td>
<td>Query → Search → Return top results immediately</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Agentic Search</strong></td>
<td><code>o3</code>, <code>o4-mini</code></td>
<td>Integration of search into CoT, autonomous decision on additional search after analysis of intermediate results</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Deep Research</strong></td>
<td><code>o3-deep-research</code></td>
<td>Browse hundreds of sources in minutes</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>Role of Codex Client</h3>
<p>The Codex client (Rust) does not run the server pipeline directly. Instead:</p>
<ol>
<li>Serialize <code>ToolSpec::WebSearch</code> to JSON and send to API</li>
<li>Receive <code>web_search_call</code> event from streaming response</li>
<li>Deserialize with <code>WebSearchAction</code> to display UI</li>
<li>Extract citation information from <code>sources</code> array</li>
</ol>
<h2>Analytics / telemetry</h2>
<p>Web search turns emit dedicated analytics events:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/analytics/src/events.rs:72, 673-684
AnalyticsEvent::WebSearch(CodexWebSearchEventRequest),
pub(crate) struct CodexWebSearchEventParams {
    pub(crate) web_search_action: Option&#x3C;WebSearchActionKind>,
    // ...
}
</code></pre>
<p>Thread rollups track <code>web_search_count</code> per session (<code>analytics/src/events.rs:807</code>); reducer tests assert count increments when <code>ThreadItem::WebSearch</code> is present (<code>analytics/src/analytics_client_tests.rs:3757</code>).</p>
<p>OTel session telemetry maps <code>ResponseItem::WebSearchCall</code> to <code>"web_search_call"</code> event type (<code>codex-rs/otel/src/events/session_telemetry.rs:1197</code>).</p>

<h2>Korean corpus (reference)</h2>

<h1>Codex — Web Search 구현</h1>
<blockquote>
<p><strong>분석 스냅샷</strong>: <code>121_openai-codex/codex-rs/</code> — web search integration.</p>
</blockquote>
<h2>개요</h2>
<p>Codex는 OpenAI Responses API의 <strong>내장 <code>web_search</code> 도구</strong>를 사용한다. Rust 코어에서 <code>ToolSpec::WebSearch</code> 변형으로 정의되며, API 서버 측에서 검색을 수행하고 결과를 스트리밍으로 반환한다. 3단계 모드(<code>live</code>/<code>cached</code>/<code>disabled</code>)로 비용과 속도를 제어할 수 있으며, 도메인 필터링, 지리적 위치, 컨텍스트 크기 등 세밀한 설정을 지원한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>핵심 타입 정의</h2>
<h3>ToolSpec::WebSearch</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/tools/src/tool_spec.rs:36-48
#[serde(rename = "web_search")]
WebSearch {
    external_web_access: Option&#x3C;bool>,
    filters: Option&#x3C;ResponsesApiWebSearchFilters>,
    user_location: Option&#x3C;ResponsesApiWebSearchUserLocation>,
    search_context_size: Option&#x3C;WebSearchContextSize>,
    search_content_types: Option&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;String>>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>WebSearchAction (프로토콜 레벨)</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/protocol/src/models.rs:1191-1216
pub enum WebSearchAction {
    Search { query: Option&#x3C;String>, queries: Option&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;String>> },
    OpenPage { url: Option&#x3C;String> },
    FindInPage { url: Option&#x3C;String>, pattern: Option&#x3C;String> },
    #[serde(other)]
    Other,
}
</code></pre>
<p>4종 액션 타입으로 웹 검색 수명주기를 분류한다:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Search</strong>: 키워드 기반 검색 실행</li>
<li><strong>OpenPage</strong>: 특정 URL 페이지 열기</li>
<li><strong>FindInPage</strong>: 페이지 내 패턴 검색</li>
<li><strong>Other</strong>: 기타</li>
</ol>
<h3>검색 결과 표시</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/web_search.rs:18-29
pub fn web_search_action_detail(action: &#x26;WebSearchAction) -> String {
    match action {
        WebSearchAction::Search { query, queries } => search_action_detail(query, queries),
        WebSearchAction::OpenPage { url } => url.clone().unwrap_or_default(),
        WebSearchAction::FindInPage { url, pattern } => /* ... */,
        WebSearchAction::Other => String::new(),
    }
}
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>모드 설정</h2>
<h3>3단계 모드</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>모드</th>
<th><code>external_web_access</code></th>
<th>설명</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td><code>live</code></td>
<td><code>true</code></td>
<td>실시간 인터넷 접근, 최신 결과</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>cached</code></td>
<td><code>false</code></td>
<td>캐시된 검색 결과만 사용</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><code>disabled</code></td>
<td>(도구 미포함)</td>
<td>웹 검색 완전 비활성화</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h3>설정 경로</h3>
<pre><code class="language-toml"># ~/.codex/config.toml
web_search = "live"        # or "cached" or "disabled"
</code></pre>
<p>CLI에서:</p>
<pre><code class="language-bash">codex --config web_search="live"
</code></pre>
<p>SDK에서:</p>
<pre><code class="language-typescript">// sdk/typescript/src/exec.ts
commandArgs.push("--config", `web_search="${args.webSearchMode}"`);
</code></pre>
<h3>클라우드 요구사항 연동</h3>
<p>조직 관리자가 <code>allowed_web_search_modes</code>로 허용 모드를 제한할 수 있다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-toml"># cloud requirements
allowed_web_search_modes = ["cached"]  # live 검색 차단
</code></pre>
<hr>
<h2>필터링 옵션</h2>
<h3>도메인 필터</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">struct ResponsesApiWebSearchFilters {
    allowed_domains: Option&#x3C;Vec&#x3C;String>>,
}
</code></pre>
<h3>지리적 위치</h3>
<pre><code class="language-rust">struct ResponsesApiWebSearchUserLocation {
    r#type: WebSearchUserLocationType,  // "approximate"
    country: Option&#x3C;String>,   // ISO 코드
    region: Option&#x3C;String>,
    city: Option&#x3C;String>,
    timezone: Option&#x3C;String>,  // IANA 시간대
}
</code></pre>
<h3>컨텍스트 크기</h3>
<p><code>WebSearchContextSize</code> enum으로 검색 결과의 컨텍스트 양을 제어한다.</p>
<hr>
<h2>Tool assembly (<code>create_web_search_tool</code>)</h2>
<p>Hosted tools are built in <code>core/src/tools/hosted_spec.rs</code> — not routed through <code>ToolRouter</code> like shell/MCP tools:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/tools/hosted_spec.rs:20-49
pub fn create_web_search_tool(options: WebSearchToolOptions&#x3C;'_>) -> Option&#x3C;ToolSpec> {
    let external_web_access = match options.web_search_mode {
        Some(WebSearchMode::Cached) => Some(false),
        Some(WebSearchMode::Live) => Some(true),
        Some(WebSearchMode::Disabled) | None => None,
    }?;
    Some(ToolSpec::WebSearch { external_web_access: Some(external_web_access), /* filters, location */ })
}
</code></pre>
<p><code>WebSearchMode::Disabled</code> or <code>None</code> → function returns <code>None</code> → tool omitted from Responses API tool list for that turn.</p>
<h2>Config resolution</h2>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/config/mod.rs:2186-2196
fn resolve_web_search_mode(config_toml: &#x26;ConfigToml, features: &#x26;Features) -> Option&#x3C;WebSearchMode> {
    if let Some(mode) = config_toml.web_search { return Some(mode); }
    if features.enabled(Feature::WebSearchCached) { return Some(WebSearchMode::Cached); }
    if features.enabled(Feature::WebSearchRequest) { return Some(WebSearchMode::Live); }
    None
}
</code></pre>
<p>Per-turn override with permission profile:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/config/mod.rs:2302-2318
pub(crate) fn resolve_web_search_mode_for_turn(
    web_search_mode: &#x26;Constrained&#x3C;WebSearchMode>,
    permission_profile: &#x26;PermissionProfile,
) -> WebSearchMode { /* downgrades when PermissionProfile::Disabled */ }
</code></pre>
<p>Called from <code>core/src/session/turn_context.rs:403</code> when assembling turn tools.</p>
<h2>Event mapping (Responses → TurnItem)</h2>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/event_mapping.rs:183-192
ResponseItem::WebSearchCall { id, action, .. } => {
    let (action, query) = match action {
        Some(action) => (action.clone(), web_search_action_detail(action)),
        None => (WebSearchAction::Other, String::new()),
    };
    Some(TurnItem::WebSearch(WebSearchItem { id, query, action }))
}
</code></pre>
<p>Unit tests in <code>core/src/event_mapping_tests.rs:427-501</code> cover Search, OpenPage, FindInPage variants.</p>
<h2>메모리 오염 방지</h2>
<p>웹 검색 결과가 장기 메모리에 저장되지 않도록 <code>disable_on_external_context</code> 설정 시 thread memory mode를 오염 처리한다:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/core/src/stream_events_utils.rs:184-208
fn response_item_may_include_external_context(item: &#x26;ResponseItem) -> bool {
    matches!(item, ResponseItem::ToolSearchCall { .. }
        | ResponseItem::ToolSearchOutput { .. }
        | ResponseItem::WebSearchCall { .. })
}
pub(crate) async fn mark_thread_memory_mode_polluted_if_external_context(...) {
    if !turn_context.config.memories.disable_on_external_context
        || !response_item_may_include_external_context(item) { return; }
    state_db::mark_thread_memory_mode_polluted(...).await;
}
</code></pre>
<p>Invoked from <code>core/src/session/turn.rs:1674</code> after completed response items.</p>

<hr>
<h2>서버 사이드 파이프라인 (OpenAI 내부)</h2>
<p>Codex가 <code>web_search</code> 도구를 호출하면, OpenAI Responses API 서버 내부에서 다음 처리가 수행된다:</p>
<pre><code>사용자 쿼리 → ToolSpec::WebSearch 직렬화 → OpenAI 서버
   ↓
[Stage 1] 쿼리 분해 (Query Decomposition)
  · LLM이 원본 쿼리를 분석, 서브쿼리로 분해
  · 모호한 용어 명확화, 동의어 확장
  · 사용자에게 보이지 않는 중간 리라이팅
   ↓
[Stage 2] 다중 소스 검색
  · Bing Index (1차 소스, MS 파트너십)
  · OAI-SearchBot (자체 크롤러, GPTBot과 별개)
  · Partial Index (자체 보조 인덱스)
   ↓
[Stage 3] URL 방문 + 패시지 추출
  · 후보 URL의 실제 페이지 방문
  · HTML → 본문 텍스트 → 관련 패시지 단위 추출
   ↓
[Stage 4] LLM 기반 재순위화
  · Bing 순위와 독립적으로 LLM이 재평가
  · relevance, trust, context 기반
   ↓
[Stage 5] 응답 생성 + 인용
  · web_search_call 이벤트 (action, sources)
  · url_citation 어노테이션 자동 삽입
</code></pre>
<h3>3가지 검색 모드 (서버 측)</h3>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>모드</th>
<th>모델</th>
<th>서버 동작</th>
</tr>

</tr>

<td><strong>Deep Research</strong></td>

</tr>
</tbody>

<h3>Codex 클라이언트의 역할</h3>
<p>Codex 클라이언트(Rust)는 서버 파이프라인을 직접 실행하지 않는다. 대신:</p>
<ol>
<li><code>ToolSpec::WebSearch</code>를 JSON으로 직렬화하여 API 전송</li>
<li>스트리밍 응답에서 <code>web_search_call</code> 이벤트 수신</li>
<li><code>WebSearchAction</code>으로 역직렬화하여 UI 표시</li>
<li><code>sources</code> 배열에서 인용 정보 추출</li>
</ol>
<h2>Analytics / telemetry</h2>
<p>Web search turns emit dedicated analytics events:</p>
<pre><code class="language-rust">// 121_openai-codex/codex-rs/analytics/src/events.rs:72, 673-684
AnalyticsEvent::WebSearch(CodexWebSearchEventRequest),
pub(crate) struct CodexWebSearchEventParams {
    pub(crate) web_search_action: Option&#x3C;WebSearchActionKind>,
    // ...
}
</code></pre>
<p>Thread rollups track <code>web_search_count</code> per session (<code>analytics/src/events.rs:807</code>); reducer tests assert count increments when <code>ThreadItem::WebSearch</code> is present (<code>analytics/src/analytics_client_tests.rs:3757</code>).</p>
<p>OTel session telemetry maps <code>ResponseItem::WebSearchCall</code> to <code>"web_search_call"</code> event type (<code>codex-rs/otel/src/events/session_telemetry.rs:1197</code>).</p>

<p><strong>Reverse engineering (015)</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>이 축은 설치 help parity 문서의 다음 단계다. 기존 <code>00</code>~<code>14</code> 축은 주로 help/config/local-doc 표면을 비교했고, 이 축은 설치된 바이너리와 번들에서 복원 가능한 구조를 따로 기록한다.</li>
<li>| Level | 의미 | 사용할 수 있는 주장 |</li>
<li>| installed-help | <code>--help</code>, public command output, version output | 명령/플래그/공개 subcommand가 존재한다 |</li>
<li>| safe-local-doc | 설치 패키지의 docs, changelog, examples, manifest | 문서화된 schema/경로/기능 설명이 있다 |</li>
<li>| bundle-key | minified bundle에 남은 module key, source path, route name, proto name | 내부 모듈/라우터/프로토/컴포넌트가 존재한다 |</li>
<li>| binary-string | native binary <code>strings</code>, <code>file</code>, <code>otool</code>, <code>codesign</code>, <code>nm</code> | crate/package/protocol/tool/evaluator 이름이 embedded되어 있다 |</li>
<li>| runtime-trace | synthetic project에서 실제 명령을 실행한 결과 | 동작 semantics, precedence, permission enforcement를 확인했다 |</li>
<li>| private-artifact-name | 비공개 상태 파일의 경로/개수만 관찰 | artifact가 존재한다. 내용/schema 주장은 금지 |</li>
<li><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/33_source_deobfuscation_inventory.md</code> further separates source-like recovery levels. In this corpus, Cursor reaches preserved module-key recovery, while Grok/Kiro/AGY mostly expose native</li>
<li>auth/token/cookie/credential/login data</li>
<li>raw transcript, chat history, conversation DB/PB</li>
<li>logs and terminal captures</li>
</ul>

<h2>Main analysis</h2>
<h3><code>015_reverse-engineering/00_reverse_evidence_policy.md</code></h3>
<h1>Reverse Engineering Evidence Policy</h1>
<p>This axis is the next step in the installation help parity document. The existing <code>00</code> to <code>14</code> axis mainly compared the help/config/local-doc surface, and this axis separately records the structures that can be restored from installed binaries and bundles.</p>
<h2>Evidence Levels</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Level</th>
<th>Meaning</th>
<th>Claims available</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>installed-help</td>
<td><code>--help</code>, public command output, version output</td>
<td>Command/Flag/Public subcommand exists</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>safe-local-doc</td>
<td>docs, changelog, examples, manifest in the installation package</td>
<td>There is a documented schema/path/function description</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>bundle-key</td>
<td>Module key, source path, route name, proto name remaining in minified bundle</td>
<td>Internal modules/router/prototypes/components exist</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>binary-string</td>
<td>native binary <code>strings</code>, <code>file</code>, <code>otool</code>, <code>codesign</code>, <code>nm</code></td>
<td>The name crate/package/protocol/tool/evaluator is embedded</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>runtime-trace</td>
<td>Results of executing actual commands in synthetic project</td>
<td>Checked operational semantics, precedence, and permission enforcement</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>private-artifact-name</td>
<td>Observe only the path/count of private state files</td>
<td>An artifact exists. Content/schema claims are prohibited</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/33_source_deobfuscation_inventory.md</code> further separates source-like recovery levels. In this corpus, Cursor reaches preserved module-key recovery, while Grok/Kiro/AGY mostly expose native source-path, handler, protobuf, and runtime-trace evidence. Do not call this "full source recovered" unless a real source map or readable source archive is present.</p>
<h2>Hard Boundary</h2>
<p>The purpose of reverse analysis is to restore product structure, not to extract user state. Next, reading the content is prohibited.</p>
<ul>
<li>auth/token/cookie/credential/login data</li>
<li>raw transcript, chat history, conversation DB/PB</li>
<li>logs and terminal captures</li>
<li>browser profile state, local storage, IndexedDB, session storage</li>
<li>memory/goal runtime stores</li>
<li>screenshots and browser recordings</li>
<li>private <code>mcp.json</code>, settings, config values unless explicitly redacted</li>
</ul>
<p>For private artifacts, only “exists” is used. Field/schema/content assertions are only used when there are public docs, source/bundle evidence, sanitized fixtures, and synthetic runtime traces.</p>
<h2>Installed CLI version pin (2026-06-27)</h2>

</ul>

<h2>Reading Rule For Existing Docs</h2>
<p>When a <code>00</code>~<code>14</code> page says “None” or “Not supported”, interpret it as “Not exposed in installed help” unless this <code>15_reverse-engineering</code> axis confirms absence from bundle/binary evidence too.</p>
<p>When a page states runtime semantics from config/cache observation, this axis upgrades or downgrades the claim:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>bundle-key</code> or <code>binary-string</code> confirms a module exists.</li>
<li><code>runtime-trace</code> is still required for exact precedence, scheduling, isolation, merge, and permission behavior.</li>
</ul>

<h2>Interpretation</h2>
<p>Hermes belongs in a standalone-runtime comparison. OMC, OMX, and OMO belong in a hosted-harness comparison. The practical user-facing capability of the hosted harnesses can be high, but it is the combined host-plus-harness stack that reaches that level, not the harness alone.</p>

<h3><code>015_reverse-engineering/20_synthetic_mcp_config_trace.md</code></h3>
<h1>Synthetic MCP Config Trace</h1>
<p>This pass used disposable temp HOME/workspace directories and dummy <code>/bin/echo</code> MCP commands. It did not start real MCP servers, use credentials, call model sessions, or read private user config.</p>
<h2>Cursor Agent</h2>
<p>Synthetic files:</p>
<ul>
<li>temp HOME: <code>&#x3C;tmp>/home/.cursor/mcp.json</code></li>
<li>temp workspace: <code>&#x3C;tmp>/ws/.cursor/mcp.json</code></li>
</ul>
<p>Config shape used:</p>
<pre><code class="language-json">{"mcpServers":{"homeDummy":{"command":"/bin/echo","args":["home"]}}}
</code></pre>
<p>Findings:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Condition</th>
<th>Result</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>temp workspace <code>.cursor/mcp.json</code> only, non-git directory</td>
<td>not discovered</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>temp HOME <code>~/.cursor/mcp.json</code></td>
<td><code>homeDummy: not loaded (needs approval)</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>temp workspace after <code>git init</code></td>
<td><code>workspaceDummy: not loaded (needs approval)</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Implications:</p>
<ul>
<li>Cursor Agent's synthetic trace supports <code>mcpServers</code> as the config root.</li>
<li>User-level <code>~/.cursor/mcp.json</code> is discovered with temp HOME.</li>
<li>Project <code>.cursor/mcp.json</code> discovery appears tied to workspace/git detection in this trace.</li>
<li>Servers are not auto-loaded; they require approval.</li>
</ul>
<p>Follow-up runtime trace:</p>
<p><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/29_cr_mcp_handshake_trace.md</code> used a project-scoped <code>.cursor/mcp.json</code> plus a synthetic stdio MCP server. <code>cursor-agent mcp enable trace</code> wrote an approval entry under temp HOME at <code>.cursor/projects/&#x3C;project-slug>/mcp-approvals.json</code>; the observed entry was <code>trace-0bab3cead8c72734</code>.</p>
<p><code>mcp list-tools trace</code> then crossed the pre-approval gate and launched the minimal hand-written server, but it timed out without sending any JSON-RPC <code>initialize</code> frame to that fixture.</p>
<p>A second fixture using <code>@modelcontextprotocol/server-everything</code> succeeded: <code>cursor-agent mcp list-tools everything</code> listed 14 tools. This confirms approval enforcement, project-state write behavior, and standalone no-account stdio MCP tool enumeration.</p>
<h2>Grok Build</h2>
<p>Command:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>HOME=&#x3C;tmp>/home /Users/jun/.local/bin/grok mcp add dummy --command /bin/echo --args dummy</code></li>
<li><code>HOME=&#x3C;tmp>/home /Users/jun/.local/bin/grok mcp list --json</code></li>
</ul>
<p>Findings:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Surface</th>
<th>Result</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Add target</td>
<td><code>MCP server 'dummy' saved to ~/.grok/config.toml</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>JSON list</td>
<td>entry includes <code>name</code>, <code>command</code>, <code>args</code>, <code>enabled</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Enabled default</td>
<td><code>enabled: true</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>This confirms that <code>grok mcp add</code> writes user config under temp HOME and that <code>mcp list --json</code> is machine-readable.</p>
<p>Follow-up doctor trace:</p>
<p><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/30_grok_mcp_doctor_trace.md</code> configured <code>@modelcontextprotocol/server-everything</code> directly in temp <code>~/.grok/config.toml</code>. <code>grok mcp doctor everything --json</code> reported <code>command found</code>, <code>server started</code>, <code>handshake OK</code> with protocol <code>2025-06-18</code>, and <code>13 tools discovered</code>.</p>
<h2>Kiro CLI</h2>
<p>Command:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>HOME=&#x3C;tmp>/home /Users/jun/.local/bin/kiro-cli-chat mcp add --name dummy --scope workspace --command /bin/echo --args dummy --disabled --force</code></li>
<li><code>HOME=&#x3C;tmp>/home /Users/jun/.local/bin/kiro-cli-chat mcp list</code></li>
<li><code>HOME=&#x3C;tmp>/home /Users/jun/.local/bin/kiro-cli-chat mcp status --name dummy</code></li>

<p>Implications:</p>

<li>In this run, workspace-scoped server display/status resolved under the default agent bucket.</li>
<li>Disabled servers are listed and status-inspectable without launching the command.</li>
<li>A later enabled official-server status trace in <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/24_ki_agent_mcp_trace.md</code> confirmed JSON-array args for <code>@modelcontextprotocol/server-everything</code>, displayed <code>Disabled: false</code>, but still did not report protocol handshake or tool discovery.</li>

<h2>Remaining Gaps</h2>
<ul>
<li>Cursor MCP project approval behavior and standalone no-account <code>tools/list</code> with an official stdio server are tested in <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/29_cr_mcp_handshake_trace.md</code>.</li>
<li>Grok native TOML MCP startup, handshake, and tool discovery are tested in <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/30_grok_mcp_doctor_trace.md</code>.</li>
<li>OAuth flows were not tested.</li>
<li>Kiro agent-specific MCP routing with a custom synthetic agent is tested in <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/24_ki_agent_mcp_trace.md</code>; actual server startup and protocol handshake remain separate gaps.</li>
<li>AGY MCP activation requires either hidden <code>agentapi</code> knowledge, plugin import, or model/session trace.</li>
</ul>

<h3><code>015_reverse-engineering/00_reverse_evidence_policy.md</code></h3>
<h1>Reverse Engineering Evidence Policy</h1>
<p>이 축은 설치 help parity 문서의 다음 단계다. 기존 <code>00</code>~<code>14</code> 축은 주로 help/config/local-doc 표면을 비교했고, 이 축은 설치된 바이너리와 번들에서 복원 가능한 구조를 따로 기록한다.</p>
<h2>Evidence Levels</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Level</th>
<th>의미</th>
<th>사용할 수 있는 주장</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>installed-help</td>
<td><code>--help</code>, public command output, version output</td>
<td>명령/플래그/공개 subcommand가 존재한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>safe-local-doc</td>
<td>설치 패키지의 docs, changelog, examples, manifest</td>
<td>문서화된 schema/경로/기능 설명이 있다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>bundle-key</td>
<td>minified bundle에 남은 module key, source path, route name, proto name</td>
<td>내부 모듈/라우터/프로토/컴포넌트가 존재한다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>binary-string</td>
<td>native binary <code>strings</code>, <code>file</code>, <code>otool</code>, <code>codesign</code>, <code>nm</code></td>
<td>crate/package/protocol/tool/evaluator 이름이 embedded되어 있다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>runtime-trace</td>
<td>synthetic project에서 실제 명령을 실행한 결과</td>
<td>동작 semantics, precedence, permission enforcement를 확인했다</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>private-artifact-name</td>
<td>비공개 상태 파일의 경로/개수만 관찰</td>
<td>artifact가 존재한다. 내용/schema 주장은 금지</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/33_source_deobfuscation_inventory.md</code> further separates source-like recovery levels. In this corpus, Cursor reaches preserved module-key recovery, while Grok/Kiro/AGY mostly expose native source-path, handler, protobuf, and runtime-trace evidence. Do not call this "full source recovered" unless a real source map or readable source archive is present.</p>
<h2>Hard Boundary</h2>
<p>역분석의 목적은 제품 구조 복원이지 사용자 상태 추출이 아니다. 다음은 내용 읽기 금지다.</p>
<ul>
<li>auth/token/cookie/credential/login data</li>
<li>raw transcript, chat history, conversation DB/PB</li>
<li>logs and terminal captures</li>
<li>browser profile state, local storage, IndexedDB, session storage</li>
<li>memory/goal runtime stores</li>
<li>screenshots and browser recordings</li>
<li>private <code>mcp.json</code>, settings, config values unless explicitly redacted</li>
</ul>
<p>비공개 artifact는 “존재한다”까지만 쓴다. 필드/schema/content 주장은 public docs, source/bundle evidence, sanitized fixture, synthetic runtime trace가 있을 때만 쓴다.</p>
<h2>Installed CLI version pin (2026-06-27)</h2>

<ul>
<li><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/36_installed_cli_version_manifest.md</code></li>
</ul>

<h2>Reading Rule For Existing Docs</h2>
<p>When a <code>00</code>~<code>14</code> page says “없음” or “지원하지 않음”, interpret it as “installed help에서 노출되지 않음” unless this <code>15_reverse-engineering</code> axis confirms absence from bundle/binary evidence too.</p>
<p>When a page states runtime semantics from config/cache observation, this axis upgrades or downgrades the claim:</p>
<ul>
<li><code>bundle-key</code> or <code>binary-string</code> confirms a module exists.</li>
<li><code>runtime-trace</code> is still required for exact precedence, scheduling, isolation, merge, and permission behavior.</li>
</ul>

<h2>Interpretation</h2>
<p>Hermes belongs in a standalone-runtime comparison. OMC, OMX, and OMO belong in a hosted-harness comparison. The practical user-facing capability of the hosted harnesses can be high, but it is the combined host-plus-harness stack that reaches that level, not the harness alone.</p>

<h3><code>015_reverse-engineering/20_synthetic_mcp_config_trace.md</code></h3>
<h1>Synthetic MCP Config Trace</h1>
<p>This pass used disposable temp HOME/workspace directories and dummy <code>/bin/echo</code> MCP commands. It did not start real MCP servers, use credentials, call model sessions, or read private user config.</p>
<h2>Cursor Agent</h2>
<p>Synthetic files:</p>
<ul>
<li>temp HOME: <code>&#x3C;tmp>/home/.cursor/mcp.json</code></li>
<li>temp workspace: <code>&#x3C;tmp>/ws/.cursor/mcp.json</code></li>
</ul>
<p>Config shape used:</p>
<pre><code class="language-json">{"mcpServers":{"homeDummy":{"command":"/bin/echo","args":["home"]}}}
</code></pre>
<p>Findings:</p>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Condition</th>
<th>Result</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>temp workspace <code>.cursor/mcp.json</code> only, non-git directory</td>
<td>not discovered</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>temp HOME <code>~/.cursor/mcp.json</code></td>
<td><code>homeDummy: not loaded (needs approval)</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>temp workspace after <code>git init</code></td>
<td><code>workspaceDummy: not loaded (needs approval)</code></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<p>Implications:</p>
<ul>
<li>Cursor Agent's synthetic trace supports <code>mcpServers</code> as the config root.</li>
<li>User-level <code>~/.cursor/mcp.json</code> is discovered with temp HOME.</li>
<li>Project <code>.cursor/mcp.json</code> discovery appears tied to workspace/git detection in this trace.</li>
<li>Servers are not auto-loaded; they require approval.</li>
</ul>
<p>Follow-up runtime trace:</p>
<p><code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/29_cr_mcp_handshake_trace.md</code> used a project-scoped <code>.cursor/mcp.json</code> plus a synthetic stdio MCP server. <code>cursor-agent mcp enable trace</code> wrote an approval entry under temp HOME at <code>.cursor/projects/&#x3C;project-slug>/mcp-approvals.json</code>; the observed entry was <code>trace-0bab3cead8c72734</code>.</p>
<p><code>mcp list-tools trace</code> then crossed the pre-approval gate and launched the minimal hand-written server, but it timed out without sending any JSON-RPC <code>initialize</code> frame to that fixture.</p>
<p>A second fixture using <code>@modelcontextprotocol/server-everything</code> succeeded: <code>cursor-agent mcp list-tools everything</code> listed 14 tools. This confirms approval enforcement, project-state write behavior, and standalone no-account stdio MCP tool enumeration.</p>

<p>Follow-up doctor trace:</p>

<h2>Remaining Gaps</h2>
<ul>
<li>Cursor MCP project approval behavior and standalone no-account <code>tools/list</code> with an official stdio server are tested in <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/29_cr_mcp_handshake_trace.md</code>.</li>
<li>Grok native TOML MCP startup, handshake, and tool discovery are tested in <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/30_grok_mcp_doctor_trace.md</code>.</li>
<li>OAuth flows were not tested.</li>
<li>Kiro agent-specific MCP routing with a custom synthetic agent is tested in <code>/Users/jun/Developer/codex/015_reverse-engineering/24_ki_agent_mcp_trace.md</code>; actual server startup and protocol handshake remain separate gaps.</li>
<li>AGY MCP activation requires either hidden <code>agentapi</code> knowledge, plugin import, or model/session trace.</li>
</ul>

4a:T4b0a,<h2>Overview</h2>
<p><strong>Technical reference &#x26; synthesis</strong> — developer-depth section from the codex corpus. Structural highlights extracted from the analysis:</p>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: Codex 에이전트 시스템 동작 원리를 11개 섹션으로 상세 확장. CLI 진입 → Session 초기화 (43 pub 모듈) → 3층 프롬프트 조립 (AGENTS.md contextual fragment, 스킬 2단계 주입) → ToolRouter/Registry/Handler 37+ 3단 디스패치 → OS-level 샌드박스 (Seatbelt/Landlock/Windows) → Ghost Commi</li>
</ul>

<ul>
<li>이 문서는 Codex, Aider, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Claude Code를 13개 아키텍처 차원에서 동시에 비교한 캡스톤 문서다.</li>
<li>graph TD</li>
<li>A[5개 에이전트 개요] --> B[13개 차원 비교]</li>
<li>B --> C[공통 패턴 추출]</li>
<li>B --> D[핵심 차별점 추출]</li>
<li>C --> E[기술 선택 시사점]</li>
<li>D --> E</li>
<li>E --> F[미래 전망과 설계 교훈]</li>
<li>따라서 여기서는 TUI, prompt, tool, skill, subagent, app-server, sandbox, config, MCP, memory, plugin, guardian, 그리고 잔여 교차 관심사를 하나의 프레임으로 다시 묶는다.</li>
<li>근거: [[00_co_overview]], [[00_ai_overview]], [[00_ge_overview]], [[00_oc_overview]], [[00_cc_overview]]</li>

<h2>Source code snippets</h2>

<h2>Change history</h2>
<h2>Change history</h2>
<ul>
<li>2026-03-26: Detailed expansion of Codex agent system operating principles into 11 sections. CLI entry → Session initialization (43 pub modules) → 3rd floor prompt assembly (AGENTS.md contextual fragment, skill 2nd level injection) → ToolRouter/Registry/Handler 37+ 3rd level dispatch → OS-level sandbox (Seatbelt/Landlock/Windows) → Ghost Commit checkpointing → Responses API single wire → Subagent thread inheritance (v1/v2 API comparison) → MCP integration (auth + skill_dependencies) → Feature flag level 5 (50+, dependency normalization) → CodexErr 20 variant retry → Including OTel trace_safe/log_only.</li>
</ul>
